name: Matthew
chapters: A ten-an izuṛan n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ yellan si dderya n Sidna Dawed akk-d Sidna Ibṛahim :
Sidna Ibṛahim yeǧǧa-d Isḥaq, Isḥaq yeǧǧa-d Yeɛqub, Yeɛqub yeǧǧa-d Yahuda d watmaten-is.
Yahuda akk-d Tamaṛ ǧǧan-d Fares, akk-d Ziraḥ ; Fares yeǧǧa-d Ḥesrun, Ḥesrun yeǧǧa-d Aram.
Aram yeǧǧa-d Ɛaminadab, Ɛaminadab yeǧǧa-d Naḥsun, Naḥsun yeǧǧa-d Salmun.
Salmun d Raḥab ǧǧan-d Buɛaz, Buɛaz akk-d Rut sɛan-d Ɛubed, Ɛubed yeǧǧa-d Yassa.
Yassa yeǧǧa-d Sidna Dawed, Sidna Dawed yuɣal d agellid, yeǧǧa-d ɣer tmeṭṭut n Uryaḥ Sidna Sliman.
Sidna Sliman yeǧǧa-d Raḥabɛam, Raḥabɛam yeǧǧa-d Abiya, Abiya yeǧǧa-d Asaf,
Asaf yeǧǧa-d Yehucafat ; Yehucafat yeǧǧa-d Yihuram ; Yihuram yeǧǧa-d Ɛuzya ;
Ɛuzya yeǧǧa-d Yuṭam ; Yuṭam yeǧǧa-d Aḥaz ; Aḥaz yeǧǧa-d Ḥizeqya ;
Ḥizeqya yeǧǧa-d Mennac ; Mennac yeǧǧa-d Ɛamun ; Ɛamun yeǧǧa-d Yuciya ;
Yuciya yeǧǧa-d Yixunya akk-d watmaten-is, di lweqt i deg iqaldiyen wwin at Isṛail d imeḥbas ɣer tmurt n Babilun.
Mbeɛd lweqt n usgiǧǧi ɣer tmurtn Babilun, Yixunya yeǧǧa-d Calatyel ; Calatyel yeǧǧa-d Zurubabil .
Zurubabil yeǧǧa-d Abihud. Abihud yeǧǧa-d Ilyaqim ; Ilyaqim yeǧǧa-d Ɛazuṛ ;
Ɛazuṛ yeǧǧa-d Saduq ; Saduq yeǧǧa-d Yaxin ; Yaxin yeǧǧa-d Ilihud.
Ilhud yeǧǧa-d Ilɛazaṛ ; Ilɛazaṛ yeǧǧa-d Mattan ; Mattan yeǧǧa-d Yeɛqub.
Yeɛqub yeǧǧa-d Yusef, d Yusef agi i d argaz n Meryem i d-yeǧǧan Sidna Ɛisa i gețțusemman Lmasiḥ.

Si lweqt n Sidna Ibṛahim armi d lweqt n Sidna Dawed, ɛeddan ṛbeɛṭac n leǧyal. Ɛeddan daɣen ṛbeɛṭac n leǧyal si lweqt n Sidna Dawed armi d lweqt n usgiǧǧi ɣer tmurt n Babilun. Si lweqt-agi n usgiǧǧi armi d lweqt n Lmasiḥ ɛeddan daɣen ṛbeɛṭac n leǧyal.
Atan wamek i d-ilul Sidna Ɛisa : yemma-s Meryem tella tețwaxḍeb i yiwen wergaz ițțusemman Yusef. S tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, terfed s tadist uqbel aț-țeddu ț-țislit.
Yusef axḍib-is, yellan d argaz n ṣṣwab, ur yebɣi ara a ț-țicemmet, dɣa yeqsed ad imsefṛaq yid-es s tuffra.

Akken yețxemmim i waya, yers-ed ɣuṛ-es lmelk n Ṛebbi di targit yenna-yas : A Yusef ! A mmi-s n Dawed ! Ur țțaggad ara aț-țesɛuḍ Meryem ț-țameṭṭut-ik, axaṭer llufan yellan di tɛebbuṭ-is, yusa-yas-d s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
A d-tesɛu aqcic, a s-tsemmiḍ Ɛisa, axaṭer d nețța ara iselken lumma-s si ddnubat-nsen.
Ayagi akk yedṛa iwakken ad ițwakemmel wayen i d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi seg imi n nnbi Iceɛya :
Ațan tɛezrit aț-țerfed tadist, a d-tesɛu aqcic ad ițțusemmi Imanuwil yeɛni :« Ṛebbi yid-nneɣ.»
Mi i d-yuki Yusef, ixdem ayen i s-d-yenna lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi, yeqbel Meryem aț-țili ț-țameṭṭut-is ; yewwi-ț-id ɣer wexxam-is.
Meɛna ur ț-innul ara armi i d-tesɛa mmi-s iwumi isemma Ɛisa.
Sidna Ɛisa ilul di taddart n Bitelḥem, di tmurt n Yahuda di lweqt n ugellid Hiṛudus ameqqran, kra n imusnawen usan-d si cceṛq ɣer temdint n Lquds, iwakken ad steqsin :
anda ilul llufan-nni ara yilin d agellid n wat Isṛail ? Axaṭer nwala-d itri-ines si cceṛq, nusa-d a t-neɛbed.
Agellid Hiṛudus akk-d imezdaɣ n temdint n Lquds meṛṛa dehcen, yerwi lxaṭer-nsen mi slan s lexbaṛ-agi.
Hiṛudus yesnejmaɛ-ed akk lmuqedmin d lɛulama n wegdud, isteqsa-ten ɣef wemkan anda ara d-ilal Lmasiḥ ara d-yasen.
Nnan-as : Ahat di tmurt n Yahuda di taddart n Bitelḥem ! Axaṭer atan wayen i gura nnbi Mixa :
I kemm a taddart n Bitelḥem, ur telliḍ ara ț-țaneggarut ger temdinin n Yahuda, axaṭer seg-em ara d-iffeɣ ugellid ara yeksen at Isṛail agdud-iw.
Hiṛudus yessawel i imusnawen nni s tuffra, isteqsa-ten si melmi i walan itri-nni.
Dɣa iceggeɛ-iten ɣer Bitelḥem, yenna-yasen : Nadit lexbaṛ n ṣṣeḥ ɣef weqcic-agi, m'ara t-tafem, init-iyi-d iwakken ad ṛuḥeɣ ula d nekk a t-ɛabdeɣ.
Mi slan i ugellid, ṛuḥen. AAkken kan i ffɣen, walan itri-nni i ẓran di cceṛq yezwar, iteddu zdat-sen. MMi gewweḍ sennig wemkan anda yella weqcic-nni, yeḥbes.
Kecmen ɣer wexxam-nni, walan llufan akk-d yemma-s Meryem ; tɛeǧben s weqcic-nni dɣa seǧǧden zdat-es. FFsin tiyemmusin-nsen, fkan-as tirezfin : ddheb, lebxuṛ akk-d leɛṭeṛ ɣlayen.
Sidi Ṛebbi ixebbeṛ-iten-id di targit ur țțuɣalen ara ɣer Hiṛudus, dɣa uɣalen ɣer tmurt-nsen seg ubrid nniḍen.

Mi ṛuḥen, lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi idheṛ-as-ed i Yusef di targit, yenna-yas-ed :-- Kker, ddem aqcic akk-d yemma-s, rewlet ɣer tmurt n Maṣeṛ, qqimet dinna alamma nniɣ-ak-ed a d-tuɣaleḍ, axaṭer Hiṛudus ad iqelleb ɣef weqcic-agi iwakken a t-ineɣ.
Yusef ikker yewwi aqcic-nni akk-d yemma-s deg iḍ, yerwel ɣer tmurt n Maṣeṛ.
Yeqqim dinna armi yemmut Hiṛudus, iwakken ad idṛu wayen i d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi seg imi n nnbi Huceɛ : Ssawleɣ-as i Mmi a d-iffeɣ si tmurt n Maṣer.

Mi gwala Hiṛudus belli kelxen-t imusnawen-nni, ikcem-it zzɛaf d ameqqran, iceggeɛ ɣer taddart n Bitelḥem akk-d ț-țmura i s-d-izzin, ad nɣen arrac meṛṛa yesɛan si sin iseggasen d akessar, s wakken yella leḥsab i s-d-fkan imusnawen-nni.
Dɣa yețwakemmel wayen i d yenna nnbi Irmiya :
Yekker leɛyaḍ di taddart n Rama, nesla i imeṭṭawen d umeǧǧed, d Ṛaḥil i gețrun ɣef warraw-is, tegguma aț-țesbeṛ fell-asen, axaṭer mmuten.
Mi gemmut Hiṛudus ameqqran, lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi iweḥḥa-d i Yusef di targit mi gella di tmurt n Maṣer,
yenna-yas : Kker, ddem aqcic d yemma-s tuɣaleḍ ɣer tmurt n wat Isṛail, axaṭer wid yebɣan ad nɣen aqcic-nni, mmuten.
Yusef iddem aqcic-nni d yemma-s, yuɣal ɣer tmurt n wat Isṛail
Meɛna mi gesla belli d Aṛxilyus mmi-s n Hiṛudus, i gellan d agellid ɣef tmurt n Yahuda, yuggad. SSidi Ṛebbi iɛeggen-as-ed di targit, iṛuḥ ɣer tmurt n Jlili,
izdeɣ deg yiwet n taddart ițțusemman Naṣaret, iwakken ad yedṛu wayen i d-nnan lenbiya : Ad ițțusemmi Anaṣari.
Deg wussan-nni, iban-ed Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas, yețbecciṛ deg unezṛuf n tmurt n Yahuda,
iqqaṛ-ed : Tubet, beddlet tikli, axaṭer tagelda n igenwan tqeṛṛeb-ed.
Fell-as i d-immeslay nnbi Iceɛya mi d-yenna : Ț-țaɣect n win ițɛeggiḍen di lxali : Heggit abrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, ssemsawit iberdan-is.
Yeḥya yelsa llebsa yețwaxedmen s ccɛeṛ n welɣem, tabagust n weglim ɣef wammas-is, tamɛict-is d ibẓaẓ akk-d tament n lexla.
Imezdaɣ meṛṛa n temdint n Lquds, tamurt n Yahuda akk-d tmura i d-yezzin i wasif n Urdun, țțasen-d ɣuṛ-es
iwakken a d-qiṛṛen s ddnubat nsen, nețța yesseɣḍas-iten deg wasif nni n Urdun.
Mi gwala aṭas n at ifariziyen d isaduqiyen i d-ițasen ad țwaɣeḍsen, yenna-yasen : A ccetla n izerman, anwa i kkun isfaqen belli tzemrem aț-țrewlem i lḥisab i d-iteddun ?
Sbeggnet-ed s lecɣal-nwen belli tettubem, tbeddlem tikli.
Ur qqaṛet ara i yiman-nwen : « Sidna Ibṛahim d jeddi-tneɣ » ! Axaṭer, a wen-iniɣ : SSidi Ṛebbi yezmer a d-yefk dderya i Ibṛahim seg idɣaɣen-agi.
Ațan ihi tcaquṛt thegga ɣer izuṛan n ttjuṛ, yal ttejṛa ur d-nețțak ara lfakya lɛali, aț-țețwagzem, aț-țețwaḍeggeṛ ɣer tmes.
Nekk sseɣḍaseɣ-kkun deg waman iwakken aț-țetubem, lameɛna a d-yas yiwen yesɛan tazmert akteṛ-iw, ur uklaleɣ ara a s-fsiɣ ula d arkasen is. Nețța a kkun-yesseɣḍes s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ț-țmes.
Tazzert deg ufus-is, ad yebrez annar-is, ad ijmeɛ irden-is ɣer ikuffan, ma d alim a t-yesseṛɣ di tmes ur nxețți.
Sidna Ɛisa yusa-d si tmurt n Jlili ɣer wasif n Urdun iwakken a t- yesseɣḍes Yeḥya.
Yeḥya yugi, yenna-yas : D nekk i geḥwaǧen ad iyi- tesɣeḍseḍ, kečč tusiḍ-ed ɣuṛ-i iwakken a k-sɣeḍseɣ !
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Anef tura ! Akkagi i glaq a nexdem lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi ! DDɣa Yeḥya yunef-as.
Mi gețwaɣḍes Sidna Ɛisa, yeffeɣ-ed seg waman ; imiren kan ldin igenwan, yers-ed fell-as Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi s ṣṣifa n tetbirt.
Tekka-d yiwet n taɣect seg igenwan, tenna-d : «` Wagi d Mmi ameɛzuz, deg-s i gella lfeṛḥ-iw ! »
Imiren Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yewwi Sidna Ɛisa ɣer unezṛuf iwakken a t-ijeṛṛeb Cciṭan.
Mi guẓam ṛebɛin wussan d ṛebɛin wuḍan, yuɣal yelluẓ.
Iqeṛṛeb ɣuṛ-es Yeblis yenna-yas : Ma d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi i telliḍ, ini-yasen i yedɣaɣen-agi ad uɣalen d aɣṛum.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Yura di tira iqedsen : Mačči s weɣṛum kan ara iɛic wemdan, lameɛna s mkul awal i d-ițasen s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Cciṭan yewwi-t ɣer temdint n Lquds issers-it ɣef yixef n lǧameɛ iqedsen,

yenna-yas : Ma d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi i telliḍ, ḍeggeṛ iman-ik d akessar, anaɣ yura : Sidi Ṛebbi ad yefk lameṛ i lmalayekkat-is fell-ak, aa k-awint ger ifassen-nsent iwakken ad ḥadrent aḍar-ik ɣef yedɣaɣe n .
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Yura daɣen : Ur tețjeṛṛibeḍ ara Sidi Ṛebbi IIllu-inek .
Cciṭan yewwi-t daɣen ɣef wedrar ɛlayen, isken-as-ed tigeldiwin meṛṛa n ddunit d lɛaḍima-nsent, yenna-yas :
A k-tent-fkeɣ meṛṛa ma yella tseǧǧdeḍ zdat-i a yi-tɛebdeḍ.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Beɛɛed akkin fell-i a Cciṭan, axaṭer yura : Anagar Sidi Ṛebbi-inek ara tɛebdeḍ , i nețța kan iwumi ara tseǧdeḍ .
Dɣa Cciṭan iṭṭaxeṛ fell-as. Imiren usant-ed lmalayekkat ɣuṛ-es, iwakken a s-qedcent.
Mi gesla s Yeḥya yețwaḥbes, Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal ɣer tmurt n Jlili.
Iffeɣ si taddart n Naṣaret, iṛuḥ ad izdeɣ di Kafernaḥum ; ț-țamdint yyellan rrif n lebḥeṛ di leǧwahi n tmura n Zabulun d Nefṭali,
iwakken ad yedṛu wayen yenna nnbi Iceɛya :
A tamurt n Zabulun akk-d Nefṭali, a timura iqeṛben lebḥeṛ akkin i wasif n Urdun , a tamurt n Jlili i deg zedɣen leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail,
agdud-nni yezgan di ṭṭlam, iwala tafat tameqqrant, wid izedɣen di ṭṭlam n lmut, tceṛq-ed fell-asen tafat !
Seg imiren, Sidna Ɛisa yebda yețbecciṛ yeqqaṛ : Tubet, uɣalet-ed ɣer webrid, axaṭer tagelda n igenwan tqeṛṛeb-ed.
Mi gțeddu Sidna Ɛisa ɣef rrif n lebḥeṛ n Jlili, iwala sin iḥewwaten : SSemɛun ițțusemman Buṭrus akk-d gma-s Andriyus. Llan ṭeggiṛen icebbaken-nsen ɣer lebḥeṛ, țṣeggiḍen.
Yenna-yasen : Ddut-ed yid-i, a kkun-rreɣ d iṣeggaḍen n yemdanen.
Dɣa imiren kan, ǧǧan icebbaken nsen, ddan yid-es.
Mi gerna yelḥa kra, iwala sin watmaten nniḍen : Yeɛqub d Yuḥenna yellan d arraw n Zabadi. LLlan akk-d baba-tsen di teflukt, țxiḍin icebbaken-nsen.
Yessawel-asen, imiren kan ǧǧan dinna baba-tsen, taflukt-nni, ṛuḥen ddan yid-es.
Syenna, Sidna Ɛisa yekka-d tamurt n Jlili meṛṛa, yesselmad di leǧwameɛ n wat Isṛail, yețbecciṛ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n tgeldit n Ṛebbi, isseḥlay yal aṭan d yal leɛyubat n lɣaci.
Slan yis ula di tmurt n Surya meṛṛa ; țțawin-as-ed imuḍan i ghelken si mkul aṭan : wid ițwamelken, wid iwumi yețṛuḥu leɛqel akk-d wukrifen. Sidna Ɛisa isseḥla-ten akk.
D izumal n lɣaci i t-id-itebɛen si tmurt n Jlili, si ɛecṛa n temdinin-nni, si temdint n Lquds, si tmurt n Yahuda akk-d leǧwahi yellan agemmaḍ i wasif n Urdun.
Mi gwala annect-nni n lɣaci, Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer wedrar iqqim. Inelmaden-is qeṛṛben ɣuṛ-es,
D iseɛdiyen wid ițeddun s neyya, aaxaṭer tagelda n igenwan d ayla-nsen !
D iseɛdiyen wid ițrun, axaṭer ad țwaṣebbṛen !
D iseɛdiyen wid ḥninen, aaxaṭer ad weṛten tamurt i sen-iwɛed Sidi Ṛebbi !
D iseɛdiyen wid illuẓen, iffuden lḥeqq, axaṭer ad ṛwun !
D iseɛdiyen wid yesɛan ṛṛeḥma deg wulawen-nsen, aaxaṭer ad iḥunn fell-asen Sidi Ṛebbi !
D iseɛdiyen wid iwumi yeṣfa wul, axaṭer ad walin Sidi Ṛebbi !
D iseɛdiyen wid i d-isrusun talwit, aad țțusemmin d arraw n Sidi Ṛebbi !
D iseɛdiyen wid ițțuqehṛen ɣef lḥeqq, aaxaṭer ddewla igenwan d ayla-nsen !
D iseɛdiyen ara tilim, m'ara kkun-regmen, mm'ara tețwaqehṛem, m'ara xedmen deg-wen lbaṭel ɣef ddemma-w.
Feṛḥet, ilit di lfeṛḥ, axaṭer ṛṛezq-nwen d ameqqran deg igenwan, aakka i țwaqehṛen lenbiya i kkun-id izwaren.
D kunwi i d lmelḥ n ddunit, lameɛna ma tṛuḥ-as lbenna i lmelḥ, s wacu ara s-ț-id-nerr ? Yelha kan ma nḍeggeṛ-it ɣer beṛṛa a t-rekkḍen yemdanen.
D kunwi i ț-țafat n ddunit ; taddart yellan ɣef wudrar ulamek ara teffer !
Akken daɣen, ur nceɛɛel ara taftilt iwakken a ț-nɣumm s kra, meɛna a ț-nessers ɣef lmeṣbeḥ, iwakken aț-țfeǧǧeǧ i wid akk yellan deg wexxam.
Akka i glaq aț-țecceɛceɛ tafat-nwen zdat yemdanen, iwakken ad walin lecɣal-nwen ilhan, yerna ad ḥemden Baba-twen yellan deg igenwan.
Ɣuṛ-wat aț-țɣilem usiɣ-ed ad sseɣliɣ ayen i d-tenna ccariɛa d wayen i d-nnan lenbiya ! Ur d-usiɣ ara ad sseɣliɣ, lameɛna usiɣ-ed ad snekmaleɣ.
A wen-iniɣ tideț : skud mazal igenwan d lqaɛa, ula d yiwen wawal neɣ usekkil n ccariɛa ur imeḥḥu, alamma yedṛa wayen akk yuran deg-s.

Win ur nqudeṛ ara ula d yiwen n lameṛ amecṭuḥ n ccariɛa, yerna isselmad i wiyaḍ ad xedmen am nețța, ad ițwaḥseb d amecṭuḥ akk di tgelda n igenwan. MMa d win ixeddmen ayen i d-tenna ccariɛa, yerna isselmad i wiyaḍ ad xedmen akken, ad yili d ameqqran di tgelda n igenwan.
Axaṭer a wen-iniɣ, ma yella ur tuɣem ara awal i Sidi Ṛebbi akteṛ n wakken tețțaɣem awal i yimusnawen n ccariɛa d ifariziyen, ur tkeččmem ara tagelda n igenwan.
Teslam daɣen s leqwanen i d- ițțunefken i lejdud-nneɣ : Ur tneqqeḍ ara tamgeṛt, WWin ara yenɣen tamgeṛṭ, ad iɛeddi di ccṛeɛ, ad ițwaḥkem fell-as.

Ma d nekk a wen-iniɣ : kra n win ara izeɛfen ɣef gma-s, ad iɛeddi di ccṛeɛ. Win ara yinin i gma-s : « ay abuhal, » ad ibedd zdat wesqamu n ccraɛ. Win ara yinin i gma-s : « ay amehbul, » yuklal ad ikcem ɣer ǧahennama.
M'ara tțedduḍ aț-țefkeḍ lweɛda i Sidi Ṛebbi, temmektaḍ-ed zdat n wemkan n iseflawen belli gma-k iṭṭef-ak cceḥna,
eǧǧ dinna lweɛda-nni, tṛuḥeḍ uqbel aț-ḍelbeḍ ssmaḥ i gma-k, d wamek ara tefkeḍ lweɛda-k i Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ma yella iḍlem-ik yiwen, tedduklem di sin ɣer wexxam n ccṛeɛ, ɣiwel msefham kečč yid-es deg ubrid, m'ulac axṣim-ik a k-yawi ɣer lḥakem, lḥakem a k-yefk i wɛessas, aɛessas-nni, a k-yerr ɣer lḥebs.
A k-iniɣ tideț : ur d-țeffɣeḍ ara syenna alamma txellṣeḍ aṣurdi aneggaru n ṭṭlaba-inek.
Teslam belli qqaṛen-d : ur xeddem ara asekkak yeɛni zzna.
Lameɛna, nekkini a wen-d-iniɣ : win ara imuqlen tameṭṭut, imenna deg ul-is ad iznu yid-es, atan am akken izna yid-es.
Daymi ma yella ț-țiṭ-ik tayeffust i k-ițawin ɣer leḥṛam, qleɛ-iț, ḍeggeṛ-iț akkin fell-ak. Axaṭer axiṛ-ak a k-iṛuḥ yiwen si lemfaṣel-ik wala aț-țkecmeḍ s lekmal-ik ɣer ǧahennama.
Ma yella s ufus-ik ayeffus i txeddmeḍ leḥṛam, gzem-it, tḍegṛeḍ-t akkin fell-ak, axiṛ-ak a k-ixaṣ ufus wala ma tkecmeḍ s lekmal-ik ɣer ǧahennama.
Qqaṛen-d daɣen : Win ara yebrun i tmeṭṭut-is, a s-yefk lkaɣeḍ n berru .
Lameɛna nekkini a wen-iniɣ : win ara yebrun i tmeṭṭut-is, yili ur tezni ara, d nețța i ț-iwelhen ɣer zzna ma tezweǧ d wayeḍ. Daɣen win yuɣen tameṭṭut innebran, ula d nețța yezna.
Ayen txeddmem i Sidi Ṛebbi, ur t-id-sbegginet ara iwakken a kkun-walin medden, m'ulac ur tseɛɛum ara lfayda ɣer Baba-twen yellan deg igenwan.
M'ara tseddqeḍ, ur țberriḥ ara am akken xeddmen at sin wudmawen di leǧwameɛ neɣ deg iberdan, iwakken ad sɛun ccan ɣer yemdanen. A wen iniɣ tideț : d ayagi kan i d lfayda-nsen.
Ma d kečč m'ara tseddqeḍ, ilaq afus-ik ayeffus ur ițwali ara wayen ixeddem ufus-ik azelmaḍ ;
iwakken ssadaqa-inek aț-țeqqim di sser, akka ara tețwaqebleḍ ɣer Baba Ṛebbi yețwalin ayen txeddmeḍ di sser.
M'ara tețẓallam, ur xeddmet ara am at sin wudmawen iḥemmlen ad ẓallen s ibeddi di leǧwameɛ neɣ deg iberdan iwakken a ten-walin medden. AA wen-iniɣ tideț : d ayagi kan i d lfayda-nsen.
Ma d kečč m'ara tebɣuḍ aț-țẓalleḍ, ṛuḥ ekcem ɣer texxamt-ik, sekkeṛ tawwurt, tedɛuḍ di sser ɣer Baba Ṛebbi, nețța yețwalin ayen yellan di sser, a k-id-iqbel.
M'ara tețẓallam, ur sṭuqqutet ara lehduṛ am akken xeddmen at ddunit, ɣilen s lketṛa n imeslayen ara d țwaqeblen.
Ur ten-țɛanadet ara, axaṭer Baba Ṛebbi yeẓra d acu teḥwaǧem uqbel a s-t-tessutrem.
Atah wamek ilaq aț-țețẓallam : AA Baba-tneɣ yellan deg igenwan, iisem-ik ad ițwaqeddes,
lḥekma n tgeldit-ik a d-tass, llebɣi-k ad idṛu di lqaɛa aakken yedṛa deg igenwan.
Semmeḥ-aɣ ddnubat-nneɣ aakken i nețsamaḥ i wid i ɣ-iḍelmen.
Ssebɛed fell-aɣ ajeṛṛeb, ssellek-aɣ si tḥila n Cciṭan. AAxaṭer ɣuṛ-ek i tella tgeldit, ttazmert d lɛaḍima i dayem. Amin !
Ma yella tețsamaḥem i yemdanen ii wen-ixeddmen cceṛ, Baba Ṛebbi yyellan deg igenwan a wen-isameḥ uula i kunwi.
Lameɛna ma yella kkunwi ur tețsamaḥem ara i wiyaḍ, aatan Baba Ṛebbi ur a wen-ițsamaḥ aara ula i kunwi ddnubat-nwen.
Asmi ara tuẓummem, ur d tesbegginet ara iman-nwen tḥeznem am at sin wudmawen issexsaṛen udmawen-nsen iwakken a ten-țwalin yemdanen belli uẓamen. A wen-iniɣ tideț : d ayagi kan i d lfayda-nsen.
Ma d kečč, m'ara tuẓumeḍ, ssired udem-ik, tdehneḍ aqeṛṛuy-ik s rriḥa,
iwakken yiwen ur k-iɛeqqel belli tuẓameḍ. Ilaq ayagi ad iqqim gar-ak d Baba Ṛebbi ițwalin ayen yellan di sser, nețța a k-id-iqbel.
Ur ssexzanet ara igerrujen di ddunit anda ara ten-yečč ubeɛɛuc d ṣṣdiḍ, anda ara ten-akren wid ifettken leḥyuḍ.
Meɛna sxeznet axiṛ igerrujen deg igenwan anda ur llin ibeɛɛac d ṣṣdiḍ isserkuyen, anda ur zmiren ara imakaren ad fetken neɣ ad akren.
Axaṭer anda yella ugerruj-ik, dinna ara yili wul-ik.
Allen, ț-țiftilin n lǧețța, ma yella seḥḥant wallen-ik, aț-țilliḍ s lekmal-ik di tafat.
Ur țḥasabet ara wiyaḍ iwakken ur kkun-ițḥasab ula d yiwen.
Akken tețḥasabem wiyaḍ ara kkun-iḥaseb Sidi Ṛebbi. A wen-d-iktil s lkil s wayes tețțektilim i wiyaḍ.
Acuɣeṛ tețmuqquleḍ axeclaw yellan di tiṭ n gma-k, kečč ur nețwali ara tigejdit yellan di tiṭ-ik ?
Amek ara tiniḍ i gma-k : « Eǧǧ-iyi ad kkseɣ axeclaw-nni yellan di tiṭ-ik, » kečč yesɛan tigejdit di tiṭ-ik ?
A bu sin wudmawen ! Ekkes uqbel tigejdit yellan di tiṭ-ik, imiren aț-țwaliḍ amek ara d-tekkseḍ axeclaw yellan di tiṭ n gma-k.
Ur țțaket ara ayen yeṣfan i yeqjan, ur ṭeggiṛet ara tiɛeqcin ɣlayen zdat yilfan, m'ulac a ten ṛekḍen yerna a d-zzin fell-awen a kkun-gezren.
Ssutret, a wen-d-ițunefk ! Nadit, aț-țafem ! Sqerbebbet, a wen-d-ldin !
Axaṭer kra n win ara issutren, a s-d-ițțunefk ! Win ițnadin, ad yaf ! A s-d-teldi tewwurt i win ara isṭebṭben.
Anwa deg-wen ara yefken ablaḍ i mmi-s ma yessuter-as-d aɣṛum ?
Neɣ, anwa deg-wen ara yefken azrem i mmi-s ma yella yessuter-as-d aslem ?
Ma yella kunwi yellan d imcumen tessnem aț-țefkem ayen yelhan i warraw-nwen, amek Baba twen yellan deg igenwan ur d-ițțak ara ayen yelhan i wid ara s-t-issutren ?
Ihi, xedmet i wiyaḍ ayen i tebɣam a wen-t-xedmen i kunwi, axaṭer akka i ɣ-d-tweṣṣa ccariɛa n Musa akk-d lenbiya.
Kecmet si tewwurt iḍeyqen ! Axaṭer acḥal tewseɛ tewwurt, acḥal yeshel webrid yețțawin ɣer nnger, yerna aṭas i gețɛeddayen syenna.
Meɛna acḥal teḍyeq tewwurt, acḥal yewɛeṛ webrid yețțawin ɣer tudert yerna drus i gețɛeddayen syenna.
Ḥadret iman-nwen si lenbiya n lekdeb ! Țțasen-d ɣuṛ-wen am izamaren, nutni ɣer daxel d uccanen.
A ten-tɛeqlem s lecɣal-nsen. UUr d-nțekkes ara tiẓurin seg inijel, neɣ lexṛif seg isennanen.
Ttejṛa yelhan, tețțak-ed lfakya yelhan, yir ttejṛa tețțak-ed lfakya n diri.
Ttejṛa yelhan ur tezmir ara a d-tefk yir lfakya, akken daɣen yir ttejṛa ur tezmir ara a d-tefk lfakya yelhan.
Yal ttejṛa ur d-nețțak ara lfakya lɛali aț-țețwagzem, aț-țețwaḍeggeṛ ɣer tmes.
S wakka, s lecɣal-nsen ara tɛeqlem lenbiya n lekdeb.
Mačči d wid kan i yi-d-iqqaṛen : « A Sidi, a Sidi » ara ikecmen ɣer tgelda n igenwan, meɛna d wid ixeddmen lebɣi n Baba yellan deg igenwan.
Aṭas ara yi-d-yinin ass n lḥisab : « a Sidi a Sidi, s yisem-ik i nbecceṛ imeslayen s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi, s yisem-ik i nessufeɣ leǧnun, s yisem-ik i nexdem aṭas n lbeṛhanat ! »
Dɣa a sen-d-rreɣ : beɛdet akkin fell-i a wid ixeddmen cceṛ, ur kkun ssineɣ ara !
Akka, s kra n win yesmeḥsisen i wawal-iw yerna ixeddem-it, ițemcabi ɣer wemdan aɛeqli yebnan lsas n wexxam-is ɣef wezṛu.
Mi d-yuder Sidna Ɛisa seg udrar, aṭas n lɣaci i t-id-itebɛen.
Ataya yiwen wemdan ihelken lbeṛs yusa-d ɣuṛ-es, iseǧǧed zdat-es, yenna-yas : A Sidi, ma yella tebɣiḍ, tzemreḍ a yi-tseḥluḍ.
Sidna Ɛisa yessers afus-is fell-as, yenna-yas : Bɣiɣ ! Ili-k teḥliḍ ! IImiren kan iḥla wergaz-nni si lbeṛs-ines, yeṣfa weglim-is.

Dɣa Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ḥader aț-țeḥkuḍ ula i yiwen ɣef wayagi, meɛna ṛuḥ ɣer yiwen si lmuqedmin a k-iẓer, ad iwali belli teṣfiḍ, tefkeḍ lweɛda-nni n tezdeg s wayes i wen-d-yumeṛ nnbi Musa, iwakken ayagi a sen-yili d țbut.
Akken i gekcem Sidna Ɛisa ɣer temdint n Kafernaḥum, ataya yiwen umeqqran n lɛeskeṛ n Ṛuman iqeṛṛeb ed ɣuṛ-es, iḥellel-it, yenna yas :
A Sidi, aqeddac-iw yenṭer, atan iḍleq deg wexxam, yekref !
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ad ṛuḥeɣ a t-sseḥluɣ.
Ameqqran n lɛeskeṛ yerra-yas : A Sidi, ur uklaleɣ ara aț-țkecmeḍ ɣer wexxam-iw, meɛna ini-d kan yiwen n wawal, aqeddac-iw ad iḥlu.

Axaṭer nekk s yiman-iw akken sɛiɣ wid iḥekmen fell-i, i sɛiɣ wid yellan seddaw n lḥekma-w. Ad iniɣ i yiwen ṛuḥ ad iṛuḥ, ad iniɣ i wayeḍ aṛwaḥ a d-yas, ad iniɣ daɣen i uqeddac-iw : xdem aya, a t-ixdem.
Mi gesla Sidna Ɛisa imeslayen-agi itɛeǧǧeb, yenna i wid yellan dinna : A wen-iniɣ tideț, ger wat Isṛail meṛṛa ur ufiɣ ara liman am wagi.
A wen-iniɣ daɣen : aṭas ara d-yasen si cceṛq d lɣeṛb, ad ṭṭfen imukan ɣer tama n Ibṛahim, n Isḥaq akk-d Yeɛqub di tgelda n igenwan.
Meɛna aṭas seg wid i gɣilen ad weṛten tagelda ara yețwaḍeggṛen ɣer beṛṛa, ɣer ṭṭlam anda ara ilin imeṭṭawen, nndama tameqqrant akk-d weqṛac n tuɣmas.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna i umeqqran-nni n lɛeskeṛ : Ṛuḥ, imi tumneḍ atan wayen i tḍelbeḍ a k-id-yaweḍ ! DDi teswiɛt-nni, yeḥla uqeddac-is.
Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ ɣer wexxam n Buṭrus, yufa taḍeggalt n Buṭrus deg usu tuɣ-iț tawla.
Innul afus-is, dɣa teffeɣ-iț tawla-nni. Imiren kan tekker-ed, tebda tqeddec-asen.
Mi geɣli yiṭij, wwin-d i Sidna Ɛisa aṭas n yemdanen ițwamelken. S wawal-is, issufeɣ seg-sen leǧnun yerna yesseḥla imuḍan meṛṛa.
Ixdem ayagi iwakken ad ițwakemmel wawal i d-yenna nnbi Iceɛya : Yewwi leɛyub-nneɣ , iɛebba lehlakat-nneɣ .
Sidna Ɛisa mi gwala annect-nni n lɣaci yezzi-yas-d, yumeṛ i inelmaden-is ad zegren ɣer ugemmaḍ n lebḥeṛ.
Yiwen lɛalem n ccariɛa iqeṛṛeb ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, yenna-yas : A Sidi, anda teddiḍ ad dduɣ.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Uccanen sɛan lɣiṛan, ifṛax n igenni sɛan leɛcuc, ma d Mmi-s n bunadem ur yesɛi ara anda ara yessers aqeṛṛuy-is.
Yiwen seg inelmaden-is, yenna-yas : A Sidi, semmeḥ-iyi ad ṛuḥeɣ ad meḍleɣ baba.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Ddu yid-i eǧǧ wid yemmuten ad meḍlen lmegtin-nsen.
Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer teflukt, yezger lebḥeṛ yuɣal ɣer temdint n Kafernaḥum.
Wwin-as-d yiwen wukrif iḍleq ɣef wusu. MMi gwala liman n yemdanen-agi, yenna i wukrif-nni : Ur țțaggad ara a mmi, țwaɛeffan ak ddnubat-ik.
Llan dinna kra si lɛulama țxemmimen deg wulawen-nsen qqaṛen : Argaz-agi yekfeṛ !
Dɣa Sidna Ɛisa yeẓran ayen țxemmimen, yenna-yasen : Acuɣeṛ yir axemmem-agi deg ulawen-nwen ?
D acu i gsehlen a t-id-iniɣ : « Țwaɛfan-ak ddnubat-ik neɣ kker telḥuḍ » ?
Meɛna iwakken aț-țeẓrem belli Mmi-s n bunadem yesɛa tazmert di ddunit-agi ad yeɛfu ddnubat... YYenna i wukrif-nni : Ekker, ddem usu-inek tṛuḥeḍ ɣer wexxam-ik !
Imiren, argaz-nni yekker, iṛuḥ ɣer wexxam-is.
Mi walan ayagi, lɣaci akk ikcem-iten lxuf, țḥemmiden Sidi Ṛebbi, imi i d-ifka tazmert am tagi i yemdanen.
Mi gɛedda zdat wexxam anda țxelliṣen tabzert, ( leɣṛama ) Sidna Ɛisa iwala yiwen umekkas isem-is Matta, yenna-yas : Ddu-d yid-i ! IImiren kan ikker Matta, yedda yid-es.
Mi llan tețțen deg wexxam n Matta, aṭas n imekkasen akk-d yir imdanen i d-yusan, qqimen akk-d Sidna Ɛisa d inelmaden-is, tețțen yid-sen.
Ifariziyen mi walan ayagi nnan i inelmaden-is : Acuɣeṛ Ssid-nwen iteț akk-d imekkasen d yir imdanen ?
Sidna Ɛisa yesla i wayen i d nnan, yerra-yasen : Mačči d wid iseḥḥan i geḥwaǧen ṭṭbib, meɛna d wid ihelken.
Meyzet ɣef lmeɛna n wawal-agi yellan di tira iqedsen : D ulawen yeṣfan i bɣiɣ mačči d iseflawen n lmal. AAxaṭer ur d-usiɣ ara ad ssiwleɣ i iḥeqqiyen iwakken a d uɣalen ɣer webrid, meɛna i imednuben.
Inelmaden n Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas usan-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : Acuɣeṛ nukkni akk-d ifariziyen nețțuẓum ma d inelmaden-ik ur țțuẓumen ara ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Eɛni inebgawen n tmeɣṛa zemren ad ilin di leḥzen skud yella yesli yid-sen ? A d-yas wass i deg ara sen-ițwakkes yesli, imiren ad uẓummen.
Ur nezmir ara a nxiḍ tafaweț tajḍiṭ i uceṭṭiḍ aqdim, axaṭer tafaweț-nni tajḍiṭ aț-țejbed aceṭṭiḍ-nni aqdim, acerrig-nni ad innerni.

Ur nețɛemmiṛ ara daɣen iyeddiden iqdimen s ccṛab ajdid, neɣ m'ulac ad fellqen, ccṛab ad inɣel, iyeddiden ad xesṛen ; meɛna a nerr ccṛab ajdid deg yeddiden ijdiden, s wakkenni ccṛab d uyeddid ad țwaḥerzen.
Mazal Sidna Ɛisa ițmeslay, yusa-d yiwen n ccix n lǧameɛ iseǧǧed zdat-es, yenna-yas : Tura kan i temmut yelli, di leɛnaya-k as-ed aț-țserseḍ afus-ik fell-as, a d-teḥyu !
Sidna Ɛisa ikker yedda yid-es nețța d inelmaden-is.
Ațaya yiwet n tmeṭṭut yuḍnen ssiq tnac iseggasen aya, tekka-yas-d si deffir, tennul tacḍaṭ n ubeṛnus-is,
axaṭer teqqaṛ deg ul-is : « lemmer zemreɣ ad nnaleɣ ɣas ula ț-țacḍaṭ n ubeṛnus-is, ad ḥluɣ. »
Sidna Ɛisa yezzi ɣer deffir, mi ț-iwala yenna-yas : Ur țțaggad a yell-i, liman-im isseḥla-kkem. SSeg imiren tameṭṭut-nni teḥla.
Mi gewweḍ Sidna Ɛisa ɣer wexxam n ccix-nni, yufa lɣaci țmeǧǧiden, yerna nhewwalen meṛṛa. Yenna-yasen :
Ffɣet syagi, taqcict ur temmut ara, d iḍes kan i teṭṭes. DDɣa țmesxiṛen fell-as.
Mi ssufɣen lɣaci, ikcem, yeṭṭef-ed taqcict-nni seg ufus, dɣa tekker-ed.
Mi gṛuḥ Sidna Ɛisa syenna, tebɛen-t sin iderɣalen, țɛeggiḍen : A mmi-s n Sidna Dawed, ḥunn fell-aɣ !
Mi gewweḍ ɣer wexxam, iderɣalen-nni kecmen ɣuṛ-es, dɣa Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Tumnem belli zemreɣ a wen xedmeɣ ayen i yi-d-tessutrem ? RRran-as : Ih a Sidi numen !
Innul allen-nsen, yenna : A wen-ițwaxdem s wakken yella liman-nwen !
Sidna Ɛisa yessawel i tnac inelmaden-is, yefka-yasen tazmert s wayes ara ssufuɣen leǧnun, ara seḥluyen mkul aṭan d mkul lɛib.
Atnan yismawen n tnac-nni inelmaden n Sidna Ɛisa :Amezwaru d Semɛun ițțusemman Buṭrus akk-d gma-s Andriyus, Yeɛqub mmi-s n Zabadi akk-d gma-s Yuḥenna,
Filibus d Bartelmay, Suma akk-d Matta amekkas n tebzert, Yeɛqub mmi-s n Ḥalfi akk-d Taddi ;
Semɛun awaṭani, Yudas n Qeṛyut, win akken ixedɛen Sidna Ɛisa.
Sidna Ɛisa iceggeɛ tnac inelmaden-is, iweṣṣa-ten : Ur țṛuḥut ara ɣer tmura tibeṛṛaniyin, ur keččmet ara ɣer temdinin n at Samarya ;
ṛuḥet axiṛ ɣer wat Isṛail yellan am ulli iḍaɛen.
M'ara tețțeddum, țbecciṛet qqaṛet : « Ațaya tgeldit n igenwan tqeṛṛeb-ed » !
Sseḥlut imuḍan, sseḥyut-ed lmegtin, ssizdeget wid ihelken lbeṛs, ssufɣet leǧnun. Akken i wen-d-ițțunefk mbla idrimen, fket ula d kunwi mbla idrimen.
Ur țțawit yid-wen ama d ddheb, ama d lfeṭṭa, ama d idrimen ;
ur țțawit yid-wen agrab neɣ sin iqendyaṛ, ur țțawit irkasen neɣ aɛekkaz, axaṭer axeddam yuklal lqut-is.
Di yal tamdint neɣ taddart anda ara tkecmem, steqsit ma yella win ara yesṭerḥben yis-wen, qqimet ɣuṛ-es alamma tekkrem aț-țṛuḥem.
M'ara tkecmem ɣer yiwen wexxam, sellmet fell-asen,
ma sṭerḥben yis-wen, lehna-nwen aț-țers fell-asen ; ma yella ur sṭerḥben ara yis-wen, lehna-nwen aț-țeqqim ɣuṛ-wen.
M'ur qbilen ara ad sṭreḥben yis-wen neɣ ad semḥessen i wawal, ffɣet seg wexxam-nni neɣ si temdint nni, zwit ula d aɣebbaṛ seg iḍaṛṛen nwen.
A wen-iniɣ tideț : ass n lḥisab, imezdaɣ n temdint-agi ad țțuɛaqben akteṛ n temdinin n Sudum akk-d Gumuṛ.
Atan, a kkun-ceggɛeɣ am ulli ger wuccanen, ḥeṛcet ihi am izerman, sɛut neyya am yetbiren.
Ḥadret ɣef yiman-nwen, axaṭer kra n yemdanen a kkun-sbedden ɣer ccṛeɛ; yerna a kkun-wten s ujelkaḍ di leǧwameɛ-nsen.
Ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw, a kkun-sbedden zdat lḥekkam akk-d igelliden, iwakken am nutni am at leǧnas nniḍen, ad slen s yisem-iw.
M'ara kkun-ṭṭfen, ur țḥebbiṛet ara ɣef wamek ara temmeslayem, neɣ ɣef wayen ara d-tinim, imeslayen ara d-tinim, a wen-d-țțunefken di teswiɛt nni kan.
Axaṭer mačči d kunwi ara imeslayen, meɛna d Ṛṛuḥ n Baba Ṛebbi ara d-imeslayen seg-wen.
Amdan ad yefk gma-s ɣer lmut, ababat ad yefk mmi-s, dderya a d kkren ɣer imawlan-nsen, a ten ssiwḍen ɣer lmut.
A kkun-keṛhen irkul ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw, meɛna win ara yeṭṭfen alamma ț-țaggara, ad ițțusellek.
M'ara tețwaqehṛem deg yiwet n temdint, rewlet ɣer tayeḍ. A wen-iniɣ tideț : Mmi-s n bunadem a d-yuɣal uqbel a d-tekkem tudrin meṛṛa n tmurt n wat Isṛail.
Ulac anelmad yugaren ccix-is neɣ aqeddac yellan sennig umɛellem is.
Akken ițwaḥseb ccix ara yețwaḥseb unelmad-is. Daɣen akken yella wemɛellem ara yili uqeddac-is. MMa semman i bab n wexxam Balzabul iḥekkmen ɣef leǧnun, amek ur țsemmin ara akkenni i wat wexxam-is !
Ur ten-țaggadet ara ihi ! Axaṭer kra n wayen yeffren a d-iḍheṛ, kra n lbaḍna yellan a d-tban.
Ayen i wen-qqaṛeɣ deg iḍ, init-eț ɛinani deg wass, ayen slan imeẓẓuɣen-nwen di sser, berrḥet-eț deg iberdan.
Ur țțaggadet ara wid ineqqen lǧețța lameɛna ur zmiren ara ad nnɣen ṛṛuḥ, aggadet win izemren ad iḍeggeṛ ṛṛuḥ akk-d lǧețța ɣer ǧahennama.
Eɛni ur znuzun ara sin iẓiwcen s uṣuṛdi ? Meɛna ula d yiwen deg-sen ur d-iɣelli ɣer lqaɛa mbla lebɣi n Baba Ṛebbi.
Ula d anẓaden uqeṛṛuy-nwen țwaḥesben irkulli.
Ihi ur țțaggadet ara : tesɛam azal akteṛ n waṭas n iẓiwcen !
Kra win ara yessetḥin s yisem-iw zdat yemdanen, ula d nekk, ad ssetḥiɣ yis zdat Baba yellan deg igenwan.
Mi gweṣṣa tnac-nni inelmaden is, Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ syenna ad ibecceṛ di tudrin n leǧwahi-nni.
Yeḥya yellan di lḥebs, yesla s lecɣal n Lmasiḥ, iceggeɛ ɣuṛ-es inelmaden is iwakken a s-inin :
D kečč i d win akken ara d yasen neɣ ilaq-aɣ a nerǧu wayeḍ ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen-d : Ṛuḥet ssiwḍet-as lexbaṛ i Yeḥya ɣef wayen twalam d wayen teslam :
Iderɣalen țwalin, iquḍaren leḥḥun, ibeṛsiyen ṣeffun, iɛeẓẓugen sellen, lmegtin ḥeggun-d, lexbaṛ n lxiṛ ițțubecceṛ i yimeɣban.
D aseɛdi win iwumi ur țțiliɣ ara d sebba n tuccḍa ( ugur ) !
Mi ṛuḥen inelmaden-is, Sidna Ɛisa yebda iheddeṛ i lɣaci ɣef Yeḥya : D acu i tṛuḥem a t-id-teẓrem deg unezṛuf ? D aɣanim yețhuzzu waḍu ?
Ɣer wacu i tṛuḥem aț-țfeṛǧem ? ƔƔer yiwen wergaz yelsan llebsa ifazen ? Wid yețlusun llebsa ifazen, deg ixxamen n igelliden i țțilin.
Anwa i ɣer tṛuḥem a t-id-teẓrem ihi ? D yiwen n nnbi ? Țideț ih, d nnbi ! A wen-iniɣ : yugar nnbi.
Axaṭer d nețța i ɣef yura : Atan zewwreɣ zdat-ek amceggeɛ-inu, iwakken ad iheggi abrid zdat-ek.
A wen-iniɣ tideț : ulac mmi-s n tmeṭṭut yugaren Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas. Lameɛna, amecṭuḥ maḍi di tgelda n igenwan, meqqeṛ akteṛ-is.
Seg wussan-nni i deg ițbecciṛ Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas armi ț-țura, imdanen țnaɣen ɣef tgelda n igenwan, bɣan a ț-țkecmen s ddreɛ.
Axaṭer ccariɛa n Musa d lenbiya hedṛen-d ɣef tgelda n igenwan armi d lweqt n Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas.
Ma tebɣam aț-țfehmem, d nețța i d Ilyas-nni ilaqen a d-yas.
Ɣer wuɣuṛ ara metleɣ lǧil-agi ? Icuba ɣer warrac yeqqimen deg uzniq, ssawalen i warrac nniḍen, qqaṛen asen :
Newwet ajewwaq uur tecḍiḥem ara, nnecna cnawi n leḥzen uur tmeǧdem ara.
Axaṭer Yeḥya yusa-d, ur iteț ur itess, tennam : « izdeɣ-it uṛuḥani. »
Mmi-s n bunadem yusa-d, iteț, itess am wiyaḍ, teqqaṛem : «` Ițxemmim kan ɣef wučči ț-țissit, d amdakkul n imekkasen ixeddaɛen akk-d yir imdanen » lameɛna tideț tban-ed s lecɣal-is.
Sidna Ɛisa ibda ițlumu timdinin nni i deg ixdem aṭas n lbeṛhanat, axaṭer imezdaɣ-is ur d-uɣalen ara ɣer webrid n Ṛebbi.

A nnger-im a tamdint n Kurazim ! A nnger-im a tamdint n Bitsayda ! Axaṭer lemmer lbeṛhanat yedṛan deg-kkunt dṛan di temdinin n Sur akk-d Sidun, tili imezdaɣ-nsent aṭas aya i sburren tacekkaṛt n leḥzen, qqimen ɣef yiɣiɣden iwakken a d sbegnen belli ndemmen uɣalen-d ɣer ubrid n Ṛebbi.
Daymi, imezdaɣ n temdinin-agi ad țuɛaqben akteṛ n wid n temdinin n Sur akk-d Sidun.
Ula d kemm a tamdint n Kafernaḥum, tɣileḍ aț-țaliḍ ɣer igenni ? Xaṭi ! Aț-țețwaḍeggreḍ ɣer laxeṛt ; axaṭer lemmer di temdint n Sudum i dṛan lbeṛhanat i gedṛan ɣuṛ-em, tili mazal-iț ar ass-a !
Daymi, ass n lḥisab anegaru aț-țețțuɛaqbeḍ akteṛ n tmurt n Sudum.
Di lweqt-nni, Sidna Ɛisa inṭeq yenna : Ḥemmdeɣ-k a Baba Ṛebbi, a Bab igenwan d lqaɛa, imi i d tessekneḍ i imecṭaḥ ayen i teffreḍ i imusnawen d lɛuqal.
Ih a Baba Ṛebbi ! Ḥemmdeɣ-k imi d wagi i d lebɣi-k.
Baba Ṛebbi yerra-d kullec ger ifassen-iw. YYiwen ur yessin Mmi-s n Ṛebbi anagar Baba Ṛebbi ! Yiwen ur issin daɣen Baba Ṛebbi anagar Mmi-s akk-d win iwumi yebɣa Mmi-s a s-t-id-isken.
Aset-ed ɣuṛ-i a wid akk yeɛyan, iɛebban taɛekkumt ẓẓayen, a wen-fkeɣ talwit d westeɛfu.
Refdet ɣef tuyat-nwen azaglu inu tlemdem s ɣuṛ-i, axaṭer ul-iw yeččuṛ d ṛṛeḥma yerna d aḥnin, aț-țafem talwit i teṛwiḥin-nwen.
Yiwet n tikkelt, deg wass n ssebt yellan d ass n westeɛfu, Sidna Ɛisa izger igran n yirden. Inelmaden-is lluẓen, bdan țekksen-d tigedrin, tețțen-tent.
Ifariziyen mi ten-walan, nnan i Sidna Ɛisa : Acuɣeṛ inelmaden-ik xeddmen ayen iḥeṛmen deg wass n westeɛfu ?
Meɛna Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Eɛni ur teɣṛim ara wayen yexdem ugellid Dawed, mi gelluẓ nețța d wid yellan yid-es ?
Mi gekcem ɣer wexxam iqedsen, yečča seg weɣṛum-nni yețțunefken d lweɛda i lmuqedmin yerna yefka seg-s i imdukkal-is !
Eɛni ur teɣṛim ara di tektabt n ccariɛa n Musa belli lmuqedmin xeddmen ɣas akken d ass n westeɛfu yerna mačči d leḥṛam fell-asen ?
Ihi a wen-d-iniɣ : yella dagi win yugaren axxam iqedsen.
Lemmer tfehmem d acu i d lmeɛna n wawal-agi : D ulawen yesɛan ṛṛeḥma i bɣiɣ mačči d isflawen n lmal ttili ur tḥekkmem ara s lmut ɣef wid ur neḍlim ara !
Axaṭer Mmi-s n bunadem, d nețța i gḥekmen ɣef wass n westeɛfu.
Syenna, yerra ɣer yiwen n lǧameɛ,
yella dinna yiwen wergaz iwumi yekref ufus. Ifariziyen steqsan-t nnan-as : Eɛni iḥlel useḥlu deg wass n westeɛfu ? SSteqsan-t akka, iwakken a s-d-afen sebba s wayes ara t-sḍelmen.
Yerra-yasen : Anwa deg-wen yesɛan yiwet n tixsi kan, ma yella teɣli ɣer tesraft deg wass n westeɛfu ur ț-id-issalay ara ?
Eɛni tixsi teswa akteṛ n wemdan ? Ihi, yeḥlel a nexdem lxiṛ deg wass n westeɛfu !
Imiren Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas i wergaz-nni : Sleq-ed afus-ik ! YYeḍleq afus-is, dɣa yuɣal iṣeḥḥa am ufus nniḍen.
Ifariziyen ffɣen, ṛuḥen mcawaṛen wway gar-asen amek ara a s-d-afen sebba s wayes ara t-nɣen.
Mi gesla bɣan a t-nɣen, Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ syenna. Aṭas i geddan yid-es, yesseḥlay imuḍan meṛṛa,
Iwakken ad idṛu wayen yenna nnbi Iceɛya :
Ataya uqeddac-iw i xtaṛeɣ, win eɛzizen fell-i, deg-s i gella lfeṛḥ-iw. A d-yers Ṛṛuḥ-iw fell-as, ad ibecceṛ lḥeqq i leǧnas.
Ur iskkaray ara ccwal, ur ițɛeggiḍ ara, ur ițḥettim ara iman-is ɣef wiyaḍ.
Ur ițkemmil ara i uɣanim iceqqeqen, ur isnusuy ara taftilt yețmețțaten, alamma yesbedd lḥeqq.
Ass-nni kan, Sidna Ɛisa yeffeɣ-ed seg wexxam, iṛuḥ ad iqqim rrif n lebḥeṛ,
d izumal n lɣaci i s-d-izzin, dɣa yuli ɣer teflukt, yeqqim. LLɣaci ibedd ɣef rrif n lebḥeṛ,
nețța yebda isselmad-iten s lemtul iqqaṛ-asen : Yiwen ufellaḥ yeffeɣ ad izreɛ.
Mi gzerreɛ, ɣlin-as kra n iɛeqqayen rrif n webrid, usan-d igṭaṭ ( ifṛax igenni ) ččan-ten.
Kra iɛeqqayen nniḍen ɣlin deg wakal yeččuṛen d izṛa, mɣin-d s lemɣawla axaṭer ulac aṭas n wakal.
Mi gebda wezɣal, yezlef imɣan nni dɣa qquṛen, axaṭer ur sɛin ara izuṛan lqayen.
Kra iɛeqqayen nniḍen ɣlin ger isennanen. Isennanen-nni gman dɣa ɣummen-ten.
Meɛna kra iɛeqqayen ɣlin deg wakal yelhan : fkan-d tigedrin, ta tefka-d meyya iɛeqqayen, ta sețțin, tayeḍ tlatin.
Inelmaden-is qeṛṛben ɣuṛ-es, nnan-as : Acimi i sen-theddṛeḍ s lemtul ?
Yerra-yasen : Kunwi yețțunefk-awen-d aț țissinem lbaḍna n tgelda igenwan, ma d wiyaḍ, ur sen-d-ițțunefk ara.
Axaṭer win yesɛan a s-d-nernu alamma yella di tawant, ma d win ur nesɛi ara, a s-nekkes ula d ayen yesɛa.
Daymi i sen-țmeslayeɣ s lemtul, axaṭer țmuqulen ur țwalin, țḥessisen ur sellen, ur fehhmen.
S wakka, yedṛa-d yid-sen wayen i d-ixebbeṛ fell-asen nnbi Iceɛya : Aț-țsellem s imeẓẓuɣen-nwen, ur tfehhmem ara, aț-țmuqulem s wallen-nwen, ur tețwalim ara,

Imi agdud-agi qquṛen wulawen-nsen, qeflen imeẓẓuɣen- sen, qqnen allen-nsen, iwakken ur țwalin, ur sellen ; sseɣṛen ulawen nsen, ugin ad fehmen, axaṭer lemmer tuben, uɣalen-d ɣer webrid, tili sseḥlaɣ ten.
Ma d kunwi amarezg-nwen ! Axaṭer allen-nwen țwalint, imeẓẓuɣen nwen sellen.
Aql-i nniɣ-awen tideț, aṭas si lenbiya akk-d imdanen iḥeqqiyen i gebɣan ad walin ayen tețwalim, ur t-walan, ad slen ayen tsellem, ur t-slin.
A wen-d-iniɣ lmeɛna n lemtel n win izerrɛen :
yenna i iqeddacen-is : D Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas ! D nețța i-d iḥyan si ger lmegtin, daymi i gesɛa tazmert s wayes ixeddem lbeṛhanat.
D agellid Hiṛudus i gefkan yakan lameṛ ad qnen Yeḥya s ssnasel, a t-rren ɣer lḥebs. Ayagi ɣef sebba n Hiṛudyad, tameṭṭut n Filibus yellan d gma-s n Hiṛudus.
Axaṭer Yeḥya yella yeqqaṛ i Hiṛudus : D leḥṛam fell-ak aț-țesɛuḍ Hiṛudyad ț-țameṭṭut-ik !
Seg imiren, Hiṛudus ițqellib ad ineɣ Yeḥya, meɛna ikukra agdud n wat Isṛail axaṭer ḥesben-t akk d nnbi.
Ass n lɛid n umulli n Hiṛudus, yelli-s n Hiṛudyad tecḍeḥ zdat inebgawen, teɛǧeb-as aṭas i Hiṛudus,
armi i s-iɛuhed, a s-yefk ayen ara s-d tessuter.
Tweṣṣa-ț yemma-s a s-tini : Awi-yi-d ɣer dagi aqeṛṛuy n Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas deg uḍebsi.
Agellid Hiṛudus iḥzen aṭas, yemmuɣben, lameɛna ɣef ddemma n limin i geggul zdat inebgawen-is, issendeh a s-t-id-awin.
Iceggeɛ a s-d-gezmen aqeṛṛuy i Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas di lḥebs ;
wwin-as-t-id i teqcict-nni deg uḍebsi, nețțat tefka-t i yemma-s.
Inelmaden n Yeḥya usan-d ad awin lǧețța-s iwakken a ț-meḍlen ; imiren ṛuḥen ssawḍen-as lexbaṛ i Sidna Ɛisa.
Mi gesla s lexbaṛ n lmut n Yeḥya, Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer teflukt, iṛuḥ iwakken ad iḍeṛṛef iman-is. Akken slan lɣaci s wemkan i ɣer iteddu, ffɣen-d si tudrin, tebɛen-t ɣef wuḍar.
Sidna Ɛisa yers-ed si teflukt, iwala annect-nni n lɣaci, dɣa gezmen tasa-s ; ibda yesseḥlay imuḍan-nsen.
Mi geɣli yiṭij, inelmaden n Sidna Ɛisa qeṛṛben ɣuṛ-es, nnan-as : Amkan-agi yexla yerna iṛuḥ lḥal ; ini-yasen i lɣaci-yagi ad ṛuḥen ɣer tudrin iwakken a d-aɣen ayen ara ččen.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Acuɣeṛ ara ṛuḥen, fket-asen kunwi ad ččen !
Nnan-as : Ɣuṛ-nneɣ anagar xemsa teḥbulin n weɣṛum, d sin iselman ( iḥutiwen ).
Yenna i lɣaci ad qqimen ɣef leḥcic, iddem-ed xemsa teḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum d sin iselman-nni, yerfed allen-is ɣer igenni, iḥmed Ṛebbi. YYebḍa aɣṛum-nni, yefka-t i inelmaden-is, feṛqen-t i lɣaci.
Sčan akk armi ṛwan, yerna inelmaden-is ččuṛen-d tnac iqecwalen n wayen i d-yegran.
Ad ilin azal n xemsa alaf n yergazen i geččan, mbla tilawin d warrac.
Imiren kan, Sidna Ɛisa iḥṛes inelmaden-is ad alin ɣer teflukt iwakken ad zwiren ɣer rrif nniḍen n lebḥeṛ, ma d nețța ad yerr lɣaci-nni.
Mi ṛuḥen akk lɣaci-nni, yuli weḥd-es ɣer wedrar iwakken ad iẓẓall, dɣa yeɣli-d yiḍ.
Taflukt-nni tella di tlemmast n lebḥeṛ, lemwaji kkatent-eț axaṭer aḍu iqubel-iten-id.
Acuɣeṛ inelmaden-ik țṛuẓun lɛadda i d-ǧǧan lejdud-nneɣ ? M'ara qeṛṛben ɣer lqut, ur ssiriden ara ifassen-nsen.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : I kunwi, acimi tețṛuẓum lumuṛat n Ṛebbi iwakken aț-țxedmem ṛṛay nwen ?
Yak d ṣṣeḥ, Ṛebbi yenna-d : Qadeṛ baba-k d yemma-k, yyenna daɣen : Kra win ara ineɛlen baba-s d yemma-s, ad yețwaḥkem fell-as s lmut.
Meɛna kunwi teqqaṛem : win yefkan d lweɛda i Ṛebbi ayen s wacu i glaq ad iɛiwen imawlan-is,
am akken d imawlan-is i gɛawen. SS wakka, tbeddlem awal n Ṛebbi, iwakken aț-țesɛeddim lɛaddat-nwen.
Ay at sin wudmawen ! Ț-țideț i d-yenna nnbi Iceɛya mi d-icar fell awen :
Y enna-d Ṛebbi : agdud-agi, ițɛuzzu-yi s wawal kan, ma d ul-is yebɛed fell-i.
L eɛbada-nsen ur tesɛi ara azal axaṭer sselmaden ayen i d-yekkan seg imdanen.
Dɣa Sidna Ɛisa yessawel i lɣaci yenna-yasen : Semḥesset-d tfehmem ayagi :
mačči d ayen i gkeččmen seg imi n wemdan i t-yessamasen, meɛna d ayen i d-ițeffɣen seg-s.
Inelmaden qeṛṛben-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : Ifariziyen iɣaḍ-iten lḥal ɣef yimeslayen-nni i d-tenniḍ !
Yerra-yasen : Yal imɣi ur yeẓẓi ara Baba yellan deg igenwan, ad yețwaqleɛ.
Anfet-asen, d iderɣalen iteṭṭfen afus i iderɣalen nniḍen ; ma yella aderɣal yeṭṭef afus i wayeḍ, ad ɣlin i sin ɣer tesraft.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna i inelmaden-is : Eɛni ula d kunwi txuṣṣ-ikkun lefhama ?
Ur tefhimem ara belli ayen ikeččmen seg imi n wemdan yețțara ɣer uɛebbuḍ-is, mbeɛd ad ițwadeggeṛ ɣer beṛṛa.
Lameɛna ayen i d-iteffɣen seg imi itekk-ed seg wul, d annect-agi i gessenǧasen amdan.
Axaṭer seg wul i d-tekken : yir ixemmimen, timegṛaḍ, zzna ( lɛaṛ ), yir tikli, tukerḍa, cchada n ẓẓuṛ akk-d rregmat.
Atan wayen yessenǧasen amdan, mačči d učči mbla tarda n ifassen i t-yessenǧasen.
Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ syenna, iteddu ɣer tmura n Sur akk-d Sidun.
Ifariziyen d isaduqiyen qeṛṛben ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, ssutren-as lbeṛhan iwakken a t-jeṛben.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : M'ara yeɣli yiṭij, twalam igenni d azeggaɣ, teqqaṛem ad yelhu lḥal.
Akken daɣen taṣebḥit, teqqaṛem a d-iwwet ugeffur ( lehwa ) axaṭer yella usigna. AAmek ! Tesnem aț-țfehmem lḥala n igenni, ur tezmirem ara aț-țfehmem licaṛat yeɛnan lweqt-agi !
Lǧil am agi ijehlen ixedɛen Ṛebbi, yessutur lbeṛhan ! Meɛna ur as-d-ițțunefkay ara lbeṛhan nniḍen anagar win n nnbi Yunes ! DDɣa iṛuḥ, yeǧǧa-ten.
Mi zegren agummaḍ i lebḥeṛ, inelmaden-is țțun ur wwin ara yid-sen aɣṛum.
Dɣa Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Ḥadret iman-nwen seg iɣes n temtunt n ifariziyen d isaduqiyen !
Inelmaden xemmemen deg yiman-nsen, nnan : Ahat imi ur d-newwi ara yid-nneɣ aɣṛum i ɣ-d-yenna akka !
Sidna Ɛisa iẓra ɣef wacu i țxemmimen yenna-yasen : A wid i gxuṣṣen di liman ! Tɣilem imi ur d-tewwim ara aɣṛum i wen-d-nniɣ akka ?
Mazal ur tefhimem ara ? Eɛni tețțum yakan xemsa teḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum i bḍiɣ i xemsa alaf n yergazen ? D wacḥal n tqecwalin i d-yegran ?
Ur tecfim ara daɣen ɣef sebɛa teḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum i bḍiɣ i ṛebɛa alaf n yemdanen, d wacḥal n tqecwalin i d-yegran ?
Amek akka ur tefhimem ara belli mačči ɣef weɣṛum i wen-d-țmeslayeɣ ? ḤḤadret iman-nwen seg iɣes n temtunt n ifariziyen d isaduqiyen !
Imiren inelmaden-is fehmen belli mačči ɣef yiɣes n temtunt i sen-d-immeslay, lameɛna ad ḥadren iman-nsen ɣef wuselmed n ifariziyen d isaduqiyen.
Mi gewweḍ Sidna Ɛisa ɣer tmurt n Qiṣarya n Filibus, isteqsa inelmaden is, yenna-yasen : D acu i-d-qqaṛen medden ɣef Mmi-s n bunadem ?
Rran-as : Kra qqaṛen d Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas, wiyaḍ qqaṛen d nnbi Ilyas, wiyaḍ daɣen d nnbi Irmiya neɣ d yiwen ger lenbiya.
Buṭrus yerra-yas : Kečč d Lmasiḥ, Mmi-s n Sidi Ṛebbi yeddren !
Mi ɛeddan sețța wussan, Sidna Ɛisa yewwi yid-es Buṭrus, Yeɛqub akk-d gma-s Yuḥenna, ulin ɣer wedrar eɛlayen, anda qqimen ḍeṛfen iman-nsen.
Taswiɛt kan ibeddel ṣṣifa zdat sen, walan udem-is yețfeǧǧiǧ am yiṭij, llebsa-s tuɣal ț-țamellalt, tecceɛceɛ am tafat.
A ten-aya dehṛen-asen-d Sidna Musa akk-d Sidna Ilyas țmeslayen d Sidna Ɛisa.
Buṭrus inṭeq yenna i Sidna Ɛisa : A Sidi, yelha ma neqqim dagi, ma tebɣiḍ ad sbeddeɣ tlata iqiḍunen : yiwen i kečč, yiwen i Sidna Musa, wayeḍ i Sidna Ilyas.
Mazal-it ițmeslay mi d-ters yiwet n tagut ițfeǧǧiǧen tɣumm-iten. Si tagut-nni tenṭeq-ed yiwet n taɣect, tenna-d : Wagi d Mmi eɛzizen deg-s i gella lfeṛḥ-iw, smeḥsiset-as !
Mi slan i taɣect-nni, inelmaden ikcem-iten lxuf, ɣlin ɣef wudem.
Sidna Ɛisa yessers afus-is fell-asen, yenna-yasen : Ur țțaggadet ara, kkret !
Mi refden allen-nsen, ur walan ula d yiwen nniḍen anagar Sidna Ɛisa.
Akken i d-țadren seg wedrar, Sidna Ɛisa yumeṛ-iten yenna-yasen : Ur qqaṛet i yiwen wayen akka twalam alamma yeḥya-d Mmi-s n bunadem si ger lmegtin.
Inelmaden steqsan Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : Iwacu imusnawen n ccariɛa qqaṛen-d : « Ilaq a d-yas nnbi Ilyas d amezwaru ? »
Yerra-yasen : Ț-țideț ilaq a d-yas nnbi Ilyas d amezwaru, iwakken ad iseggem kullec.
Ma d nekk aql-i nniɣ awen-d : nnbi Ilyas yusa-d yakan, lameɛna imdanen ur t-ɛqilen ara yerna xedmen deg-s akken i sen ihwa. Akka daɣen ara inɛețțab Mmi-s n bunadem ger ifassen-nsen !
Inelmaden fehmen imiren belli ițmeslay-asen-d ɣef Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas.
Mi wwḍen ɣer wanda llan lɣaci, yiwen wergaz iqeṛṛeb-ed ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, yeɣli ɣef tgecrar zdat-es yenna yas :
A Sidi, ḥunn ɣef mmi ! Atan kkaten-t imsigman, yenneɛtab aṭas ! Acḥal d abrid i geɣli ɣer tmes neɣ ɣer waman,
wwiɣ-t-id i inelmaden-ik, meɛna ur zmiren ara a t-sseḥlun.
Inṭeq Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : A lǧil ijehlen, iɛewjen ! Ar melmi ara yiliɣ yid-wen ? Ar melmi ara wen-sebṛeɣ ? Awit-iyi-d aqcic-agi ɣer dagi !
Sidna Ɛisa iɛeggeḍ ɣef lǧen-nni, yumeṛ-as ad iffeɣ seg weqcic-nni. Imiren kan, aqcic-nni yeḥla.
Mi llan inelmaden iman-nsen, qeṛṛben ɣer Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : Acuɣeṛ nukkni ur nezmir ara a t-nessufeɣ ?

Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Axaṭer txuṣṣem di liman ! Aql-i nniɣ-awen, lemmer tesɛim liman annect n uɛeqqa n uxerḍel, tili a s tinim i wedrar-agi, qleɛ iman-ik sya ɣer dihin ad iqleɛ. Ulac wayen iwumi ur tețțizmirem ara.
Sṣenf-agi n leǧnun țeffɣen anagar s tẓallit d uẓummu.
Mi llan di tmurt n Jlili, Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Mmi-s n bunadem ad ițțusellem ger ifassen n yemdanen ;
a t-nɣen, meɛna ass wis tlata a d-iḥyu si ger lmegtin. DDɣa inelmaden ikcem-iten leḥzen d ameqqran.
Mi gewweḍ Sidna Ɛisa akk-d inelmaden-is ɣer Kafernaḥum, imekkasen n lǧameɛ qeṛṛben-d ɣer Buṭrus nnan-as : Eɛni Ssid-nwen ur ițxelliṣ ara tabzert n lǧameɛ ?

Yerra-yasen Buṭrus : Ih, ad ixelleṣ ! Imiren kan mi gekcem Buṭrus ɣer wexxam, Sidna Ɛisa iluɛa-t, yenna-yas : D acu twalaḍ a Buṭrus ? Anwa i glaqen ad ixelleṣ tabzert i igelliden n ddunit-a , d arraw-nsen neɣ d ibeṛṛaniyen ?
Buṭrus yerra-yas : D ibeṛṛaniyen ! DDɣa Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas-d : Ihi arraw n tmurt ur țxelliṣen ara !

Lameɛna iwakken ur ten-yețɣaḍ ara lḥal, ṛuḥ, ḍeggeṛ tasennaṛt ɣer lebḥeṛ, aslem ( aḥewtiw ) amezwaru ara d-teṭṭfeḍ, ldi-yas imi, aț-țafeḍ deg-s aṣurdi n lfeṭṭa, efk-asen-t d lexlaṣ n tebzert-nneɣ nekk yid-ek.
Di lweqt-nni, inelmaden n Sidna Ɛisa qeṛṛben ɣuṛ-es nnan-as : -- Anwa i d ameqqran di tgelda n igenwan ?
Sidna Ɛisa yessawel i yiwen weqcic isbedd-it di tlemmast-nsen, yenna :
A wen-d-iniɣ tideț ; ma yella ur d-tuɣalem ara ɣer webrid, m'ur teqbilem ara aț-țilim .am arrac imecṭuḥen, ur tkeččmem ara ɣer tgelda n igenwan !
Daymi, win ara yeṣṣemẓin iman-is am weqcic-agi amecṭuḥ, d nețța ara yilin d ameqqran di tgelda n igenwan.
Kra win ara yestṛeḥben s weqcic am-agi ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw, yis-i i gesṭerḥeb.
Win ara yesseɣlin di ddnub ula d yiwen seg imecṭuḥen-agi yumnen yis-i, axiṛ-as a s-cudden aɣaṛef n tsirt ɣer temgeṛṭ-is, a t-ḍeggṛen ɣer lebḥeṛ ad iɣṛeq.
A tawaɣit n ddunit-a, imi qwant tsebbiwin n tuccḍa ! Axaṭer tisebbiwin n tuccḍa ulamek ur d-țilint ara. Meɛna a nnger n win ara yilin d sebba-nsent.

Ma yella d afus-ik neɣ d aḍaṛ-ik ara k-yesseɣlin di ddnub, gzem-iten, ḍeggeṛ-iten akkin fell-ak, axiṛ-ak aț-țiliḍ di ddunit d aɛiban wala aț-țesɛuḍ sin iḍaṛṛen neɣ sin ifassen, aț-țwaḍeggṛeḍ ɣer tmes ur nxețți.
Ma yella daɣen ț-țiṭ-ik ara k-yawin ɣer ddnub, qleɛ-iț ḍeggeṛ-iț akkin fell-ak ; axiṛ-ik aț-țiliḍ di ddunit s yiwet n tiṭ wala aț-țesɛuḍ snat wallen, aț- țwaḍeggṛeḍ ɣer tmes n ǧahennama.
Ɣuṛ-wat aț-țḥeqṛem yiwen seg imecṭuḥen-agi axaṭer aql-i nniɣ awen-t : lmalayekkat-nsen deg igenwan, zgant daymen zdat Baba Ṛebbi.
[ Axaṭer Mmi-s n bunadem yusa-d ad isellek wid i gḍaɛen ! ]
D acu twalam ? Ma yella win yesɛan meyya wulli dɣa teɛṛeq-as yiwet deg-sent, ur ițțaǧa ara țesɛa uțesɛin-nni nniḍen di lexla iwakken a d-inadi ɣef tin i s-iɛeṛqen ?
A wen-iniɣ tideț : ma yufa-ț, ad ifṛeḥ yis akteṛ n țesɛa uțesɛin-nni nniḍen ur neɛṛiq ara.
Akken daɣen Baba-twen Ṛebbi yellan deg igenwan, ur yebɣi ara a s-iṛuḥ ula d yiwen seg imecṭuḥen-agi.
Ma yella twalaḍ gma-k idneb, ṛuḥ ṭṭef-it weḥd-es, nhu-t. Ma yuɣ-ak awal, atan trebḥeḍ-ed gma-k !
Meɛna ma igumma a k-d-isel, awi yiwen neɣ sin yemdanen yid-ek, iwakken ad ilin d inigan m'ara tefru temsalt , akken i d-tenna ccariɛa.
Ma yugi a sen-isel, ssiweḍ tamsalt ɣer tejmaɛt n watmaten, m'ur iḥess ara ula i tejmaɛt-nni, ḥseb-it am akken d akafriw neɣ d amekkas axabit !
A wen-iniɣ tideț : ayen akk ara teqnem neɣ iwumi ara tserrḥem di ddunit, ad yețwaqbel deg igenwan.
A wen-iniɣ daɣen s tideț : ma yella sin seg-wen ddukklen iwakken ad ssutren kra di tẓallit, Baba Ṛebbi yellan deg igenwan, a sen-t-id-yefk.
Axaṭer anda ara dduklen sin neɣ tlata s yisem-iw, ad ḥedṛeɣ gar-asen !
Imiren Buṭrus iqeṛṛeb ɣuṛ-es yenna-yas : A Sidi, acḥal n tikkal ilaq ad semḥeɣ i gma ma yeḍlem-iyi, armi d sebɛa n tikkal ? SSidna Ɛisa yerra yas :
Xaṭi ! Ur k-d-nniɣ ara alamma d sebɛa tikkal, meɛna alamma d sebɛin iberdan sebɛa tikkal !
Daymi, tagelda n igenwan tețțemcabi ɣer yiwen ugellid yebɣan ad imḥasab nețța d iqeddacen-is.
Akken yebda leḥsab, wwin-as-d yiwen uqeddac iwumi yețțalas imelyunen.
Imi ur yesɛi ara s wacu ara ixelleṣ, agellid-nni ifka lameṛ a ten-zzenzen d aklan, s nețța s tmeṭṭut-is, s warraw-is d wayen akk yesɛa, iwakken ad ixelleṣ ṭṭlaba-ines.
Aqeddac-nni yeɣli ɣer iḍaṛṛen n ugellid, iḥellel-it yenna-yas : «` A Sidi, ṣṣbeṛ kra wussan, ad uɣaleɣ a k-xellṣeɣ ayen akk i yi tețțalaseḍ. »
Imi i t-iɣaḍ aṭas, agellid-nni isumeḥ-as ṭṭlaba-ines iserreḥ-as ad iṛuḥ.
Akken kan i d-iffeɣ uqeddac-nni immuger-ed yiwen seg imdukkal-is ixeddmen yid-es, iwumi yețțalas kra n iṣurdiyen. IIkker ɣuṛ-es yeṭṭef-it si temgeṛṭ yeqqaṛ-as : « Err-iyi-d ayen i k țțalaseɣ ! »
Amdakkel-is yeɣli ɣer iḍaṛṛen-is iḥellel-it, yenna-yas : « Sṣbeṛ kra n wussan, ad uɣaleɣ a k-xellṣeɣ ! »
Lameɛna ur yeqbil ara ad isbeṛ, yerra-t ɣer lḥebs, alamma tețwaxelleṣ ṭṭlaba-ines.
Iqeddacen nniḍen mi walan ayen yedṛan, iɣaḍ-iten lḥal, dɣa ṛuḥen ṣṣawḍen lexbaṛ i ugellid.
Agellid iceggeɛ ɣer uqeddac-nni akken a d-yas, dɣa yenna-yas : « A yir amdan ! Mi tețḥellileḍ deg-i, eɛni ur k-sumḥeɣ ara akk ṭṭlaba-inek ?
Acuɣeṛ ihi ur as-tsumḥeḍ ara i wemdakkel-ik akken i k-sumḥeɣ nekkini ? »
Mi gekfa lewṣayat-agi, Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ si tmurt n Jlili ɣer tmurt n Yahuda ɣer leǧwahi n wasif n Urdun.
Aṭas n lɣaci i t-iḍefṛen ɣer dinna, dɣa yesseḥla wid akk ihelken.
Kra ifariziyen qeṛṛben-d ɣuṛ-es iwakken a t-jeṛben, nnan-as : Eɛni ccariɛa-nneɣ tsumeḥ-as i wergaz ad yebru i tmeṭṭut-is ɣef yal sebba yellan ?
Yerra-yasen : Ur teɣṛim ara ayen i d-teqqaṛ ccariɛa : di tazwara Sidi Ṛebbi ixleq-ed argaz ț-țmeṭṭut,
yenna-d : AArgaz ad yeǧǧ baba-s d yemma-s, iiwakken ad iɛic nețța ț-țmeṭṭut-is, ddɣa di sin yid-sen, ad uɣalen d yiwen.
S wakka ur llin ara d sin, meɛna uɣalen d yiwen. Ur as-ilaq ara ihi i wemdan ad ifṛeq ayen yesdukkel Sidi Ṛebbi !
Nnan-as : Acuɣeṛ ihi Sidna Musa yeǧǧa yaɣ-d lqanun belli m'ara yebru wergaz i tmeṭṭut-is, a s-yefk lkaɣeḍ n berru ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Ɣef ddemma n wulawen-nwen yeqquṛen i wen-iserreḥ nnbi Musa aț-țebrum i tilawin-nwen. Meɛna di tazwara mačči akka i gella lḥal.
Ma d nekk a wen-d-iniɣ : kra n win ara yebrun i tmeṭṭut-is yili ur tezni ara, iwakken ad yaɣ tayeḍ, d nețța i geznan !
Inelmaden nnan-as : Ma yella akka i d lḥala n wergaz ɣer tmeṭṭut, ulac lfayda di zzwaǧ !
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Mačči d imdanen meṛṛa i gzemren ad qeblen aselmed agi lameɛna anagar wid iwumi i d-ifka Sidi Ṛebbi lefhama i gzemren ad qeblen annect-agi.

Aṭas n sebbat i gqeḍɛen zzwaǧ i wemdan. Llan wid i d-ilulen si tɛebbuṭ n yemma-tsen ur sɛin ara ddunit, wiyaḍ d imdanen i sen-ț-ikksen. LLlan daɣen wid iḥeṛmen iman-nsen ɣef zwaǧ, ɣef ddemma n tgelda n igenwan. Win i gzemren ad ifhem aselmed agi a t-yefhem !
Kra yemdanen țawin-d i Sidna Ɛisa arrac imecṭuḥen iwakken ad issers afus-is fell-asen a ten-ibarek, meɛna inelmaden-is țțaran-ten.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Anfet-asen i warrac a d-asen ɣuṛ-i, ur sen-qeṭṭɛet ara abrid, axaṭer tagelda n igenwan thegga i nutni akk-d wid yellan am nutni !
Yessers afus-is fell-asen, iburek iten, dɣa iṛuḥ syenna.
Imiren yiwen wergaz iqeṛṛeb-ed ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, yenna-yas : A Sidi, d acu i yi-ilaqen a t xedmeɣ n wayen yelhan iwakken ad sɛuɣ tudert n dayem ?

Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Acuɣeṛ i yi-testeqsayeḍ ɣef wayen yelhan ? AAnagar yiwen i gelhan ! Ma tebɣiḍ aț-țesɛuḍ tudert-agi, xdem lumuṛat yellan di ccariɛa. YYerra-yas-ed weqcic-nni : Anwi i d lumuṛat ara tebɛeɣ ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Ur tneqqeḍ ara tamgeṛṭ, ur tzennuḍ ara, ur tețțcehhideḍ ara s ẓẓur, ur tețțakkṛreḍ ara,
qadeṛ baba-k d yemma-k, tḥemmleḍ lɣiṛ-ik am yiman-ik !
Aqcic-nni yerra-yas-ed : Ayagi akk xedmeɣ-t, d acu i yi-ixuṣṣen ?

Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ma tebɣiḍ ihi aț-țkemleḍ deg webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi , ṛuḥ, zzenz akk ayen i tesɛiḍ, tefkeḍ idrimen-nni i yimeɣban, s wakka aț-țesɛuḍ agerruj deg igenwan ! Imiren as-ed, aț-țedduḍ yid-i.
Mi gesla i yimeslayen-agi, ilemẓi-nni yeḥzen aṭas dɣa iṛuḥ, axaṭer d ameṛkanti ameqqran i gella.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna i inelmaden-is : A wen-iniɣ s tideț : iwɛeṛ aṭas i umeṛkanti ad ikcem ɣer tgelda n igenwan !
A wen-iniɣ daɣen : ma yella iwɛeṛ i welɣem ad iɛeddi di tiṭ n tissegnit, iwɛeṛ akteṛ i umeṛkanti ad ikcem ɣer tgelda n igenwan !
Mi slan i imeslayen-agi, inelmaden-is dehcen aṭas, nnan-as : Anwa i gzemren ad ițțusellek ihi ?
Dɣa Sidna Ɛisa imuqel-iten, yenna : Imdanen s yiman-nsen ur zmiren ara, meɛna Sidi Ṛebbi yezmer i kullec.
Buṭrus inṭeq, yenna-yas : Aql-aɣ nukkni neǧǧa kullec iwakken a k-netbeɛ, d acu ara yedṛun yid-nneɣ ?

Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : A wen-iniɣ s tideț, asm'ara d-ḥyun lmegtin ɣer ddunit tajḍiṭ, asm'ara yeqqim Mmi-s n bunadem ɣef wukersi n lḥekma di lɛaḍima-s, ula d kunwi yeddan yid-i, aț-țeqqimem di tnac yid-wen ɣef yikersiyen n lḥekma iwakken aț-țḥasbem tnac n leɛṛac n wat Isṛail.

Yerna, kra win ara yeǧǧen ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw axxam-is neɣ atmaten-is, yessetma-s neɣ baba-s, yemma-s, arraw-is neɣ tiferkiwin-is, ad as-d-yețțunefk akteṛ n wayen yeǧǧa, yerna a t-id-tṣaḥ tudert n dayem.
Aṭas seg wid yellan d imezwura ad uɣalen d ineggura, aṭas daɣen seg wid yellan d ineggura ad uɣalen d imezwura.
Imsefham yid-sen a ten-ixelleṣ s twizeț n lfeṭṭa i wass, dɣa iceggeɛ-iten ɣer tfeṛṛant-is.
Iffeɣ daɣen ɣef țesɛa n ṣṣbeḥ, iwala wiyaḍ qqimen di beṛṛa mbla lxedma.
yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet ula d kunwi aț-țxedmem di tfeṛṛant-iw, a wen-fkeɣ ayen tuklalem.
Dɣa ṛuḥen. Bab n tfeṛṛant-nni yexdem akken daɣen ɣef tnac n wass akk-d ț-țlata n tmeddit.
Iffeɣ daɣen ɣef lxemsa n tmeddit, yufa wiyaḍ qqimen di beṛṛa yenna-yasen : Acuɣeṛ i tețɣimim ass kamel mbla lxedma ?
Nnan-as-ed : Ulac win i ɣ-d-ifkan lxedma ! YYenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet ula d kunwi aț-țxedmem di tfeṛṛant-iw !
Mi i d-tewweḍ tmeddit, bab n tfeṛṛant yenna i lewkil-is : Ssiwel i ixeddamen txellseḍ-ten yiwen yiwen. Zwir seg ineggura tessegriḍ imezwura.
Usan-d wid yebdan lxedma ɣef lxemsa n tmeddit, ixelleṣ-iten s ssuma n yiwen wass,
mi i d-tewweḍ nnuba n wid ibdan lxedma ɣef țesɛa n ṣṣbeḥ, ɣilen ad țwaxelṣen akteṛ n wiyaḍ, meɛna ula d nutni țwaxellṣen s ssuma n yiwen wass.
Mi ṭṭfen lexlaṣ-nsen, iɣaḍ-iten lḥal, nnan i bab n tfeṛṛant-nni :
Ixeddamen-agi ineggura xedmen yiwet n ssaɛa kan, txellṣeḍ ten am nukkni yenɛețțaben ass kamel i wezɣal ?
Meɛna yerra-yas i yiwen seg sen : Ay amdakkel, acuɣeṛ i k-iɣaḍ lḥal ? Eɛni ur nemsefham ara ɣef lexlaṣ-nwen ad yili tawizeț n lfeṭṭa d ssuma n yiwen wass ?
Awi lḥeqq-ik tṛuḥeḍ. I ma yella bɣiɣ ad fkeɣ i uneggaru annect i k-fkiɣ i kečč ?
Eɛni ur zmireɣ ara ad xedmeɣ akken bɣiɣ s idrimen-iw ? Neɣ iɣaḍ-ik lḥal imi ur lliɣ ara d amecḥaḥ ?
S wakka aṭas ineggura ara yuɣalen d imezwura, aṭas n imezwura ara yuɣalen d ineggura.
Mi țeddun ad alin ɣer temdint n Lquds, Sidna Ɛisa iṭṭef tnac-nni inelmaden-is weḥḥed-sen, yenna yasen :
Ḥesset-ed : atan a nali ɣer temdint n Lquds, anda ara ițțusellem Mmi-s n bunadem ger ifassen n lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d lɛulama n ccariɛa. Ad ḥekmen fell-as s lmut,
Mi qṛib ad kecmen ɣer temdint n Lquds, wwḍen ɣer yiɣil n uzemmur yellan tama n taddart n Bitfaji, Sidna Ɛisa iceggeɛ sin inelmaden-is,
yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet ɣer taddart yellan ɣer zdat, dinna aț-țafem taɣyult akk-d mmi-s, brut-asen-d, tawim-iyi-ten-id.
Ma yella win i wen-d-yennan kra, init-as : d Ssid-nneɣ i ten-iḥwaǧen, imiren a sen-d-iserreḥ.
Ayagi yedṛa-d am akken i t-id yenna nnbi Zakarya di tira iqedsen :
Init i wat wedrar n Siyun : AA taya ugellid-nwen iteddu-d ɣuṛ-wen s wannuz, irkeb-ed ɣef weɣyul amecṭuḥ mmi-s n teɣyult.
Inelmaden-nni ṛuḥen, xedmen ayen i sen-d-yenna Sidna Ɛisa.
Wwin-d taɣyult-nni d mmi-s, sburren-asen llebsa-nsen, dɣa srekben Sidna Ɛisa.
Aṭas n lɣaci ssan iceṭṭiḍen-nsen deg ubrid, wiyaḍ țṛuẓun-d tiseḍwa si ttjuṛ, țessun-tent ula d nutni deg ubrid.
Lɣaci yezwaren zdat Sidna Ɛisa d wid i t-id-iḍefṛen, țɛeggiḍen s lfeṛḥ qqaṛen : Ḥusana i mmi-s n Sidna Dawed ! Ițțubarek win i d-yusan s yisem n Sidi Ṛebbi ! Ḥusana deg imukan eɛlayen.
Mi gekcem Sidna Ɛisa ɣer temdint n Lquds, imezdaɣ meṛṛa nhewwalen, qqaṛen : Anwa-t wagi ?
Lɣaci-nni țțaran-asen : D Sidna Ɛisa, nnbi-nni n taddart n Naṣaret i d-yusan si tmurt n Jlili !
Sidna Ɛisa yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ iqedsen, iqecceɛ meṛṛa wid yețțaɣen znuzun dinna deg ufrag n lǧameɛ. Iqleb-asen ṭṭwabel i wid yețbeddilen idrimen akk-d wid yeznuzun itbiren.
dɣa yenna-yasen : Yura : Axxam-iw ad ițțusemmi d axxam n tẓallit, ma d kunwi terram-t d lɣaṛ n imakaren.
Di lǧameɛ-nni, qeṛṛben-d ɣuṛ-es iderɣalen d iquḍaren, dɣa yesseḥla ten.
Lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lɛulama n ccariɛa rfan mi walan leɛǧayeb i gxeddem akk-d warrac ițɛeggiḍen di lǧameɛ : Ḥusana i mmi-s n Sidna Dawed !

Imiren nnan i Sidna Ɛisa : Tesliḍ d acu i d-qqaṛen ? SSidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Sliɣ ih ! Eɛni ur teɣṛim ara imeslayen-agi yuran di tira iqedsen : Tessufɣeḍ-ed leḥmadi seg imawen n warrac akk-d wid n llufanat iteṭṭḍen .
Imiren yeǧǧa-ten dinna, yeffeɣ si temdint, iṛuḥ ɣer taddart n Bitanya, dinna i gensa.
Azekka-nni taṣebḥit mi d-yuɣal ɣer temdint, Sidna Ɛisa yelluẓ ;
iwala yiwet n tneqleț rrif n webrid, iqeṛṛeb ɣuṛ-es, ur yufi deg-s acemma anagar afriwen ; dɣa yenna-yas : Seg wass-a, ur tețțuɣaleḍ ara a d-tefkeḍ lfakya ! IImiren kan, taneqleț-nni teqquṛ.
Inelmaden-is mi walan ayagi tɛeǧben, nnan : Amek akka teqquṛ tneqleț-agi deg yiwet n teswiɛt ?

Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : A wen-iniɣ tideț, ma yella tesɛam liman ur tețcukkum ara, aț-țizmirem aț-țxedmem akteṛ n wayen xedmeɣ i tneqleț-agi ! AAț-ținim i wedrar-agi qleɛ iman-ik syagi tḍeggṛeḍ iman-ik ɣer lebḥeṛ, ayagi a d-yedṛu !
Ayen akk ara tessutrem s liman di tẓallit, a wen-d-ițunefk !
Sidna Ɛisa yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ ibda yesselmad. Lmuqedmin akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud qeṛṛben ɣuṛ-es nnan-as : Ansi i k-d-tekka tezmert s wayes i txeddmeḍ ayagi ? Anwa i k-d-yefkan tazmert-agi ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : A wen-fkeɣ asteqsi ula d nekk, yiwen kan ; ma tǧawbem-iyi-d, ula d nekk a wen-iniɣ ansi i yi-d-tekka tezmert-agi.
Aɣḍas n Yeḥya, s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi i d-ikka neɣ s ɣuṛ yemdanen ? DDɣa bdan qqaṛen wway gar-asen : Ma nenna-yas seg igenwan, a ɣ-d-yini acuɣeṛ ihi ur tuminem ara yis,
ma nenna-yas daɣen seg imdanen, nuggad lɣaci-agi, axaṭer ḥesben akk Yeḥya d nnbi.
Dɣa nnan-as i Sidna Ɛisa : Ur neẓri ara ! YYerra-yasen : Ihi ula d nekk ur wen-d-qqaṛeɣ ara ansi i yi-d-tekka tezmert s wayes i xeddmeɣ ayagi !
D acu twalam ? Yiwen wergaz yesɛa sin warraw-is, yenṭeq ɣer umezwaru, yenna-yas : A mmi, ṛuḥ aț-țxedmeḍ ass-agi di tfeṛṛant-iw.
Yerra-yas : Ur țṛuḥuɣ ara ! MMeɛna yuɣal yendem, iṛuḥ ad ixdem di tfeṛṛant.
Yenna-yas daɣen i mmi-s wi sin ad iṛuḥ ad ixdem, yerra-yas-d : Ih a baba ad ṛuḥeɣ ! MMeɛna ur iṛuḥ ara.
Anwa deg sen i gxedmen lebɣi n baba-s ? RRran-as-ed : D amezwaru a Sidi ! SSidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : A wen-d-iniɣ tideț, imekkasen imakaren akk-d yir tilawin a kkun zwiren ɣer tgelda n igenwan !

Axaṭer Yeḥya yusa-d ɣuṛ-wen yesken-awen-d abrid n tideț, meɛna ur t-tuminem ara ; ma d imekkasen d yir tilawin umnen yis. Yerna ɣas akken twalam ayagi, ur d-tuɣalem ara ɣer webrid teggumam aț-țamnem yis.

A wen-d-rnuɣ daɣen lemtel nniḍen : yella yiwen umɛellem, yeẓẓa tafeṛṛant, izzi-yas-ed s zzeṛb, yeɣza amkan i tɛeṣṣart n tẓurin, yebna taɛrict i tɛessast, issekra tafeṛṛant-is i ixemmasen, imiren iṛuḥ ɣer lɣeṛba.
Mi d-yewweḍ lweqt n tẓurin, iceggeɛ iqeddacen-is ɣer ixemmasen nni iwakken a s-d-fken amur-is n lɣella.
Sidna Ɛisa imeslay-asen-d daɣen s lemtel, yenna-yasen : --
Tagelda n igenwan tcuba ɣer yiwen ugellid i gxedmen tameɣṛa i mmi-s.
Iceggeɛ iqeddacen-is ad ssiwlen i wid yețwaɛeṛden, meɛna ugin a d-asen.
Yerna iceggeɛ-asen iqeddacen nniḍen a sen-inin : Heggaɣ imensi, zliɣ izgaren-iw d wakraren-iw, kullec ihegga, aset-ed ɣer tmeɣṛa !
Meɛna widak-nni ițwaɛeṛḍen ur s-fkin ara azal, yal yiwen yelha d ccɣel-is, wa iṛuḥ ɣer yiger-is, wa ɣer ssuq-is.
Agellid-nni ikcem-it zzɛaf d ameqqran, dɣa iceggeɛ lɛeskeṛ-is nɣan iqettalen-nni, sseṛɣen tamdint-nsen.
Imiren yenna i iqeddacen-is : Imensi n tmeɣṛa ihegga, meɛna widak-nni ițwaɛeṛḍen ur t-uklalen ara ;
ṛuḥet ɣer izenqan, tɛeṛḍem-d ɣer tmeɣṛa wid akk ara tafem deg iberdan.
Iqeddacen-nni ṛuḥen ɣer izenqan jemɛen-d wid akk ufan, ama d amcum ama d win yelhan, s wakka axxam n tmeɣṛa yeččuṛ-ed d lɣaci.
Mi d-ikcem ugellid ad iwali inebgawen, iwala yiwen wergaz ur yelsi ara llebsa n tmeɣṛa.
yenna-yas : Ay amdakkel, amek i d-tkecmeḍ ɣer dagi mbla llebsa n tmeɣṛa yețwaheggan i yinebgawen ? AArgaz-nni yessusem, ur yufi d acu ara s-yini.
Agellid-nni yefka lameṛ i iqeddacen-is yenna-yasen : Cuddet-as ifassen d iḍaṛṛen, tḍeggṛem-t ɣer ṭṭlam n beṛṛa, anda llan imeṭṭawen d nndama tameqqrant.
Axaṭer aṭas i gețwaɛerḍen, meɛna drus ara yețwaqeblen.
Imiren ṛuḥen ifariziyen ad mcawaṛen amek ara d-sseɣlin Sidna Ɛisa deg wawal.

Ceggɛen-as kra seg inelmaden-nsen akk-d kra si terbaɛt n Hiṛudus, nnan-as : A Sidi, neẓra-k d bab n lḥeqq i telliḍ, tesselmadeḍ iberdan n Ṛebbi s tideț, ur tuggadeḍ ula d yiwen, ur txeddmeḍ ara lxilaf ger yemdanen.
Ini-yaɣ-d ihi d acu twalaḍ : d leḥlal neɣ d leḥṛam a nxelleṣ tabzert ( leɣṛama ) i ugellid Qayṣar (yestɛemṛen tamurt-nneɣ) ?
Meɛna Sidna Ɛisa yeẓran ayen i țxemmimen, yenna-yasen : Ay at sin wudmawen ! Acuɣeṛ tebɣam a yi-tjeṛbem ?
Seknet-iyi-d aṣurdi s wacu țxelliṣen tabzert ! FFkan-as-d aṣurdi n lfeṭṭa.
Dɣa isteqsa-ten : Udem akk-d tira yellan deg uṣuṛdi-agi, wi ten-ilan ?
Rran-as : N Qayṣer ! IImiren yenna-yasen : Erret ihi i Qayṣer ayen yellan n Qayṣer, terrem i Ṛebbi ayen yellan n Ṛebbi !
Mi slan i imeslayen-agi, wehmen, dɣa ṛuḥen ǧǧan-t.
Ass-nni, isaduqiyen i gellan d imdanen ur nețțamen ara s ḥeggu n lmegtin, usan-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, steqsan-t, nnan-as :
A Sidi, Sidna Musa yenna-d : ma yella yemmut wergaz d amengur, ilaq gma-s ad yaɣ taǧǧalt-nni iwakken a d-isɛu yid-es dderya ara iweṛten gma-s-nni yemmuten.
Imiren Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq ɣer lɣaci d inelmaden-is yenna yasen :
Lɛulama d ifariziyen sselmaden ccariɛa n Musa.
Xedmet ayen akk ara wen-d-inin, meɛna ur xeddmet ara wayen xeddmen nutni, axaṭer ayen i d-qqaṛen ur t-xeddmen ara.
Țcuddun tiɛekkmin ẓẓayen țɛebbin-tent ɣef tuyat n yemdanen, ma d nutni țțagin a ten-ɛiwnen ula s yixef n iḍuḍan-nsen.
Ayen akk i xeddmen, xeddmen-t iwakken a ten-walin yemdanen, țɛelliqen tiḥerztin ț-țeɣṛisin ɣef yiman-nsen.
Ḥemmlen ad ṭṭfen imukan imezwura ama di tmeɣṛiwin ama di leǧwameɛ, ḥemmlen m'ara țsellimen fell-asen yemdanen di tejmuyaɛ akk-d leswaq ;
ḥemmlen daɣen m'ara sen-qqaṛen yemdanen : « a Sidi ».
Ma d kunwi ɣuṛ-wat a wen qqaṛen : « a Sidi » axaṭer d atmaten i tellam yerna yiwen kan i d Ssid-nwen.
Ur qqaṛet ula i yiwen di ddunit : « Baba » axaṭer anagar yiwen i d baba-wen, d Baba Ṛebbi yellan deg igenwan.
Ur qebblet ara aț-țețțusemmim : « imeqqranen » axaṭer anagar yiwen i d ameqqran : d Lmasiḥ !
Ameqqran deg-wen, d win iqeddcen fell-awen.
Kra n win issimɣuṛen iman-is a d-yers, ma d win issimẓiyen iman is ad ițwarfed !
A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ay at sin wudmawen ! AAxaṭer tmeddlem tiwwura n igenwan i yemdanen, ur tkeččmem kunwi, ur tețțaǧǧam ad kecmen wid yebɣan !

A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ay at sin wudmawen ! Axaṭer tettețțem ayla n tuǧǧal, tesṭuqqutem awal di tẓallit-nwen iwakken a d-tesbegnem iman-nwen telham. Ɣef wayagi, lɛiqab i kkun-ițṛaǧun d ameqqran !

A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ay at sin udmawen ! Tețnadim timura, tzeggrem lebḥuṛ iwakken a d-rebḥem ɣas ula d yiwen ɣer ddin i tettabaɛem; mi t-id-rnam ɣuṛ-wen, tețțaram-t d win yuklalen ǧahennama akteṛ-nwen !

A nnger-nwen ay iderɣalen iteṭṭfen afus i wiyaḍ ! Teqqaṛem : « Ma yella yeggul bunadem s lǧameɛ iqedsen, ɣas yeḥnet ulac fell-as ; ma d win ara yegallen s ddheb yellan di lǧameɛ, ur s-ilaq ara ad iḥnet, ilaq ad iṭṭef di limin-ines ! »
Ay imehbal, ay iderɣalen ! D acu i gesɛan azal, d ddheb neɣ d lǧameɛ i gețțarran ddheb-nni d imqeddes ?
Teqqaṛem daɣen : « Win ara yegallen s udekkan n iseflawen, ɣas iḥnet ulac fell-as, ma d win ara yegallen s iseflawen nni, ur s-ilaq ara ad iḥnet, ilaq ad iṭṭef di limin-ines.»
Ay iderɣalen ! Anwa i gesɛan azal, d iseflawen neɣ d udekkan-nni i gerran iseflawen d imqedsen ?
Win ara yegallen s udekkan n iseflawen, yeggul s udekkan-nni d wayen akk yersen fell-as.
Mi d-iffeɣ si lǧameɛ iqedsen, Sidna Ɛisa iteddu ad iṛuḥ. Inelmaden-is qeṛṛben-d ɣuṛ-es, țwehhin-as iwakken ad yerr ddehn-is ɣer cbaḥa akk-d lebni n lǧameɛ iqedsen.
Meɛna Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Twalam annect-agi meṛṛa ? A wen-iniɣ tideț : ur d-yețɣimi wezṛu ɣef wayeḍ, kullec ad ihudd.
Yuli ɣer yiɣil n uzemmur iqqim weḥd-es, inelmaden-is usan-d a t-steqsin nnan-as : Melmi ara d-idṛu wayen i d tenniḍ, amek ara neɛqel ass ameqqran n tuɣalin-ik akk-d taggara n ddunit ?
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Ɣuṛ-wat win ara wen-ikellxen !
Axaṭer aṭas n yemdanen ara d-yasen s yisem-iw, a d-inin : «` D nekk i d Lmasiḥ ! » Yerna ad kellxen aṭas n lɣaci.
Aț-țeslem s ṭradat ț-țegrawliwin, meɛna ɣuṛ-wat a kkun-iffeɣ leɛqel. Ur țțaggadet ara, axaṭer ilaq a d-yedṛu wannect-a, meɛna mazal mačči d nnger n ddunit.
Agdud ad yennaɣ d wayeḍ, tagelda aț-țeẓdem ɣef tayeḍ, a d-yili laẓ d zzelzlat deg waṭas n imukan.
Ayagi akk ara yedṛun, ad yili am lqeṛḥ amezwaru n tmeṭṭut iṭṭfen addud.
Imiren a kkun-fken iwakken aț-țețțuɛetbem, a kkun-nɣen, leǧnas meṛṛa a kkun-keṛhen ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw.
Aṭas ara yeǧǧen liman-nsen, ad msekṛahen, ad țemyexdaɛen wway gar-asen.
A d-nnulfun lenbiya n lekdeb, ad ɣuṛṛen aṭas n lɣaci,
simmal ad yețzad lbaṭel, simmal lmaḥibba n waṭas n yemdanen aț-țenqes.
Ma d win ara yeṭṭfen di liman-is alamma ț-țaggara, ad ițțusellek.
Lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ ɣef tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi, ad ițțubecceṛ di ddunit meṛṛa iwakken leǧnas ad slen yis. Imiren ara d-taweḍ taggara n ddunit.
M'ara twalim deg wemkan iqedsen win iwumi semman lmuṣiba issengaren i ɣef d-ihḍeṛ nnbi Danyel ; ( win ara yeɣṛen taktabt-agi n nnbi Danyel ad ifhem !)
Imiren, wid ara yilin di tmurt n Yahuda ilaq ad rewlen ɣer idurar,
win ara yilin s ufella n ssqef, ur ilaq ara ad ikcem ɣer wexxam iwakken a d-iddem lqecc-is,
win daɣen ara yilin di lexla, ur ilaq ara ad yuɣal ɣer deffir iwakken a d-iddem abeṛnus-is !
A tawaɣit n tilawin ara yilin s tadist akk-d țid ara yessuṭuḍen deg ussan-nni !
Dɛut ɣer Ṛebbi iwakken tarewla agi-nwen ur d-tdeṛṛu ara di ccetwa neɣ deg wass n westeɛfu.
Axaṭer « ad yili yiwen n leɛtab ur d-nelli seg wasmi d-tebda ddunit ar ass-a yerna ur ițțuɣal ara a d-yili ! »
Lemmer ur issenqes ara Sidi Ṛebbi deg wussan-nni, tili yiwen ur imenneɛ, meɛna ɣef ddemma n wid yextaṛ ara yeṣṣenqes i wussan-agi.
Imiren ma yenna-yawen-d yiwen : Lmasiḥ atan dagi neɣ atan, dihin, ur țțamnet ara !
Axaṭer a d-asen wid ara yerren iman-nsen d Lmasiḥ neɣ d lenbiya, ad xedmen lbeṛhanat d leɛǧayeb akk-d licaṛat iwakken ad kelxen ma zemren ula d wid yextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
ma nnan-awen Lmasiḥ atan deg unezṛuf, ur țṛuḥut ara, neɣ ma nnan-awen walit, atan deg umkan-ihin yeffren, ur țțamnet ara.
Axaṭer asm'ara d-yas Mmi-s n bunadem, ad yili am tafat n lbeṛeq m'ara d-tfeǧǧeǧ si cceṛq alamma d lɣeṛb.
Anda yella umuṛḍus ( lǧifa ), dinna ara nnejmaɛen igudar.
M'ara ɛeddin wussan-nni n leɛtab, iṭij ad inqes, aggur ur d-ițțak ara tiziri-ines, itran a d-ɣlin seg igenni, tizmar n igenwan ad rgagint.
Imiren a d-iban Mmi-s n bunadem deg igenni, leɛṛac meṛṛa n ddunit ad meǧden, a d wwten deg idmaren-nsen m'ara walin Mmi-s n bunadem deg igenwan, yusa-d ɣef wusigna s tezmert akk-d lɛaḍima tameqqrant.
A d-iceggeɛ lmalayekkat-is ad berrḥent s ṣṣut n lbuq, a d snejmaɛent wid akk yextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, si yal amkan, seg ixef n ddunit ɣer wayeḍ.
Meyzet ɣef lemtel n tneqleț : mi lqaqit isegman-is, fsan wafriwen-is, teḥsam yewweḍ-d unebdu !
Ula d kunwi, m'ara twalim yewweḍ-ed wannect-agi meṛṛa, ḥṣut belli Mmi-s n bunadem ițeddu-d, atan ɣer tewwurt.
A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : lǧil-agi ur ițɛedday ara alamma ideṛṛu-d wannect agi meṛṛa.
Igenni d lqaɛa ad fnun, ma d imeslayen-iw ur fennun ara !
Meɛna ɣef wayen yeɛnan ass neɣ ssaɛa n wannect-agi meṛṛa, yiwen ur ten-issin, ama d lmalayekkat n igenwan, ama d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi, anagar Baba Ṛebbi i geẓran.
Am akken i tedṛa di zzman n nnbi Nuḥ, akken daɣen ara tedṛu di lweqt n Mmi-s n bunadem.
Axaṭer deg ussan-nni uqbel a d-neflen waman ɣef ddunit, imdanen llan tețțen, tessen, țemyezwaǧen, zeggjen i warraw-nsen, armi d ass i deg yekcem nnbi Nuḥ ɣer lbabuṛ.
Yiwen ur ifaq s wacemma armi d-ḥemlen waman i ten-yewwin, snegren-ten akk. AAkken ara tedṛu di lweqt n tuɣalin n Mmi-s n bunadem !
Imiren, ger sin yergazen ara yilin deg iger, yiwen ad ițwarfed wayeḍ a d-iqqim.
Ger snat n tilawin yeẓẓaden s tsirt, yiwet aț-țețwarfed tayeḍ a d-teqqim !
Ɛasset ihi ur ɣefflet ara ! Axaṭer ur teẓrim ara lweqt i deg ara d-yas Ssid-nwen !
Rret ddehn-nwen ɣer wayagi : lemmer yeẓri bab n wexxam lweqt i deg ara d-yas umakar, tili ad iɛiwez ur iggan ara, iwakken ur t-țțakren ara.
Daymi ula d kunwi heggit iman-nwen axaṭer di lweqt i ɣef ur tebnim ara, ara d-yas Mmi-s n bunadem.
Anwa i d aqeddac aɛeqli i ɣef ara yețkel bab n wexxam ? D win ara iwekkel ɣef wat wexxam-is meṛṛa, iwakken a sen-yefk lqut-nsen di lawan.
Amarezg n uqeddac-agi ara d-yaf bab n wexxam m'ara d-yaweḍ, yelha d ccɣel-nni.
A wen-iniɣ tideț : a t-yerr d lewkil ɣef wayla-s meṛṛa !
Meɛna ma yella axeddam-agi diri-t, ad yini deg ul-is : bab n wexxam iɛeṭṭel, mazal ur d-ițas ara ;
dɣa ad ibdu ad ikkat iqeddacen n wexxam-nni, ad iteț, ad itess nețța d isekṛanen.
Bab n wexxam a d-yas deg wass i ɣef ur ibni ara uqeddac-nni, di lawan ur yeẓri.
A t-iqecceɛ, a t-iɛaqeb akken țwaɛaqben at sin udmawen : imiren ara yilin imeṭṭawen d nndama tameqqrant.
Daymi deg wussan-nni, tagelda n igenwan aț-țecbu ɣer ɛecṛa telmeẓyin i geddmen tiftilin-nsent iwakken ad ṛuḥent ad mmagrent isli.
Xemsa seg-sent ț-țuḥṛicin, xemsa nniḍen ț-țungifin.
Mi d-ddment tungifin-nni tiftilin nsent, ur d-wwint ara zzit yid-sent.
Ma ț-țuḥṛicin-nni, wwint-ed yid-sent tiqbucin n zzit.
Imi i gɛeṭṭel yesli, tilmeẓyin-nni nuddment dɣa ṭsent.
Di tlemmast n yiḍ, yiwet n taɣect tɛeggeḍ-ed : Ataya yesli iteddu-d, ffɣemt a t-temmagremt !
Imiren kan ukint-ed akk telmeẓyin-nni, heggant tiftilin-nsent.
Tungifin-nni nnant i tuḥṛicin : Fkemt-aɣ-d kra si zzit-nkunt, tiftilin-nneɣ qṛib ad xsint.
Tuḥṛicin rrant-asent : Ulamek, ur aɣ-d-tkeffu ara i nekkunti d kunemti, ṛuḥemt a d taɣemt i yiman-nkunt ɣer wid yeznuzun.
Mi ṛuḥent a d-aɣent, isli yewweḍ-ed, tuḥṛicin-nni iheggan iman-nsent kecment yid-es ɣer wexxam n tmeɣṛa, dɣa rran-d tawwurt.
Mi i d-wwḍent tungifin-nni, bdant țɛeggiḍent : A Sidi, a Sidi ldi-yaɣ-d tawwurt.
Meɛna nețța yerra-yasent-ed : A kunt-iniɣ tideț : ur kkunt ssineɣ ara !
Daymi a wen-iniɣ : Ɛasset, imi ur teẓrim ass, ur teẓrim lweqt.
Ass n tuɣalin n Mmi-s n bunadem ad yili daɣen am yiwen wergaz i gțeddun ad iṛuḥ ɣer lɣeṛba, yesnejmaɛ-ed iqeddacen-is, iwekkel iten ɣef wayen akk yesɛa.
Ifka i umezwaru xemsmeyya twiztin n ddheb, wi sin yefka-yas mitin, wis tlata yefka-yas meyya ; yefka i yal yiwen s wakken tella tezmert-is, dɣa iṛuḥ.
Imiren kan, aqeddac-nni iwumi yefka xemsmeyya twiztin, iṛuḥ yetjeṛ yis-sent, irbeḥ-ed xemsmeyya nniḍen.
Ula d win iwumi yefka mitin, ixdem akken, irbeḥ-ed mitin nniḍen.
Ma d win iwumi yefka meyya, iṛuḥ yeɣza di lqaɛa, yeffer tiwiztin-nni i s-d-ifka umɛellem-is.
Mi gɛedda lweqt, yuɣal-ed umɛellem-nni, isnejmaɛ-iten-id iwakken ad imḥasab yid-sen.
Win akken iwumi yefka xemsmeyya twiztin, yusa-d yewwi-d yid-es xemsmeyya twiztin nniḍen, yenna-yas : A Sidi tefkiḍ-iyi-d xemsmeyya twiztin n ddheb, a tent-ih xemsmeyya nniḍen i d-rebḥeɣ yis-sent.
Amɛellem-is yenna-yas : D ayen yelhan i txedmeḍ ay aqeddac unṣiḥ, imi deg-ek laman ɣef tɣawsiwin timecṭuḥin, sya d asawen a k-wekkleɣ ɣef timeqqranin ! Ili-k di lfeṛḥ yid-i !
Aqeddac-nni iwumi yefka mitin twiztin n ddheb, iqeṛṛeb-ed ula d nețța, yenna-yas : A Sidi tefkiḍ-iyi mitin twiztin n ddheb, a tent-ih mitin nniḍen i d-rebḥeɣ yis-sent.
Amɛellem-is yenna-yas : D ayen yelhan i txedmeḍ, ay aqeddac unṣiḥimi deg-k laman ɣef tɣawsiwin timecṭuḥin, sya d asawen a k-wekkleɣ ɣef timeqqranin ! Ili-k di lfeṛḥ yid-i !
Iwweḍ-ed win akken iwumi yefka meyya twiztin, yenna yas : A Sidi ẓriɣ-k d argaz iweɛṛen, tmeggreḍ anda ur tezriɛeḍ, tjemmɛeḍ seg wennar ayen ur tesrewteḍ ,
dɣa uggadeɣ-k, daymi i ṛuḥeɣ ffreɣ deg wakal tiwiztin-nni i yi-tefkiḍ. Atan wayla-k, ddem-it !
Amɛellem-is yenna-yas : Ay aqeddac amcum, ameɛdaz ! Imi iyi-teẓriḍ meggreɣ-d anda ur zriɛeɣ, jemmɛeɣ-ed daɣen anda ur srewteɣ,
acuɣeṛ ihi ur tessekraḍ ara idrimin-iw iwakken m'ara d-uɣaleɣ a ten-id-erreɣ s lfayda.
Imiren amɛellem-nni yumeṛ i iqeddacen-is yenna-yasen : Kkset-as meyya-nni twiztin ternum-tent i win yesɛan ɛecṛa alef n twiztin !
Axaṭer kra win yesɛan, a s-nernu ad yili di tawant, ma d win ur nesɛi ara, a s-nekkes ula d ayen yesɛa.
Ma d aqeddac-agi ur nemɛin, ḍeggṛet-eț ɣer ṭṭlam n beṛṛa anda ara yilin imeṭṭawen d nndama tameqqrant.
Asm'ara d-yas Mmi-s n bunadem di tmanegt-is nețța d lmalayekkat meṛṛa, ad iḥkem di lɛaḍima-s ;
leǧnas meṛṛa a d-nnejmaɛen zdat-es, a ten-ifṛeq am umeksa iɛeSlen ulli ɣef tɣeṭṭen.
Ad yerr ulli ɣer uyeffus-is, tiɣeṭṭen ɣer uzelmaḍ-is.
Imiren agellid ad yini i wid yellan ɣer uyeffus-is : Aset-ed a kunwi iburek Baba, aț-țweṛtem tagelda i wen-ițțuheggan seg wasmi i tebda ddunit.
Mi gfukk Sidna Ɛisa imeslayen-agi, yenna i inelmaden-is : --
Mazal sin wussan i lɛid n Tuffɣa, Mmi-s n bunadem ad ițțuzenz iwakken ad ițuṣemmer ɣef wumidag.
Dɣa lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud nnejmaɛen deg ufrag n Kayef, i gellan d lmuqeddem ameqqran.
Msefhamen ad ṭṭfen Sidna Ɛisa s tḥila iwakken a t-nɣen.
Meɛna nnan : « mačči deg ussan-agi n lɛid n Tuffɣa ara t-neḥbes, neɣ m'ulac ad yekker ccwal ger lɣaci .»
Mi gella Sidna Ɛisa di taddart n Bitanya, deg wexxam n Semɛun abeṛsi,
ațaya yiwet n tmeṭṭut tewwi-d tabuqalt yețwaxedmen s wedɣaɣ amellal, teččuṛ d leɛṭeṛ ɣlayen. Mi geqqim Sidna Ɛisa ɣer ṭṭabla, tameṭṭut-nni tusa-d tesmar leɛṭeṛ-nni ɣef wuqeṛṛuy-is.
Mi walan ayagi, inelmaden iɣaḍ-iten lḥal, nnan : Iwumi lexsaṛa-yagi ?
Lemmer nezzenz leɛṭeṛ-nni, tili yewwi-d ssuma tameqqrant ara nefṛeq i igellilen !
Sidna Ɛisa yeẓran wayen nnan wway-gar-asen, yenna-yasen : Acuɣeṛ i tesḥeznem tameṭṭut agi ? D ayen yelhan i yi-texdem !
Axaṭer aț-țesɛum daymen igellilen yid-wen, meɛna nekk ur țțiliɣ ara daymen yid-wen.
Mi d-tesmar leɛṭeṛ-agi fell-i, d lǧețța-w i thegga i temḍelt-iw.
A wen-iniɣ tideț : di yal amkan n ddunit i deg ara ițțubecceṛ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, a d țmektayen tameṭṭut-agi d wayen texdem.
Imiren Yudas n Qeṛyut, yiwen si tnac-nni inelmaden n Sidna Ɛisa, iṛuḥ ɣer lmuqedmin imeqqranen,
yenna yasen : Ma wwiɣ-kkun ɣuṛ-es a t-id teṭṭfem, d acu ara yi-tefkem ? FFkan-as tlatin iṣurdiyen n lfeṭṭa.
Seg imiren, Yudas yețɛassa tagniț i deg ara yizmir ad izzenz Sidna Ɛisa.
Ass amezwaru n lɛid n weɣṛum mbla iɣes n temtunt , inelmaden usan-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : A Sidi, anda tebɣiḍ a k-nheggi imensi n lɛid n Izimer n leslak ?
Yerra-yasen : Ṛuḥet ɣer temdint, ɣer leflani, init-as : yenna-yak Ssid-nneɣ, lweqt-iw yewweḍ-ed, deg uxxam-ik ara sɛeddiɣ lɛid n Izimer n leslak nekk d inelmaden-iw.
Inelmaden-nni xedmen ayen i sen-yenna Sidna Ɛisa, heggan imensi n lɛid n Izimer n leslak.
Mi d-teɣli tmeddit, Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim ad yečč nețța d inelmaden-is.
Mi llan tețțen yenna-yasen : A wen-iniɣ tideț : yiwen seg-wen ad iyi-izzenz.
Mi d-yenna ayagi, ikcem-iten akk leḥzen d ameqqran, bdan qqaṛen as yiwen yiwen : Neɣ mačči d nekk a Sidi ?
Yerra-yasen : Win igren afus-is yid-i deg uḍebsi, d nețța ara yi-izzenzen.
Ad yedṛu d Mmi-s n bunadem akken yura fell-as ; mmeɛna a nnger n win ara t-izzenzen, lemmer ur d-ilul ara axiṛ-is.
Yudas ara t-ixedɛen yenṭeq yenna-yas : Eɛni d nekk a Sidi ? SSidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Atan tenniḍ-t-id !
Mi llan tețțen, Sidna Ɛisa yeddem-d aɣṛum, iḥmed Ṛebbi, icekkeṛ-it, dɣa yebḍa-t, ifṛeq-it i inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen : Eččet aɣṛum-agi : d lǧețța-w.
Iddem-ed daɣen taqbuct, iḥmed Ṛebbi, icekkeṛ-it, yefka-yasen-ț, yenna-yasen : Swet akk si teqbuct-agi,
axaṭer ayagi d idammen-iw, d idammen n lemɛahda ara yazzlen ɣef yizumal n lɣaci ɣef ddemma n leɛfu n ddnubat-nsen.
A wen-d-iniɣ : ur țțuɣaleɣ ara ad sweɣ seg waman-agi n tẓurin alamma d ass i deg ara ten-sweɣ d ijdiden yid-wen, di tgelda n Baba Ṛebbi.
Mi ḥemden Sidi Ṛebbi s ccnawi d isefra, ṛuḥen ulin ɣer yiɣil n uzemmur,
dinna Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Iḍ-agi ad a wen-iliɣ akk d sebba n tuccḍa, axaṭer yura di tira iqedsen ad wwteɣ ameksa, ulli n tqeḍɛit-is ad rewlent ɣer yal tama .
Meɛna m'ara d-ḥyuɣ si ger lmegtin, ad iyi-tafem zwareɣ ɣer tmurt n Jlili.
Buṭrus yenṭeq, yenna : Ɣas a sen-tiliḍ d sebba n tuccḍa i wiyaḍ akk, nekk d lmuḥal ad ccḍeɣ.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : A k-iniɣ tideț : deg iḍ-agi uqbel ad iskkuɛ uyaziḍ, ad iyi-tnekṛeḍ tlata iberdan.
Buṭrus yerra-yas : Ɣas lukan d lmut ara mmteɣ yid-ek, d lmuḥal a k-nekkṛeɣ ! UUla d inelmaden nniḍen, nnan-as am nețța.
Taṣebḥit, nnejmaɛen-d akk imeqqranen n lmuqedmin akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud, mcawaṛen iwakken ad nɣen Sidna Ɛisa.
Dɣa urzen-t, wwin-t i Bilaṭus, yellan d lḥakem n Ṛuman yesteɛemṛen tamurt.
Mi gwala ḥekmen ɣef Sidna Ɛisa, Yudas-nni i t-ixedɛen yendem. DDi nndama-nni-ines tameqqrant, iṛuḥ ɣer imeqqranen n lmuqedmin d imeqqranen n wegdud, yerra-yasen tlatin-nni twiztin n lfeṭṭa, dɣa
yenna yasen : Denbeɣ, nekk i wen-d-izzenzen amdan aḥeqqi. RRran-as-d : Ur aɣ-d-tewqiɛ ara lmeɛna, wagi d ccɣel-ik.
Yudas iḍeggeṛ tiwiztin-nni di lǧameɛ iqedsen, imiren iṛuḥ iɛelleq iman-is.
Imeqqranen n lmuqedmin leqḍen-d tiwiztin-nni n lfeṭṭa, nnan : Ur yeḥlil ara a tent-nerr ɣer usenduq n lǧameɛ iqedsen, imi d lexlaṣ n temgeṛt.
Mi mcawaṛen d acu ara xedmen s twiztin-nni, msefhamen iwakken ad aɣen iger n yiwen wergaz ixeddmen afexxaṛ, iwakken a t-erren ț-țimeqbeṛt i ibeṛṛaniyen.
Daymi iger-agi ițțusemma ar ass-a : « Iger n idammen ».
S wakka i gedṛa wayen i d-yenna nnbi Irmiya : Ddmen-d tlatin n twiztin n lfeṭṭa, d wagi i d azal i s-fkan warraw n wat Isṛail ;
uɣen-d yis iger ɣer win ixeddmen afexxaṛ, akken i yi-d-yumeṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Sidna Ɛisa ibedd zdat lḥakem Bilaṭus. Yesteqsa-t lḥakem-nni yenna-yas : D kečč i d agellid n wat Isṛail ? SSidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Tenniḍ-t-id !
Lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud sseḍlamen deg-s, ma d nețța ur sen-d-yerri ula d acemma.
Bilaṭus yenna i Sidna Ɛisa : Eɛni ur tesliḍ ara ayen akk ɣef i d-țcetkin fell-ak ?
Sidna Ɛisa yessusem, ur as-d yerri ula d yiwen wawal, ayagi d ayen iswehmen lḥakem.
Lḥakem yennum di mkul lɛid n Tuffɣa ițserriḥ-ed i yiwen umeḥbus i gextaṛ lɣaci.
Yella yakan yiwen umeḥbus mechuṛen, ițțusemman Barabas.
Mi d-nnejmaɛen akk lɣaci, Bilaṭus isteqsa-ten : Anwa i tebɣam a s-d-serrḥeɣ : i Barabas neɣ i Ɛisa ițțusemman Lmasiḥ ?
Axaṭer yeẓra s tismin i s-d-wwin Ɛisa.
Mi gella Bilaṭus ițcaṛaɛ, tceggeɛ-as-d tmeṭṭut-is, tenna-yas-d : Ur ssekcam ara iman-ik di temsalt n uḥeqqi-agi, axaṭer ass-agi targit urgaɣ fell-as terwi-yi.
Imeqqranen n lmuqedmin akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud sḥeṛcen-d lɣaci iwakken ad ssutren a d-serrḥen i Barabas, ad nɣen Sidna Ɛisa.
Lḥakem yenna-yasen : Anwa ger sin-agi iwumi tebɣam ad serrḥeɣ ? RRran-as : I Barabas ! Serreḥ-ed i Barabas !
Bilaṭus yenna-yasen : D acu ara xedmeɣ ihi i Ɛisa ițțusemman Lmasiḥ ? RRran-as-d akk : Ad ițțusemmeṛ ɣef wumidag !
Lḥakem yenna : D acu i gexdem n diri ? RRnan țɛeggiḍen : Semmeṛ-it ɣef wumidag !
Mi gwala lɣaci ugin a s-d ḥessen, yerna ccwal simmal yețțimɣuṛ, Bilaṭus yeddem-ed aman, issared ifassen-is zdat lɣaci, yenna : Nekk ur țekkiɣ ara di tazzla n idammen n uḥeqqi-agi, wagi d ccɣel-nwen.
Lɣaci meṛṛa nnan-as : Tazzla n idammen-is a d-tuɣal ɣef yirawen-nneɣ d yirawen n warraw-nneɣ.
Imiren Bilaṭus iserreḥ-ed i Barabas, jelkḍen Sidna Ɛisa, dɣa yefka lameṛ a t-semmṛen ɣef wumidag.
Iɛsekṛiyen n lḥakem ssufɣen Sidna Ɛisa ɣer ufrag, snejmaɛen-d akk iɛsekṛiyen nniḍen, zzin-as.
Imiren kksen-as llebsa-s, sselsen as abeṛnus azeggaɣ.
Zḍan taɛeṣṣabt s isennanen, ssersen-as-ț ɣef wuqeṛṛuy is, fkan-as aɣanim ɣer ufus-is ayeffus. Bdan kennun zdat-es, stehzayen fell-as, qqaṛen-as : Sslam fell-ak ay agellid n wat Isṛail !
Ssusufen-t, kkaten-t s uɣanim ɣer uqeṛṛuy.
Mi ɛyan deg ustehzi fell-as, kksen-as abeṛnus-nni, rran-as llebsa-s, wwin-t a t-semmṛen ɣef wumidag.
Mi d-ffɣen, mlalen-d yiwen wergaz n tmurt n Qiṛwan, isem-is semɛun, ḥettmen fell-as ad ibbib amidag n Sidna Ɛisa.
Mi wwḍen ɣer yiwen wemkan ițțusemman Gulguṭa, yeɛni « amkan n uxecxuc »,
fkan-as ad isew ccṛab i deg yexleḍ yiwen uɛeqqaṛ aṛzagan. Iɛreḍ-it, yugi a t-isew.
Mi t-semmṛen ɣef wumidag, gren tasɣaṛt iwakken ad feṛqen llebsa-ines, s wakka, yedṛa-d wayen yuran di tira iqedsen : feṛqen llebsa-w, gren tasɣart ɣef wuqenduṛ-iw.
ɛelqen sennig uqeṛṛuy-is talwiḥt i ɣef uran sebba n lmut-is : Wagi d Ɛisa, agellid n wat Isṛail
Țwasemmṛen yid-es sin imcumen, yiwen ɣer uyeffus-is wayeḍ ɣer uẓelmaḍ-is.
qqaṛen-as : A win ițhuddun lǧameɛ iqedsen ibennu-t di tlata wussan, sellek iman-ik ma d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi i telliḍ, ers-ed seg umidag-nni.
Imeqqranen n lmuqedmin, lɛulama n ccariɛa akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud, stehzayen fell-as ula d nutni, qqaṛen :
Isellek wiyaḍ ur yezmir ad isellek iman-is ! Ma d agellid n wat Isṛail i gella, a d-yers ihi seg umidag iwakken a namen yis.
Yețkel ɣef Ṛebbi, a t-isellek ihi Ṛebbi ma iḥemmel-it aaxaṭer yenna-d : « Nekk d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi.»
Ula d imcumen-nni ițțusemmṛen yid-es, regmen-t am wiyaḍ.
Deg uzzal si tnac armi d țlata n tmeddit, yeɣli-d ṭṭlam ɣef ddunit meṛṛa.
Ɣef leǧwahi n țlata, Sidna Ɛisa iɛeggeḍ s tɛibṛanit, yenna : Ilya, Ilya, lama sabaqtani ? Yeɛni : Illu-iw, Illu-iw, acuɣeṛ i yi-teǧǧiḍ ?
Mi gɛedda wass n westeɛfu, taṣebḥit n wass amezwaru n dduṛt, Meryem tamagdalit akk-d meryem-nni nniḍen, ṛuḥent a d-ẓuṛent aẓekka n Sidna Ɛisa.
Deg yiwet n teswiɛt, tergagi lqaɛa ; ataya yiwen n lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi, iṣubb-ed seg igenni, iqeṛṛeb ɣer uẓekka, iswexxeṛ ablaḍ-nni, yeqqim fell-as.
Ițfeǧǧiǧ am lebṛaq, llebsa-s ț-țamellalt am udfel.
Iɛessasen yellan dinna, ikcem-iten lxuf d ameqqran, qquṛen amzun mmuten.
