Yenṭeq lmelk ɣer tilawin-nni, yenna-yasent : Kunemti ur țțaggademt ara, axaṭer ẓriɣ ɣef Ɛisa i yețțusemmṛen ɣef wumidag i tețnadimt.
Ulac-it dagi, iḥya-d si ger lmegtin akken i t-id-yenna. Asemt-ed aț-țwalimt amkan anda akken yeḍleq !
Azlemt aț-ținimt i inelmaden-is belli yeḥya-d si ger lmegtin. Atan a kkun-yezwir ɣer tmurt n Jlili ; dinna ara t-teẓrem. AAtan nniɣ-akunt-ț-id !
Imiren kan, ṛuḥent seg uẓekka-nni s lfeṛḥ d ameqqran ɣas akken uggadent. Uzzlent ad awint lexbaṛ i inelmaden n Sidna Ɛisa.
Ataya Sidna Ɛisa imuger-itent-id, yenna-yasent : Sslam fell-akunt ! QQeṛṛbent, seǧǧdent zdat-es, ssudnent iḍaṛṛen-is.
Imiren Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasent : Ur țțaggademt ! Ṛuḥemt inimt i watmaten-iw ad ṛuḥen ɣer tmurt n Jlili, dinna ara yi-ẓren.
Mi țeddunt deg ubrid, kra seg iɛessasen-nni n uẓekka kecmen ɣer temdint, xebbṛen imeqqranen n lmuqedmin ɣef wayen akk yedṛan.
Mi nnejmaɛen imeqqranen n wegdud akk-d imeqqranen n lmuqedmin, msefhamen ad fken i iɛessasen-nni ssuma tameqqrant n yedrimen,
nnan-asen : Init belli d inelmaden-is i d-yusan deg yiḍ, ukren lǧețța-s mi nella neṭṭes.
Ma yella yewweḍ lexbaṛ-agi ɣer lḥakem, d nukkni ara t-iqablen iwakken ur awen-ixeddem ula d acemma.
Iɛsekṛiyen-nni ṭṭfen idrimen-nni, xedmen ayen akk i sen-d-nnan lmuqedmin. Tamsalt-agi țɛawaden-ț-id wat Isṛail ar ass-a.
Ḥdac inelmaden-nni ṛuḥen ɣer tmurt n Jlili, ɣer wedrar-nni anda i sen-yenna Sidna Ɛisa ad mlilen.
Mi t-walan seǧǧden zdat-es, meɛna kra seg-sen mazal țcukkuten.
Sidna Ɛisa iqeṛṛeb-ed ɣuṛ-sen, yenna-yasen : Tețțunefk-iyi-d tezmert ama di lqaɛa ama deg igenwan.
Ṛuḥet ɣer tmura meṛṛa n ddunit, slemdet imdanen iwakken ad uɣalen d inelmaden-iw, ad țwaɣedṣen s yisem n Baba Ṛebbi, s yisem n Mmi-s akk-d yisem n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
Slemdet-asen ad tebɛen ayen akk i wen-slemdeɣ. MMa d nekk ad iliɣ yid-wen yal ass alamma ț-țaggara n ddunit.

name: Mark
chapters: Akka i gebda lexbaṛ n lxiṛ yeɛnan Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, Mmi-s n Ṛebbi.
Am akken yura di tektabt n nnbi Iceɛya : Ad zzewreɣ zdat-ek amceggeɛ-iw, a k-ifres abrid.
?-țaɣect n win yețɛeggiḍen deg unezṛuf : heggit abrid i Sidi Ṛebbi, ssemsawit iberdan-is !
Iban-ed Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas deg unezṛuf , yesseɣḍas lɣaci deg waman, yeqqaṛ-asen : Beddlet tikli, aset-ed aț-țețwaɣeḍsem iwakken a wen-yeɛfu Sidi Ṛebbi.
Imezdaɣ meṛṛa n tmurt n Yahuda d wid n temdint n Lquds țṛuḥun-d ɣuṛ-es, țqiṛṛin s ddnubat-nsen zdat lɣaci dɣa Yeḥya yeṣṣeɣḍas-iten deg wasif n Urdun.
Yelsa llebsa yețwaxedmen s ccɛeṛ n welɣem, yebges tabagust n weglim ɣef wammas-is. Lqut-is d ajṛad akk-d țament n lexla.
Yețbecciṛ yeqqaṛ : Win ara d-yasen deffir-i yugar iyi, yesɛa tazmert akteṛ-iw ; ur uklaleɣ ara ad knuɣ a s-fsiɣ ula d lexyuḍ n warkasen-is.
Nekk sseɣḍaseɣ-kkun deg waman, lameɛna nețța a kkun-isseɣḍes s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
Deg wussan-nni, Sidna Ɛisa yusa-d si taddart n Naṣaret ɣer tmurt n Jlili. Yesseɣḍes-it Yeḥya deg wasif n Urdun.
Akken i d-iffeɣ seg waman, iwala igenwan ldin, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen iṣubb-ed fell-as s ṣṣifa n tetbirt.
Yiwet n taɣect tekka-d seg igenwan tenna-d : Kečč d Mmi eɛzizen ; deg-k i gella lfeṛḥ-iw !
Imiren kan, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yewwi-t ɣer uneẓruf,
anda i t-ijeṛṛeb Cciṭan ṛebɛin wussan. Yețɛic ger lewḥuc n lɣaba, lmalayekkat qeddcent fell-as.
Mi gețwaḥbes Yeḥya, Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ ɣer tmurt n Jlili ; yețbecciṛ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi, yeqqaṛ :
Tageldit n Ṛebbi tqeṛṛeb-ed ! Yewweḍ-ed lweqt-is ! Uɣalet-ed ɣer webrid tamnem s lexbaṛ n lxiṛ !
Mi gella ileḥḥu rrif n lebḥeṛ n tmurt n Jlili, iwala Semɛun akk-d gma-s Andriyus ṭeggiṛen acebbak ɣer lebḥeṛ, axaṭer d iṣeggaḍen i llan.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Ddut-ed yid-i, a kkun-rreɣ d iṣeggaḍen n yemdanen.
Imiren kan, ǧǧan icebbaken nsen, ddan yid-es.
Ikemmel abrid-is, iwala Yeɛqub akk-d gma-s Yuḥenna yellan d arraw n Zabadi, qqimen di teflukt-nsen țxiḍin icebbaken.
Yessawel-asen, imiren kan ǧǧan baba-tsen akk-d ixeddamen-is di teflukt, ddan d Sidna Ɛisa.
Sidna Ɛisa d inelmaden-is wwḍen ɣer temdint n Kafernaḥum. Deg wass n ssebt yellan d ass n westeɛfu, Sidna Ɛisa yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ yebda yesselmad.
Lɣaci i s-ițḥessisen wehmen deg uselmed ines axaṭer imeslayen-is sɛan tissas ( lhiba ), mačči am uselmed n lɛulama n ccariɛa.
Ɛeddan kra wussan, Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal-ed ɣer Kafernaḥum ; yeffeɣ lexbaṛ belli deg wexxam-nni i gella.
Aṭas n lɣaci i d-innejmaɛen, armi ur d-yeqqim wemkan ula zdat tewwurt . Nețța yețbecciṛ-asen awal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
A ten-aya ṛebɛa yergazen wwin-d yiwen wukrif i Sidna Ɛisa.
Akken walan ur zmiren ara a t-ssiwḍen ɣuṛ-es si lɣaci-nni, kkan-d si ssqef, kksen iqermuden sennig wanda yella Sidna Ɛisa, syenna ssadren-d ukrif-nni deg wusu-ines.
Mi gwala liman-nsen, Sidna Ɛisa yenna i wukrif-nni : ?waɛeffan-ak ddnubat-ik a mmi.
Llan dinna kra lɛulama qqimen țxemmimen deg ulawen-nsen qqaṛen :
Amek armi yessaweḍ a d-yini imeslayen-agi ? Wagi d lekfeṛ ! Anwa i gzemren ad yeɛfu ddnubat anagar Sidi Ṛebbi ?
Imiren kan Sidna Ɛisa yeẓra ayen țxemmimen deg ulawen-nsen, yenna yasen : Acuɣer tețxemmimem akkagi deg ulawen-nwen ?
D acu i gsehlen a s-t-iniɣ i wukrif-agi : țwaɛfan-ak ddnubat-ik, neɣ kker ddem usu-inek telḥuḍ ?
Ihi bɣiɣ aț-țeẓrem belli Mmi-s n bunadem yezmer ad yeɛfu ddnubat di ddunit. Yenna i wukrif-nni :
Kker, ddem usu-inek tṛuḥeḍ ɣer wexxam-ik !
Imiren kan, yekker yeddem usu-ines, yeffeɣ zdat-nsen irkul. Lɣaci wehmen deg wayen yedṛan, țḥemmiden Sidi Ṛebbi, qqaṛen : Werǧin ( di leɛmeṛ ) neẓri ayagi !
Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal ɣer rrif n lebḥeṛ. Aṭas n lɣaci i d-ițasen ɣuṛ-es dɣa yesselmad-iten.
Mi gɛedda, iwala yiwen umekkas yeqqim ițeṭṭef leɣṛama, isem-is Lewwi d mmi-s n ?alfi. Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ddud-d yid-i ! Lewwi yekker, yedda yid-es.
Mi llan tețțen deg wexxam n Lewwi nețța d inelmaden-is, qqimen-d yid-sen imekkasen akk-d yir imdanen, axaṭer aṭas i t-ittabaɛen.
Lɛulama d ifariziyen mi t-walan itețț d imekkasen akk-d yir imdanen, nnan i inelmaden-is : Acuɣer Ssid-nwen itețț d imekkasen akk-d imednuben ?
Mi sen-yesla Sidna Ɛisa, yenna yasen : Mačči d wid iṣeḥḥan i geḥwaǧen ṭṭbib, meɛna d imuḍan. Ur d-usiɣ ara ad ssiwleɣ i iḥeqqiyen, meɛna i imednuben.
Inelmaden n Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas akk-d ifariziyen llan țțuẓummen. Usan-d ad steqsin Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : Acuɣer inelmaden n Yeḥya d inelmaden n ifariziyen țțuẓummen, ma d inelmaden-ik ur țțuẓummen ara ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Eɛni zemren inebgawen n tmeɣṛa ad uẓummen ma yella yid-sen yesli ? Kra ara yekk yesli yid-sen ur zmiren ara ad uẓummen.
A d-yas lweqt i deg ara sen yețwakkes yesli, deg wass-nni ad uẓummen.
Yiwen ur yețxiḍi tafaweț tajdiṭ i uceṭṭiḍ aqdim, neɣ m'ulac tafaweț-nni ara s-nernu aț-țesseɣṛes aceṭṭiḍ-nni aqdim dɣa acerrig-nni ad innerni.

Yiwen ur ițțačaṛ iyeddiden ( tiyelwin ) iqdimen s ccṛab ajdid, neɣ m'ulac ccṛab-nni ad ifelleq iyeddiden ; ccṛab ad inɣel, iyeddiden-nni ad qqeṛsen. Meɛna ccṛab ajdid ilaq ad immir ɣer iyeddiden ijdiden !
Yiwen wass n ssebt yellan d ass n westeɛfu , Sidna Ɛisa yezger igran n yirden. Inelmaden-is teddun țekksen tigedrin.
Ifariziyen nnan-as : Acuɣer xeddmen inelmaden-ik ayen ur nelli ara d leḥlal deg wass n ssebt ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Di leɛmeṛ teɣṛim wayen yexdem ugellid Dawed asmi i ten-yeṭṭef laẓ nețța d irfiqen-is ?
Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal ɣer lǧameɛ. Yella dinna yiwen wergaz iwumi yekref ufus.
Wid yellan dinna țɛassan deg-s ad walin m' ad isseḥlu deg wass n westeɛfu, iwakken ad ccetkin fell-as.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna i wergaz-nni iwumi yekref ufus : Ekker tbeddeḍ dagi di tlemmast.

Imiren yenna i wid yețmuqulen : D acu i d-teqqaṛ ccariɛa-nneɣ ɣef wayen yeɛnan ass n westeɛfu ? A nexdem lxiṛ neɣ a nexdem cceṛ ? A nsellek taṛwiḥt n wemdan neɣ a t-neǧǧ ad immet ? Lameɛna nutni ssusmen meṛṛa, ur zmiren ara a d-rren awal.
Sidna Ɛisa imuqel-iten s wurrif, yerna yeḥzen aṭas fell-asen imi qquṛen wulawen nsen. Yenna i wergaz-nni : ?leq-ed ( eẓẓel-ed ) afus-ik ! Iḍleq-it dɣa yeḥla ufus-is.
Imiren ifariziyen ffɣen, ṛuḥen ad mcawaṛen nutni d ihiṛudiyen amek ara t-nɣen.
Sidna Ɛisa ijbed iman-is nețța d inelmaden-is ɣer rrif n lebḥeṛ n tmurt n Jlili. Aṭas n lɣaci i t-id-itebɛen. Usan-d si mkul tama n tmurt n Jlili, si tmurt n Yahuda,
si temdint n Lquds, si tmurt n Idum, si tmurt akkin i wasif n Urdun, si leǧwahi n temdinin n ?ur akk-d Sidun. Mi slan s wayen ixeddem, aṭas n lɣaci i d-yețțasen ɣuṛ-es.
Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa inelmaden-is a s-heggin taflukt, akken ur t-iḥeṛṛes ara lɣaci.
Ladɣa imi yețdawi aṭas n imuḍan, wid akk yuḍnen ẓeddmen fell-as iwakken a t-nnalen.
Iṛuḥaniyen m'ara t-walin, ɣellin zdat-es qqaṛen-as : « Kečč d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi !»
Meɛna nețța yețgalla deg-sen iwakken ur d-qqaṛen ara anwa-t.
Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer yiwet n tiɣilt, yessawel i wid yebɣa dɣa usan-d ɣuṛ-es.
Yextaṛ tnac deg-sen ad ilin d ṛṛusul ad țeddun daymen yid-es, iwakken a ten-iceggeɛ ad beccṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ,
a sen-yefk tazmert akken ad ssuffuɣen leǧnun.
A ten-ah tnac-nni yextaṛ : Semɛun iwumi isemma Buṭrus,
Yeɛqub akk-d gma-s Yuḥenna yellan d arraw n Zabadi iwumi isemma Buneṛǧes ( yeɛni arraw n ṛṛɛud ).
Andriyus, Filbas, Bartelmay, Matta, Tuma, Yeɛqub mmi-s n ?alfi, Taddi, Semɛun akenɛani ( awaṭani )
akk-d Yudas n Qeṛyut, win akken ixedɛen Sidna Ɛisa.
Imiren, Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal ɣer wexxam. Nnejmaɛen-d daɣen ɣuṛ-es lɣaci ḥeṛsen-t nețța d inelmaden-is armi ur zmiren ara ad ččen.
Mi gewweḍ lexbaṛ ɣer imawlan is, ṛuḥen-d a t-awin axaṭer ɣilen yedderwec !
Imusnawen n ccariɛa i d-yusan si temdint n Lquds qqaṛen : D Balzabul iḥekkmen ɣef leǧnun i t-izedɣen , s tezmert-is i gessufuɣ leǧnun !

Sidna Ɛisa yebda daɣen yețbecciṛ rrif n lebḥeṛ n tmurt n Jlili. Imi i d-innejmaɛ ɣuṛ-es waṭas n lɣaci, yuli ɣer teflukt yeqqim. Taflukt-nni tella s ufella n waman, lɣaci yeqqim ɣer lqaɛa, rrif n lebḥeṛ.
Yebda yesselmad iten s lemtul, yeqqaṛ-asen :
Selt-iyi-d ! Yiwen ufellaḥ yeffeɣ ad izreɛ.
Mi gella izerreɛ, ɣlin kra iɛeqqayen deg webrid : ṛuḥen-d igṭat ( ifṛax ) leqḍen-ten.
Kra iɛeqqayen nniḍen ɣlin ger idɣaɣen anda ulac aṭas n wakal, dɣa mɣin-d imiren, axaṭer tissi n wakal ur lqayet ara.
Mi d-yuli yiṭij, yezlef imɣan-nni dɣa qquṛen, imi izuṛan-nsen ur lqayit ara.
Kra iɛeqqayen nniḍen ɣlin ger isennanen ; mi gman isennanen-nni ɣummen-ten dɣa ur d-fkin ara lfakya.
Kra iɛeqqayen nniḍen ɣlin deg wakal yelhan, mi gman, nnernan fkan-d tigedrin ; ta tefka-d tlatin n tɛeqqayin, tayeḍ sețțin, tayeḍ meyya.
Mi gebɛed ɣef lɣaci, wid i s-d yezzin akk-d tnac-nni inelmaden ssutren-as a sen-yessefhem lemtul i sen d-yewwi.
Yerra-yasen : Kunwi yețțunefk-awen aț- țissinem sser n tgeldit n Ṛebbi, ma d wiyaḍ sellen i mkul lḥaǧa s lemtul,
iwakken : ?as țmuqulen ur țwalin ara, ɣas sellen ur fehhmen ara ; m'ulac a d-uɣalen ɣer webrid dɣa Ṛebbi a sen-yeɛfu ddnubat-nsen !
Yenna-yasen daɣen : M'ur tefhimem ara lmeɛna n lemtel-agi, amek ara tfehmem lemtul nniḍen ?
Afellaḥ-nni, d win izerrɛen awal n Ṛebbi.
Kra yemdanen cban iri n webrid anda yețwazreɛ wawal n Ṛebbi. Akken kan i s-slan, yusa-d Cciṭan iqleɛ-ed awal-nni i gețwazerɛen deg ulawen-nsen.
Wiyaḍ cban akal yeččuṛen d idɣaɣen, akken ara slen i wawal n Ṛebbi, qebblen-t s lfeṛḥ ;
lameɛna ur t-țțaǧan ara ad yefk izuṛan deg ulawen-nsen, ṭṭfen deg-s kra lweqt kan. Mi d-yewweḍ leɛtab d uqehheṛ ɣef ddemma n wawal n Ṛebbi, țțuɣalen ɣer deffir, țaǧǧan liman-nsen.
Wiyaḍ țemcabin ɣer wakal yeččuṛen d isennanen, sellen i wawal n Ṛebbi,
meɛna iɣeblan, ṭṭmeɛ, lerbaḥ akk-d zzhu n ddunit-agi, skuffuren ( țkemmimen ) awal-nni, ur d-yețțawi ara lfayda.
Wiyaḍ cban akal yelhan anda teɣli zzerriɛa, sellen i wawal n Ṛebbi, qebblen-t, țțaken-d lfayda. Mkul aɛeqqa yeggar-ed wa tlatin, wa sețțin, wa meyya.
Yenna-yasen daɣen : Eɛni yella win ara iceɛlen taftilt iwakken a ț-yerr seddaw lḥila neɣ seddaw n wusu ? Mačči iwakken a ț-issers s ufella n lmeṣbeḥ ?
Ulac ayen yeffren ur d-nețban, ulac ayen iɣummen ur d-tețbeggin tafat.
Smeḥset-ed mliḥ, ma tesɛam imeẓẓuɣen isellen !
Yerna yenna-yasen : ?adret ɣef wayen tsellem ! Axaṭer akken i tețțektilim i wiyaḍ ara wen-d-ițwaktil i kunwi, yerna a wen-d ițwaktil s zzyada.
Axaṭer win yesɛan a s-rnun, ma d win ur nesɛi ara a s-yețwakkes ula d ayen yesɛa.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen daɣen : Tageldit n Sidi Ṛebbi tețțemcabi ɣer yiwen ufellaḥ i gzerɛen iger.
Ama yeṭṭes ama ur yeṭṭis, am yiḍ am ass, zzerriɛa tețțemɣay tgemmu, ur yeẓri amek.
Akal yețțak-ed s yiman-is lɣella. Tazwara d imɣi ad yuɣal ț-țigdert, taggara tigdert-nni aț-țeččaṛ d iɛeqqayen.
Mi wwan yirden, afellaḥ-nni a d-yas a ten-yemger, axaṭer yewweḍ ed lweqt n tmegra.
Yenna daɣen : ?er wacu i nezmer a nmettel tageldit n Ṛebbi, neɣ anwa lemtel ara d-nawi fell-as ?
Ițemcabi ɣer uɛeqqa n uxerḍel. M'ara t-nezreɛ, d nețța i d aɛeqqa amecṭuḥ meṛṛa ger zzerriɛat n ddunit.
Usan-d seg ugemmaḍ n lebḥeṛ ɣer tmurt n ijiṛaziyen.
Akken kan i d-yers Sidna Ɛisa si teflukt, ataya yiwen wergaz yezdeɣ uṛuḥani, yeffeɣ-ed si tjebbant iteddu-d ɣuṛ-es.
Yezdeɣ ger iẓekwan, yiwen ur izmir a t-yarez ula s ssnesla
axaṭer acḥal d abrid i t-qqnen s ixelxalen n wuzzal deg iḍaṛṛen, s ssnasel deg ifassen, meɛna yesseɣṛas-iten akk, daymi ur yezmir yiwen a t-iṭṭef.
Iḍ d wass nețța deg uneẓruf, yețɛeggiḍ, ijerreḥ iman-is s iblaḍen.
Mi gwala Sidna Ɛisa si lebɛid, yuzzel-ed yeɣli ɣef tgecrar zdat-es.
Iɛeggeḍ s lǧehd : D acu i tebɣiḍ ɣuṛ-i a Ɛisa, a mmi-s n Ṛebbi ɛlayen ? Di leɛnaya-k, ɣef wudem n Ṛebbi ur iyi-țɛețțib ara !
Axaṭer Sidna Ɛisa yeqqaṛ-as : Effeɣ seg umdan-agi ay aṛuḥani !
Yesteqsa-t yenna-yas : Isem-ik ? Yerra-yas-d : Isem-iw tarbaɛt, axaṭer deg waṭas yid-nneɣ i nella.
Dɣa țḥellilen deg-s rennun iwakken ur ten-yessufuɣ ara si tmurt-nni.
Yuɣ lḥal tella dinna yiwet n tqeḍɛit n yilfan kessen ;
ḥellelent nnan-as : Di leɛnaya-k, ǧǧaɣ a nekcem deg yilfan-agi .
Iserreḥ-asen, dɣa ffɣen seg wergaz-nni, kecmen deg ilfan-nni, imiren grarben seg wedrar ɣer lebḥeṛ, llan deg wazal n walfin yid-sen, ɣeṛqen meṛṛa.
Wid ikessen ilfan-nni rewlen, ssawḍen lexbaṛ ɣer temdint akk-d tudrin dɣa lɣaci ṛuḥen-d ad walin ayen yedṛan.
Mi d-wwḍen ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, walan win akken tezdeɣ terbaɛt n iṛuḥaniyen yeqqim, yelsa llebsa, yuɣal-ed ɣer leɛqel-is ; imiren ikcem-iten lxuf.
Wid i gḥeḍren ḥekkun-d i wiyaḍ ayen yedṛan d win yețwazedɣen akk-d țqeḍɛit-nni n yilfan.
Imiren bdan țḥellilen Sidna Ɛisa ad iffeɣ si tmurt-nsen.
Akken iteddu Sidna Ɛisa ad yali ɣef teflukt, win akken yellan yețwazdeɣ yețḥellil deg-s yeqqaṛ-as : Di leɛnaya-k eǧǧ-iyi ad dduɣ yid-ek.
Lameɛna Sidna Ɛisa yugi, yenna-yas : Uɣal ɣer wexxam-ik d leḥbab-ik, teḥkuḍ-asen ayen i k-ixdem Sidi Ṛebbi.
Iṛuḥ, yebda yețberriḥ di ɛecṛa n temdinin-nni ayen akk i s-yexdem Sidna Ɛisa. Kra win i s-yeslan yetɛeǧǧeb.
Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal s teflukt ɣer ugemmaḍ n lebḥeṛ. Innejmaɛ-ed daɣen lɣaci ɣuṛ-es mi gella rrif n lebḥeṛ.
Yiwen seg lecyux n lǧameɛ, isem-is Jayṛus, akken i gwala Sidna Ɛisa, yeɣli ɣer iḍaṛṛen-is,
ițḥellil deg-s irennu, yeqqaṛ-as : A Sidi, di leɛnaya-k ! Yelli tețmețțat, ddu-d yid-i ssers ifassen-ik fell-as iwakken aț-țeslek, ur tețmețțat ara !
Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ syenna ɣer tmurt-is, ddan yid-es inelmaden is.

Akken i d-yewweḍ wass n westeɛfu, yebda yesselmad di lǧameɛ. Aṭas i gwehmen seg wid i s-isellen, qqaṛen : Ansi i s-d-yekka wayagi ? D acu-ț lefhama-yagi i s-d ițțunefken ? Ansi i s-d-tekka tezmert s wayes ixeddem lbeṛhanat-agi meṛṛa ?
Mačči d wagi i d aneǧǧaṛ-nni, mmi-s n Meryem, gma-s n Yeɛqub, n Yuses, n Yuda akk-d Semɛun ? Anaɣ yessetma-s gar-aneɣ i țɛicint ? Ayagi yella-yasen d ugur daymi ur uminen ara yis.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Anagar di tmurt-is ger imawlan is d wat wexxam-is i gețwaḥqeṛ nnbi.
Ur yexdim dinna ula d yiwen n lbeṛhan, anagar kra imuḍan i ɣef yessers ifassen-is yesseḥla-ten.
Yewhem deg-sen imi ugin ad amnen. Dɣa ileḥḥu, yesselmad di tudrin iqeṛben tamdint n Naṣaret.
Sidna Ɛisa yessawel i tnac-nni inelmaden, iceggeɛ-iten sin sin, yefka yasen tazmert ad ssufɣen iṛuḥaniyen.
Iweṣṣa-ten, yenna-yasen : Ur țțawit yid-wen acemma i webrid, ama d aɣṛum, ama d agrab ama d aṣurdi deg waggus, anagar aɛekkaz deg ufus.
Elset irkasen, meɛna ur țțawit ara yid-wen aqenduṛ wis sin.
Yenna-yasen daɣen : Axxam anda stṛeḥben yis-wen qqimet ɣuṛ-sen alamma tṛuḥem.
Ma yella wanda ur sṭerḥben ara yis-wen, ur bɣin ara a wen-slen, ṛuḥet syenna, zwit aɣebbaṛ n warkasen-nwen, ddnub i yirawen-nsen.
Ṛuḥen țbecciṛen i yemdanen iwakken a d-uɣalen ɣer webrid.
Ssufuɣen aṭas n leǧnun, dehhinen s zzit aṭas n imuḍan, sseḥlayen-ten.
Yuɣal yisem n Sidna Ɛisa mechuṛ di tmurt meṛṛa, yewweḍ lexbaṛ-is ɣer ugellid Hiṛudus. Kra qqaṛen : D Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas i d-iḥyan si ger lmegtin, daymi i gezmer ad ixdem lbeṛhanat.
Wiyaḍ qqaṛen : D nnbi Ilyas. Wiyaḍ daɣen qqaṛen-as : D nnbi am lenbiya nniḍen.
Meɛna mi gesla Hiṛudus s wannect-agi, yeqqaṛ : D Yehya-nni iwumi kkseɣ aqqeṛṛuy, i d-iḥyan !
Axaṭer d Hiṛudus s yiman-is i gerran Yeḥya ɣer lḥebs yeqqen-it s ssnasel, mi t-ilum imi guɣ Hiṛudyad yellan ț-țameṭṭut n gma-s Filbas.
Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas yella yeqqaṛ-as : D leḥṛam fell-ak aț-țaɣeḍ tameṭṭut n gma-k !
Daymi i t-tekṛeh Hiṛudyad, yerna tețqellib amek ara t-tneɣ lameɛna ur s-tufi ara abrid ;
axaṭer Hiṛudus yețqadaṛ Yeḥya imi i t-iẓra d argaz yeṣfan, d aḥeqqi, daymi i gețḥunnu fell-as. Iḥemmel ad ismeḥses i wawal-is, meɛna m'ara s-isel iɛewweq.
Ațaya teɣli-yas-d sebba i Hiṛudyad... Ass n lɛid n tlalit-is, Hiṛudus iɛreḍ-ed ɣer imensi imeqqranen n tgelda-s, imeqqranen n lɛeskeṛ akk-d imdebbṛen n tmurt n Jlili.
Tekcem-ed yelli-s n Hiṛudyad tecḍeḥ, dɣa teɛǧeb-as i Hiṛudus d inebgawen-is. Agellid yenna i teqcict-nni : Ssuter-iyi-d ayen tebɣiḍ a m-t-id fkeɣ.
Yerna yeggul-as : Ssuter-ed ayen tebɣiḍ a m-t-id fkeɣ, ɣas d azgen di tgelda-w.
Teffeɣ tenna i yemma-s : D acu ara s-ssutreɣ ? Terra-yas : Ssuter-as aqeṛṛuy n Yeḥya.
Tekcem ɣer ugellid tenna-yas : Efk-iyi-d tura kan aqeṛṛuy n Yeḥya deg uḍebsi !
Agellid-nni yeḥzen mačči d kra, lameɛna imi s-yeggul zdat inebgawen is, ur yezmir ara ad iḥnet.
Iceggeɛ imiren kan yiwen uɛessas, yumeṛ-it a s-d-yawi aqeṛṛuy n Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas. Aɛessas-nni iṛuḥ ɣer lḥebs, ikkes-as aqeṛṛuy i Yeḥya.
Yewwi-t-id deg uḍebsi, yefka-t i teqcict-nni, ma d nețțat tewwi-t i yemma-s.
Mi slan s wayagi, inelmaden n Yeḥya usan-d wwin lǧețța-s meḍlen-ț.
Uɣalen-d inelmaden, nnejmaɛen ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, ḥkan-as ayen akk xedmen d wayen slemden.
Ifariziyen d kra lɛulama n ccariɛa i d-yusan si temdint n Lquds, nnejmaɛen-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa.
Walan kra seg inelmaden-is tețțen aɣṛum mbla ma ssarden ifassen-nsen, akken tella di lɛadda-nsen.
Axaṭer ifariziyen akk-d wat Isṛail ur tețțen ara uqbel ad ssirden ifassen-nsen, imi ṭṭfen di lɛadda n lejdud-nsen.
M'ara d-uɣalen si ssuq, ur tețțen ara alamma uɣen luḍu. ?ṭfen daɣen deg waṭas n lɛaddat nniḍen : tarda n yeqbac, n tbuqalin, akk-d lḥilat meṛṛa n nnḥas.
Ifariziyen d lɛulama steqsan-t, nnan-as : Acuɣer inelmaden-ik ur ṭṭifen ara di lɛaddat i ɣ-d-ǧǧan lejdud nneɣ, atan tețțen s ifassen yumsen ?
Yerra-yasen : Ay at sin wudmawen ! Fell-awen i d-yura nnbi Iceɛya mi d-yenna : Lǧil-agi țɛebbiden-iyi s yimi-nsen kan, lameɛna deg ulawen-nsen beɛden fell-i aṭas.
Aɛebbed-agi i yi-țɛebbiden ur yesɛi ara lqima, imi ayen sselmaden mačči s ɣuṛ-i i d-yekka meɛna d lɛaddat n yemdanen kan.
Tețțaǧǧam lumuṛat i d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi akken aț-țtebɛem leɛwayed n yemdanen .
Sidna Ɛisa yenna daɣen : Tețțarram di ṭṭerf lumuṛ n Ṛebbi, iwakken aț-țeṭṭfem di leɛwayed-nwen.
Axaṭer Musa yenna-d qadeṛ baba-k d yemma-k. Yenna-d daɣen : Win ara ineɛlen baba-s d yemma-s, ad ițwaḥkem fell-as s lmut.
Ma d kunwi tesselmadem belli yezmer yiwen ad yini i baba-s neɣ i yemma-s : « Ayen s wacu ilaq a kkun-refdeɣ, fkiɣ-t d lqeṛban, ( yeɛni d lweɛda i Ṛebbi ). »
S wakka tserrḥem-as ur yețɛawan ara imawlan-is.
Atah wamek i tețbeddilem awal n Ṛebbi s lɛaddat-nwen yerna aṭas n temsalin nniḍen i txeddmem am tigi.
Yessawel daɣen i lɣaci yenna yasen : Smeḥset-iyi-d akk, tfehmem :
Mačči d ayen ikečmen ɣer daxel n wemdan ara t-yesneǧsen, meɛna d ayen i d-ițeffɣen seg ul-is.
Mi geǧǧa lɣaci-nni, yekcem ɣer yiwen wexxam, inelmaden-is ssutren as a sen-d-issefhem lemtel nni.
Yenna-yasen : Eɛni ula d kunwi ur tefhimem ara ayen bɣiɣ a wen-t-id-iniɣ ? Ur teẓrim ara belli mačči d ayen i gkeččmen ɣer daxel n wemdan i t-yessenǧasen ?
Axaṭer ayagi ur ikeččem ara ɣer wul-is, meɛna ɣer uɛebbuḍ-is, dɣa ad ițwadeggeṛ ɣer beṛṛa. S wakka, i gesseḥlel Sidna Ɛisa yal lqut.
Yerna yenna : D ayen i d-ițeffɣen seg wemdan i t-yessenǧasen.
Axaṭer si zdaxel n wul-is i d-țeffɣen yir ixemmimen : asefsed, tukerḍa, timegṛaḍ,
zzna, yir ccehwat, cceṛ, tiḥila, lexdeɛ, tismin, lekfeṛ, zzux, d wayen akk yellan d lehbala.
Ayagi akk ițeffeɣ-ed seg ul n wemdan yessenǧas-it.
Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ syenna ɣer leǧwahi n temdint n ?ur. Yekcem ɣer yiwen wexxam. Ur yebɣi ara a t-ẓren medden anda yella, lameɛna ur yezmir ara ad iffer fell-asen.
?-țideț, akken kan yewweḍ, ațaya yiwet n tmeṭṭut yesɛan yelli-s izdeɣ-iț uṛuḥani ; tesla s Sidna Ɛisa dɣa tusa-d teɣli ɣer idaṛṛen-is.
Deg wussan-nni, innejmaɛ-ed daɣen waṭas n lɣaci, ur sɛin ara ayen ara ččen. Sidna Ɛisa yessawel i inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen :
Tejreḥ tasa-w ɣef lɣaci-agi, tlata wussan aya i qqimen yid-i, yerna ulac ayen ara ččen.
Ma yella rriɣ-ten ansi i d-kkan i laẓ, ad nezfen deg webrid axaṭer kra deg-sen usan-d si lebɛid.
Inelmaden-is rran-as-d : Ansi ara ɣ-d-yekk weɣṛum ara ten-yesseṛwun deg wemkan-agi yexlan ?
Sidna Ɛisa yesteqsa-ten : Acḥal n teḥbulin n weɣṛum i tesɛam ? Rran-as-ed : ?uṛ-nneɣ sebɛa teḥbulin !
Yenna i lɣaci ad qqimen ɣer lqaɛa. Dɣa yeddem-ed sebɛa teḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum, yeḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi, yebḍa-tent, yefka-tent i inelmaden-is feṛqen-tent i lɣaci.
Sɛan daɣen kra iselman ( iḥewtiwen ) imecṭaḥ. Yeḥmed daɣen Sidi Ṛebbi, yenna-yasen a ten-feṛqen i lɣaci.
?čan armi ṛwan. Rnan sagren-d azal n sebɛa iqecwalen.
Llan deg wazal n ṛebɛa alaf n yemdanen. Mi fukken lmakla, iserreḥ-asen ad uɣalen ɣer ixxamen-nsen.
Imiren kan yuli ɣer teflukt nețța d inelmaden-is, ṛuḥen ɣer leǧwahi n Dalmanuta.
Ṛuḥen-d ifariziyen, bdan țmeslayen d Sidna Ɛisa iwakken a t-jeṛṛben, ssutren-as ad ixdem lbeṛhan ara d-iṣubben seg igenni.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-d nnehta, yenna : Acuɣer i yi-d-ssuturen lbeṛhan yemdanen n lǧil-agi ? S tideț aql-i nniɣ-awen : d lmuḥal a s-d-ițunefk lbeṛhan i lǧil-agi !
Dɣa yeǧǧa-ten, yerkeb daɣen di teflukt iwakken ad izger agummaḍ.
Inelmaden țțun ur wwin ara aɣṛum anagar yiwet n teḥbult i gellan ɣuṛ-sen di teflukt.
Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa-ten, yenna-yasen : ?adret iman-nwen ɣef temtunt ( iɣes ) n ifariziyen akk-d win n Hiṛudus.
Inelmaden qqaṛen wway gar asen : «Yenna-yaɣ-d ayagi imi ur d newwi ara aɣṛum.»
Mi geẓra ayen țxemmimen, yenna-yasen : Acuɣer tețxemimem ɣef weɣṛum ? Urɛad tfaqem ? Mazal ur tefhimem ara ?
Eɛni qquṛen wulawen-nwen ? Tesɛam allen ur tețwalim ara, tesɛam imeẓẓuɣen ur tsellem ara ?
Ur tecfim ara mi bḍiɣ xemsa teḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum i xemsa alaf n yergazen, acḥal n iḍellaɛen n tsigar i tjemɛem ? Rran-as : Tnac iḍellaɛen.
I wasmi bḍiɣ sebɛa teḥbulin n weɣṛum i ṛebɛa alaf n yemdanen, acḥal n tqecwalin yeččuṛen ț-țisigar i d-tjemɛem ? Nnan-as : Sebɛa n tqecwalin.
Ewwḍen ɣer temdint n Bitsayda. Wwin-as-d yiwen uderɣal, ḥellelen-t iwakken a t-yennal.
Sidna Ɛisa yeṭṭef afus i uderɣal-nni, yewwi-t beṛṛa n taddart. Yessers imetman ɣef wallen n uderɣal-nni, yessers ifassen is fell-as yesteqsa-t : Yella kra tețwaliḍ ?
Yerfed allen-is yenna : ?waliɣ imdanen am akken d ttjuṛ i gleḥḥun.
Sidna Ɛisa iɛawed issers-as ifassen ɣef wallen, mi gemmuqel uderɣal-nni, yuɣal-it-id yeẓri, ițwali akken ilaq.
Dɣa Sidna Ɛisa iceggeɛ-it ɣer wexxam-is, yenna-yas : Ur keččem ara ɣer taddart.
Sidna Ɛisa akk-d inelmaden-is ṛuḥen ɣer tudrin n Qiṣarya n Filibus. Deg webrid, yesteqsa-ten yenna yasen : D acu-yi ɣer lɣaci ?
Rran-as-d : Kra deg-sen qqaṛen d Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas i telliḍ, wiyaḍ qqaṛen d Sidna Ilyas, ma d wiyaḍ ḥesben-k d yiwen si lenbiya.
Yerna yesteqsa-ten : I kunwi, d acu-iyi ɣuṛ-wen ? Buṭrus yerra-yas : Keččini d Lmasiḥ. ( yeɛni win yextaṛ Ṛebbi )
Yumeṛ-iten iwakken ur țɛawaden i yiwen ayagi.

Sidna Ɛisa yebda yesselmad-iten yeqqaṛ : Mmi-s n bunadem ilaq ad yenɛețțab aṭas ; a t-nekkṛen lecyux d lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d lɛulama n ccariɛa. A t-nɣen, m'ara ɛeddin tlata wussan, a d-iḥyu si ger lmegtin.
Yenna-yasen-d ayagi ɛinani. Buṭrus ijbed-it weḥd-es, ilumm fell-as.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna daɣen : -- S tideț a wen-d-iniɣ, kra seg wid yellan dagi, ur țmețțaten ara alamma walan tagelda n Ṛebbi tusa-d s tmanegt tameqqrant.
Mi ɛeddan sețța wussan, Sidna Ɛisa yewwi yid-es Buṭrus, Yeɛqub d Yuḥenna, ulin ɣer yiwen wedrar ɛlayen. Mi llan dinna weḥḥed-sen, tenbeddal ṣṣifa-s zdat-sen,
llebsa-s tuɣal ț-țamellalt tețfeǧǧiǧ, ula d yiwen di ddunit ur izmir a ten yessimlul akken.
?ehṛen-asen-d nnbi Ilyas akk-d Sidna Musa, țmeslayen d Sidna Ɛisa.
Yenṭeq Buṭrus yenna i Sidna Ɛisa : A Sidi, yelha imi nella dagi. A nesbedd tlata iqiḍunen ; yiwen i kečč, wayeḍ i Sidna Musa wayeḍ i Sidna Ilyas.
Ur yeẓri d acu i d-yeqqaṛ axaṭer tekcem-iten lxelɛa ț-țameqqrant.
Taswiɛt kan ters-ed yiwet n tagut tɣumm-iten, si tagut-nni tenṭeq-ed yiwet n taɣect tenna-d : Wagi d Mmi ameɛzuz, smeḥsiset as !
Imiren kan, inelmaden muqlen ɣer mkul tama, ur walan ula d yiwen, anagar Sidna Ɛisa yellan yid-sen.
Mi d-ṣubben seg udrar, Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa-ten : Ur ḥekkut i yiwen ayen teẓram, alamma yeḥya-d Mmi-s n bunadem si ger lmegtin.
Uɣen-as awal, d acu kan țemsteqsayen, qqaṛen : Acu i d lmeɛna n ḥeggu si ger lmegtin ?
Inelmaden steqsan-t nnan-as : Acuɣer lɛulama n ccariɛa qqaṛen-d : ilaq a d-yas uqbel Sidna Ilyas ?
Yerra-yasen : ?-țideț, a d-yas uqbel Ilyas, iwakken ad iseggem kullec. lameɛna acuɣer yețwakteb ɣef Mmi-s n bunadem belli ilaq ad yenɛețțab aṭas yerna ad yețwaqehheṛ ?
Aql-i nniɣ-awen : Ilyas yusa-d, xedmen deg-s akken bɣan, am akken yețwakteb fell-as di tira iqedsen.
Mi d-ṣubben seg udrar, ufan-d lɣaci akk-d lɛulama n ccariɛa zzin i inelmaden nniḍen, țmeslayen yid-sen.
Mi d-walan Sidna Ɛisa, dehcen, uzzlen ad selmen fell-as.
Sidna Ɛisa yesteqsa-ten : ?ef wacu i tețmeslayem akka yid-sen ?
Yiwen wergaz si lɣaci-nni yerra-yas-d : A Sidi, wwiɣ-ak-d mmi axaṭer yesgugem-it uṛuḥani.
Kra wanda ara t-yeṭṭef, yesseɣlay-it ɣer lqaɛa ; aqcic yessufuɣ-ed tikufta, yețqeṛṛic tuɣmas, yețțuɣal d asemmaḍ. ?elleleɣ inelmaden-ik a t-ssufɣen seg-s meɛna ur zmiren ara.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : A lǧil i gxuṣṣ liman ! Ar melmi ara yiliɣ yid-wen ? Ar melmi ara wen-ṣebṛeɣ ? Awit-ed aqcic-agi ! Wwin-as-t-id ;
akken kan iwala Sidna Ɛisa, aṛuḥani-nni yebda yețhuccu aqcic-nni, yesseɣli-t ɣer lqaɛa yessemṛareɣ-it armi i s-d yessufeɣ tikufta.
Sidna Ɛisa yesteqsa baba-s n weqcic-nni yenna-yas : Si melmi i d-ideṛṛu yid-es wayagi ? Yerra-yas-d : Seg wasmi yella d amecṭuḥ.
Acḥal d abrid i t-idemmer uṛuḥani-agi ɣer tmes d waman iwakken a t-ineɣ. Tura, ma yella wayen iwumi tzemreḍ, ḥunn fell-aɣ, ɛiwen-aɣ !
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Teqqaṛeḍ : ma tzemreḍ... ? Win yețțamnen yezmer i kullec !
Imiren kan, baba-s n weqcic-nni yenna : Umneɣ ! Meɛna sseǧhed-iyi axaṭer xuṣṣeɣ di liman.
Sidna Ɛisa mi gwala lɣaci uzzlen-d ɣuṛ-sen, yumeṛ i uṛuḥani-nni, yenna-yas : Ay aṛuḥani ! yesgugumen yesɛuẓẓugen, effeɣ seg weqcic-agi ur țɛawad ara aț-țkecmeḍ deg-s !
Imiren iɛeggeḍ, ihucc-it nezzeh, dɣa yeffeɣ seg-s. Aqcic-nni yuɣal am lmegget, daymi aṭas i s-yeqqaṛen : « yemmut. »
Meɛna Sidna Ɛisa yeṭṭef-as afus, isekker-it-id, ibedd.
Mi kecmen ɣer wexxam, inelmaden-is steqsan-t : Acuɣer ur nezmir ara nukni a nessufeɣ aṛuḥani-nni ?
Yenna-yasen : Iwakken aț-țessufɣem iṛuḥaniyen am wigi, ilaq aț-țețțuẓumem yerna aț-țețẓallam.
Ṛuḥen syenna, zegren tamurt n Jlili. Sidna Ɛisa ur yebɣi ara ad ẓren lɣaci anda i gella,
axaṭer yesselmad inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen : Mmi-s n bunadem ad ițțusellem ger ifassen n yemdanen, a t-nɣen, meɛna tlata wussan mbeɛd lmut-is a d-iḥyu.
Inelmaden-is ur fhimen ara lmeɛna n wawal-agi, yerna kukran a t-steqsin.
Mi ewwḍen ɣer temdint n Kafernaḥum. llan deg wexxam, Sidna Ɛisa yesteqsa-ten : ?ef wacu i tețmeslayem deg webrid ?
Lameɛna ssusmen akken ma llan, axaṭer deg webrid țmesteqsayen anwa i d ameqqran gar-asen.
Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim, yessawel i tnac-nni inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen : Win yebɣan ad yili d amezwaru, ilaq ad yeqqim d aneggaru, ad yuɣal d aqeddac i mkul yiwen.
Sidna Ɛisa yeṭṭef abrid ɣer tmurt n Yahuda agummaḍ i wasif n Urdun. Nnejmaɛen-d daɣen ɣuṛ-es aṭas n lɣaci. Yebda yesselmad-iten akken yennum.
Ifariziyen qesden-t-id a t-jeṛṛben. Steqsan-t nnan-as : Yeḥlel i wergaz ad yebru i tmeṭṭut-is neɣ ala ?
Yerra-yasen : Acu n lameṛ i wen-d-yeǧǧa Musa ?
Nnan-as : Sidna Musa issereḥ-aɣ a nebru i tmeṭṭut-nneɣ ma nefka-yas leɛqed n berru.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : ?ef ddemma n wulawen-nwen yeqquṛen i wen-d-yeǧǧa lameṛ-agi.
Lameɛna di tazwara, Sidi Ṛebbi ixleq-ed argaz ț-țmeṭṭut .
Daymi : Argaz ad yeǧǧ baba-s akk-d yemma-s,iwakken ad iɛic ț-țmeṭṭut-is.
Imiren, di sin yid-sen ad uɣalen d yiwet n lǧețța. S wakka, ur llin ara d sin meɛna ad uɣalen d yiwen.
Ihi, ur feṛqet ara wayen yesdukkel Ṛebbi.
Mi llan deg wexxam, steqsan-t daɣen inelmaden-is ɣef wannect-nni.
Yerra-yasen : Kra win ara yebrun i tmeṭṭut-is yuɣ tayeḍ, ixdeɛ tameṭṭut tamezwarut, yezna.
Akken daɣen, tameṭṭut ara yebrun i wergaz-is aț-țaɣ wayeḍ, tezna.
Kra yemdanen wwin-as-d arrac imecṭuḥen iwakken ad yessers ifassen-is fell-asen, meɛna inelmaden țțaran-ten.
Mi ten-iwala Sidna Ɛisa, yezɛef fell-asen yenna-yasen : Anfet i warrac a d-asen ɣuṛ-i ! Ur ten-țțarrat ara, axaṭer tagelda n Ṛebbi i wid yellan am nutni.
A wen-iniɣ tideț : kra win ur neqbil ara tagelda n Ṛebbi am weqcic amecṭuḥ, ur ț-ikeččem ara.
Imiren issuden-iten, yessers ifassen-is fell-asen, dɣa iburek-iten.
Akken iteddu Sidna Ɛisa ad iṛuḥ, ataya yiwen ilemẓi yeɣli ɣef tgecrar zdat-es, yenna-yas : A ccix yelhan, d acu ilaqen a t-xedmeɣ iwakken ad sɛuɣ tudert n dayem ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Acuɣeṛ i yi-tsemmaḍ « win yelhan » ? Ulac win yelhan, anagar Ṛebbi weḥd-es.
Tessneḍ ccariɛa n Musa : Ur tneqqeḍ ara, ur tzennuḍ ara, ur tețțakṛeḍ ara, ur tețcehhiḍeḍ ara s ẓẓur, ur txeddɛeḍ ( tețḍuṛuḍ ) ara, aț-țqadṛeḍ baba-k d yemma-k.
Yerra-yas : A Sidi, ayagi akk xedmeɣ-t seg wasmi lliɣ d ameẓyan.
Sidna Ɛisa imuqel-it s leḥnana yenna-yas : Txuṣṣ-ik kan yiwet n lḥaǧa : ṛuḥ, zzenz akk ayen tesɛiḍ, tseddqeḍ-t i imeɣban iwakken aț-țesɛuḍ agerruj deg igenni ; imiren as-ed tbeɛ-iyi-d.
Mi gesla ilemẓi-nni i imeslayen n Sidna Ɛisa, yennuɣna. Iṛuḥ s leḥzen axaṭer yesɛa aṭas n cci.
Sidna Ɛisa imuqel wid i s-d-izzin, yenna i inelmaden-is : Acḥal i gewɛeṛ i wid yesɛan cci ad kecmen ɣer tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi !
Inelmaden-is dehcen mi slan imeslayen-agi. Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen daɣen : Acḥal i gewɛeṛ unekcum ɣer tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi a tarwa !
Ishel-as i welɣem ad iɛeddi di tiṭ n tissegnit wala i umeṛkanti ad ikcem ɣer tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ayagi issewhem inelmaden akteṛ, qqaṛen wway gar-asen : Ihi, anwa i gzemren ad ițțusellek ?
Sidna Ɛisa imuqel-iten, yenna yasen : Ayen yellan d lmuḥal i wemdan yeshel i Sidi Ṛebbi, imi Sidi Ṛebbi yezmer i kullec.
Buṭrus yenna-yas : Aql-aɣ neǧǧa kullec yerna netbeɛ-ik.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : win yeǧǧan axxam-is, ayetma-s, yessetma-s, yemma-s, baba-s, arraw-is, tiferkiwin-is ( akal-is ), ɣef ddemma-w akk-d ddemma n ubecceṛ n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ,
Mi qṛib ad awḍen ɣer temdint n Lquds, zdat n tuddar n Bitfaji akk-d Bitanya ɣer tama n yiɣil n uzemmur, Sidna Ɛisa iceggeɛ sin seg inelmaden-is
yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet ɣer taddart-nni yellan zdat-wen, m'ara tawḍem aț-țafem aɣyul d amecṭuḥ yeqqen, leɛmeṛ yerkeb fell-as ula d yiwen. Fsit-as-ed cced tawim-t-id.
Ma yella win i wen-d-yennan : « acimi txeddmem ayagi ? » Innit-as : « yeḥwaǧ-it Ssid-nneɣ, taswiɛt kan a wen-t id-yerr. »
Ṛuḥen inelmaden-nni ufan aɣyul deg webrid yeqqen ɣer tewwurt n yiwen n wexxam, fsin-as ccedd.
Kra seg wid yellan dinna nnan asen : D acu txeddmem akka ? Acuɣer i d-tserḥem i weɣyul-agi ?
Rran-asen akken i sen-d-yenna Sidna Ɛisa, dɣa ǧǧan-ten.
Wwin-d aɣyul-nni i Sidna Ɛisa, ssersen fell-as llebsa-nsen iwakken ad yerkeb fell-as.
Aṭas i s-ițessun llebsa-nsen deg webrid, ma d wiyaḍ țessun-as tiseḍwa i d-ge?men si lexla.
Wid yezwaren d wid yettabaɛen țɛeggiḍen : « ?usana, ad yețțubarek win i d-yusan s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi !
Tețțubarek tgeldit i d-yusan, tageldit n Sidna Dawed baba-tneɣ ! ?usana ( tamanegt ) deg imukan ɛlayen. »

Sidna Ɛisa yebda ițmeslay-asen s lemtul : Yiwen wergaz yeẓẓa tafeṛṛant, izeṛṛeb-iț, yeɣza amkan i tɛeṣṣart n tẓurin yerna yebna taxxamt n tɛessast. Issekra-ț i ixemmasen n tfeṛṛant imiren iṛuḥ ad yinig.
Mi d-yewweḍ lweqt n tẓurin, iceggeɛ aqeddac-is ɣer ixemmasen-nni iwakken a s-d-fken amur-is.
Meɛna ṭṭfen aqeddac-nni, wwten-t, qecɛen-t ifassen-is d ilmawen.
Iceggeɛ-asen aqeddac wis sin , reggmen-t yerna wwten-t ula d nețța ɣer uqeṛṛuy.
Iceggeɛ-asen aqeddac wis tlata, wagi nɣan-t. Iceggeɛ-asen aṭas iqeddacen nniḍen, kra nɣan-ten kra wten-ten .
Yeqqim-as-d anagar mmi-s ameɛzuz. Iceggeɛ-it d aneggaru ɣuṛ-sen, yenna : « ahat a t-qadṛen imi d mmi. »
Meɛna ixemmasen-agi nnan wway gar-asen : « atan win ara iweṛten ! Ekkret a t-nenneɣ iwakken lweṛt nni ad yuɣal d ayla-nneɣ !»
?ṭfen-t-id wwten-t armi yemmut, imiren ḍeggṛen-t ɣer beṛṛa n tfeṛṛant.
D acu ara yexdem tura bab n tfeṛṛant ? A d-yas nețța s yiman-is, ad ineɣ ixemmasen-nni ad yernu ad iwekkel tafeṛṛant-nni i wiyaḍ.
Eɛni ur teɣṛim ara awal-agi n tira iqedsen ? Adɣaɣ i ḍeggṛen wid ibennun, d nețța i guɣalen d azṛu alemmas yeṭṭfen lebni.
Ayagi yekka-d s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, yerna ɣer ɣuṛ-nneɣ d ayen i gessewhamen !
Faqen belli fell-asen i d-yewwi lemtel-agi. Bɣan a t-ṭṭfen imiren, lameɛna uggaden lɣaci ; dɣa ǧǧan-t, ṛuḥen.
Kra ifariziyen akk-d kra seg wid yellan si terbaɛt n Hiṛudus, ceggɛen ɣer Sidna Ɛisa iwakken a t-id-sseɣlin deg wawal akken a t-ṭṭfen s imeslayen-is.

Usan-d nnan-as : A Sidi, neẓra belli theddṛeḍ ṣṣeḥ, ur txeddmeḍ ara lxilaf ger yemdanen, tesselmadeḍ abrid n Ṛebbi s tideț. Ini-yaɣ-d : d leḥlal neɣ d leḥṛam fell-aɣ ma nxelleṣ tabzert i wugellid Qayṣer (yesṭeɛmeṛen tamurt-nneɣ) ?
Sidna Ɛisa ifaq i tḥila-nsen, yenna-yasen : Acuɣer i yi-d-tneddim tifxeț ? Awit-iyi-d aṣurdi iwakken a t-ẓreɣ.
Fkan-as-d aṣurdi dɣa yenna yasen : Udem-agi d wayen yuran fell-as wi ten-ilan ? Nnan-as : N Qayṣer. Imiren Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen :
Erret ihi i Qayṣer ayen yellan n Qayṣeṛ, terrem i Ṛebbi ayen yellan n Ṛebbi. Qqimen wehmen deg-s.
Isaduqiyen yellan d wid ur nețțamen ara s ḥeggu n lmegtin, usan-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa steqsan-t :
A Sidi, atan wayen i ɣ-d yeǧǧa Sidna Musa di ccariɛa : Ma yella yemmut wergaz yeǧǧa-d tameṭṭut-is, m'ur yesɛi ara dderya, ilaq gma-s ad yerr tameṭṭut-nni iwakken a d-yesɛu dderya i gma-s yemmuten.
Llan ihi sebɛa watmaten : amezwaru yezweǧ yuɣal yemmut ur d-yeǧǧi ara dderya.
Wis sin yuɣ taǧǧalt-nni, yemmut ula d nețța mbla ma yeǧǧa-d dderya. Akken daɣen i tedṛa d wis tlata,
ula d yiwen si sebɛa-nni i gzewǧen yid-es ur d-yeǧǧi dderya. ?er taggara, ula ț-țameṭṭut-nni temmut.
Asmi ara d-ḥyun lmegtin, anwa si sebɛa watmaten-nni ara ț-yesɛun ț-țameṭṭut-is imi i ț-uɣen di sebɛa yid-sen ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Tɣelṭem ! Ur tefhimem tira iqedsen, ur tessinem tazmert n Ṛebbi.
Axaṭer ass n ḥeggu n lmegtin, irgazen ț-țlawin ur țemyezwaǧen ara, lameɛna ad ilin am lmalayekkat deg igenwan.
Ma d ayen yeɛnan ḥeggu n lmegtin, leɛmeṛ ur teɣṛim di tektabt n Musa, mi t-id-iluɛa Sidi Ṛebbi zdat udarnu ireqqen ? Yenna-yas-d : Nekk d Illu n Ibṛahim, d Illu n Isḥaq, d Illu n Yeɛqub.
Ihi Ṛebbi mačči d Illu n lmegtin i gella, lameɛna d Illu n wid yeddren. S tideț, atan tɣelṭem aṭas.
Yiwen n umusnaw n ccariɛa mi geẓra Sidna Ɛisa ijaweb akken ilaq, iqeṛṛeb ɣuṛ-es yenna-yas : Anwa i d lameṛ ameqqran di ccariɛa ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Atah lameṛ ameqqran : ?ess-ed ay agdud n Isṛail ! Sidi Ṛebbi-nneɣ d yiwen.
Ilaq aț-țḥemmleḍ Sidi Ṛebbi s wul-ik, s teṛwiḥt-ik akk, s wayen yellan di tezmert-ik akk-d lɛeqliya-k meṛṛa .
Atah wis sin : Ilaq aț-țḥemleḍ lɣiṛ-ik am yiman-ik. Ulac lameṛ yugaren wigi.
Lɛalem-nni yenna-yas : ?-țideț a Sidi ! Ayen i d-tenniḍ d ṣṣeḥ ; Ṛebbi d yiwen ulac wayeḍ.
Yerna ma nḥemmel-it s wul-nneɣ, s lɛeqliya-nneɣ, akk-d wayen yellan di țezmert-nneɣ meṛṛa, ma nḥemmel daɣen lɣiṛ-nneɣ am yiman-nneɣ, annect-agi axiṛ n iseflawen akk-d lewɛadi.
Sidna Ɛisa mi t-iwala ijaweb-ed s tmusni, yenna-yas : Ur tebɛideḍ ara ɣef tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi. Ulac win i s-d-yernan asteqsi nniḍen.
Mi gella Sidna Ɛisa yesselmad di lǧameɛ iqedsen yenna : Amek armi imusnawen n ccariɛa qqaṛen-d belli Lmasiḥ d mmi-s n Sidna Dawed ?
S Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i d-yenna Dawed s yiman-is : Sidi Ṛebbi yenna-d i Sidi : Qqim ɣer tama-w tayeffust alamma rriɣ iɛdawen-ik seddaw iḍaṛṛen-ik.
Dawed s yiman-is issawel-as « a Sidi », amek ihi yezmer ad yili d mmi-s ? Aṭas n lɣaci i s-yesmeḥsisen s lfeṛḥ.
Sidna Ɛisa yesselmad lɣaci yeqqaṛ-asen : ?adret daɣen iman-nwen ɣef yimusnawen n ccariɛa i gḥemmlen ad ḥewwsen s ijellaben iɣezfanen, ḥemmlen daɣen ad selmen fell-asen medden di leswaq ;
țextiṛin imukan imezwura di leǧwameɛ akk-d imukan lɛali di tmeɣṛiwin, lameɛna
tețțen ayla n tuǧǧal ; ssiɣzifen taẓallit iwakken a ten-id-walin yemdanen. Lɛiqab-nsen ad yili d ameqqran !
Sidna Ɛisa yella yeqqim deg umkan iqublen asenduq i deg srusun lewɛadi, yețmuqul amek srusuyen lɣaci lewɛadi-nsen. Aṭas n imeṛkantiyen yeggaren xiṛella n yedrimen.
Tusa-d yiwet n taǧǧalt tigellilt tessers sin iṣurdiyen yesɛan azal n ṛebɛa twiztin n lfeṭṭa.
Sidna Ɛisa yessawel i inelmaden-is, yenna yasen : A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : lweɛda i tessers taǧǧalt-agi taẓawalit, tugar akk lewɛadi i ssersen wiyaḍ.
Axaṭer wiyaḍ seddqen seg wayen sɛan d zzyada, ma d nețțat tseddeq ciṭṭuh-nni s wacu ara tɛic.
Mi d-iffeɣ Sidna Ɛisa si lǧameɛ iqedsen, yiwen seg inelmaden-is yenna-yas : A Sidi, muqel acḥal yecbeḥ lebni-agi ! Acḥal cebḥen yedɣaɣen-is !
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Deg wayagi irkul i tețwaliḍ, ur d-yețɣimi yiwen wedɣaɣ ɣef wayeḍ ; kullec ad ihudd.
Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim deg iɣil uzemmur iqublen lǧameɛ iqedsen. Buṭrus, Yeɛqub, Yuḥenna akk-d Andriyus i gellan yid-es, steqsan-t :
Ini-yaɣ-d melmi ara d-yedṛu wayagi ; d acu ara ɣ-d-isbeggnen lweqt i deg ara yedṛu wannect-a.
Imiren, Sidna Ɛisa yebda yețweṣṣi ten : ?uṛ-wat win ara kkun-ikellxen !
Axaṭer aṭas ara d-yasen s yisem-iw, a wen-d-inin : « D nekk i d Lmasiḥ » ad kellxen i waṭas n lɣaci.
M'ara teslem s tegrawliwin i d-ideṛṛun di mkul amkan akk-d țid i d-iteddun, ur țțaggadet ara axaṭer ilaq a d-yedṛu wannect-nni, lameɛna mačči ț-țaggara n ddunit i d-yewḍen.
Agdud a d-yekker ɣer wayeḍ, tageldit aț-țennaɣ ț-țayeḍ, a d-ilint zzelzlat di kra imukan, a d-yili laẓ ; akkagi ara d-yebdu leɛtab di ddunit.

?adret ɣef yiman-nwen ; atan a kkun-caṛɛen zdat lɛulama n ccariɛa, a kkun-wten di leǧwameɛ. ?ef ddemma-w, a kkun-sbedden zdat wid i gḥekmen tamurt akk-d igelliden iwakken aț-țilim d inigan-iw zdat-nsen.
Lameɛna di tazwara ilaq lexbaṛ n lxiṛ ad ițwabecceṛ uqbel i leǧnas meṛṛa.
M'ara kkun-ẓẓuɣṛen a kkun awin ɣer ccṛeɛ, ur xeddmet ara anezgum ɣef wayen ara tinim ; init-ed kan ayen ara wen-d-yasen di teswiɛt-nni, axaṭer mačči d kunwi ara imeslayen lameɛna d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
Yiwen ad yefk gma-s ɣer lmut, wayeḍ ad yefk mmi-s ; dderya a d-kkren ɣer imawlan-nsen a ten-ssiwḍen ɣer lmut.
A kkun-keṛhen irkul ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw. Lameɛna win ara yeṭṭfen alamma ț-țaggara ad ițwasellek.
Ass m'ara twalim lmuṣiba tameqqrant tella deg umkan anda ur ilaq ara aț-țili, « win ara yeɣṛen ayagi ilaq ad imeyyez ! » ass-nni wid ara yilin di tmurt n Yahuda ad rewlen ɣer idurar ;
win ara yilin s ufella n ssqef, ur ikeččem ara ɣer wexxam-is iwakken a d-iddem leḥwayeǧ-is.
Akken daɣen win ara yilin di lexla, ur yețțuɣal ara ɣer deffir iwakken a d-yawi abeṛnus-is.
A tawaɣit n tilawin ara yilin s tadist akk-d țid ara yeṣṣuṭuḍen deg wussan-nni.
Dɛut ɣer Ṛebbi iwakken ur d-ideṛṛu ara wannect-nni di ccetwa,
axaṭer deg wussan-nni, ad yili yiwen n leɛtab ur neẓri seg wasmi i d-texleq ddunit ar ass-a, yerna d ayen ur nețțuɣal a d-yedṛu.
Lemmer ur yessenqes ara Sidi Ṛebbi kra seg wussan-nni, yiwen ur yezmir ad imneɛ. Meɛna issenqes seg-sen ɣef ddemma n wid yextaṛ.
Di lweqt-nni ma yenna-yawen walebɛaḍ : « Lmasiḥ atah dagi » neɣ «atan dihin», ur t-țțamnet ara.
Axaṭer a d-asen wid ara yerren iman-nsen d Lmasiḥ neɣ d lenbiya, ad xeddmen lbeṛhanat akk-d licaṛat, iwakken ad kellxen ma zemren ula d wid yextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Qqimen-d sin wussan i Tfaska n izimer n leslak i deg xeddmen aɣṛum mbla tamtunt ( iɣes ). Lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lɛulama, țnadin s tḥila, sebba s wayes ara ḥebbsen Sidna Ɛisa iwakken a t-nɣen.
Qqaṛen : Ur nezmir ara a t-nessekcem ɣer lḥebs deg wass n lɛid, neɣ m'ulac lɣaci ad sekkren ccwal.

Sidna Ɛisa yella di taddart n Bitanya, deg wexxam n Semɛun ihelken lbeṛs ; mi qqimen ad ččen, ațaya yiwet n tmeṭṭut tekcem-ed, tewwi-d yid-es taqbuct ițwaxedmen s wezṛu amellal, teččuṛ d leɛṭeṛ yeṣfan ɣlayen. Teṛẓa taqbuct-nni, tesmar-iț ɣef wuqeṛṛuy n Sidna Ɛisa.
Kra deg-sen zeɛfen nnan : Acuɣer i tessexṣeṛ leɛṭeṛ-agi ?
Lemmer i t-nezzenz, a d-yawi akteṛ n telt meyya twiztin n lfeṭṭa ara nefṛeq i igellilen ! Dɣa rfan ɣef tmeṭṭut-nni.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna : Anfet-as acimi i ț-tesnuɣnayem ? Ayen akka i yi-texdem d ayen yelhan !
Igellilen ad ilin daymen gar-awen, tzemrem a ten-tɛiwnem melmi i wen yehwa ; ma d nekkini ur țɣimiɣ ara daymen yid-wen.
Ayen tezmer a t-texdem texdem it : tedhen lǧețța-w thegga-ț i temḍelt.
A wen-d-iniɣ tideț : di mkul amkan n ddunit anda ara yețțubecceṛ lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ, a d-țmektayen tameṭṭut-agi d wayen akka texdem.
Yudas n Qeṛyut yiwen si tnac inelmaden, iṛuḥ ɣer imeqqranen n lmuqedmin, yemsefham yid-sen amek ara sen yezzenz Sidna Ɛisa.
Feṛḥen aṭas mi s-slan, ɛuhden-t a s-fken idrimen. Imiren Yudas ițqellib tagniț i deg ara sen-t-yezzenz.
Ass amenzu n Tfaska n weɣṛum mbla tamtunt ( iɣes ), i deg zellun izimer n leslak, inelmaden nnan i Sidna Ɛisa : Anda tebɣiḍ a nheggi imensi n Tfaska ?
Iceggeɛ sin seg inelmaden-is, yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet ɣer temdint, a d-temlilem d yiwen wergaz yewwi-d tacmuxt n waman, tebɛet-eț ɣer wanda ara yekcem,
init i bab n wexxam-nni : Ssid-nneɣ yenna-yak : « anda-ț texxamt i deg ara ččeɣ imensi n Tfaska n izimer nekk d inelmaden-iw ? »
A kkun-yessali ɣer yiwet n tɣuṛfeț tameqqrant iwesɛen, kullec yella deg-s. Dinna ara theggim imensi n Tfaska.
Inelmaden ṛuḥen, mi wwḍen ɣer temdint, ufan kullec akken i sen-t yenna. Dɣa heggan imensi n Tfaska.
Mi d-teɣli tmeddit, Sidna Ɛisa yusa-d akk-d tnac-nni inelmaden.
Mi qqimen ad ččen, Sidna Ɛisa yenna yasen : A wen-iniɣ tideț : yiwen seg-wen itețțen yid-i, ad iyi-ixdeɛ.
Yeɣli-d leḥzen fell-asen, bdan steqsayen-t yiwen yiwen qqaṛen-as : A Sidi, neɣ mačči d nekk ?
Yenna-yasen : D yiwen seg-wen, yessasnen yid-i talqimt n weɣṛum deg uḍebsi.
?-țideț, Mmi-s n bunadem ad iṛuḥ akken yețwakteb fell-as di tira iqedsen ; meɛna a nnger n wergaz-nni ara t-ixedɛen. Axiṛ-as lemmer ur d-ilul ara ɣer ddunit !
Mi bdan tețțen, Sidna Ɛisa yeddem-d aɣṛum, yeḥmed Ṛebbi, yebḍa-t, ifṛeq-it i inelmaden-is, yenna yasen : ?čet-eț, ayagi d-lǧețța-w.
Yeddem-ed daɣen lkas n ccṛab, yeḥmed Ṛebbi, yefka-yasen, swan meṛṛa seg-s.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Ayagi d idammen n leɛqed amaynut, d idammen-iw ara yazlen ɣef waṭas n yemdanen.
S tideț nniɣ-awen : ur țuɣaleɣ ara ad sweɣ si lfakya n tẓurin, alamma d ass i deg ara sweɣ ccṛab ajdid di tgelda n Ṛebbi.
Mi cnan isefra n ?abur, ulin ɣer yiɣil n uzemmur.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : A kkun-yewwet akk wugur akken yețwakteb : Ad ewwteɣ ameksa, ulli ad rewlent ɣer mkul lǧiha .
Yerna-yasen-d : Meɛna m'ara d-ḥyuɣ si ger lmegtin a wen-zwireɣ ɣer tmurt n Jlili.
Buṭrus yenna-yas : ?as ad ccḍen akk, nekkini ur țeccḍeɣ ara.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : A k-d-iniɣ tideț : iḍ-agi uqbel ad yeskkuɛ uyaziḍ snat n tikkal, kečč a i-tnekṛeḍ tlata iberdan.
Meɛna Buṭrus yenna-yas daɣen : Ad qebleɣ ad dduɣ yid-ek ula ɣer lmut wala a k-nekkṛeɣ. Inelmaden nniḍen nnan-d meṛṛa akken.
?ṣbeḥ zik, lmuqedmin imeqqranen ruḥen mcawaṛen akk-d imeqqranen n wegdud, lɛulama n ccariɛa akk dusqamu n ccṛeɛ. Urzen Sidna Ɛisa, wwin-t sellmen-t i Bilaṭus.
Bilaṭus yesteqsa-t yenna yas : D kečč i d agellid n wat Isṛail ? Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Tenniḍ-t-id.
Lmuqedmin imeqqranen ccetkan fell-as ɣef waṭas n temsalin.
Bilaṭus yerna yesteqsa-t : Ur d-tețțaraḍ ara awal ? Ur tesliḍ ara ayen akk s wayes i d-țcetkin fell-ak ?
Meɛna Sidna Ɛisa ur d-yerri acemma ; Bilaṭus yewhem deg-s.
Di mkul lɛid, Bilaṭus ițserriḥ-ed i yiwen umeḥbus, win ara s-ssutren lɣaci.
Yella yiwen umeḥbus isem-is Barabas, yețwaḥbes nețța akk-d imcewwlen nniḍen ɣef ddemma n ccwal i d-yeskker, yerna yenɣa tamgeṛṭ.
Lɣaci ulin ɣer Bilaṭus iwakken a s-ssutren ayen yennum ixeddem-asen-t.
Bilaṭus yerra-yasen-d : Tebɣam a wen-d-serrḥeɣ i ugellid n wat Isṛail ?
Axaṭer ifaq belli s tismin i s-t-id-wwin lmuqedmin imeqqranen.
Lameɛna lmuqedmin imeqqranen sḥeṛcen lɣaci iwakken ad inin i Bilaṭus: « d Barabas iwumi ara d-tserrḥeḍ. »
Bilaṭus yenna-yasen daɣen : D acu tebɣam ad xedmeɣ s win iwumi teqqaṛem agellid n wat Isṛail ?
Bilaṭus yenna-yasen : D acu i gexdem n diri ? Rnan țɛeggiḍen akteṛ : ?emmeṛ-it ɣef wumidag !
Imi i gebɣa Bilaṭus ad yeddu di lebɣi i lɣaci, iserreḥ-ed i Barabas, ma d Sidna Ɛisa yefka lameṛ a t-ewten s ujelkkaḍ, syenna a t-semmṛen ɣef wumidag.
Lɛeskeṛ wwin Sidna Ɛisa ɣer wefrag n lbeṛj, ssawlen-d i terbaɛt nsen.
Sburren-as abeṛnus azeggaɣ, xedmen-d taɛeṣṣabt s isennanen ssersen-ț ɣef wuqeṛṛuy-is.
Stehzayen fell-as qqaṛen-as : Azul fell-ak, ay agellid n wat Isṛail !
Kkaten-t s uɣanim ɣer uqeṛṛuy, ssusufen-t, kerfen tigecrar iwakken ad seǧǧden zdat-es.
Mi stehzan fell-as, kksen-as abeṛnus-nni azeggaɣ, rran-as lqecc-is, imiren wwin-t ɣer beṛṛa iwakken a t-ṣemmṛen ɣef lluḥ.
Iɛedda-d syenna yiwen umsebrid i d-yuɣalen si lexla, isem-is Semɛun n Qiṛwan, baba-s n Alexandrus akk-d Rufus ; ḥeṛsen-t lɛeskeṛ iwakken ad ibbib amidag n Sidna Ɛisa.
?ẓuɣṛen Sidna Ɛisa armi d yiwen n wemkan ițțusemman Gulguṭa, yeɛni « tiɣilt n uqeṛṛuy.»
Fkan-as ad isew ccṛab ixelḍen s uselɣaɣ n lmuṛ, lameɛna yugi a t-isew.
Semmṛen-t ɣef lluḥ, gren tasɣaṛt iwakken ad feṛqen llebsa-s.
Aț-țili d țesɛa n ṣṣbeḥ mi t-ṣemmṛen ɣef wumidag.
Uran sebba ɣef wacu i t-semmṛen : « Wagi d agellid n wat Isṛail.»
Semmṛen daɣen sin yemcumen, yiwen ɣer uyeffus-is wayeḍ ɣer uẓelmaḍ-is.
Mi gɛedda wass n westeɛfu, Meryem tamagdalit d Meryem yemma-s n Yeɛqub d Salumi uɣent-ed leɛṭeṛ iwakken ad dehnent lǧețța n Sidna Ɛisa.
Ass amezwaru n dduṛt, ṣṣbeḥ zik mi d-yecṛeq yiṭij, ṛuḥent ɣer uẓekka.
Qqaṛent wway gar-asent : Anwa ara ɣ-yekksen azṛu-nni ɣef yimi uẓekka ?
Mi refdent allen-nsent, walant azṛu-nni ameqqran yegrareb akkin.
Kecment ɣer daxel uẓekka , walant yiwen ilemẓi yeqqim ɣer lǧiha tayeffust, yelsa llebsa tamellalt ; dehcent.
Yenna-yasent : Ur xellɛemt ara ! Tețnadimt ɣef Ɛisa anaṣari win yețwasemmṛen ɣef wumidag ? Ulac-it dagi, yeḥya-d si ger lmegtin. Muqlemt, atan wemkan anda i t-ssersen.
Ṛuḥemt tura, inimt-asen i inelmaden-is akk-d Buṭrus : atan yezwar ɣer tmurt n Jlili ; dinna ara t-teẓrem akken i wen-t-yenna.
Ffɣent-ed seg uẓekka-nni, rewlent s tergagit d lxelɛa, iffeɣ-itent leɛqel, daymi ur ɛawdent i yiwen ayen yedṛan.
Sidna Ɛisa yeḥya-d si ger lmegtin ass amezwaru n dduṛt, ass i d-yernan ɣef wass n westeɛfu. Di tazwara isbeggen-ed iman-is i Meryem tamagdalit, seg i d-issufeɣ sebɛa n leǧnun.
Wid akk iteddun d Sidna Ɛisa, mazal-iten di leḥzen d imeṭṭawen, mi d-tewwi Meryem lexbaṛ i inelmaden.
Mi slan yis yeḥya-d si ger lmegtin yerna twala-t, ur ț-uminen ara.
Yesbeggen-ed iman-is s ṣṣifa nniḍen, i sin seg inelmaden iteddun ɣer lexla.
Uɣalen-d xebbṛen inelmaden nniḍen, lameɛna ula d nutni ur ten uminen ara.
Yesbeggen-ed iman-is i ḥdac-nni inelmaden mi llan tețțen. Ilumm-iten ɣef lqella n liman-nsen d wulawen nsen yeqquṛen, imi ur uminen ara wid akk i t-yeẓran yeḥya-d.
Dɣa yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet beccṛet di ddunit meṛṛa, lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i yemdanen di mkul amkan.
Win ara yamnen, ara yețwaɣeḍsen, ad ițțusellek ; ma d win ur nețțamen ara, ur yețwasellak ara.
Atnah lbeṛhanat ara xeddmen wid yețțamnen yis-i : S yisem-iw ad ssufuɣen leǧnun, ad heddṛen timeslayin nniḍen,
ɣas ṭṭfen izerman neɣ swan ssem, ur sen-ixeddem acemma ; ad srusun ifassen-nsen ɣef yimuḍan a ten sseḥlun.
Mi gekfa yid-sen ameslay, Sidna Ɛisa yețwarfed ɣer igenni, yeqqim ɣer uyeffus n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Inelmaden ṛuḥen ad beccṛen di mkul amkan ; Sidi Ṛebbi yețțili yid sen, yețbeggin-ed s waṭas lbeṛhanat, tideț n wayen țbecciṛen.

name: Luke
chapters: Imi aṭas i gebdan tira ɣef wayen yedṛan gar-aneɣ,
akken i ɣ-t-id ɛawden wid yellan d inigan si tazwara, iwalan kullec s wallen-nsen ; uɣalen d iqeddacen n wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Steqsaɣ ula d nekk akken ilaq ɣef wayen akk yedṛan seg wass amezwaru, ufiɣ d ayen yelhan a k-t-id aruɣ a Tawfilus,
iwakken aț-țissineḍ tideț ɣef wayen i tesliḍ meṛṛa.
Di zzman n Hiṛudus, agellid n tmurt n Yahuda, yella yiwen n lmuqeddem si tejmaɛt n Abya, isem-is Zakarya. Tameṭṭut-is Ilicaba, seg izuṛan n Haṛun.
D iḥeqqiyen i llan i sin, ḥerzen yerna ḍuɛen awal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ur sɛin ara dderya, meqqṛit i sin di leɛmeṛ yerna Ilicaba ț-țiɛiqeṛt.
Mi d-tewweḍ nnuba n leqdic n wedrum n Zakarya di lǧameɛ iqedsen
akken i tella di lɛadda n lmuqedmin, gren tasɣaṛt, tṣaḥ-ed Zakarya iwakken ad ikcem ɣer wemkan iqedsen ad isseṛɣ lebxuṛ.
Mi gella isseṛɣay lebxuṛ di lǧameɛ, lɣaci meṛṛa yeqqimen di beṛṛa deɛɛun ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
Iḍheṛ-as-d yiwen lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi, ibedd ɣer tama tayeffust n udekkan-nni anda sseṛɣayen lebxuṛ.
Mi t-iwala Zakarya, yedhec ikcem-it lxuf.
Lmelk-nni yenna yas -ed : Ur țțagad ara a Zakarya, ayen i tessutreḍ ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi yețwaqbel. Tameṭṭut-ik Ilicaba ad a k-d-tesɛu aqcic, a s-tsemmiḍ Yeḥya.
Aț-țfeṛḥeḍ yis, a k-yili d sebba n sseɛd ; imdanen meṛṛa ad feṛḥen s tlalit-is.
Ad yesɛu ccan d ameqqran ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, a d-iččaṛ d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen si tɛebbuṭ n yemma-s, ur itess ccṛab, ur itess ayen nniḍen isekkṛen.
A d-yerr aṭas n wat Isṛail ɣer webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ad ilḥu s leɛnaya n Sidi Ṛebbi, s ṛṛuḥ ț-țezmert n nnbi Ilyas. Ad issemlil imawlan d warraw-nsen, a d-yerr wid ijehlen ɣer webrid n iḥeqqiyen, akken ad iheggi i Sidi Ṛebbi agdud ara t-iḍuɛen.
Deg ussan-nni, yeffeɣ-ed yiwen n lqanun s ɣuṛ Qayṣeṛ ameqqran ; yefka lameṛ ad țțujerrden imezdaɣ meṛṛa yellan di tmura-ines.
Ajerred-agi amezwaru yedṛa asmi yella Kirinyus d lḥakem n tmurt n Surya.
Imdanen meṛṛa ṛuḥen ad țțujerden mkul yiwen di taddart n lejdud-is.
Yusef yellan seg izuṛan n Sidna Dawed, yuli ula d nețța si taddart n Naṣaret n tmurt n Jlili ɣer Bitelḥem, taddart n lejdud-is yellan di tmurt n Yahuda.
Iṛuḥ ad ițțujerred nețța ț-țxedibt-is Meryem yellan s tadist.
Mi ten-yuɣ lḥal dinna, yewweḍ-d lweqt i deg ara terbu ( tarew ) Meryem.
Tesɛa-d mmi-s amenzu, tețțel-it, tessegen-it di lmedwed, imi ur ufin ara amkan deg wexxam n yemsafren.
Di tmurt-nni, llan imeksawen ițnusun di lexlawi, țɛassan lmal-nsen deg yiḍ.
Ataya lmelk n Sidi Ṛebbi iḍheṛ-asen-d, tamanegt n Sidi Ṛebbi tecceɛceɛ tezzi-yasen-d, ikcem-iten lxuf d ameqqran.
Lmelk yenna-yasen : Ur țțagadet ! Aql-i wwiɣ-awen-d lexbaṛ lxiṛ ara isfeṛḥen wugdud meṛṛa.
Ass-agi di taddart n Sidna Dawed, ilul-awen-d yiwen wemsellek, d nețța i d Lmasiḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi !
Atan wamek ara t-tɛeqlem : aț-țafem llufan yețțel, yeṭṭes di lmedwed.
Imiren kan, ț-țirebbaɛ n lmalayekkat i d-yernan ɣer lmelk nni, cennunt țḥemmident Sidi Ṛebbi, qqaṛent :
Lḥemd i Sidi Ṛebbi deg imukan eɛlayen, lehna di ddunit ɣef yemdanen eɛzizen fell-as.
Akken uɣalent lmalayekkat-nni ɣer yigenni, imeksawen nnan wway gar-asen : Kkret a nṛuḥet ɣer Bitelḥem, a nẓer ayen i gedṛan, d wayen akka s wayes i ɣ-d-ixebbeṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Imiren kan ṛuḥen, ufan dinna Meryem d Yusef akk-d llufan-nni yeṭṭes di lmedwed.

Deg wuseggas wis xemseṭṭac n tgeldit n Qayṣer Tibeṛyus, llan ṛebɛa lḥekkam di tmurt n Falisṭin. Bunṭus Bilaṭus d lḥakem n tmurt n Yahuda, Hiṛudus Antifas yeḥkem ɣef tmurt n Jlili, Filbas gma-s n Hiṛudus, ɣef tmura n Iturya akk-d Tṛaxunit, ma d Lisanyas yeḥkem ɣef tmurt n Abilan.
Di lweqt-nni, ?ennan akk-d Qayif llan d lmuqedmin imeqqranen. Awal n Sidi Ṛebbi ițwaxebbeṛ-as-ed i Yeḥya, mmi-s n Zakarya, deg unezṛuf.
Iṛuḥ ițnadi timura i d-izzin i wasif n Urdun, yețberriḥ yeqqaṛ : Beddlet tikli, uɣalet-ed ɣer webrid, aset-ed aț-țețwaɣeḍsem iwakken Sidi Ṛebbi a wen-isemmeḥ ddnubat-nwen !
Akken i d-ițțuxebeṛ di tektabt n nnbi Iceɛya : ?-țaɣect n win ițɛeggiḍen deg wunezṛuf : Heggit abrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, ssemsawit iberdan-is !
Iɣezṛan, idurar ț-țɣaltin ad uɣalen d izuɣaṛ ! Iberdan iɛewjen ad țțuseggmen, wid ixesṛen ad qeɛden .
Imdanen meṛṛa ad ẓren leslak n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Yeḥya yeqqaṛ i lɣaci i d-ițțasen iwakken ad țwaɣeḍsen deg waman : A ccetla n yizerman, anwa i kkun-isfaqen belli tzemrem aț- țrewlem i lɛiqab i d-iteddun ?

Deg wayen akk txeddmem, sbeggnet-ed belli ṣfan wulawen nwen ! Ur qqaṛet ara kan deg yiman-nwen : jeddi-tneɣ d Sidna Ibṛahim, axaṭer a wen-iniɣ : seg idɣaɣen-agi, Sidi Ṛebbi yezmer a d-issufeɣ dderya i Ibṛahim.
Ațan ihi tcaquṛt thegga ɣer izuṛan n ttjuṛ, yal ttejṛa ur d-nețțak ara lfakya lɛali, aț-țețwagzem, aț-țețwaḍeggeṛ ɣer tmes.
Lɣaci steqsan-t nnan-as : D acu i ɣ-ilaqen a t-nexdem ihi ?
Yerra-yasen : Win yesɛan sin iqendyaṛ ad yefk yiwen i win ur nesɛi ara ; win yesɛan ayen ara yečč, ad yefk i win ur nesɛi ara.
Usan-d ula d imekkasen itețțen ayla n medden iwakken ad țwaɣeḍsen deg wasif, nnan-as : A Sidi, i nukkni yellan d imekkasen n tebzert ( leɣṛama ) d acu ara nexdem ?
Yenna-yasen : Ur țnadit ara sennig wayen i d-yenna lqanun.
Iɛeskṛiwen daɣen steqsan-t : I nukkni, d acu ara nexdem ? Yerra-yasen : Ur xeddmet ara lbaṭel, ur țțaṭṭafet ara tajɛelt, setqenɛet kan s lexlaṣ nwen.
Yuɣ lḥal lɣaci meṛṛa llan țṛaǧun qqaṛen deg ulawen-nsen : Ahat d nețța i d Lmasiḥ !
Yeḥya yenna-yasen : Nekk sseɣḍaseɣ-kkun deg waman, meɛna a d-yas win yesɛan tazmert akteṛ-iw ; ur uklaleɣ ara ad fsiɣ ula d lexyuḍ n warkasen-is. Nețța a kkun-isseɣḍes s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ț-țmes.
Yeṭṭef tazzart deg wufus-is, ad yessizdeg tirect deg wennar-is, a d-ijmeɛ irden ɣer yikufan, ma d alim a t-isseṛɣ di tmes ur nxețți.
Mi d- yuɣal Sidna Ɛisa seg wasif n Urdun, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yewwi-t ɣer unezṛuf.
Ṛebɛin wussan ur yečči, Cciṭan yețjeṛṛib deg-s. Mi ɛeddan wussan-nni, yuɣal illuẓ.
Cciṭan yenna-yas : Ma d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi i telliḍ, ini-yas i wedɣaɣ-agi a d-yuɣal d aɣṛum.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Yura di tektabt iqedsen : amdan ur yețɛic ara s weɣṛum kan meɛna s mkul awal i d-ițțasen s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Yuɣal Cciṭan yewwi-t ɣer yiwen wemkan eɛlayen, deg yiwet n teswiɛt yesken-as-ed akk tigeldiwin n ddunit,
yenna-yas : Ad a k-d-fkeɣ lḥekma d ccan n ddewlat-agi meṛṛa, axaṭer țțunefkent iyi-d. Zemreɣ a tent-fkeɣ i win i yi-ihwan ;
ma tseǧǧdeḍ zdat-i ad uɣalent akk d ayla-k.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Yura : Anagar Sidi Ṛebbi Illu-inek ara tɛebdeḍ, i nețța kan iwumi ara tseǧǧdeḍ.
Cciṭan yewwi-t daɣen ɣer temdint n Lquds, yessers-it ɣef yixef n lǧameɛ iqedsen, yenna-yas : Ma d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi i telliḍ, ḍeggeṛ iman-ik d akessar,
axaṭer yura : Ad yefk lameṛ i lmalayekkat-is iwakken ad ḥarbent fell-ak,
yerna a k-awint ger ifassen-nsent, ad ḥadrent iḍaṛṛen-ik ɣef wedɣaɣ.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Yura daɣen : Ur țjeṛṛib ara Sidi Ṛebbi, Illu-inek.
Mi i t-ijeṛṛeb s waṭas n tḥila ur s-yufi ara abrid, Iblis yeṭṭaxeṛ fell-as alamma ț-țikkelt nniḍen.
Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal ɣer tmurt n Jlili yeččuṛ ț-țazmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, slan yis di mkul tama n tmurt-agi.
Ikeččem ɣer leǧwameɛ n wat Isṛail yesselmad, imdanen meṛṛa țcekkiṛen-t.
Iṛuḥ ɣer taddart n Naṣaret anda yețțuṛebba ; akken innum, ikcem ɣer lǧameɛ deg wass n westeɛfu.
Mi gekker a d-iɣeṛ, fkan-as-d taktabt n nnbi Iceɛya, yeldi-ț, yufa amkan anda yura :
Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi yers-ed fell-i, axaṭer yextaṛ-iyi iwakken ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i yimeɣban, ad beccṛeɣ i yimeḥbas tilelli, iwakken a d-rreɣ iẓri i yiderɣalen , a d kkseɣ lḥif ɣef wid ițwaḍelmen,
ad beccṛeɣ ɣef wuseggas i deg ara d-issers Sidi Ṛebbi ṛṛeḥma ines .
Ijmeɛ taktabt-nni, yerra-ț i uqeddac, imiren yeqqim. Wid akk yellan di lǧameɛ ččan-t s wallen.
Dɣa yenna-yasen : Ayen i wen-d-ɣṛiɣ akka, atan yedṛa-d gar-awen ass-agi !
Wehmen atas, tɛeǧǧben deg yimeslayen i d-ițeffɣen seg yimi-s, qqaṛen : Amek ? Mačči d mmi-s n Yusef wagi ?
Dɣa yenna-yasen : ?riɣ belli a yi-d-tinim lemtel-agi : « A ṭṭbib sseḥlu iman-ik,» neɣ « xdem dagi di tmurt-ik ayen i nesla txedmeḍ-t di temdint n Kafernaḥum.»
Yenna-yasen daɣen : S tideț a wen-iniɣ : ulac nnbi yețwaqeblen di tmurt-is.
A wen-iniɣ tideț : Di zzman n nnbi Ilyas, tlata yiseggasen d wezgen ur d-tewwit lehwa dɣa yeɣli-d laẓ d ameqqran ɣef tmurt meṛṛa. Deg wussan-nni, aṭas n tuǧǧal i gellan di tmurt n wat Isṛail.
?as akken, Sidi Ṛebbi ur iceggeɛ ara nnbi Ilyas ɣer yiwet deg-sent, anagar ɣ er yiwet n taǧǧalt yellan di taddart n ?urfat di tmurt n Sidun .
Llan daɣen aṭas n wid ihelken lbeṛs di tmurt n wat Isṛail di zzman n nnbi Ilyaceɛ , meɛna ula d yiwen deg-sen ur iḥli anagar Neɛman n tmurt n Surya.
Mi slan imeslayen-agi, lɣaci meṛṛa yellan di lǧameɛ yenɣa-ten lɣecc.
Kkren ɣuṛ-es, ssufɣen-t si taddart, ssawḍen-t armi d ixef n wedrar i ɣef tebna taddart-nsen iwakken a t-ssegrirben d akessar ;
Sidna Ɛisa iṣubb ɣer tamdint n Kafernaḥum, illan n at Jlili, anda yesselmad lɣaci deg wass n westeɛfu.
Imdanen wehmen aṭas deg wuselmed-ines axaṭer imeslayen-is sɛan tissas.
Di lǧameɛ, yella yiwen wergaz izdeɣ-it uṛuḥani, iɛeggeḍ s lǧehd n taɣect-is :
D acu i tebɣiḍ ɣuṛ-nneɣ a Ɛisa Anaṣari ? Tusiḍ-ed iwakken ad aɣ tesnegreḍ ? ?riɣ d acu-k , kečč d Imqeddes n Ṛebbi !
Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq ɣuṛ-es yenna-yas : Ssusem ! Effeɣ seg wergaz-agi ! Aṛuḥani iḍeggeṛ argaz-nni ɣer lqaɛa di tlemmast-nsen, dɣa iffeɣ seg-s mbla ma iḍuṛṛ-it.
Yiwen wass, Sidna Ɛisa yella ɣef rrif n lebḥeṛ n Jiniṣaret. Lɣaci meṛṛa zzin-as-d, mčuččaɛen-d akken ad slen i wawal n Ṛebbi.
Iwala snat n teflukin rrif n lebḥeṛ, iḥewwaten rsen-d iwakken ad ssirden icebbaken nsen.
Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer yiwet si teflukin-nni, tin yellan n Semɛun, yenna-yas ad ibɛed acemma ɣef rrif. Yeqqim , yebda yesselmad-ed lɣaci syenna.
Mi gfukk aselmed yenna i Semɛun : Sbeɛdet taflukt ɣer wemkan lqayen, tḍeggṛem icebbaken-nwen aț-țṣeggdem.
Semɛun yenna-yas : A Sidi, iḍ kamel nukni d aṣeggeḍ ur d-neṭṭif acemma ; lameɛna ɣef wawal-ik a nexdem akken i d-tenniḍ, a nḍeggeṛ icebbaken.
Mi xedmen akken i sen-yenna Sidna Ɛisa, ṭṭfen-d aṭas n iselman ( lḥut ), armi qṛib ad qeṛsen icebbaken nsen.
Ssawalen, țwehhin i yemdukkal nsen yellan di teflukt nniḍen a d-asen a ten-ɛiwnen. Mi d-usan, ččuṛen snat-nni n teflukin armi qṛib ad ɣeṛqent.
Semɛun-Buṭrus, mi gwala ayagi, yuɣal ɣef tgecrar zdat Sidna Ɛisa, yenna-yas : Beɛɛed fell-i a Sidi axaṭer d amednub i lliɣ.
Ikcem-it lxuf nețța d wid yellan yid-es, dehcen imi i d-ṭṭfen annect-nni n yiselman.
Ula d Yeɛqub akk-d Yuḥenna, arraw n Zabadi yellan d imdukkal n Semɛun wehmen. Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq ɣer Semɛun yenna-yas : Ur țțagad ara, sya d asawen mačči d iselman ara d-țṣeggideḍ, meɛna d imdanen.
Imiren rran-d tiflukin-nsen ɣer rrif, ǧǧan kullec dinna, ddan d Sidna Ɛisa.
Mi gella Sidna Ɛisa deg yiwet n taddart n at Jlili, yusa-d yiwen wergaz ihelken lbeṛs, mi gwala Sidna Ɛisa, yuzzel ɣuṛ-es yeɣli ɣer iḍaṛṛen-is, yenna-yas : A Sidi, ma tebɣiḍ, tzemreḍ a yi-tesseḥluḍ.
Sidna Ɛisa issers afus-is fell-as, yenna-yas : Bɣiɣ ! Ili-k teḥliḍ ! Imiren kan, argaz-nni ikkes-as lbeṛs, yeṣfa weglim-is.

Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa-t ur iqqaṛ i yiwen ayen yedṛan yid-es. Yenna-yas : Ṛuḥ ɣer lmuqeddem a k-iwali, tefkeḍ lweɛda ɣef ṣeffu-inek, akken yura di ccariɛa n Musa. Lweɛda-nni a sen-tili d țbut ɣef ḥellu-inek.
Simmal ițwassen Sidna Ɛisa, simmal țnejmaɛen-d ɣuṛ-es lɣaci iwakken ad slen i wawal-is yerna a ten-isseḥlu si lehlakat-nsen ;
meɛna nețța iṭeṛṛif iman-is, ițṛuḥu ɣer yimukan yexlan iwakken ad iẓẓall.

Yiwen wass Sidna Ɛisa yella yesselmad. Llan dinna ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, usan-d si tuddar n at Jlili, n at Yahuda akk ț-țemdint n Lquds, qqimen smeḥsisen-as. Tazmert n Sidi Ṛebbi yellan yid-es tesseḥlay imuḍan.
Atnaya kra n yemdanen wwin-d yiwen wukrif akken deg wusu-ines. ?qelliben amek ara t-skecmen iwakken a t-ssersen zdat Sidna Ɛisa.
Imi aṭas n lɣaci i gellan, ur ufin ara ansi ara t-sɛeddin ; ulin ɣef ssqef, kksen kra n iqermuden, ṣubben-t-id s wusu-ines ɣer tlemmast n lɣaci, zdat Sidna Ɛisa.
Yiwen wass, Sidna Ɛisa akk-d inelmaden-is zegren igran n yirden deg wass n westeɛfu. Tekksen d tigedrin, țḥukkun-tent ger ifassen nsen, tețțen-tent.
Kra n ifariziyen nnan-asen : Acuɣeṛ i txeddmem ayen ur neḥlil deg wass n westeɛfu ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Ur teɣṛim ara ayen yexdem ugellid Dawed asmi yelluẓ nețța d imdukkal-is,
d wamek i gekcem ɣer wexxam iqedsen anda keččmen anagar lmuqedmin ! Iddem-ed aɣṛum n lweɛda, yečča yerna yefka i wid yellan yid-es ɣas akken aɣṛum-nni i lmuqedmin kan iwumi yeḥlel !
Sidna Ɛisa yerna-yasen-d : Mmi-s n bunadem, d nețța i gḥekkmen ɣef wass n westeɛfu !
Ass n westeɛfu nniḍen, Sidna Ɛisa yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ, yebda yesselmad. Yella dinna yiwen wergaz iwumi yekref ufus ayeffus.
Lɛulama n ccariɛa d ifariziyen țɛassan Sidna Ɛisa, ad ẓren ma ad isseḥlu deg wass n westeɛfu iwakken a s-d-afen sebba s wacu ara ccetkin fell-as.
Lameɛna Sidna Ɛisa yessnen ixemmimen-nsen, yekker yenna i wergaz-nni iwumi yekref ufus : Ekker tbeddeḍ dagi di tlemmast n lɣaci. Argaz-nni yekker ibedd.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna : A kkun-steqsiɣ : d acu yellan d leḥlal deg wass n westeɛfu, a nexdem lxiṛ neɣ a nexdem cceṛ ? A nsellek amdan neɣ a t-neǧǧ ad immet ?
Yerfed allen-is ɣer wid akk i s-d-yezzin , dɣa yenna i wergaz nni : Eḍleq afus-ik ! Ukrif-nni yeḍleq afus-is, yeḥla.
Nutni yenɣa-ten lɣecc, bdan țemcawaṛen wway gar-asen amek ara xedmen i Sidna Ɛisa.
Deg ussan-nni, Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer wedrar akken ad iẓẓall. Yeqqim iḍ kamel nețța ideɛɛu ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
Mi yuli wass, yessawel i yinelmaden is, yextaṛ seg-sen tnac iwumi isemma « ṛṛusul» yeɛni « imceggɛen.»
Yella Semɛun iwumi isemma Buṭrus akk-d gma-s Andriyus, Yeɛqub, Yuḥenna, Filbas, Bartelmay,
Matta, ?uma, Yeɛqub mmi-s n ?alfi, Semɛun iwumi qqaṛen awaṭani,
Yahuda mmi-s n Yeɛqub d Yudas n taddart n Qeṛyut win yuɣalen d axeddaɛ.

Sidna Ɛisa iṣubb-ed yid-sen seg wedrar, ḥebsen di luḍa anda nnejmaɛen aṭas n yinelmaden-is d waṭas n lɣaci i d-yusan si tmurt n Yahuda, si temdint n Lquds, si temdinin n ?ur akk-d Sidun yellan rrif n lebḥeṛ.
Usan-d iwakken ad slen i wawal-is yerna a ten-isseḥlu si lehlakat-nsen ; wid akk zedɣen leǧnun, ḥlan.
Lɣaci meṛṛa țqelliben a t-nalen ( a t-massen ) axaṭer tețțeffeɣ-ed seg-s tezmert i ten-isseḥlayen akk.
Sidna Ɛisa yerfed allen-is ɣer inelmaden-is yenna : Amarezg-nwen kunwi yellan d iẓawaliyen, tagelda n Sidi Ṛebbi d ayla-nwen.
Amarezg-nwen kunwi yelluẓen tura, a d-yas wass i deg ara teṛwum. Amarezg-nwen kunwi yețrun tura, a d-yas wass i deg ara tilim di lfeṛḥ.
D iseɛdiyen ara tilim m'ara kkun-keṛhen yemdanen, m'ara kkun-qecɛen, m'ara kkun-regmen, ad rren isem-nwen amzun d lɛaṛ ɣef ddemma n Mmi-s n bunadem.
Ass-nni ilit di lfeṛḥ, friwset s lfeṛḥ axaṭer d ṛṛezq ameqqran i kkun-ițṛaǧun deg igenni ! Imi akka i xedmen lejdud-nsen i lenbiya.
Ma d kunwi ay imeṛkantiyen, a tawaɣit-nwen axaṭer rrbeḥ-nwen tesɛam-t tura.
A tawaɣit-nwen kunwi yeṛwan tura, aț-țuɣalem aț-țellaẓem. A tawaɣit-nwen kunwi yețțaḍṣan tura axaṭer aț-țilim di leḥzen d yimeṭṭawen.
A tawaɣit nwen asm'ara kkun-cekkṛen yemdanen, axaṭer akka i xedmen lejdud-nsen i lenbiya n lekdeb.
Ma d nekk a wen-iniɣ i kunwi i d-ițḥessisen : ḥemmlet iɛdawen-nwen, xedmet lxiṛ i wid i kkun-ikeṛhen.
Barket wid i kkun-ineɛlen, dɛut s lxiṛ i wid i kkun-iḍelmen.
Ma yewwet-ik yiwen ɣer lḥenk, sendi-yas lḥenk nniḍen. Ma yekkes-ak yiwen abeṛnus-ik, anef-as ad yernu ula d aqenduṛ-ik.
Efk-as ayen yuḥwaj i win i k-id-yessutren ; win i k-ikksen kra, ur țṛaǧu ara a k-t-id-yerr.
Mi gekfa awal zdat widak i s-d-ismeḥsisen, yekcem ɣer temdint n Kafernaḥum.
Yiwen lqebṭan aṛumani yesɛa aqeddac i gḥemmel aṭas ; aqeddac-agi yuḍen, ițmețțat.
Mi gesla s Sidna Ɛisa, iceggeɛ ɣuṛ-es kra seg yimeqqranen n wat Isṛail iwakken a d-yas ad isseḥlu aqeddac-is.
Mi wwḍen ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, ḥellelen-t nnan-as : A Sidi ! Yuklal a s-txedmeḍ lxiṛ agi,
axaṭer iḥemmel agdud nneɣ ; d nețța i gebnan lǧameɛ-nneɣ.
Sidna Ɛisa yedda yid-sen. Mi qṛib ad yaweḍ ɣer wexxam, lqebṭan-nni iceggeɛ imdukkal-is a s-inin : A Sidi, ur țɛețțib ara iman-ik, ur uklaleɣ ara a d-tkecmeḍ axxam-iw.
Nekk s yiman-iw daɣen walaɣ ur uklaleɣ ara a n-aseɣ ɣuṛ-ek ; ini-d kan yiwen wawal, aqeddac-iw ad iḥlu.
Axaṭer sɛiɣ wid i gṭebbiṛen fell-i, sɛiɣ daɣen lɛeskeṛ seddaw lḥekma-w. Ad iniɣ i yiwen ṛuḥ ad iṛuḥ ; i wayeḍ as-ed, a d-yas ; ad iniɣ i wqeddac-iw xdem ayagi, a t-ixdem.
Mi gesla Sidna Ɛisa i yimeslayen-agi, itɛeǧǧeb deg-sen. Yezzi ɣer lɣaci yeddan yid-es, yenna-yasen : A wen-d-iniɣ : di tmurt n wat Isṛail meṛṛa ur ufiɣ ara liman yecban wagi.
Widak-nni i d-ițwaceggɛen, mi uɣalen ɣer wexxam ufan aqeddac-nni yeḥla.
Azekka-nni, Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ ɣer yiwet n taddart isem-is Naɛim. Ddan yid-es inelmaden-is d waṭas n lɣaci.
Mi gewweḍ ɣer tewwurt n taddart, atnaya lɣaci wwin-d lmegget a t-meḍlen, d mmi-s n yiwet n taǧǧalt, anagar nețța i tesɛa. Aṭas n imezdaɣ n taddart-nni i d-iddan yid-es.
Mi ț-iwala Sidna Ɛisa, tɣaḍ-it, yenna-yas : Ur țru ara !
Iqeṛṛeb ɣer usenduq n lmegget nni, iḍleq afus-is innul-it, dɣa widak i t-irefden ḥebsen. Yenna : Ay aqcic ! Ekker !
Dɣa lmegget-nni ikker-ed, yebda iheddeṛ. Sidna Ɛisa yerra aqcic-nni i yemma-s.
Ikcem-iten akk lxuf, bdan țḥemmiden Ṛebbi qqaṛen : « Sidi Ṛebbi yerra-d ddehn-is ɣer wegdud is, nnbi ameqqran ikker-ed gar-aneɣ. »
Slan s wannect-agi di tmurt n Yahuda meṛṛa akk ț-țmura i s-d izzin.
Inelmaden n Yeḥya xebbṛen-t ɣef wayen akk yedṛan.
Yeḥya iceggeɛ sin seg yinelmaden-is ɣer Sidna Ɛisa iwakken a s-inin ma d nețța i d win akken ara d-yasen, neɣ ilaq ad ṛǧun wayeḍ.
Ewwḍen ɣer Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : Iceggeɛ-aɣ-ed ɣuṛ-ek Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas iwakken a k-nesteqsi ma d kečč i d win akken ara d-yasen neɣ ilaq a neṛǧu wayeḍ.
Di teswiɛt-nni ufan Sidna Ɛisa isseḥla aṭas n yemdanen si lehlakat nsen d leɛyubat-nsen, issufeɣ leǧnun seg wid yețwamelken, yerra-d iẓri i waṭas n yiderɣalen.

Sidna Ɛisa yenna i yinelmaden n Yeḥya : Ṛuḥet erret lexbaṛ i Yeḥya ɣef wayen teẓram d wayen teslam : iderɣalen țwalin, wid ikerfen teddun, wid ihelken lbeṛs ṣeffun, iɛeẓẓugen sellen, lmegtin ḥeggun-d, le xbaṛ n lxiṛ ițwabecceṛ i yigellilen .
D aseɛdi win iwumi ur țțiliɣ ara d ugur.
Mi ṛuḥen inelmaden-nni i d-iceggeɛ Yeḥya, Sidna Ɛisa yebda iheddeṛ i lɣaci ɣef Yeḥya yenna : D acu i tṛuḥem a d-teẓrem deg unezṛuf ? D aɣanim yețhuzzu waḍu ?
D acu i tṛuḥem a d-teẓrem ? D amdan yelsan llebsa ifazen ? Wid yețlusun llebsa ifazen, yețɛicin di rrbeḥ atnan di lebṛuj n yigelliden !
Anwa i tṛuḥem a t-id-teẓrem ihi ? D nnbi ? A wen-d-iniɣ ... yugar nnbi !
Yeḥya d win i ɣef yura di tira iqedsen : Atan ad zzewreɣ amceggeɛ-inu zdat-ek iwakken a k-iheggi abrid.
Nniɣ-awen, ulac di ddunit amdan yugaren Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas. Lameɛna amecṭuḥ maḍi di tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi, d ameqqran fell-as.
Lɣaci meṛṛa mi slan i Yeḥya, setɛeṛfen s lḥeqq n Sidi Ṛebbi, qeblen ad țwaɣeḍsen deg waman, llan gar-asen ula d imekkasen n tebzert ( n leɣṛama ).
Ma d ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa, ur qbilen ara ayen i sen yebɣa Sidi Ṛebbi, ugin a ten yesseɣḍes Yeḥya.
?er wacu ara metleɣ imdanen n lǧil-agi ? ?er wuɣuṛ i țemcabin ?
?emcabin ɣer warrac yeqqimen di tejmaɛt, țemsawalen wway gar-asen qqaṛen : Newwet-awen-d ajewwaq ur tecḍiḥem ara, nerna newwi-yawen-d acewwiq n leḥzen ur trum ara.
Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas yusa-d ur itețț aɣṛum ur itess ccṛab, teqqaṛem ițwamlek.
Mmi-s n bunadem yusa-d itețț itess, teqqaṛem : ițxemmim kan ad yečč ad isew, d amdakkul n yimekkasen akk-d yemcumen.
Lameɛna lḥeqq n Sidi Ṛebbi ɛeqlen-t warraw-is, nutni qeblen-t.
Yiwen ufarizi yusa-d ad iɛṛrḍ Sidna Ɛisa ad yečč ɣuṛ-es. Idda yid-es, ikcem ɣer wexxam-is, yeqqim ad yečč.
Di taddart-nni tella yiwet n tmeṭṭut yellan d yir tameṭṭut ; mi tesla s Sidna Ɛisa yella deg wexxam n wufarizi-nni, tekcem tewwi yid-es tabuqalt n leɛṭer.
Tekka-d deffir Sidna Ɛisa, teɣli ɣer idaṛṛen-is tețru. Tessebzeg (tesselxes) iḍaṛṛen n Sidna Ɛisa s yimeṭṭawen-is, tesfeḍ-iten s ucebbub-is, tessudun-iten yerna tdehhin-iten s leɛṭeṛ-nni.
Sidna Ɛisa iteddu yețbecciṛ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n tgeldit n Ṛebbi si temdint ɣer tayeḍ, si taddart ɣer tayeḍ. Tnac-nni yinelmaden-is ddan yid-es,
ddant daɣen kra n tilawin i gesseḥla si lehlakat-nsent, tid iwumi yessufeɣ leǧnun. Tella gar-asent Meryem iwumi qqaṛen tamagdalit ițwasellken si sebɛa leǧnun,
akk-d Yunna tameṭṭut n Cuza lewkil n ugellid Hiṛudus, Suzana akk ț-țilawin nniḍen i ten-ițɛawanen s wayen sɛant.
Lɣaci usan-d seg waṭas n tudrin. Mi d-nnejmaɛen ɣuṛ-es, Sidna Ɛisa yewwi-yasen-d lemtel-agi :
Yiwen ufellaḥ iffeɣ ad izreɛ irden. Mi gzerreɛ, kra n iɛeqqayen ɣlin ɣer webrid , țwaṛekḍen yerna ččan-ten yefṛax n igenni.
Amur nniḍen n zzerriɛa yeɣli ger yedɣaɣen , mi d-temɣi teqquṛ imi xuṣṣen waman.
Amur nniḍen yeɣli daɣen ger isennanen , mi d-temɣi zzerriɛa mɣin-d yid-es isennanen, ɣummen-ț.
Amur nniḍen daɣen yeɣli deg wakal lɛali ; mi d-mɣin, mkul aɛeqqa yefka-d meyya. Mi d-yenna ayagi, iɛeggeḍ yenna : Win yesɛan imeẓẓuɣen isel-ed !
Inelmaden-is ssutren-as d acu i d lmeɛna n lemtel-agi.

Yerra-yasen : Kunwi yețțunefk-awen-d aț țissinem lbaḍna n tgeldit n Ṛebbi, ma d wiyaḍ ițțunefk-asen-d a ț-issinen s lemtul kan iwakken ɣas ad ẓren s wallen-nsen ur țwalin ara, ɣas ma slan ur fehhmen ara.
Atah lmeɛna n lemtel-agi : zzerriɛa d awal n Ṛebbi.
Llan kra n yemdanen țemcabin ɣer webrid-nni anda teɣli zzerriɛa, m'ara slen i wawal, Cciṭan a d-yas a t-iqleɛ seg ulawen-nsen iwakken ur țțamnen ur țwasellaken.
Wiyaḍ țemcabin ɣer wakal yeččuṛen d idɣaɣen. M'ara slen i wawal a t-qeblen s lfeṛḥ lameɛna ur t-țaǧǧan ara ad iger izuṛan ; imiren kan ad amnen, m'ara d-yas lweqt n ujeṛṛeb țțuɣalen ɣer deffir.
Ayen yeɣlin ger isennanen, d wid isellen i wawal meɛna m'ara d-imɣi ur igemmu ara deg-sen axaṭer țțaǧan anezgum d rrbeḥ akk-d zzhu n ddunit ad iɣumm awal-nni.
Ma d ayen yețwazerɛen deg wakal lɛali, d wid isellen i wawal s wul yeṣfan d neyya ḥerzen-t yerna țțaǧan-d lxiṛ s ṣṣbeṛ-nsen.
Yiwen ur iceɛɛel taftilt iwakken a ț-iɣum s lḥila neɣ a ț-issedreg; lameɛna a ț-issers ɣef lmeṣbeḥ iwakken kra n win ara d-ikecmen ad iwali tafat.
Kra n wayen yeffren a d-iban, kra n wayen yellan di ṭṭlam a t-id-tesban tafat.
Ɛasset iman-nwen ihi ɣef wayen i tsellem, axaṭer win i gḥerzen ayen yesɛa a s-nernu, ma d win ur nḥerrez ara a s-ițwakkes ula d ayen i gɣil yesɛa-t.
Yemma-s d watmaten n Sidna Ɛisa usan-d a t-ẓren, meɛna ur zmiren ara ad qeṛṛben ɣuṛ-es imi aṭas n lɣaci i gellan dinna.
Ssawḍen-as lexbaṛ nnan-as : A Sidi, yemma-k d watmaten-ik atnan di beṛṛa, bɣan a k-ẓren.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Yemma d watmaten-iw d widak ismeḥsisen i wawal n Ṛebbi yerna ttabaɛen-t.
Yiwen wass, Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer yiwet n teflukt nețța d yinelmaden-is. Yenna-yasen : Eyyaw a nzegret ɣer tama nniḍen n lebḥeṛ n Jlili. Dɣa ṛuḥen.
Mi teddun ɣef waman, Sidna Ɛisa yeṭṭes. Yekker-ed waḍu iǧehden di lebḥeṛ, taflukt tebda tețțačaṛ d aman, ikcem-iten lxuf ameqqran.
Inelmaden qeṛṛben ɣuṛ-es, sekkren-t-id nnan-as : A Sidi, a Sidi, atan a neɣṛeq. Yekker-ed, dɣa yumeṛ i waḍu d lemwaji ad ḥebsen, imiren kan ters-ed talwit.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Anida-t liman-nwen ? Tɛeǧǧben, țergigin, qqaṛen wway gar-asen : Anwa-t wagi ? Izmer ad yefk lameṛ i waḍu d lebḥeṛ yerna țțaɣen as awal !
Wwḍen ɣer tama nniḍen n lebḥeṛ, ɣer tmurt n ijiṛaziyen iqublen tamurt n Jlili.
Mi d-yers Sidna Ɛisa, ataya yusa-d ɣuṛ-es yiwen wergaz n taddart nni, melken-t waṭas n leǧnun ; acḥal ur yelsi llebsa, ur yezdiɣ axxam, yețɛici di tmeqbeṛt ger iẓekwan.
Mi gwala Sidna Ɛisa, yeɣli ɣer iḍaṛṛen-is iɛeggeḍ yenna : D acu i tebɣiḍ ɣuṛ-i a Ɛisa Mmi-s n Ṛebbi ɛlayen ? Di leɛnaya-k ur iyi-țɛețțib ara.

Yenna-yas-d akka axaṭer Sidna Ɛisa yefka lameṛ i uṛuḥani i t-izedɣen ad iffeɣ seg-s. Acḥal d abrid i s-cudden ifassen d iḍaṛṛen s ssnasel, nețța isseɣṛas-itent yerna aṛuḥani-nni yezzuɣuṛ-it ɣer yimukan yexlan.
Sidna Ɛisa isteqsa-t yenna-yas : Isem-ik ? yerra-yas : Tarbaɛt. Yenna-yas-d akka axaṭer aṭas n leǧnun i t-izedɣen.
?ḥellilen Sidna Ɛisa ur ten-ițceggiɛ ara ɣer yimukan n ṭṭlam.
Tella dinna yiwet n tqeḍɛit tameqqrant n yilfan kessen deg yiwet n tiɣilt. Leǧnun-nni țḥellilen Sidna Ɛisa a ten-yeǧǧ ad kecmen deg yilfan-nni ; Sidna Ɛisa iserreḥ-asen.
Imiren ffɣen seg wergaz-nni, kecmen deg yilfan, grarben seg ixef n tiɣilt ɣer lebḥeṛ, ɣeṛqen.
Imeksawen-nsen mi walan ayen yedṛan uzzlen ɣer taddart d lexlawi ad ssiwḍen lexbaṛ.
Usan-d lɣaci ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, ufan-d argaz-nni i seg d-ffɣen leǧnun yeqqim ɣer iḍaṛṛen-is, yuɣal-ed ɣer leɛqel-is, yelsa llebsa. Wehmen akk, tekcem-iten tugdi.
Wid iḥedṛen i wayen yedṛan, ḥkan amek yețwasellek umeǧnun-nni.
Sidna Ɛisa isnejmaɛ-ed tnac yinelmaden-is, yefka-yasen tazmert d lḥekma s wacu ara ssufɣen leǧnun, ara sseḥlun imuḍan.
Iceggeɛ-iten ad beccṛen tageldit n Ṛebbi, yerna ad sseḥlun imuḍan.
Yenna-yasen : Ur țțawit acemma yid-wen d aɛwin, ur țțawit aɛekkaz neɣ agrab (aqwrab), ur țțawit aɣṛum neɣ idrimen, ur țțawit ara daɣen sin yiqendyaṛ.
Kra n win ara yestṛeḥben yis wen, qqimet deg wexxam-is alamma tṛuḥem.
Ma d anda ur stṛeḥben ara yis-wen, m'ara teffɣem si taddart-nni, zwit ula d aɣebbaṛ-is seg yiḍaṛṛen nwen, iwakken aț-țcehdem fell-asen belli d nutni i kkun-yugin.
Ṛuḥen, țeddun si taddart ɣer tayeḍ, țbecciṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, sseḥlayen imuḍan di mkul amkan.
Hiṛudus lḥakem n tmurt n Jlili, yeɛweq mi gesla s wayen yedṛan meṛṛa, axaṭer kra n yemdanen qqaṛen : « d Yeḥya i d-iḥyan si ger lmegtin ! »
Wiyaḍ qqaṛen : « d Sidna Ilyas i d-yuɣalen ! » Neɣ : « ahat d yiwen si lenbiya n zik i d-iḥyan ! »
Lameɛna Hiṛudus yeqqaṛ : « Yeḥya kkseɣ-as aqeṛṛuy ! Anwa-t ihi wagi i ɣef selleɣ annect-agi ? » Dɣa ițqellib ad iẓer Sidna Ɛisa.
Mi d-uɣalen ṛṛusul n Sidna Ɛisa, bdan ḥekkun-as ayen akk i xedmen. Yewwi-ten yid-es ɣer yiwen wemkan, ɣer tama n taddart n Bitsayda akken ad qqimen weḥḥed-sen.
Mi slan anda yella lɣaci tebɛen-t. Nețța yesteṛḥeb yis-sen, yebda iheddeṛ-asen ɣef tgeldit n Ṛebbi, yesseḥla daɣen wid ihelken.

Akken qṛib ad yeɣli yiṭij, tnac-nni n ṛṛusul usan-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : Serreḥ i lɣaci ad ṛuḥen ɣer temdinin ț-țudrin iqeṛben iwakken ad afen ayen ara ččen d wanda ara ṭsen, axaṭer aql-aɣ deg wemkan yexlan.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Fket-asen kunwi s yiman-nwen ayen ara ččen. Erran-as : ?uṛ-nneɣ anagar xemsa teḥbulin n weɣṛum d sin yiselman. Neɣ tebɣiḍ a nṛuḥ nukni a d-naɣ ayen ara ččen lɣaci-agi ?
Llan dinna azal n xemsa alaf n yergazen. Sidna Ɛisa yenna i yinelmaden-is : Feṛqet lɣaci ț-țirebbaɛ n xemsin xemsin, tesɣimem-ten.
Ṛuḥen sɣimen-ten akken i sen-d yenna.
Sidna Ɛisa yerfed allen-is ɣer yigenni, yeḥmed Ṛebbi icekkeṛ-it, yeddem-ed xemsa-nni teḥbulin n weɣṛum d sin-nni iselman yebḍa-ten, yefka-ten i inelmaden-is a ten- feṛqen i lɣaci.
?čan akk armi ṛwan, yerna ččuṛen tnac yiḍellaɛen s wayen i d-yugran.
Yiwen wass Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim weḥd-es yețẓalla. Inelmaden-is qeṛṛben ɣuṛ-es dɣa isteqsa-ten yenna-yasen : D acu-yi ɣer lɣaci ?
Rran-as : Kra qqaṛen d Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas ; wiyaḍ d Sidna Ilyas i d-yuɣalen ; ma d kra nniḍen qqaṛen d yiwen si lenbiya n zik i d-iḥyan si ger lmegtin.
Yenna-yasen : I kunwi, d acu-yi ɣuṛ-wen ? Yenṭeq Buṭrus yenna-yas : D kečč i d Lmasiḥ n Ṛebbi.
Sidna Ɛisa iweṣṣa-ten ur qqaṛen i yiwen belli d nețța i d Lmasiḥ.
Yenna-yasen daɣen : Ilaq Mmi-s n bunadem ad yeɛteb aṭas. A t-nekkṛen lecyux d lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d lɛulama n ccariɛa yerna a t-nɣen, lameɛna ass wis tlata a d-iḥyu si ger lmegtin.
Yenna daɣen i lɣaci : Win yebɣan ad iddu yid-i ur ilaq ara ad ixemmem ɣef tudert-is ; ilaq ad iqbel ad yenɛețțab yal ass ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw yerna ad yetbeɛ abrid-iw.
Axaṭer win yebɣan ad isellek tudert-is a s-tṛuḥ. Ma d win iwumi ara tṛuḥ ɣef ddemma-w ad yuɣal a ț-yaf.
Syenna, Sidna Ɛisa yextaṛ-ed tnin usebɛin yinelmaden nniḍen, iceggeɛ-iten sin sin ad ṛuḥen ɣer mkul taddart d mkul amkan anda ilaq ad iṛuḥ ula d nețța.
Yenna-yasen : Tamegra meqqṛet meɛna drus yixeddamen i gellan. Dɛut ihi ɣer Bab n tmegra iwakken a d-iceggeɛ ixeddamen ɣer yigran-is.
Atan a kkun-ceggɛeɣ am izamaren ger wuccanen.
Ur țțawit yid-wen idrimen, ur țțawit aɛwin neɣ tayuga nniḍen n yerkasen. Deg webrid-nwen ur sṛuḥuyet ara lweqt di sslam.
Kra n wexxam ara tkecmem init : sslam n Ṛebbi fell-awen ay at wexxam !
Ma yella dinna walebɛaḍ d imhenni, sslam-nwen ad yers fell-as, neɣ m'ulac lehna-nwen aț-țeqqim ɣuṛ-wen.
Qqimet deg wexxam-nni, ččet swet ayen ara wen-d-fken, axaṭer axeddam yuklal lexlaṣ-is. Ur țṛuḥut ara seg wexxam ɣer wayeḍ.
Mkul taddart ara tkecmem, ma stṛeḥben yis-wen ččet ayen ara wen-d-ssersen.
Sseḥlut imuḍan-nsen, init-asen : tageldit n Ṛebbi tewweḍ-ed ɣuṛ-wen.
Lameɛna mkul taddart ara tkecmem m'ur stṛeḥben ara yis-wen, effɣet ɣer yizenqan-nsen init :
« a nezwi ula d aɣebbaṛ n taddart-nwen i d-ineṭḍen deg yiḍaṛṛen nneɣ, meɛna ḥṣut belli tageldit n Ṛebbi tewweḍ-ed ɣuṛ-wen.
Aql-i nniɣ-awen, ass n lḥisab taddart-agi aț-țețțuɛaqeb akteṛ n temdint n ?udum.

A nnger-im a tamdint n Kurazim, a nnger-im a Bitsayda ! A lukan lbeṛhanat yețwaxedmen deg kkunt țwaxedmen di temdinin n ?ur akk-d Sidun, tili imezdaɣ-nsent acḥal aya segmi sburren ticekkaṛin n leḥzen, sexnunnsen iman-nsen deg iɣiɣden iwakken a d-beggnen belli ndemmen, uɣalen-d ɣer webrid.
?ef wannect-agi, ass n lḥisab a ț-țețțuɛaqbemt akteṛ n temdinin n ?ur d Sidun.
I kemmini a tamdint n Kafernaḥum, tɣileḍ aț-țaliḍ ɣer yigenni ? Xaṭi ! ?er tesraft lqayen n laxeṛt ara tețwaḍeggṛeḍ.
Win i wen-ismeḥsisen ismeḥsis-iyi-d i nekk. Win ur kkun-neqbil d nekk ur geqbil ara, win ur iyi-neqbil ara, ur iqbil ara Win i yi-d-iceggɛen.
Tnin usebɛin-nni yinelmaden uɣalen-d ččuṛen d lfeṛḥ, nnan-as : A Sidi, ula d leǧnun țțagaden-aɣ s yisem-ik.
Yenna-yasen : Walaɣ Cciṭan yeɣli-d am lebṛaq seg yigenni.
Slet-ed i wayen ara wen-iniɣ : ț-țideț fkiɣ-awen tazmert s wayes ara tṛekḍem izerman ț-țɣerdmiwin, aț-țmeḥqem lǧehd n weɛdaw yerna ulac ayen ara wen-izemren ;
lameɛna ur feṛṛḥet ara imi i tḥekkmem ɣef leǧnun, feṛḥet imi ismawen-nwen țwajerden deg igenwan.
Yiwen wass, Sidna Ɛisa yețẓalla deg yiwen wemkan. Mi gfukk, yiwen seg yinelmaden-is yenna-yas : A Sidi, selmed-aɣ amek ara neẓẓal akken yesselmed Yeḥya i yinelmaden-is.
Yenna-yasen : M'ara tẓallem, init : A Baba Ṛebbi, isem-ik ad ițwaqeddes, lḥekma n tgeldit-ik a d-tas.
Semmeḥ-aɣ ddnubat-nneɣ akken i nețsamaḥ ula d nukkni i wid i ɣ-ixedmen cceṛ, ur aɣ-țaǧǧa ara a neɣli deg wujeṛṛeb.
Yenna-yasen daɣen : Ma yella yiwen deg-wen yesɛa aḥbib, iṛuḥ ɣuṛ-es di țnaṣfa n yiḍ a s-yini : « Ay aḥbib ṛḍel-iyi-d tlata teḥbulin n weɣṛum ,
atan yusa-yi-d yiwen weḥbib i geṭṭef webrid, ur sɛiɣ d acu ara s-d-sserseɣ. »
Ma yerra-yas-d si zdaxel n wexxam : « Ur iyi-țɛețțib ara, tawwurt tsekkeṛ, nekk d warraw-iw aql-aɣ neṭṭes, ur zmireɣ ara a d-kkreɣ iwakken a k-d-fkeɣ aɣṛum. »
A wen-d-iniɣ : ma yeɛdez ur yebɣi ara a d-yekker ɣuṛ-es ɣas akken d aḥbib-is, a d-ikker a s-d-yefk ayen akk i s-issuter axaṭer yusa-d ɣuṛ es di țnaṣfa n yiḍ yeṛṛez-as aqeṛṛuy-is.
Ma d nekk nniɣ-awen : ssutret a wen-d-ițunefk, qellbet aț-țafem, sqerbebbet di tewwurt a wen-d-ldin.
Axaṭer kra n win yessuturen a s-d ițunefk, win ițqelliben ad yaf, win yesṭebṭuben a s-d-ldin tawwurt.
Anwa deg-wen ara yefken i mmi-s adɣaɣ ma yessuter-as aɣṛum ? Neɣ a s-yefk azrem ma yessuter-as aslem ?
Neɣ ma yessuter-as tamellalt a s-yefk tiɣirdemt ?
Ma yella kunwi yellan d imcumen tessnem aț-țefkem ayen yelhan i warraw-nwen, amek Baba-twen yellan deg igenni ur d-ițțak ara Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i wid i s-t-issuturen ?
Yiwen wass ikker Sidna Ɛisa yessuffeɣ lǧen yesgugmen yiwen wergaz. Mi t-iffeɣ lǧen, argaz-nni yebda iheddeṛ ; lɣaci meṛṛa wehmen.
Lameɛna kra deg-sen nnan : « D Balzabul iḥekmen ɣef leǧnun i s-yefkan tazmert akken a ten issuffeɣ. »
Kra nniḍen bɣan a t-jeṛṛben, ssutren-as yiwen n lbeṛhan ara d-yasen seg yigenni.
Sidna Ɛisa yessnen ixemmimen-nsen yenna yasen : Yal tagelda i deg ara țnaɣen imezdaɣ-is wway gar-asen tețțeddu ɣer nnger, ixxamen-is ad ɣlin.
Ma yella Cciṭan yețnaɣ d yiman-is amek ara tdum tgelda-s ? Teqqaṛem s Balzabul i ssufuɣeɣ leǧnun !
Ma yella nekk s Balzabul i ten-ssufuɣeɣ, anwa ihi i sen-ițțaken tazmert i yinelmaden-nwen iwakken a ten-ssuffuɣen ? Daymi d nutni ara kkun-iḥasben.
Lameɛna ma yella s ufus n Ṛebbi i ten-ssuffuɣeɣ, ațan ihi tageldit n Ṛebbi tewweḍ-ed ɣuṛ-wen.
Argaz iǧehden yesɛan leslaḥ, ițɛassan ɣef wexxam-is, ṛṛezq-is ad yili di laman.
Ma yusa-d ɣuṛ-es yiwen iǧehden akteṛ-is iɣleb-it, a s-ikkes leslaḥ ɣef wacu yețkel, ad yernu ad ifṛeq i wiyaḍ ayen akk yesɛa.
Win ur nelli ara yid-i, d axṣim-iw ; win ur njemmeɛ ara yid-i, yețḍeggiɛ.
M'ara yeffeɣ uṛuḥani seg yiwen wergaz, ad iṛuḥ ɣer yimukan yexlan akken ad iqelleb ɣef ṛṛaḥa. M'ur yufi ara, ad yini : « ad uɣaleɣ ɣer tnezduɣt-iw ansi i d-ffɣeɣ. »
M'ara yaweḍ ɣer tnezduɣt-nni, a ț-yaf zeddiget, tqeɛɛed ;
imiren ad iṛuḥ a d-yawi sebɛa yiṛuḥaniyen nniḍen iweɛṛen akteṛ-is, ad kecmen ad zedɣen deg-s ; s wakka lḥala n wergaz-nni aț-țenṭeṛ akteṛ n tikkelt tamezwarut.
