Mi d-yenna Sidna Ɛisa ayagi, yiwet n tmeṭṭut tenṭeq-ed s ṣṣut ɛlayen si ger n lɣaci tenna-yas : ?-țaseɛdit tmeṭṭut i k-id-yurwen, i k-issuṭṭḍen !
Lameɛna nețța yerra-yas : Iseɛdiyen, d wid ismeḥsisen i wawal n Ṛebbi, yerna ḥerzen-t.
Mi d-innejmaɛ ɣuṛ-es waṭas n lɣaci, Sidna Ɛisa yekker yenna-yasen : Lǧil-agi d lǧil amcum, yessutur lbeṛhan ! Ur as-d-ițunefkay ara lbeṛhan anagar win n nnbi Yunes !
Axaṭer akken yella nnbi Yunes d lbeṛhan i yimezdaɣ n temdint n Ninebi, ara yili Mmi-s n bunadem d lbeṛhan i lǧil-agi.

Ass n lḥisab tagellit n tmurt n usammer a d-tekker ɣer yemdanen n lǧil-agi a ten-tesseḍlem imi nețțat tusa-d seg yixef n ddunit iwakken aț-țsel i tmusni n ugellid Sliman. Atah yella gar-awen win yugaren agellid Sliman !
Ass n lḥisab a d-kkren daɣen imezdaɣ n temdint n Ninebi ɣer lǧil-agi a ten-sḍelmen, axaṭer nutni uɣalen-d ɣer webrid mi sen-ibecceṛ nnbi Yunes. Kunwi tesɛam dagi gar-awen win yugaren nnbi Yunes !
Yiwen ur iceɛɛel taftilt iwakken a ț-iffer neɣ akken a ț-iɣumm s lḥila, lameɛna a ț-issers ɣef lmeṣbeḥ iwakken kra n win ara d-ikecmen ad iwali tafat.
Tiṭ ț-țaftilt n wemdan. Ma yella tiṭ-ik tṣeḥḥa aț-țiliḍ di tafat, meɛna ma tedderɣel aț-țiliḍ di ṭṭlam.
?ader ihi aț-țuɣal tafat yellan deg-k d ṭṭlam.
Ma telliḍ di tafat s lekmal-ik, ur yețțili ara deg-k ṭṭlam, aț-țiliḍ di tafat am teftilt m'ara d-cceɛceɛ fell-ak.
Mi gfukk Sidna Ɛisa ameslay, iɛreḍ-it yiwen wufarizi ɣeṛ imensi.
Afarizi-nni yewhem mi gwala Sidna Ɛisa ur issared ara uqbel ad yečč, akken tella di lɛadda-nsen.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Kunwi s yifariziyen tessiridem taqbuct d uḍebṣi s wufella kan ma zdaxel n wulawen teččuṛem d ṭṭmeɛ akk-d ddɣel.
A wid iɣeflen ! Eɛni win i d ixelqen ayen yellan s wufella, mačči d nețța i d-ixelqen ayen n daxel ?
Fket lweɛda s wulawen-nwen, imiren kullec ad awen-yeṣfu.

A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen ! Kunwi yețɛecciṛen nneɛneɛ d uwermi d wayen i d-ițemɣayen di tebḥirt, ma d lḥeqq d leḥmala n Sidi Ṛebbi tețțarram-ten ɣer deffir ; d annect-agi i gezwaren mbla ma tețțum ayen nniḍen.
A nnger-nwen ay ifariziyen ! Tḥemmlem imukan imezwura di leǧwameɛ, tḥemmlem ad țsellimen fell-awen yemdanen deg iberdan.
A nnger-nwen, kunwi yecban iẓekwan i gɣumm wakal, ur d-nețban ara, ɛeffsen-ten yemdanen ur d-wwin s lexbaṛ.
Yenṭeq yiwen lɛalem n ccariɛa, yenna-yas : A Sidi, atan tregmeḍ-aɣ ula d nukkni s wayen i d-tenniḍ akka !
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : A nnger-nwen ula d kunwi a lɛulama n ccariɛa ! Tețɛebbim i wiyaḍ tiɛekkmin ẓẓayen, ma d kunwi ur tent-tețnalem ara ula s yiwen uḍaḍ.
A tawaɣit-nwen ! Lejdud-nwen nɣan lenbiya, kunwi tbennum-asen iẓekwan.
Di teswiɛt-nni kan, lɣaci yennejmaɛ-ed s luluf armi țemyeɛfasen. Sidna Ɛisa yenna i yinelmaden-is : ?adret iman-nwen ɣef temtunt ( iɣes ) n yifariziyen, axaṭer d at sin wudmawen.
Kra n wayen iɣummen a d-iban, kra n wayen yeffren ad yemẓer.
Ayen i thedṛem di ṭṭlam a t-slen di tafat, ayen i tennam ɣer umeẓẓuɣ di texxamt ad ițțuberreḥ deg yizenqan.
A wen-d-iniɣ i kunwi yellan d iḥbiben-iw : ur țțagadet ara wid ineqqen lǧețța, sennig lmut ur zmiren ad xedmen acemma nniḍen.
A wen-d-iniɣ anwa i glaq aț- țaaggadem : aggadet win izemren a kkun-ikkes si ddunit yerna a kkun-iḍeggeṛ ɣer ǧahennama. Atan nniɣ-awen-t-id, d nețța i glaq aț- țaggadem.
D acu i swan xemsa iẓiwcen ? Anaɣ sin iṣurdiyen kan ! Lameɛna Sidi Ṛebbi ur itețțu ula d yiwen deg-sen.
Ula d anẓaden n iqeṛṛay-nwen țwaḥesben yiwen yiwen. Ur țțagadet ara ihi, teswam akteṛ n iẓiwcen.
A wen-d-iniɣ : kra n win ara d-icehden zdat yemdanen belli yumen yis-i, Mmi-s n bunadem ur t-inekkeṛ ara zdat lmalayekkat,
Di lweqt-nni, kra n yemdanen usan-d a s-ḥkun i Sidna Ɛisa ɣef kra n yergazen n tmurt n Jlili i genɣa Bilaṭus, d wamek issexleḍ dammen-nsen d idammen n iseflawen nsen.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Tɣilem belli imezdaɣ-agi n Jlili ițțuɛetben akka d imednuben akteṛ n wiyaḍ ?
Xaṭi, meɛna a wen-d-iniɣ : m'ur tbeddlem ara tikli aț-țemtem ula d kunwi.
Neɣ am tmenṭac-nni yergazen yemmuten mi d-yeɣli fell-asen ṣṣuṛ n Silwi, tɣilem d imednuben akteṛ n imezdaɣ nniḍen n temdint n Lquds ?
Xaṭi, meɛna nniɣ-awen : m'ur tbeddlem ara tikli aț-țemtem ula d kunwi.
Yewwi-yasen-d lemtel-agi : Yiwen wergaz yesɛa taneqleț teẓẓa deg yiger n tẓurin. Yusa-d iwakken a d-ikkes tibexsisin lameɛna ur yufi ara.
Yenna i uxeddam n yiger-nni : tlata n yiseggasen aya nekk țțaseɣ ed iwakken a d-kkseɣ lexṛif si tneqleț agi meɛna ur d-țțafeɣ ara, gzem-iț ihi ! Acuɣeṛ ara teṭṭef akal mbla nnfeɛ ?
Axeddam-nni yerra-yas : a Sidi, eǧǧ-iț aț-țernu aseggas-a ; aț-țneqceɣ, a s-rreɣ leɣbaṛ,
sya d asawen ma tefka-d lfakya eǧǧ-iț, m'ulac qeleɛ -iț.
Sidna Ɛisa yesselmad deg yiwen n lǧameɛ deg wass n westeɛfu.
Tella dinna yiwet n tmeṭṭut ihelken tmenṭac yiseggasen aya ; d yiwen uṛuḥani i ț-ikerfen ur tezmir ara aț-țesbedd lqedd-is.
Mi ț-iwala Sidna Ɛisa, iluɛa-ț yenna-yas : A tameṭṭut, teḥliḍ seg wekraf-im.
Issers ifassen-is fell-as , imiren kan tesbedd lqedd-is, teḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi.

Ccix-nni n lǧameɛ iɣaḍ-it lḥal imi i ț-isseḥla Sidna Ɛisa deg wass n westeɛfu, yenna i lɣaci : Llan sețța wussan i deg ilaq a nexdem ; aset-ed ihi deg ussan-nni iwakken a kkun-isseḥlu mačči deg wass n westeɛfu !
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Ay at sin wudmawen ! Anwa deg-wen ur d-nețserriḥ i wezger-ines neɣ i weɣyul-is iwakken a t-yawi a d-isew ɣas deg wass n westeɛfu ?
I tmeṭṭut-agi yellan si dderya n Ibṛahim, i gekref Cciṭan tmenṭac n yiseggasen aya, eɛni ur ilaq ara a s-nekkes akraf ɣas akka d ass n westeɛfu ?
Mi d-yenna imeslayen-agi, ixṣimen-is meṛṛa nneḥcamen ma d lɣaci feṛḥen s leɛǧayeb i gxeddem.
Yenna daɣen : ?er wacu i tețțemcabi tgeldit n Ṛebbi ? ?er wacu ara ț-metleɣ ?
Tețțemcabi ɣer uɛeqqa amecṭuḥ n zerriɛa n uxerḍel i geẓẓa yiwen wergaz di tebḥirt-is. Mi d-imɣi yuɣal d ttejṛa, ifṛax n igenni bnan leɛcuc deg ifurkawen-is.
Yenna daɣen : ?er wacu i zemreɣ ad metleɣ tageldit n Ṛebbi ?
Tețțemcabi ɣer ciṭṭuḥ yiɣes n temtunt i d-teddem tmeṭṭut, tger-it di tlata lkilat n uwren dɣa teǧǧa-t armi yuli meṛṛa.
Deg webrid-is ɣer temdint n Lquds, Sidna Ɛisa ițɛedday ɣef temdinin ț-țudrin, isselmad.
Isteqsa-t yiwen yenna-yas : A Sidi, drus n yemdanen ara yețțuselken ?
Yenna-yasen : Qellbet amek ara tkecmem si tewwurt iḍeyqen ; a wen-d-iniɣ : aṭas ara yebɣun ad kecmen lameɛna ur țțizmiren ara.

M'ara d-yekker bab n wexxam ad isekkeṛ tawwurt, wid i d-yufa lḥal di beṛṛa a d-bdun asqeṛbeb ad qqaṛen : « A Sidi ! A Sidi ! Ldi-yaɣ tawwurt» ! Nețța a wen-d-yerr : ur kkun-ssineɣ ur ẓriɣ ansi i d-tekkam !?
Kunwi ad as-tinim : « anaɣ nečča neswa yid-ek, teslemdeḍ deg yizenqan nneɣ ! »
Nețța a wen-d-yerr : Nniɣ-awen ur kkun-ssineɣ ara, beɛdet akkin fell-i a kunwi ixeddmen cceṛ !
Dinna ara yilin yimeṭṭawen d nndama tameqqrant m'ara twalim Ibṛahim, Isḥaq, Yeɛqub akk-d lenbiya di tgelda n yigenwan, ma d kunwi aț-țeqqimem di beṛṛa.
A d-asen si cceṛq d lɣeṛb, seg umalu d usammer, ad ṭṭfen imukan di tmeɣṛa n tgelda n igenwan.
Imiren ad ilin ineggura ara yuɣalen d imezwura, am akken daɣen ara yilin imezwura ara yuɣalen d ineggura.
Di teswiɛt-nni, kra n ifariziyen usan-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : Ṛuḥ tixxeṛ syagi, atan Hiṛudus ițqellib a k-ineɣ.
Yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet init-as i wuccen-agi : ass-a d uzekka ad ssufɣeɣ leǧnun, ad sseḥluɣ imuḍan , ass wis tlata ad fakeɣ cceɣl-iw.
Lameɛna ilaq ad kemmleɣ tikli-inu ass-a, azekka d sellazekka, axaṭer ur s-ilaq ara i nnbi ad immet beṛṛa n temdint n Lquds.

A tamdint n Lquds ! A tamdint n Lquds ineqqen lenbiya, iṛeǧǧmen wid i m-d-ițwaceggɛen s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi ! Acḥal d abrid i ɛerḍeɣ a d-jemɛeɣ arraw-im am tyaziṭ i d-ijemɛen ifṛax-is seddaw wafriwen-is, lameɛna ur tebɣim ara.
Atan ihi, axxam-nwen ad ixlu yerna nniɣ-awen, ur iyi-tẓerrem ara alamma d asmi ara tinim : Ad ițțubarek win i d-yusan s yisem n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Yiwen wass yellan d ass n westeɛfu, Sidna Ɛisa illa yețwaɛreḍ ɣer wexxam n yiwen seg yimeqqranen n yifariziyen iwakken ad yefteṛ. Wid yellan dinna țɛassan-t d acu ara yexdem.
Yella dinna yiwen wergaz yesɛan lehlak n ubezzug.
Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq ɣer lɛulama n ccariɛa d yifariziyen yenna-yasen : D acu twalam ? D leḥlal win ara isseḥlun deg wass n westeɛfu neɣ ala ?
Imi yiwen deg-sen ur d-yenṭiq, Sidna Ɛisa iqeṛṛeb ɣer umuḍin-nni, yesseḥla-t, iserreḥ-as ad iṛuḥ.
Dɣa yenna i wiyaḍ : Anwa deg-wen ma yeɣli-yas mmi-s neɣ wezger-ines ɣer lbir, ur t-id-ițekkes ara ɣas ma d ass n westeɛfu ?
Yiwen ur izmir a s-d-yerr awal.
Mi gwala wid yețwaɛerḍen bdan țextiṛin imukan imezwura, Sidna Ɛisa yewwi-yasen-d lemtel-agi yenna yasen :
M'ara k-id-yeɛreḍ yiwen ɣer tmeɣṛa, ɣurek ur țțaṭṭaf ara amkan amezwaru ! Axaṭer yezmer ad yili yiwen ger inebgawen yesɛan leqdeṛ akteṛ-ik ,
a d-yas win i kkun-iɛerḍen i sin a k-yini : « eǧǧ-as amkan-nni i wagi ! » Imiren aț-țenneḥcameḍ, aț-țṛuḥeḍ aț-țeṭṭfeḍ amkan aneggaru.
Lameɛna m'ara tețwaɛeṛḍeḍ, ṭṭef amkan aneggaru iwakken m'ara d-yas win i k-id-iɛerḍen, a k-yini : « ay aḥbib ɛeddi-d ɣer zdat ! » Imiren aț-țesɛuḍ leqdeṛ zdat inebgawen meṛṛa.
Axaṭer kra n win yessalayen iman-is a t-id-yessers Ṛebbi , ma d win yesrusuyen iman-is a t-yerfed.

Yenna daɣen i win i t-id iɛeṛḍen : M'ara tebɣuḍ aț-țseččeḍ, ur d-ɛeṛṛeḍ ara imdukkal-ik neɣ atmaten ik, ur d-ɛeṛṛeḍ ara imawlan-ik neɣ lǧiran-ik imeṛkantiyen ; m'ulac a k ɛerḍen ula d nutni iwakken a k-d-rren lxiṛ-ik.
Lameɛna m'ara txedmeḍ tameɣṛa, ɛṛeḍ-ed igellilen, ineɛyuba, iquḍaren d yiderɣalen.
Ili-k di lfeṛḥ imi ur zmiren ara a k-d-rren lxiṛ-ik, axaṭer lxiṛ-ik a k-id-yuɣal asm'ara d-ḥyun wid yellan d iḥeqqiyen ɣer Ṛebbi.
Mi gesla i imeslayen-agi, yiwen seg inebgawen inṭeq-ed yenna i Sidna Ɛisa : Amasseɛd n win ara yeččen tiremt di tgelda n yigenwan!
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Yiwen wergaz ixdem imensi, iɛreḍ-ed aṭas lɣaci.
Lweqt n imensi, iceggeɛ aqeddac-is iwakken ad yini i inebgawen : aset-ed ! Kullec iwjed !
Akken ma llan ufan-d sebba. Amezwaru yenna-yas : « aql-i uɣeɣ iger, ilaq ad ṛuḥeɣ a t-id-ẓreɣ , di leɛnaya-k semmeḥ-iyi ».
Wayeḍ yenna-yas : « aql-i uɣeɣ-d xemsa n tyugiwin n yezgaren bɣiɣ ad ṛuḥeɣ a tent-ɛerḍeɣ, di leɛnaya-k semmeḥ iyi ».
Wayeḍ daɣen yenna-yas : « tura kan i zewǧeɣ, ulamek ara d aseɣ ».

Mi d-yuɣal uqeddac ɣer umɛellem-is, yeḥka-yas ayen akk i s-d-nnan. Bab n wexxam yerfa, yenna i uqeddac-is : « azzel, ṛuḥ ɣer yiberdan d yizenqan n temdint, tɛeṛḍeḍ-ed iẓawaliyen, ineɛyuba, iderɣalen d iquḍaren ».
Mi d-yuɣal uqeddac-nni yenna-yas : a Sidi, ayen i yi-d-tenniḍ xedmeɣ-t yerna mazal llan imukan.
Amɛellem yenna i uqeddac is : « effeɣ ɣer iberdan n tudrin d lexlawi ; wid akk ara tafeḍ, ḥṛeṣ-iten a d asen iwakken ad iččaṛ wexxam-iw. »
Atan nniɣ-awen : ula d yiwen seg wid-nni yețwaɛerḍen d imezwura ur iɛerreḍ imensi-inu.
Aṭas n lɣaci i geddan d Sidna Ɛisa. Yezzi ɣuṛ-sen yenna-yasen :
Kra n win ara d-yasen ɣuṛ-i, ma iḥemmel baba-s d yemma-s neɣ tameṭṭut-is d warraw-is neɣ ayetma-s d yessetma-s neɣ iḥemmel iman-is akteṛ-iw, ur izmir ara ad yili d anelmad-iw.
Kra n win ur neqbil ara ad yeɛteb ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw yerna ur iyi-d-itbiɛ ara, ur izmir ara ad yili d anelmad-iw.
Anwa deg-wen ma yebɣa ad ibnu lbeṛǧ, ur yețɣimi ara ad ixdem uqbel leḥsab-is, iwakken ad iẓer ma yezmer a t-ifak ?
Axaṭer ma yebda lsas yeǧǧa-t akken, kra n wid ara t-iẓren ad stehzin fell-as ad inin :
argaz-agi yebda lsas ur izmir ad ikemmel lebni.
Neɣ anwa agellid ara yekkren ad innaɣ d ugellid nniḍen, ur ixeddem ara uqbel leḥsab iwakken ad iẓer ma yezmer ad iqabel s ɛecṛa alaf iɛsekṛiwen win i d-iteddun ɣuṛ-es s ɛecrin alef iɛsekriwen ?
Ma iwala ur s-izmir ara, ad iceggeɛ ɣuṛ-es uqbel a d-yaweḍ, iwakken ad ifru yid-es tamsalt s lehna.
S wakka, yiwen ur yezmir ad yili d anelmad-iw m'ur yeqbil ara ad yeǧǧ ayen akk yesɛa.
Lmelḥ d ayen yelhan, lameɛna ma tṛuḥ-as lbenna-s amek ara s-ț-id-nerr ?
Ur yelhi i wakal, ur yelhi i leɣbaṛ, ilaq kan a t-nḍeggeṛ ɣer beṛṛa. Win yesɛan imeẓẓuɣen isellen, isel-ed !..
Imekkasen n tebzert akk-d yir imdanen țțasen-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa iwakken a s-slen.
Ifariziyen d lɛulama n ccariɛa iɣaḍ-iten lḥal qqaṛen wway garasen : « argaz-agi yesṭerḥib s imednuben yerna yețɣimi yid-sen ɣer lmakla ».
Anwa deg-wen ma yesɛa meyya wulli tṛuḥ-as yiwet deg-sent, ur yețțaǧa ara di lexla țesɛa uțesɛin nniḍen akken ad iṛuḥ a d-inadi ɣef tin i s-iɛeṛqen alamma yufa-ț ?
M'ara ț-yaf, a ț-id-ibibb ɣef tuyat-is s lfeṛḥ.
M'ara d-yaweḍ ɣer wexxam, ad issiwel i imdukkal-is d lǧiran-is, a sen-yini : feṛḥet yid-i, atan ufiɣ tixsi-nni i yi-iɛeṛqen.
S wakka nniɣ-awen : ad yili lfeṛḥ d ameqqran deg igenni ɣef yiwen umednub i d-yuɣalen ɣer webrid wala ɣef țesɛa uțesɛin nniḍen ur neɛṛiq ara.
Neɣ anta tameṭṭut ma tesɛa ɛecṛa n twiztin tṛuḥ-as yiwet, ur tceɛɛel ara taftilt, ur tberrez ara axxam akken aț-țqelleb fell-as alamma tufa-ț ?
Mi ț-tufa aț-țessiwel i tmeddukal-is ț-țǧiratin-is a sent-tini : ufiɣ tawizeț-nni i yi-ṛuḥen ! Feṛḥemt yid-i !
S wakka a wen-d-iniɣ : yețțili lfeṛḥ d ameqqran ɣer lmalayekkat ɣef yiwen umednub i d-yuɣalen ɣer webrid.
Yenna-yasen daɣen : Yiwen wergaz yesɛa sin warrac.
Ameẓyan deg-sen yenna i baba-s : a baba, efk-iyi-d amur i yi-d-iṣaḥen deg wayla-k. Dɣa baba-s yefka-yas amur-is.
Mi Ɛeddan kra n wussan, ikker ameẓyan-nni ijmeɛ-ed akk amur-is, izzenz-it, ibeddel tamurt, iṛuḥ ɣer yiwet n tmurt ibeɛden. Dinna yewwi-t zzhu, yesṛuḥ ayen akk yesɛa.
Mi i gṣeṛṛef akk idrimen is, yeɣli-d laẓ d ameqqran di tmurt nni, ula d nețța yuɣal yelluẓ.
Yufa lxedma ɣer yiwen umezdaɣ n tmurt nni, iceggeɛ-it ad yeks taqeḍɛit n yilfan.
Acḥal imenna ad yečč ulamma d axeṛṛub-nni i tețțen yilfan-nni, meɛna yiwen ur as-d-yefki.
Ihi yebda yețxemmim deg iman-is yenna : « acḥal n ixeddamen yellan ɣer baba ṛwan aɣṛum, nekk yenɣa-yi laẓ dagi.
Ad kkreɣ kan ad uɣaleɣ ɣer baba, a s-iniɣ : a baba ɛuṣaɣ Ṛebbi erniɣ-k keččini ;
ur uklaleɣ ara ad iliɣ d mmi-k, ḥseb-iyi am yiwen seg ixeddamen-ik »
Ikker iṛuḥ ɣer baba-s. Akken qṛib ad yaweḍ ɣer wexxam, baba-s iɛqel-it-id si lebɛid, iɣaḍ-it, yuzzel-ed ɣuṛ-es. Yeṭṭef-it ger iɣallen-is isellem fell-as.
Mmi-s yenna-yas : « a baba, ɛuṣaɣ Ṛebbi rniɣ-k keččini, ur uklaleɣ ara a yi-tḥesbeḍ d mmi-k ».
Lameɛna baba-s ikker yenna i iqeddacen-is : « ɣiwlet awit-ed abeṛnus-nni n leḥrir selset-as-t, qnet-as taxatemt i uḍaḍ-is ternum-as isebbaḍen i iḍaṛṛen-is.
Awit-ed agenduz-nni yeṭṭuqten tezlum-t a t-nečč, a nexdem tameɣṛa ;
axaṭer mmi-nni i ḥesbeɣ yemmut yuɣal-ed idder, yella yeɛṛeq tura iban-ed ». Dɣa bdan tameɣṛa.
Mmi-s amenzu yella di lexla. Mi d-yuɣal, akken qṛib a d-yaweḍ ɣer wexxam, yesla i ccna d ccḍeḥ.
Yessawel i yiwen seg iqeddacen, isteqsa-t ɣef wayen yedṛan.
Aqeddac nni yenna-yas : « d gma-k i d-yuɣalen, baba-k ifṛeḥ aṭas imi i d-yuɣal di lehna, yezla-yas agenduz-nni yeṭṭuqten.
Mi gesla i yimeslayen-nni, yerfa yugi ad ikcem ɣer wexxam. Baba-s yeffeɣ a t-iḥellel iwakken ad ikcem,
lameɛna nețța yenna-yas : « acḥal iseggasen nekk qeddceɣ fell-ak, ula d yiwen webrid ur ɛuṣaɣ awal-ik, leɛmeṛ ur iyi-tefkiḍ ula d yiwen yiɣid a t-zluɣ iwakken ad feṛḥeɣ d imdukkal-iw.
ma d mmi-k-agi i gesṛuḥen ayen akk yesɛa ɣef yir tilawin, i nețța tezliḍ agenduz-nni yeṭṭuqten ! »
Ikker baba-s yenna-yas : A mmi, kečč kull ass tețțiliḍ yid-i, ayen akk sɛiɣ d ayla-k.
Lameɛna ilaq-aɣ a nefṛeḥ axaṭer gma-k i ḥesbeɣ yemmut atan yuɣal-ed idder, yella ijaḥ, tura iban-ed.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna daɣen i inelmaden-is : -- Yiwen wergaz d ameṛkanti yesɛa lewkil ; lewkil-agi ccetkan fell-as ɣer umɛellem-is nnan-as : « lewkil-ik ițḍeggiɛ ayla-k ».
Amɛellem-is issawel-as yenna yas : « d acu-ten imeslayen-agi i sliɣ fell-ak ? Efk-iyi-d leḥsab ɣef wayen akk i d-teskecmeḍ d wayen i tessufɣeḍ, axaṭer sya d asawen ur tețțiliḍ ara d lewkil-iw ».
Lewkil-agi ixemmem deg iman-is yenna : d acu ara xedmeɣ imi amɛellem-iw ad iyi ikkes amkan-iw ? Ad xedmeɣ akal... Ur zmireɣ ara ! Ad țreɣ.... ssetḥaɣ !
?riɣ d acu ara xedmeɣ, iwakken m'ara yi-istixxeṛ umɛellem-iw, ad afeɣ wid ara yi-iɛiwnen !
Yessawel-asen yiwen yiwen i wid akk yesɛan ṭṭlaba ɣer umɛellem-is. Yenna i umezwaru : « Acḥal i k-ițalas umɛellem-iw ? »
Argaz-nni yerra-yas-d : « Meyya yecbuyla n zzit uzemmur. » Yenna-yas : « sellek awi-d leḥsab ik, qqim taruḍ xemsin ».
Yenna daɣen i wayeḍ : « i keččini, acḥal i k-ițalas ? » Yenna-yas-d : « meyya tcekkaṛin n yirden. » Yenna-yas : « awi-d leḥsab-ik, qqim taruḍ tmanyin».
Amɛellem n lewkil-nni axeddaɛ icekkeṛ-it ɣef tiḥeṛci-ines axaṭer arraw n ddunit-agi ḥeṛcen di lecɣal wway gar-asen akteṛ n warraw n tafat.
Ma d nekk atan a wen-d iniɣ: sxedmet adrim n ddunit-agi iwakken aț-țesɛum imdukkal, s wakka asm'ara yefnu cci n ddunit, aț-țețțuqeblem di tmezduɣin n dayem.
Ma nesɛa laman deg yiwen ɣef tɣawsiwin timecṭuḥin, a nețkel fell-as ula ɣef tmeqqranin ; win yellan d axeddaɛ di tɣawsiwin timecṭuḥin, ad yili d axeddaɛ ula di tmeqqranin.
Ma yella tețḍeggiɛem leṛẓaq n ddunit-agi, anwa ara kkun-iwekklen ɣef leṛẓaq n tideț ?
Ma yella ulac daɣen laman deg-wen ɣef wayen i wen-iwekkel walebɛaḍ, amek ara wen-d-yefk Sidi Ṛebbi ayen i wen-ihegga i kunwi ?

Ulac aqeddac ara iqedcen ɣef sin yemɛellmen : ma iḥemmel yiwen ad ikṛeh wayeḍ neɣ ma yeṭṭef deg yiwen ur yețțak ara lqima i wayeḍ. Ur tezmirem ara aț-țqedcem ɣef Ṛebbi ma yella tettabaɛem leṛẓaq n ddunit agi.
Ifariziyen i gesmeḥsisen i wayen i d-iqqaṛ Sidna Ɛisa, stehzayen fell-as axaṭer nutni ḥemmlen idrimen ;
ma d nețța yenna-yasen : Tesbegginem-d iman-nwen d iḥeqqiyen zdat medden, meɛna Sidi Ṛebbi yessen ulawen-nwen ; ayen yesɛan ccan ɣer yemdanen di ddunit-agi, d ayen yețwakeṛhen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
Uqbel lweqt n Yeḥya aɣeṭṭas, kullec iteddu s ccariɛa n Musa d wayen i d-xebbṛen lenbiya. Tura, lexbaṛ n lxiṛ yeɛnan tgelda n Ṛebbi ițțubecceṛ ; mkul yiwen yekkat amek ara ț-ikcem s ddreɛ.
Yeshel i igenni d lqaɛa ad fnun, ma d ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi ur ițțanqas seg-s ula d yiwen n usekkil.
Kra n win ara yebrun i tmeṭṭut-is iɛawed zzwaǧ, yezna ; kra n win ara yaɣen tameṭṭut yennebran, yezna daɣen.
Yiwen wergaz d ameṛkanti, ițlusu anagar llebsa ifazen n leḥrir aṛqaq ; mkul ass ixeddem tameɣṛa, ițɛici di zzhu d lfeṛḥ.
Yiwen igellil isem-is Laɛẓar, iččuṛ d ideddiyen, ițɣimi ɣer tewwurt n umeṛkanti-nni,
iṭṭamaɛ deg-s ad yečč ɣas d ayen i gɣellin ɣer lqaɛa ; ula d iqjan țțasen-d ad mecḥen ideddiyen-is.
Asmi yemmut uẓawali-nni, ddment-eț lmalayekkat wwint-eț ɣer igenni ɣer wanda yella Ibṛahim. Ameṛkanti-nni yemmut ula d nețța, meḍlen-t.
Di laxeṛt yenɛețțab aṭas, yerfed allen-is, iwala mebɛid Ibṛahim akk-d Laɛẓar ɣer tama-s.
Iɛeggeḍ yenna-yas : « A baba Ibṛahim, ḥunn fell-i ceggeɛ-ed Laɛẓar ad iger ulamma d ixef n uḍad-is deg waman ad issismeḍ iles-iw, aql-i nneɛtabeɣ aṭas deg uḥǧaǧu-yagi n tmes. »
Ibṛahim yerra-yas : A mmi, mmekti-d belli tewwiḍ amur-ik di ddunit ; ma d Laɛẓar yeṛwa lehmum. Tura nețța yețțuṣebbeṛ yufa dagi lfeṛḥ, kečč iṣaḥ-ik-id lqeṛḥ.
Yerna yella gar-aneɣ yiwen yeɣzeṛ annect ila-t, wid yebɣan ad zegren sya ɣuṛ-wen, ur zmiren ara ; kunwi daɣen ur tezmirem ara a d-zegrem ɣuṛ-nneɣ.
Ameṛkanti-nni yenna-yas : Ihi a baba Ibṛahim di leɛnaya-k ceggeɛ Laɛẓar ɣer wexxam n baba ;
ad iɛeggen i xemsa-nni wayetma, iwakken ur d-țțasen ara ula d nutni ɣer wemkan-agi n leɛtab.
Ibṛahim yerra-yas : Atmaten-ik ɣuṛ-sen ccariɛa n Musa d lenbiya, a ten-tebɛen !
Ameṛkanti-nni yenna-yas-d : A baba Ibṛahim, ur țḥessisen ara i ccariɛa d lenbiya lameɛna ma yuɣal ɣuṛ-sen yiwen syagi, ad beddlen tikli.
Ibṛahim yerra-yas : M'ur semḥessen ara i ccariɛa n Musa d lenbiya, atan ɣas ma yuɣal yiwen si lmegtin ur as-smeḥsisen ara.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna i inelmaden is imeslayen-agi : -- D lmuḥal ur d-țilint ara sebbat ara yesseɣlin imdanen di ddnub. A nnger n win ara yilin d sebba n uɣelluy ;
axiṛ a s-ɛelqen aɣaṛef n tsirt ɣer temgeṛṭ-is, a t-ḍeggṛen ɣer lebḥeṛ wala ad yesseɣli di ddnub yiwen seg imecṭuḥen-agi.
?adret ɣef yiman-nwen ! Ma yeḍlem gma-k ssefhem-it, ma yendem deg wayen ixdem semmeḥ as.
?as ma yeḍlem-ik sebɛa iberdan deg wass, ma yusa-d ɣuṛ-ek sebɛa tikkal a k-d-yini : « aql-i ndemmeɣ deg wayen xedmeɣ », ilaq a s tsemmḥeḍ.
Ṛṛusul n Sidna Ɛisa nnan-as : A Sidi ssemɣeṛ liman-nneɣ !
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Lemmer tesɛam liman ulamma annect n uɛeqqa n yired, aț-țizmirem aț-ținim i ttejṛa-yagi n țut qleɛ sya tṛuḥeḍ aț-țeẓẓuḍ iman-im di lebḥeṛ, a wen-taɣ awal.
Anwa deg-wen ara yesɛun axeddam ikerrzen neɣ ikessen lmal, ara s-yinin m'ara d-yuɣal si lexla : « lɛeslama-inek, qqim aț-țesteɛfuḍ, tura a k-d-awiɣ aț-țeččeḍ ».
Mačči akka ara s-yini, meɛna a s-yini : « ɣiwel beddel lqecc-ik tawiḍ-iyi-d ad ččeɣ ad sweɣ, mi ččiɣ ṛwiɣ, imiren aț-țeččeḍ aț-țesweḍ ula d keččini. »
Eɛni ad icekkeṛ axeddam-is imi gexdem ayen i s-yumeṛ ?
Kunwi daɣen m'ara txedmem ayen i wen-d yețwamṛen, init : d iqeddacen kan i nella, nexdem ayen ilaqen a t-nexdem.
Deg webrid-is ɣer temdint n Lquds, Sidna Ɛisa iɛedda ger tmurt n Samarya akk ț-țmurt n Jlili.
Mi gekcem ɣer yiwet n taddart, mmugren t-id ɛecṛa imuḍan ihelken lbeṛs, bedden mebɛid
ɛeggḍen nnan-as : A Sidna Ɛisa ! A Sidi ḥunn fell-aɣ !
Mi ten-iwala, Sidna Ɛisa yenna yasen : Ṛuḥet a kkun-walin lmuqedmin, a d-cehden belli teḥlam. Deg webrid-nsen mi ṛuḥen, akken walan iman-nsen ḥlan ṣfan,
yiwen deg-sen yuɣal-ed seg webrid-nni yețḥemmid Ṛebbi s kra yellan di taɣect-is.
Yusa-d yeɣli ɣer iḍaṛṛen n Sidna Ɛisa, iseǧǧed zdat-es, icekkeṛ-it, yerna argaz-agi d aṣamari i gella.
Sidna Ɛisa yewwi-yasen-d lemtel-agi iwakken ad deɛɛun daymen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi ur feččlen ara.
Yenna-yasen : Deg yiwet n temdint yella yiwen lqaḍi, ur ițțagad Ṛebbi ur yețqadaṛ imdanen.
Di temdint-nni tella daɣen yiwet n taǧǧalt tețṛuḥu ɣuṛ-es, teqqaṛ-as : « eḥkem s lḥeqq gar-i d wexṣim-iw. »
Aṭas i geqqim yegguma a s-yefk lḥeqq, meɛna ixemmem deg yiman-is yenna : « taǧǧalt-agi eɛyiɣ deg-es ! ?as ur țțaggadeɣ Ṛebbi ur ḥsibeɣ yiwen
a s-fkeɣ lḥeqq akken ur d-tețțuɣal ara a yi-teṛṛeẓ aqeṛṛuy-iw. »
Dɣa Sidna Ɛisa yenna : Twalam ayen i d-yenna lqaḍi agi amesbaṭli !
Amek Sidi Ṛebbi ur d-yețțak ara lḥeqq i wid i gextaṛ, i gețɛeggiḍen ɣuṛ-es am yiḍ am ass ? A wen-d-iniɣ : ur yețɛeṭṭil ara iwakken a ten-iɛiwen, a sen-yefk lḥeqq.
Meɛna Mmi-s n bunadem asm'ara d-yas, wissen ma d-yaf liman di ddunit ?
Yenna-d daɣen lemtel-agi ɣef kra n yemdanen iḥesben iman-nsen d iḥeqqiyen ɣer Ṛebbi, iḥeqqṛen wiyaḍ :
Sin yergazen ulin ɣer lǧameɛ ad ẓallen ; yiwen (d ccix n lǧameɛ) n ukabar n ifariziyen, wayeḍ d amekkas (ixeddmen ɣer iṛumaniyen istɛemṛen tamurt).

Afarizi ibedd yețẓalla yeqqaṛ deg iman-is : a k-ḥemdeɣ a k-cekkṛeɣ a Sidi Ṛebbi imi ur lliɣ ara am wid yellan d imcumen, d ixeddaɛen, yețɛicin di zzna ; a k-cekkṛeɣ daɣen imi ur lliɣ ara am umekkas-agi.
?țuẓumeɣ sin wussan di dduṛt, țțakeɣ leɛcuṛ seg wayen sɛiɣ.
Amekkas-nni ibedd mebɛid, issetḥa ad yerfed ula d allen-is ɣer igenni, yekkat deg idmaren-is yeqqaṛ : « a Sidi Ṛebbi, ḥunn fell-i nekk yellan d amednub ! »

A wen-d-iniɣ : amekkas-nni yuɣal ɣer wexxam-is di lehna, yețwaqbel ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, ma d afarizi-nni ur yețwaqbel ara. Kra n win yessimɣuṛen iman-is a t-id-isres Sidi Ṛebbi ; ma d win yessimẓiyen iman-is a t-issaɛli.
Lɣaci țțawin-as-ed ula d llufanat iwakken ad issers afus-is fell-asen a ten-ibarek. Inelmaden-is mi walan ayagi, țnaɣen-ten.
Sidna Ɛisa issawel asen-d yenna : Anfet-asen i warrac imeẓyanen a d-asen ɣuṛ-i ur ten-țțarrat ara, axaṭer tagelda n Ṛebbi tețwahegga i wid yellan am nutni.
A wen-iniɣ tideț : kra n win ur neqbil ara tageldit n Sidi Ṛebbi am weqcic ameẓyan, ur ț-ikeččem ara.
Yiwen umeṛkanti isteqsa Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ay argaz n lɛali, d acu i yi ilaqen a t-xedmeɣ iwakken ad sɛuɣ tudert n dayem ?
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Acuɣeṛ i yi-d-tenniḍ « ay argaz lɛali » ? Ulac win yellan d lɛali-t anagar Sidi Ṛebbi !
Tessneḍ ayen i d-tenna ccariɛa n Musa : ur xeddem ara zzna, ur neqq ara, ur țțaker ara, ur țcehhid ara s ẓẓur, qadeṛ baba-k d yemma-k.
Argaz-nni yenna-yas : Ayagi akk xeddmeɣ-t seg wasmi lliɣ d ameẓyan.
Mi gesla Sidna Ɛisa i imeslayen agi, yenna-yas : Ihi txuṣṣ-ik yiwet lḥaǧa kan : ṛuḥ zzenz ayen akk tesɛiḍ, seddeq-it i yigellilen iwakken aț-țesɛuḍ agerruj deg igenni, tuɣaleḍ-ed aț-țedduḍ yid-i.
Argaz-nni mi gesla i yimeslayen-agi yeɣli-d fell-as leḥzen imi d ameṛkanti i gella.
Mi t-iwala yeḥzen, Sidna Ɛisa yenna : Acḥal i sen-yewɛeṛ i wid yesɛan cci ad kecmen ɣer tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi !
Ishel i welɣem ad iɛeddi di tiṭ n tissegnit wala i umeṛkanti ad yekcem ɣer tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Wid i s-yeslan, nnan-as : Anwa i gzemren ad ițțusellek ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Ayen yellan d lmuḥal i wemdan yeshel ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
Buṭrus yenna-yas : I nukkni yeǧǧan kullec iwakken a neddu yid-ek ?
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : A wen-iniɣ tideț : kra n win yeǧǧan axxam-is, tameṭṭut-is, ayetma- s, imawlan-is neɣ arraw-is ɣef ddemma n tgeldit n Ṛebbi,
a s-d-ițunefk di ddunit-agi akteṛ n wayen yeǧǧa yerna ɣer zdat, ad yesɛu tudert n dayem.
Sidna Ɛisa iɛedda si temdint n Yiriku.
Yella dinna yiwen umeṛkanti isem-is Zaci, d ameqqran n imekkasen n ddewla.
Yebɣa ad iẓer anwa i d Sidna Ɛisa lameɛna ur yezmir ara a t-iwali imi aṭas lɣaci i gellan, yerna nețța d awezlan.
Yuzzel ɣer zdat, yuli ɣef ttejṛa iwakken a t-iwali m'ara d-iɛeddi syenna.
Mi gewweḍ Sidna Ɛisa ɣer wemkan-nni, yerfed allen-is yenna i Zaci : A Zaci, ɣiwel ers-ed syenna, ɣuṛ-ek ara nseɣ ass-agi.
Zaci yers-ed s lemɣawla ad yesteṛḥeb s Sidna Ɛisa.
Lɣaci mi walan ayagi smermugen wway gar asen qqaṛen : « ɣer yiwen umekkas (axeddaɛ) am wagi ara yens ! »
Zaci iqeṛṛeb-ed ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, yenna-yas : A Sidi, atan ad fkeɣ i igellilen azgen n wayen sɛiɣ, yerna ma ḍelmeɣ yiwen a s-rreɣ ṛebɛa imuren.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ass-agi leslak ikcem-ed axxam agi, imi argaz-agi ula d nețța d mmi-s n Ibṛahim.
Axaṭer Mmi-s n bunadem yusa-d ad inadi ɣef wid iḍaɛen, a ten-isellek.
Sidna Ɛisa yerna-d yiwen n lemtel i wid i s ismeḥsisen, axaṭer qṛib ad awḍen ɣer temdint n Lquds, lɣaci ɣilen imiren kan ara d-tas tgeldit n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Yenna yasen : Yiwen wergaz imawlan-is muceɛen, ițeddu ad iṛuḥ ɣer yiwet n tmurt ibeɛden iwakken a t-sbedden d agellid ɣef tmurt-is , imiren a d-yuɣal.
Qbel ad iṛuḥ, yessawel i ɛecṛa seg iqeddacen-is ; yefka tawizeț i mkul yiwen deg-sen, yenna-yasen : « xedmet yis-sent tjaṛa alamma uɣaleɣ-ed ».
Arraw n tmurt-is i t-ikeṛhen, ceggɛen deffir-es kra n yemdanen ara yinin : « ur nebɣi ara ad yili wergaz agi d agellid fell-aneɣ. »
Mi t-sbedden d agellid, yuɣal ed ɣer tmurt-is ; yessawel i iqeddacen nni iwumi yefka tiwiztin iwakken ad isteqsi mkul yiwen deg-sen d acu i d-yerbeḥ yis-sent.
Amezwaru yusa-d, yenna : A Sidi, s twizeț-nni i yi-d-tefkiḍ rebḥeɣ-ed ɛecṛa nniḍen.
Agellid yenna-yas : D ayen yelhan ay aqeddac lɛali, imi deg-ek laman ɣef lḥaǧa tamecṭuḥt, a k-fkeɣ aț-țḥekmeḍ ɣef ɛecṛa n tudrin.
Aqeddac wis sin yusa-d yenna : A Sidi, rebḥeɣ-ed xemsa n twiztin s twizeț i yi-d-tefkiḍ.
Agellid yenna-yas : Ula d kečč a k-sbeddeɣ d lḥakem ɣef xemsa tudrin.
Yusa-d uqeddac wis tlata yenna : A Sidi, ațah twizeț-inek ! Freɣ-ț deg yiwen uceṭṭiḍ ;
uggadeɣ-k axaṭer tweɛṛeḍ, tețțeddmeḍ ayen ur tesriseḍ, tmeggreḍ ayen ur tezriɛeḍ.
Agellid yerra-yas : ?ef yimeslayen-ik ara k-ḥasbeɣ ay aqeddac amcum ! Teẓriḍ weɛṛeɣ, țeddmeɣ ayen ur sriseɣ, meggreɣ ayen ur zriɛeɣ ;
acuɣeṛ ihi ur tefkiḍ ara idrimen-iw i wid ara ten-isxedmen, iwakken m'ara d-uɣaleɣ a ten-id jebdeɣ s lfayda ?
Dɣa yenna i widak yellan dinna : Kkset-as tawizeț-nni, rnut-as-ț i win yesɛan ɛecṛa.
Nnan-as : A Sidi, yesɛa yakan ɛecṛa !
Yerra-yasen : Nniɣ-awen : win yesɛan a s nernu, ma d win ur nesɛi ara a s nekkes ula d ayen i gɣil yesɛa-t.
Ma d iɛdawen-nni-inu ur neqbil ara ad iliɣ d agellid fell-asen, awit-țen-id ɣer dagi tezlum-ten zdat-i.
Mi gekfa ameslay, Sidna Ɛisa yezwar ɣer zdat lɣaci iwakken ad yali ɣer temdint n Lquds.
Mi qṛib ad yaweḍ ɣer tuddar n Bitfaji akk-d Bitani, ɣer tama n yiwen yiɣil ițțusemman « Iɣil Uzemmur, » Sidna Ɛisa iceggeɛ sin seg inelmaden-is,
yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet ɣer taddart ihin i ɣ-d iqublen, aț-țafem ajḥiḥ yeqqen, leɛmeṛ ur yerkib fell-as yiwen ; brut-as-ed, tawim-t-id.
Ma yella win i wen-d yennan : « acuɣeṛ i s-d-tebram ? » Init-as : yeḥwaǧ-it Ssid-nneɣ.
Imceggɛen-nni ṛuḥen, ufan kullec akken i sen-d-yenna Sidna Ɛisa.
Mi s-d-bran i wejḥiḥ-nni, bab-is yenna-yasen : I wacu i s-d-tebram ?
Wwin-d ajḥiḥ-nni, ssersen fell-as ibeṛnyas-nsen, srekben Sidna Ɛisa.
Akken i gteddu, lɣaci tessun-as-d ibeṛnyas-nsen deg webrid.
Mi qṛib ad awḍen ɣer temdint n Lquds, di tkessart-nni n yiɣil n uzemmur, inelmaden-is d lɣaci meṛṛa ččuṛen d lfeṛḥ, țḥemmiden Sidi Ṛebbi s ṣṣut eɛlayen ɣef lbeṛhanat akk i walan.
Yiwen wass deg ussan-nni, Sidna Ɛisa yella yesselmad lɣaci deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen yețbecciṛ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ ; leḥqen-d lmuqedmin d lɛulama n ccariɛa akk d imeqqranen n wegdud,
nnan-as : Di leɛnaya-k ! ansi i k-d-tekka lḥekma s wacu i txeddmeḍ annect agi ? Anwa i k-ț-id-yefkan ?
Yerra-yasen : A kkun-steqsiɣ ula d nekkini, init-iyi-d :
anwa i d-icegn, d Ṛebbi neɣ d imdanen ?
Bdan țemcawaṛen wway gar-asen, qqaṛen : Ma nenna-yas d Ṛebbi, a ɣ-d yini iwacu ihi ur tuminem ara yis ?
Ma nenna-yas d imdanen, lɣaci akk a ɣ-ṛejmen axaṭer umnen meṛṛa belli Yeḥya d nnbi.
Dɣa nnan i Sidna Ɛisa : Atan ur neẓri ara anwa i t-id iceggɛen.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Ula d nekk ur awen-d-qqaṛeɣ ara ansi i yi-d-tekka lḥekma s wacu i xeddmeɣ annect-agi.
Dɣa yewwi-d lemtel-agi i lɣaci : Yiwen wergaz yeẓẓa tafeṛṛant ( iger n tẓurin ) issekra-ț i ixemmasen, iṛuḥ ɣer lɣeṛba, iɛeṭṭel dinna.
Mi d-yewweḍ lweqt n tẓurin, iceggeɛ ɣuṛ-sen aqeddac iwakken a s-d-fken amur-is ; lameɛna ixemmasen-nni wwten-t, rrant-id ifassen d ilmawen.
Iceggeɛ daɣen aqeddac nniḍen, lameɛna ula d nețța ewten-t, regmen-t, rrant-id ifassen d ilmawen.
Iceggeɛ-asen daɣen wis tlata, jerḥen-t rnan qecɛen-t-id syenna.
Amɛellem-nni n tfeṛṛant yenna : « d acu ara xedmeɣ tura ? A sen ceggɛeɣ mmi ameɛzuz , ahat nețța a t-qadṛen ! »
Lameɛna ixemmasen nni mi t-walan, mcawaṛen wway gar asen nnan : « ataya win ara iweṛten ! Kkret a t-nenneɣ iwakken aț-țuɣal tfeṛṛant d ayla-nneɣ. »
?eggṛen-t beṛṛa n tfeṛṛant, nɣan-t. D acu ara sen-yexdem tura bab n tfeṛṛant-agi ?
A d-yas ad ineɣ ixemmasen-nni, ad yefk tafeṛṛant i wiyaḍ. Lɣaci mi slan annect-agi, nnan : A ɣ-imneɛ Ṛebbi !
Lameɛna Sidna Ɛisa imuqel-iten yenna : D acu i d lmeɛna n wawal-agi yuran : adɣaɣ i ḍeggṛen wid ibennun, yuɣal d win yeṭṭfen lebni .
Kra n win ara yeɣlin ɣef wedɣaɣ-agi ad yeṛṛez ; ma d win i ɣef ara d-yeɣli, ad ițwanɣed.
Lɛulama n ccariɛa d imeqqranen n lmuqedmin țqelliben a t-ṭṭfen imiren kan, axaṭer fehmen fell-asen i d-yenna lemtel-agi, lameɛna uggaden lɣaci.
Bdan țɛassan Sidna Ɛisa iwakken ma yeɣli-d deg wawal a t-ṭṭfen. Fkan tajɛelt i kra n yemdanen yerran iman-nsen d wid iḍuɛen Ṛebbi iwakken a t-zenzen ɣer lḥakem n tmurt.
Steqsan-t ihi s imeslayen-agi : A Sidi, neẓra ayen i d-teqqaṛeḍ d wayen i tesselmadeḍ d lḥeqq, yerna ur txeddmeḍ ara lxilaf ger yemdanen, tesselmadeḍ abrid n Ṛebbi s tideț.
Ini-yaɣ-d ma d leḥlal a nxelleṣ tabzert i Qayṣer (isteɛmṛen tamurt)?
Sidna Ɛisa ifaqen i tḥila-nsen, yerra-yasen : Seknet-iyi-d aṣurdi.
Udem-agi d wayen yuran ɣef wuṣuṛdi-agi wi ten-ilan ? Rran-as : D udem n Qayṣer!
Dɣa yenna-yasen : Ihi erret i Qayṣer ayen yellan n Qayṣer, terrem i Ṛebbi ayen yellan n Ṛebbi.
Wehmen s wayen i sen-d-yerra dɣa ssusmen irkul, axaṭer ur ufin ara amek ara t-id-sseɣlin deg wawal zdat lɣaci.
Kra n isaduqiyen ur nețțamen ara s ḥeggu n lmegtin, qeṛṛben-d ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, steqsan-t nnan-as :
Sidna Ɛisa yerfed allen-is, iwala imeṛkantiyen srusun lewɛadi deg usenduq n lǧameɛ.
Ațaya yiwet n taǧǧalt taẓawalit tger sin iṣurdiyen ɣer usenduq-nni,
dɣa yenna : A wen-iniɣ tideț : lweɛda n taǧǧalt-agi taẓawalit tugar akk tiyaḍ ;
axaṭer wiyaḍ fkan seg wayen sɛan d zzyada ma d nețțat tefka ciṭṭuḥ-nni s wacu ara tɛic.
Kra n yemdanen țmeslayen ɣef lǧameɛ iqedsen qqaṛen wway gar-asen : Acḥal yecbeḥ lebni n lǧameɛ-agi akk-d țɣawsiwin i s-d-yețțunefken d lweɛda ! Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen :
Deg wayen akka i tețwalim, a d-awḍen wussan anda kullec ad ihudd, ur d-yețɣimi wedɣaɣ ɣef wayeḍ.
Steqsan-t nnan-as : A Sidi, melmi ara d-yedṛu wannect-a ? Anta licaṛa ara d isbegnen belli qṛib a d-yedṛu waya ?
Yenna-yasen : ?uṛ-wat a kkun-kellxen, axaṭer aṭas ara d-yasen s yisem-iw a d inin : d nekk i d Lmasiḥ ! Neɣ a wen-d-inin : lweqt yewweḍ-ed ! Ur ten-țțamnet ara !
M'ara teslem heddṛen ɣef tegrawliwin d ṭradat ur țțagadet ara, axaṭer ilaq a d-yedṛu uqbel wayagi, lameɛna mačči imiren i ț-țaggara n ddunit.
Yenna-yasen daɣen : A d-yekker wegdud ɣer wayeḍ, a d-tekker tagelda ɣer tayeḍ.
A d-tilint zzelzlat timeqqranin, a d-ɣlin di yal lehlakat i gderrɛen ( i gneṭṭḍen) akk-d laẓ, a d-tilint leɛǧubat yessexlaɛen akk-d licaṛat timeqqranin deg igenni.

Lameɛna uqbel a d-yedṛu wannect-a, kunwi s inelmaden-iw a kkun-ṭṭfen, a kkun qehṛen, ad ḥekmen fell-awen di leǧwameɛ, a kkun-ḍeggṛen ɣer leḥbus, a kkun-sbedden zdat igelliden d lḥekkam ɣef ddemma n yisem-iw.
A d-yedṛu wannect-a yid-wen iwakken aț-țilim d inigan-iw zdat-sen.
Ur țḥebbiṛet ara amek ara tsellkem iman-nwen,
axaṭer a wen-d-fkeɣ imeslayen d leɛqel s wacu ara tqablem iɛdawen nwen, ur țizmiren ara ad bedden zdat-wen neɣ a kkun-xalfen.
Ula d imawlan-nwen akk-d atmaten-nwen d imdukkal-nwen a kkun-zzenzen yerna ad nɣen aṭas seg-wen.
A kkun-keṛhen yemdanen meṛṛa ɣef ddemma-w,
lameɛna yiwen wenẓad n uqeṛṛuy-nwen ur yețṛuḥu.
?ebṛet, axaṭer s ṣṣbeṛ-nwen ara tsellkem tiṛwiḥin-nwen.
M'ara teẓrem tamdint n Lquds zzin-as-d lɛeskeṛ n yeɛdawen-is, ḥṣut belli nnger-is yewweḍ-ed.
Ass-nni ilaq wid ara yilin di temdint n Lquds ad ffɣen, wid ara yilin di lexla ur keččmen ara ɣer temdint, wid ara yilin di tmurt n Yahuda ad rewlen ɣer idurar.
Axaṭer ussan-nni d ussan n twaɣit deg wacu ara yedṛu meṛṛa wayen yuran.
A nnger n tilawin ara yilin s tadist neɣ tid ara yessuṭuḍen deg ussan-nni axaṭer a d-teɣli cedda ț-țameqqrant ɣef tmurt, a d-yeɣli wurrif n Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef wegdud,

imezdaɣ-is ad mmten s ujenwi, a ten-awin d imeḥbas ɣer tmura nniḍen. Tamdint n Lquds a ț-ṛekḍen leǧnas ur nețțamen ara s Sidi Ṛebbi, alamma yețwakemmel lweqt i sen-d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi, imiren ad yezzi ɣef leǧnas-nni, a ten-iɛaqeb.
Lɛid i deg xedmen aɣṛum mbla iɣes n temtunt ițțusemman « Tafaska n izimer n leslak » tqeṛb-ed.
Lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lɛulama n ccariɛa țqelliben amek ara nɣen Sidna Ɛisa lameɛna uggaden lɣaci.
Yudas n Qeṛyut yiwen si tnac-nni n inelmadenis, ikcem-it Cciṭan.
Iṛuḥ ad yemcawaṛ d lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d lḥekkam iɛessasen n lǧameɛ iqedsen, iwakken a sen izzenz Sidna Ɛisa.
Nutni feṛḥen yerna ɛuhden-t a s-fken idrimen.
Yudas yefra awal yid-sen syenna yebda yețqellib amek ara sen-t-yezzenz s tuffra ɣef lɣaci.
Yewweḍ-ed wass n Tfaska n weɣṛum mbla iɣes n tamtunt i deg ilaq ad zlun izimer n leslak.
Sidna Ɛisa iceggeɛ Buṭrus d Yuḥenna, yenna-yasen : Ṛuḥet a ɣ-theggim imensi n Tfaska.
Nnan-as : Anda tebɣiḍ a t-nheggi a Sidi ?
Yerra-yasen : M'ara tkecmem ɣer temdint, a d-temmagrem yiwen wergaz yerfed tacmuxt n waman ; tebɛet-eț ɣer wexxam anda ara yekcem.
Init i bab n wexxam-nni : yeqqaṛ-ak-d Ssid nneɣ, anda ara nečč imensi n Tfaska nekk d inelmaden-iw ?
A wen-d-isken yiwet n tɣuṛfeț tameqqrant iwejden, dinna ara theggim imensi n Tfaska.
Mi ṛuḥen, ufan kullec akken i sen-t-id-yenna, dɣa heggan imensi n Tfaska.
Mi d-yewweḍ lweqt n imensi, Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim ad yečč nețța d Ṛṛusul-is,
yenna-yasen : Acḥal i mennaɣ ad ččeɣ imensi n Tfaska-agi yid-wen uqbel ad nneɛtabeɣ !
A wen-d-iniɣ : atan ur țțuɣaleɣ ara maḍi a t-ččeɣ alamma tețwakemmel lmeɛna-ines di tgelda n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Yeddem-d tabuqalt n waman n tẓurin, yeḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi yenna : Axet tabuqalt-agi, feṛqet-eț wway gar-awen,
a wen-d-iniɣ : sya d asawen ur țțuɣaleɣ ara ad sweɣ seg waman-agi n tẓurin alamma tewweḍ ed tgeldit n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Yeddem-ed daɣen aɣṛum, iḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi, yebḍa-t yefka-yasen-t, yenna : Aɣṛum-agi d lǧețța-w ara fkeɣ fell-awen, feṛqet-eț gar-awen. Sya d asawen xeddmet akkagi akken ad iyi-d-tețmektayem.
Mi gfukk imensi, yeddem-ed tabuqalt n waman n tẓurin, yefka yasen-ț yenna : Tabuqalt-agi, d leɛqed ajdid s idammen-iw ara yazzlen fell-awen.
Ma d win ara yi-zzenzen atan yeqqim-ed yid-i ɣer lmakla.
Mmi-s n bunadem ad immet akken yura fell-as di tira iqedsen, lameɛna a nnger n wemdan agi ara t-izzenzen !
Ṛṛusul bdan țmesteqsayen wway gar-asen anwa-t wagi ara t-ixedɛen.
Inelmaden bdan țemjadalen wway gar-asen iwakken ad ẓren anwa deg-sen ara ițwaḥesben d ameqqran.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna yasen : Imeqqranen n ddunit ḥekmen s ddreɛ ɣef yigduden-nsen yerna țțusemman d at lxiṛ.
Kunwi xḍut i wannect-agi. Ameqqran deg-wen ad yili am umeẓyan, win iḥekmen ad yili am win iqeddcen.
Anwa i d ameqqran , d amɛelem yeqqimen ad yečč neɣ d win i s iqeddcen ? Yak d win yeqqimen ad yečč ! Ma d nekk, aql-i gar-awen am win iqeddcen.
Kunwi aql-ikkun tṣebṛem yid-i di lmeḥnat-iw.
Akken i yi-d-ihegga Baba tagelda, ula d nekk a wen-ț-id heggiɣ i kunwi
iwakken aț-țeččem aț-țeswem yid-i di tgelda-inu. Aț-țeqqimem ɣef yikursiyen n lḥekma, aț-țḥekmem ɣef tnac leɛṛac n wat Isṛail.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna : A Semɛun sel-iyi-d ! Cciṭan yessuter a kkun-isserwet am yirden,
lameɛna dɛiɣ ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi fell-ak akken ur tfeččleḍ ara di liman. Ma d kečč m'ara d-tuɣaleḍ ɣuṛ-i, sseǧhed atmaten-ik.
Buṭrus yenna-yas : Aql-i heggaɣ iman-iw ad kecmeɣ yid-ek ɣer lḥebs, ad dduɣ yid-ek ula ɣer lmut.
Tajmaɛt meṛṛa tekker, wwin Sidna Ɛisa ɣer lḥakem Bilaṭus.
Bdan țcetkin fell-as, qqaṛen : -- Nufa argaz-agi yeskker ccwal ger lɣaci-nneɣ, yeqqaṛ-asen : « ur țxelliṣet ara leɣṛama i Qayṣer », yeqqaṛ daɣen : « d nețța i d Lmasiḥ, i d agellid ».
Bilaṭus isteqsa-t s imeslayen-agi : D kečč i d agellid n wat Isṛail ? Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Tenniḍ-t-id.
Bilaṭus yenna i lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lɣaci : Ur s-d-ssukkseɣ acemma i wergaz-agi.
Nutni țkemmilen qqaṛen : Yeskker ccwal ger lɣaci s wayen yesselmad ; yebda-d si tmurt n Jlili, yuɣal ɣer tmurt n Yahuda meṛṛa, tura yewweḍ-ed ɣer dagi.
Bilaṭus, mi gesla bedren-d tamurt n Jlili, yesteqsa ɣef Sidna Ɛisa ma d ajlili i gella.
Mi geẓra belli Sidna Ɛisa ajlili, n tmurt i ɣef yeḥkem Hiṛudus, iceggeɛ-as-t i Hiṛudus yellan ula d nețța di temdint n Lquds ussan-nni.
Hiṛudus ifṛeḥ aṭas mi geẓra Sidna Ɛisa, axaṭer acḥal segmi yebɣa a t-iẓer ɣef ddemma n wayen yesla fell-as. Yețmenni a t-iwali yexdem lbeṛhan,
isteqsa-t aṭas, lameɛna Sidna Ɛisa ur as-d-yerri acemma.
Lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d lɛulama n ccariɛa yellan dinna țcetkayen fell-as s lɣecc.
Hiṛudus d lɛeskeṛ-is ḥeqṛen-t, stehzayen fell as, selsen-as yiwen ubeṛnus ifazen, imiren rran-t i Bilaṭus.
Seg wass-nni, Bilaṭus d Hiṛudus uɣalen d imdukkal nutni yellan zik d iɛdawen.
Imiren Bilaṭus yesnejmaɛ-ed lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lɛulama akk-d lɣaci,
yenna-yasen : Tewwim-iyi-d argaz-agi, tennam d yeskker ccwal ger lɣaci ; atan steqsaɣ-t zdat-wen ur ufiɣ ara deg-s ayen akka s wayes i d-teccetkam fell as.
Ula d Hiṛudus ur s-d yessukkes acemma imi i ɣ-t-id-yerra. Ihi argaz-agi ur yexdim ara ayen yuklalen lmut.
A s-fkeɣ tiɣṛit imiren a s-serrḥeɣ.
Mkul Tafaska n izimer n leslak Bilaṭus yețserriḥ-ed i yiwen umeḥbus.
Lɣaci meṛṛa țɛeggiḍen qqaṛen : Enɣ-it , tserḥeḍ-ed i Barabas !
Barabas-agi yețwaḥbes ɣef ccwal i gexdem di temdint-nni akk ț-țemgeṛṭ i genɣa.
Bilaṭus yebɣan a d-iserreḥ i Sidna Ɛisa ihḍeṛ-ed tikkelt nniḍen i lɣaci,
lameɛna nutni țɛeggiḍen qqaṛen : Semmeṛ-it, semmeṛ-it ɣef wumidag.
Bilaṭus inṭeq-ed tikkelt tis tlata, yenna-yasen : D acu n cceṛ i gexdem ? Ur ufiɣ ara deg-s ayen yuklalen lmut. Atan ihi a s-fkeɣ tiɣṛit, imiren a s-serrḥeɣ.
Lameɛna nutni ḥeṛsen-t s leɛyaḍ qqaṛen : Semmeṛ-it ɣef lluḥ ! ?elben-t s leɛyaḍ-nsen
dɣa Bilaṭus yeqbel ayen i s-ssutren.
Iserreḥ-as-d i umeḥbus-nni issekren ccwal yerna yenɣa tamgeṛṭ ; ma d Sidna Ɛisa yefka-yasen-t ad xedmen yis ayen bɣan.
Mi wwin Sidna Ɛisa, mmugren-d yiwen wergaz n temdint n Qiṛwan ițțusemman Semɛun, yuɣal-ed si lexla ; ḥettmen fell-as ad ibbib amidag-nni, ad iddu deffir Sidna Ɛisa.
Aṭas n lɣaci i d-itebɛen deffir nsen, llant gar-asen tilawin kkatent deg idmaren-nsent, țrunt fell-as.
Sidna Ɛisa yezzi-d ɣuṛ-sent yenna-yasent : A yessi-s n temdint n Lquds ur țrumt ara fell-i, țrumt ɣef yiman-nkunt d warraw-nkunt,
axaṭer atan a d-asen wussan i deg ara yinin : « ț-țiseɛdiyin tid ur nezmir ara a d-sɛunt dderya, ț-țiseɛdiyin tid ur d-nuriw ara, ur nessuṭeḍ ara.»
Imiren imdanen ad bdun ad qqaṛen : ay idurar ɣlit-ed fell-aɣ, a tiɣaltin ffremt-aɣ.
Axaṭer ma xedmen annect-a i wesɣaṛ akken d azegzaw amek ara tedṛu d uquṛan ?
Wwin daɣen sin n yemcumen iwakken a ten-semmṛen akk-d Sidna Ɛisa.
Mi wwḍen ɣer yiwen wemkan ițțusemman « Iɣil Uqeṛṛuy», semmṛen Sidna Ɛisa ɣef lluḥ, nețța d sin-nni yembaṣiyen, yiwen ɣer tama-s tayeffust wayeḍ ɣer tama-s tazelmaṭ.
Dɣa Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq-ed yenna : A Baba eɛfu-yasen imi ur ẓrin ara d acu i xeddmen. Iɛsekṛiwen-nni gren tasɣaṛt ad feṛqen gar-asen llebsa-ines.
Lɣaci i gbedden dinna țfeṛṛiǧen ; lmuqedmin țmesxiṛen fell-as qqaṛen : Isellek wiyaḍ, ad isellek iman-is tura ma yella ț-țideț d Lmasiḥ i gextaṛ Ṛebbi.
Iɛsekṛiwen daɣen țmesxiṛen fell as, qeṛṛben ɣuṛ-es bɣan a s-sswen lxell,
qqaṛen-as : Ma d agellid n wat Isṛail i telliḍ, sellek iman-ik.
Ddmen-d daɣen yiwet n telwiḥt, semmṛen-ț sennig uqeṛṛuy-is, uran deg-s : « wagi d agellid n wat Isṛail ».
Yiwen seg seg imbaṣiyen-nni ițțusemmṛen ɣef lluḥ, ireggem Sidna Ɛisa, yeqqaṛ-as : Ma d Lmasiḥ i telliḍ sellek iman ik tsellkeḍ-aɣ ula d nukkni.
Lameɛna wayeḍ ilumm-it yenna yas : Ur tuggadeḍ ara Ṛebbi, kečč ițțusemmṛen am nețța ?
Nukni ma ḥekmen fell-aɣ d lḥeqq axaṭer nuklal lmut s wayen i nexdem ; lameɛna nețța ur yexdim acemma n wayen n diri.
Yezzi ɣer Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : A Ɛisa, mmekti-yi-d m'ara d-tas lḥekma n tgeldit-ik.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : A k-iniɣ tideț, ass-agi aț-țiliḍ yid-i di lǧennet.
Aț-țili d leǧwahi n tnac, yeɣli-d ṭṭlam ɣef tmurt meṛṛa armi d țlata n tmeddit.
Ass n lḥedd ṣṣbeḥ zik, tilawin nni ṛuḥent ɣer uẓekka, wwint yid-sent leɛṭeṛ i d-heggant.
Ufant azṛu-nni iqeflen aẓekka, yegrareb akkin.
Mi kecment ɣer daxel, ur ufint ara lǧețța n Sidna Ɛisa ;
qqiment wehment. Atnaya ḍehṛen-asent-id sin yergazen s llebsa yețfeǧǧiǧen.
Ikcem itent lxuf, brant i wallen nsent ɣer lqaɛa ; irgazen-nni nnan-asent : Acuɣeṛ tețqellibemt deg uẓekka win yeddren ?
Ulac-it dagi, yeḥya-d si ger lmegtin. Ur tecfimt ara ɣef wayen i wen-d-yenna di tmurt n Jlili ?
« Ilaq Mmi-s n bunadem ad ițwasellem ger ifassen n yemcumen, ad ițusemmeṛ ɣef wumidag, ass wis tlata a d-iḥyu si ger lmegtin. »
Dɣa mmektant-ed imeslayen n Sidna Ɛisa.
Fɣent seg uẓekka iwakken ad ssiwḍent lexbaṛ ɣef wayen yedṛan, i ḥdac-nni yinelmaden d wid yellan yid-sen.
Llant gar-asent Meryem-nni tamagdalit, Yunna, Meryem yemma-s n Yeɛqub akk-d tidak nniḍen yeddan yid-sent ; ḥkant kullec i inelmaden.
Lameɛna ayen i sen-ḥkant iban asen-d am tmacahuț, ur tent-uminen ara.
Dɣa Buṭrus yekker yuzzel ɣer uẓekka. Mi gewweḍ, imuqel ɣer daxel, iwala anagar lekfen di lqaɛa. Yuɣal syenna, iwhem deg wayen yedṛan.
Ass-nni, sin inelmaden teddun ɣer yiwet n taddart isem-is Amawes, taddart-agi tebɛed ɣef temdint n Lquds azal n snat sswayeɛ n tikli.
?eddun țmeslayen wway gar-asen ɣef wayen akk yedṛan.
Akken llan țmeslayen, Sidna Ɛisa iqeṛṛeb ɣuṛ-sen, yedda yid-sen.
Yenna-yasen : ?ef wacu i tețmeslayem akka deg webrid ? D acu i d yesseɣlin fell-awen leḥzen ?
Yiwen deg-sen, isem-is Klufas, yenna-yas : Eɛni anagar kečč ur neẓri ara ayen yedṛan ussan-agi di temdint n Lquds ?
Nețța yenna-yasen : D acu yedṛan akka ? Rran-as : Ayen yedṛan d Ɛisa anaṣari nnbi-nni, yesɛan tazmert tameqqrant deg wayen ixeddem d wayen i d-iqqaṛ zdat Ṛebbi akk-d yemdanen.
Lmuqedmin imeqqranen d lḥekkam-nneɣ sellmen-t ɣer ifassen n iṛumaniyen, ḥekmen fell-as s lmut, semmṛen-t ɣef wumidag.
Nukni neḍmeɛ d nețța ara isellken wat Isṛail ; ass-agi d ass wis tlata segmi yedṛa wannect-a.
?-țideț, kra si tilawin-nneɣ swehment-aɣ ! Mi ṛuḥent ṣṣbeḥ zik ɣer uẓekka
ur ufint ara lǧețța-s. Uɣalent-ed nnant-aɣ-ed belli ḍehṛen asent-ed snat n lmalayekkat i sent id-yennan « atan yedder. »

name: John
chapters: Di tazwara yella win yellan d Awal n Ṛebbi, yella akk-d Ṛebbi, d nețța i d Ṛebbi.
kullec yețwaxleq seg-s ; deg wayen meṛṛa yețwaxelqen, ulac ayen ur d-nekki ara s ɣuṛ-es.
Deg-s i tella tudert ; tudert-agi tella ț-țafat i yemdanen.
Tafat tețfeǧǧiǧ di ṭṭlam, yerna ṭṭlam ur ț-iqbil ara.
Yella yiwen wergaz yețwaceggeɛ ed s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi, argaz-agi isem-is Yeḥya ;
yusa-d ad yili d inigi n tafat iwakken imdanen meṛṛa ad amnen s cchada-ines.
Mačči d nețța i ț-țafat, nețța yusa-d d inigi n tafat.
Tafat-agi ț-țafat n tideț, tusa-d ɣer ddunit iwakken aț-țecṛeq ɣef yal amdan.
Win yellan d Awal n Ṛebbi yella yakan si tazwara di ddunit, imi d nețța i ț-ixelqen lameɛna ddunit ur t- teɛqil ara.
Yusa-d ɣer lumma-s lameɛna nețțat ur t-teqbil ara.
Ma d wid i t-iqeblen yumnen yis, widak iɛuzz-iten, uɣalen d arraw n Ṛebbi,
mačči seg wemdan i d-lulen, mačči s lebɣi n tnefsit neɣ s lebɣi n wemdan, lameɛna d Ṛebbi i sen-yefkan tudert tajdiṭ.
Win akken yellan d Awal, yuɣal-ed d amdan, iɛac gar-aneɣ, yeččuṛ ț-țideț akk-d ṛṛeḥma. Nețweḥḥid di lqeḍra i d-yefka Baba Ṛebbi i Mmi-s awḥid.
Yeḥya iched-ed fell-as zdat lɣaci yeqqaṛ : D nețța ɣef i wen-d-nniɣ : win ara d-yasen deffir-iw yezwar-iyi-d axaṭer yella uqbel ad iliɣ.
Yesseṛwa-yaɣ s lxiṛat-is, lbaṛaka ɣef tayeḍ.
ccariɛa tusa-d s ufus n Sidna Musa, ma d ṛṛeḥma ț-țideț usant-ed s Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ
Yiwen ur yeẓri Sidi Ṛebbi, Mmi-s awḥid yellan ɣuṛ-es, d nețța i ɣ-t-id isbeggnen.
Atah wamek i geched Yeḥya asmi i d-ceggɛen ɣuṛes lḥekkam n wudayen si temdint n Lquds. Ceggɛen-d ɣuṛes tajmaɛt n lmu-qedmin akk-d yemṛabḍen n at Lewwi akken a t-steqsin, nnan-as : Anwa-k keččini ?
Yenna-yasen tideț mbla tuffra : Mačči d nekk i d Lmasiḥ !
Rnan steqsan-t : Anwa-k ihi ? D kečč i d nnbi Ilyas ? Yeḥya yenna-yasen : Xaṭi mačči d nekk. Nutni rnan nnan-as : D nnbi i telliḍ ? Nețța yerra-yasen : Xaṭi !
Rnan ḥeṛsen-t nnan-as : Anwa-k ihi ? Ilaq a nerr lexbaṛ i wid i ɣ-d-iceggɛen. D acu i teqqaṛeḍ ɣef yiman-ik ?
Yeḥya yenna-yasen : Nekk d win akken ɣef i d-yenna nnbi Iceɛya : ț-țaɣect tețɛeggiḍ deg unezṛuf : Heggit abrid i Sidi Ṛebbi !
Wid i d-yusan ɣuṛ-es i gellan di tejmaɛt n ifariziyen,
rnan steqsan-t nnan-as : Imi ur telliḍ ara d Lmasiḥ neɣ d nnbi Ilyas neɣ d nnbi nniḍen, iwacu ihi i tesseɣḍaseḍ lɣaci deg waman ?
Yeḥya yerra-yasen : Nekk sseɣḍaseɣ-kkun deg waman ; yella gar-awen yiwen ur t-tessinem ara,
usiɣ-ed uqbel-is, lameɛna ur uklaleɣ ara ad fsiɣ ulamma d lexyuḍ n warkasen-is.
Annect-agi meṛṛa yedṛa di taddart n Bitanya ɣer tama n cceṛq n wasif n Urdun anda i gesseɣḍas Yeḥya lɣaci.
Azekka-nni, Yeḥya iwala Sidna Ɛisa iteddu-d ɣuṛ-es, yenṭeq s ṣṣut ɛlayen : Atan Izimer n Ṛebbi, d win ițekksen ddnub n ddunit.
Fell-as i wen-d-nniɣ : « a d-yas yiwen, zwareɣ-t-id meɛna yella uqbel a d iliɣ.»
Nekk s yiman-iw ur ẓriɣ ara anwa-t meɛna usiɣ-ed ad sɣeḍseɣ deg waman akken a t-issinen wat Isṛail .
Atan wayen i d-yenna Yeḥya Aɣeṭṭas fell-as : Walaɣ Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen iṣubb-ed seg igenni s ṣṣifa n tetbirt yers-ed fell-as.

Nekk ur ẓriɣ ara belli d nețța, meɛna Sidi Ṛebbi i yi-d iceggɛen iwakken ad sɣeḍseɣ deg waman, yenna-yi-d : « Aț-țwaliḍ Ṛṛuḥ iṣubb-ed seg igenni, a d-yers ɣef yiwen wergaz, d nețța ara yesɣeḍsen imdanen s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen. »
Ayagi d ayen i ẓrant wallen-iw, daymi i d-cehdeɣ fell-as qqaṛeɣ : « Argaz-agi d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi.»
Azekka-nni, Yeḥya mazal-it dinna nețța d sin seg inelmaden-is.
Akken i gwala Sidna Ɛisa iɛedda-d, yenna-yasen : Atan izimer n Ṛebbi !
Mi slan i imeslayen-agi, inelmaden-nni tebɛen Sidna Ɛisa.
Sidna Ɛisa mi geẓra tebɛen-t-id, yezzi-d ɣuṛ-sen, yenna-yasen : D acu tebɣam ? Nutni nnan-as : Ṛabi ( yeɛni : a Sidi ), anda tzedɣeḍ ?
Yenna-yasen : Ddut yid-i aț-țeẓrem. Inelmaden-nni ddan yid-es, ẓran anda yezdeɣ. Aț-țili d ṛebɛa n tmeddit, qqimen yid-es armi yekfa wass.
Andriyus, gma-s n Semɛun Buṭrus d yiwen seg inelmaden-nni i gtebɛen Sidna Ɛisa m'akken i sen-d-yehdeṛ fell-as Yeḥya ;
iṛuḥ uqbel ɣer gma-s Semɛun, yenna-yas : Nufa Lmasiḥ ! Win i gextaṛ Ṛebbi.
Andriyus yewwi Semɛun ɣer Sidna Ɛisa. Akken i t-iwala Sidna Ɛisa, imuqel-it yenna-yas : Kečč i d Semɛun mmi-s n Yunes. Sya d asawen aț-tețțusemmiḍ Sifas yeɛni : Buṭrus.
Azekka-nni, Sidna Ɛisa yeqsed ad iṛuḥ ɣer tmurt n Jlili. Deg ubrid yemmuger-ed Filibus, yenna-yas : Ddu-d yid-i !
Filibus, d yiwen si taddart n Bitsayda, anda akken zedɣen Buṭrus d Andriyus.
Syenna Filibus yeẓra-d Natanahil, yenna-yas : Nufa win ɣef i d-yehdeṛ Sidna Musa di ccariɛa, win akken i ɣef d-xebbṛen lenbiya. D Ɛisa, mmi-s n Yusef n taddart n Naṣaret.
Natanahil yerra-yas : Amek, yezmer a d-iffeɣ wayen yelhan si taddart n Naṣaret ? Filibus yerra-yas : Eyya-d aț-țwaliḍ s wallen-ik !
Sidna Ɛisa mi gwala Natanahil iteddu-d ɣuṛ-es, yenna : Atah yiwen n wat Isṛail n tideț, ulac deg-s leɣdeṛ.
Natanahil yenna i Sidna Ɛisa : Anda i yi-tesneḍ ? Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Uqbel a k-d-yessiwel Filibus, mi telliḍ ddaw n tneqleț, walaɣ-k-in !
Dɣa Natanahil yenna-yas : A Sidi, kečč d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi ! D agellid n wat Isṛail !
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Tumneḍ imi i k-d-nniɣ walaɣ k-in seddaw n tneqleț ; sya ɣer zdat aț-țeẓred ayen yugaren annect-a !
S tideț qqaṛeɣ-awen : aț-țwalim igenni yeldi, lmalayekkat n Sidi Ṛebbi țțalint țṣubbunt sennig Mmi-s n bunadem.
Mi ɛeddan sin wussan, tella-d tmeɣṛa di tmurt n Jlili di taddart Kana, tella dinna yemma-s n Sidna Ɛisa.
Ula d Sidna Ɛisa yețwaɛṛed nețța d inelmaden-is ɣer tmeɣṛa-nni.
Imi i ten-ixuṣṣ ccṛab, yemma-s n Sidna Ɛisa tusa-d ɣuṛ-es tenna-yas : Ifuk-asen ccṛab !
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : D nekk neɣ d kemm i teɛna temsalt-agi a tameṭṭut ? Taswiɛt-iw urɛad i d-tusi.
Dɣa yemma-s tenna i iqeddacen : Xedmet ayen akk ara wen-d yini !
Llant dinna sețța n tsebbalin ( icmuxen ) yețwaxedmen s wedɣaɣ, țțawint si tmanyin ar meyya uɛecrin n litrat, seg-sent i d-țɛemmiṛen wat Isṛail aman i luḍu.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna i iqeddacen nni : ?čaṛet ticbayliyin-agi d aman. ?čuṛen-tent armi d imi.
Dɣa yenna-asen : Ɛemmṛet-ed tura kra n waman seg-sent tawim-ten i bab n tmeɣṛa. Kkren xedmen akken i sen-d-yenna.
Win iḍebbṛen di leqdic n tmeɣṛa yeɛṛeḍ aman-nni i guɣalen d ccṛab. Nețța ur yeẓri ansi i d-yekka ccṛab-agi, ma d iqeddacen-is ẓran axaṭer d nutni i ten-id-yewwin. Iṛuḥ yessawel i yesli,
yenna-yas : Di tmeɣṛiwin, medden srusun-d uqbel ccṛab yelhan, mi ḥman inebgawen rennun-asen-d win ṛqiqen, kečč teǧǧiḍ ccṛab yelhan armi ț-țura !
D wagi i d lbeṛhan amezwaru i gexdem Sidna Ɛisa di taddart n Kana di tmurt n Jlili. S wakka i d-ibeggen tamanegt-is i inelmaden-is, dɣa umnen yis.
Deffir wayagi Sidna Ɛisa iṣubb ɣer temdint n Kafernaḥum. Tedda yid-es yemma-s, atmaten-is akk-d inelmaden-is ; qqimen dinna anagar kra n wussan.
Akken i d-yeqṛeb wass n Tfaska n izimer n leslak yellan d lɛid n wat Isṛail, Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer temdint n Lquds.
Yufa deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen wid yeznuzun izgaren, ulli d yetbiren, yufa daɣen dinna wid yețbeddilen idrimen ; rran lǧameɛ iqedsen d ssuq.

Ixdem-ed ajelkwaḍ ( acelliṭ ) s wemrar, yebda itellif-iten s nutni s wulli-nsen akk-d yezgaren-nsen, iqleb-asen ( ițți-yasen ) daɣen ṭṭwabel i wid yețbeddilen idrimen, iḍeggeṛ asen kullec ɣer lqaɛa, issufeɣ-iten meṛṛa seg ufrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen ,
yerna yenna i wid yeznuzun itbiren : Kkset syagi ssuq-nwen ! Wagi d axxam n Baba, ur t-țarrat ara d ssuq !
inelmaden-is mmektan-d ayen yuran di tektabt n ?abur : Leḥmala i sɛiɣ ɣef wexxam-ik am tmes itețțen ul-iw !
Kkren wudayen nnan-as : D acu n lbeṛhan ara ɣ-d-tbeggneḍ akken a neɛqel lḥekma s wayes i txeddmeḍ annect-agi ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Huddet lǧameɛ-agi iqedsen, a t-id-sbeddeɣ di tlata wussan.
At Isṛail nnan-as : Wid yebnan lǧameɛ-agi qqimen deg-s sețța uṛebɛin iseggasen, kečč tzemreḍ a s-tɛiwdeḍ lebni di tlata wussan !
Lameɛna « Lǧameɛ » i ɣef d-yehdeṛ Sidna Ɛisa d lǧețța-s.
Asmi i d-yeḥya Sidna Ɛisa si lmut ɣer tudert, inelmaden-is mmektan-d awal-agi i d-yenna, dɣa umnen s wayen yuran di tira iqedsen d wayen i d-yenna Sidna Ɛisa.
Mi gella Sidna Ɛisa di temdint n Lquds di lweqt n lɛid n Tfaska, aṭas i gumnen yis mi ẓran lbeṛhanat i gxeddem.
Lameɛna Sidna Ɛisa ur yesɛi ara deg-sen laman axaṭer yessen-iten akken ma llan.
Ur yeḥwaǧ ara a s-d-ḥkun ɣef yemdanen imi yessen ayen yellan deg wulawen-nsen.
Yella yiwen wergaz isem-is Nikudem i gellan si tejmaɛt n ifariziyen, d yiwen seg imeqqranen n wat Isṛail.
Iṛuḥ-ed deg iḍ ɣer Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : A Sidi neẓra belli d Sidi Ṛebbi i k-id-iceggɛen iwakken a ɣ-teslemdeḍ, axaṭer yiwen ur izmir ad yexdem lbeṛhanat i txeddmeḍ m'ur yelli ara Ṛebbi yid-es.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : S tideț a k-d-iniɣ : yiwen ur izmir ad iẓer tagelda n Ṛebbi m'ur d-iɛawed ara talalit.
Nikudem yenna-yas : Amek i gezmer yiwen a d iɛiwed talalit ma yella d amɣaṛ ? Izmer ad yuɣal ɣer tɛebbuṭ n yemma-s a d iɛiwed talalit ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Nniɣ-ak s tideț : m'ur d-ilul ara yiwen seg waman akk-d Ṛṛuḥ, ur ițțizmir ara ad ikcem tagelda n Ṛebbi.
Win i d-ilulen seg wemdan ț-țaṛwiḥt n wemdan, win i d-ilulen s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen d Ṛṛuḥ.
Ur țțawham ara imi i k-d-nniɣ « ilaq a d-tɛiwdem talalit.»
Aḍu yețsuḍu ɣer wanda i s-yehwa, tselleḍ i ṣṣut-is lameɛna ur tẓerreḍ ara ansi d-yekka neɣ anda iteddu. Akka daɣen i gella ɣef kra n win i d-ilulen s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
Nikudem yenna-yas : Amek ara yedṛu wayagi ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Tesselmadeḍ ccariɛa i wat Isṛail ur tessineḍ ara annect-agi ?
A k- iniɣ tideț: neqqaṛ-ed ayen kan i nessen, nețcehhid-ed s wayen i nwala, lameɛna kunwi ur teqbilem ara cchada-nneɣ.
M'ur tuminem ara mi wen-d-hedṛeɣ ɣef temsalin n ddunit-agi amek ara tamnem s tid n igenwan ?
Yiwen ur yuli ɣer igenwan anagar Mmi-s n bunadem i d-iṣubben seg igenwan.
Akken i gɛelleq Musa azrem n nnḥas ɣef tgejdit deg unezṛuf, i glaq ad ițțuɛelleq daɣen Mmi-s n bunadem
iwakken kra n win yumnen yis, ad yesɛu tudert n dayem.
Sidi Ṛebbi iḥemmel imdanen n ddunit meṛṛa armi i d-yefka Mmi-s awḥid iwakken kra n win yumnen yis ur yețmețțat ara meɛna ad yesɛu tudert n dayem.
Sidi Ṛebbi ur d-iceggeɛ ara Mmi-s ɣer ddunit iwakken ad iḥaseb imdanen meɛna iwakken a ten-isellek.
Win yumnen yis ur yețțuḥaseb ara, ma d win ur numin ara atan yețțuḥaseb yakan, imi ur yumin ara s Mmi-s awḥid n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Atah lḥisab yellan fell-as : « tafat tusa-d ɣer ddunit meɛna imdanen ḥemmlen ṭṭlam axiṛ n tafat, axaṭer lecɣal-nsen diri-ten. »
Kra n win ixeddmen cceṛ, yekṛeh tafat yerna ur ițqeṛṛib ara ɣuṛ-es, ițțaggad a d-tessedheṛ yir lecɣal-is.
Ma d win iteddun di tideț yețțas-ed ɣer tafat akken a d-iban belli kra n wayen ixeddem, ixeddem it di lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Syenna Sidna Ɛisa d inelmaden is ṛuḥen ɣer tmurt n Yahuda, qqimen dinna kra n wussan, sseɣḍasen lɣaci deg waman.
Yeḥya daɣen yella yesseɣḍas lɣaci di Ɛinun ț-țama n Salim imi qwan waman dinna. Aṭas lɣaci i d-ițasen ɣuṛ-es iwakken a ten-isseɣḍes.
Di lweqt-nni urɛad i skecmen Yeḥya ɣer lḥebs.
Yiwen wass kra seg inelmaden n Yeḥya hedṛen d yiwen wergaz n wat Isṛail ɣef luḍu.
Ṛuḥen ɣer Yeḥya, nnan-as : A Sidi, win yellan yid-ek mi telliḍ agemmaḍ i wasif n Urdun, win akken i ɣef d-tcehdeḍ, atan yesseɣḍas ula d nețța, lɣaci meṛṛa țṛuḥun ɣuṛ-es.
Yeḥya yerra-yasen : Yiwen ur izmir ad ixdem ccɣel nniḍen sennig wayen i s-d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi.
Aql-ikkun s yiman-nwen d inigan, acḥal d abrid i wen-d nniɣ : mačči d nekk i d Lmasiḥ, țwaceggɛeɣ d kan uqbel-is .
Iwumi tewjed teslit ? Anaɣ i yesli ! Ma d aḥbib n yesli d win yețɣimin ɣer tama-s, ifeṛṛeḥ m'ara isel i ṣṣut n yesli. Ula d nekk tura lfeṛḥ-iw yennekmal.
Ilaq nețța ad yețțimɣuṛ nekk ad țțim?iyeɣ.
Win i d-yusan seg igenni yella nnig n wayen yellan meṛṛa, ma d win yellan n ddunit-agi iheddeṛ anagar ɣef wayen yellan di ddunit. Win i d-yusan seg igenni yella sennig-nsen meṛṛa.
Icehhed-ed ɣef wayen yeẓra d wayen yesla, lameɛna yiwen ur iqbil cchada-ines.
Win ara iqeblen cchada-ines, yetḥeqqeq belli Sidi Ṛebbi yeqqaṛ tideț.
S tideț amceggeɛ n Ṛebbi iheddeṛ imeslayen i s-d-yefka Ṛebbi, imi i t-yeččuṛ s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
Baba Ṛebbi iḥemmel Mmi-s, yerra kullec ger ifassen-is.
Win yumnen s Mmi-s yesɛa tudert ur nfennu ; ma d win ur numin ara s Mmi-s ur yețwali ara tudert, urrif n Ṛebbi yezga fell-as.
Ifariziyen slan s Sidna Ɛisa yesɛa aṭas n inelmaden yerna yesseɣḍas imdanen akteṛ n Yeḥya.
Lameɛna Sidna Ɛisa mačči d nețța s yiman-is i gesseɣḍasen lɣaci, ccɣel-agi yeǧǧa-t i inelmaden-is. Mi geẓra Sidna Ɛisa belli slan yis,
yeffeɣ si tmurt n at Yahuda. Iwakken ad yuɣal ɣer tmurt n Jlili,
ilaq-as ad iɛeddi ɣef tmurt n Samarya.
Yelḥeq ɣer taddart n Sicar iqeṛben akal i d-yeǧǧa Sidna Yeɛqub i mmi-s Yusef ;
dinna i gella lbir n Sidna Yeɛqub. Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim ɣef yiri n lbir akken ad yesteɛfu. Aț-țili d tnac n wass.
Yiwet n tmeṭṭut n Samarya tusa-d aț-țagem ; Sidna Ɛisa iluɛa-ț, yenna yas : A tameṭṭut, ma ulac aɣilif efk- yi-d ad sweɣ !
Yuɣ lḥal inelmaden-is ṛuḥen ɣer temdint a d-aɣen ayen ara ččen.
Tameṭṭut-nni tasamarit tenna-yas : Amek, kečč yellan n wat Isṛail tessutreḍ-iyi-d aț-țesweḍ i nekk yellan ț-țasamarit ? (axaṭer at Isṛail ur țemsaɛaden ara yerna ur țemxalaḍen ara d isamariyen).
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Lemmer teẓriḍ ayen i gebɣa Ṛebbi a m-t-id yefk akk-d win i m-d-yessutren aman, tili d kemm ara s-yessutren a m-d-yefk aț țesweḍ ; nețța, d aman yessidiren ara m-d-yefk.
Tameṭṭut-nni tenna-yas : A Sidi, ur tesɛiḍ ara s wacu ara d-tessaliḍ aman yerna lbir-agi lqay. Ansi ara k-d-kken waman-agi yessidiren ?
Tebɣiḍ eɛni a d-tiniḍ tɛeddaḍ jeddi-tneɣ Yeɛqub i ɣ-d yeǧǧan lbir-agi, i geswan seg-s nețța d warraw-is akk țqeḍɛiyin-is ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Kra n win ara yeswen seg waman-agi ad yuɣal ad iffad,
lameɛna win ara yeswen seg waman ara s-d-fkeɣ ur yețțuɣal ara ad iffad. Yerna aman ara s-d-fkeɣ ad uɣalen deg-s ț-țaɛwint ur nețɣaṛ ara, a d-tețfeggiḍ seg-s tudert n dayem.
Tameṭṭut-nni tenna-yas : A Sidi, efk-iyi-d seg waman-agi iwakken ur țțuɣaleɣ ara ad ffadeɣ neɣ a d-aseɣ ɣer lbir-agi ad agmeɣ.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ṛuḥ ssiwel-as i wergaz-im tuɣaleḍ-ed ɣer dagi !
Tameṭṭut-nni terra-yas : Ur sɛiɣ ara argaz ! Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Tesɛiḍ lḥeqq imi d-tenniḍ ur sɛiɣ ara argaz.
Axaṭer xemsa iberdan i tzewǧeḍ, win yellan yid-em tura mačči d argaz-im ; deg wannect-agi ț-țideț i d-tenniḍ !
Nețțat tenna-yas : A Sidi, ɛeqleɣ-k d nnbi i telliḍ.
Ini-yi-d anwa i gesɛan lḥeqq : lejdud nneɣ isamariyen ɛebbden Ṛebbi ɣef wudrar-agi, ma d kunwi s wat Isṛail teqqaṛem amkan anda i glaq a neɛbed Ṛebbi, d Lquds.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : A tameṭṭut, amen s wayen ara m-d-iniɣ ! Iteddu-d lweqt anda mačči ɣef wedrar-agi neɣ di Lquds ara yețwaɛbed Baba Ṛebbi.
Kunwi s isamariyen tɛebbdem ayen ur tessinem ara, ma d nukkni nɛebbed ayen nessen axaṭer leslak ițekk-ed seg wegdud n Isṛail.
Lameɛna iteddu-d lweqt yerna yewweḍ-ed, anda lmumnin n ṣṣeḥ ad ɛebbden Baba Ṛebbi s Ṛṛuḥ, s tideț, axaṭer d lmumnin-agi n ṣṣeḥ i gebɣa Baba Ṛebbi.
Imi Ṛebbi d Ṛṛuḥ i gella, ilaq wid ara t-iɛebden a t-ɛebden s Ṛṛuḥ ț-țideț.
Tameṭṭut-nni tenna-yas : ?riɣ a d-yas win i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, win ițțusemman « Lmasiḥ ». Asm'ara d-yas a ɣ-d-yessefhem kra yellan.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yas : Lmasiḥ, d nekk s yiman-iw !
Imiren kan wwḍen-d inelmaden is. Wehmen imi i t-id-ufan yețmeslay ț-țmeṭṭut ; lameɛna yiwen deg-sen ur s-yenni : d acu i tebɣiḍ ɣuṛ-es, neɣ iwacu i tețmeslayeḍ yid-es ?
Dɣa tameṭṭut-nni teǧǧa tacmuxt-is dinna, tuzzel ɣer taddart tenna i lɣaci :
Eyyaw aț-țe?rem yiwen yenna-yi-d akk ayen xedmeɣ ! Ad yili d nețța i d Lmasiḥ !
Lɣaci ffɣen-d si taddart ṛuḥen ad ẓren Sidna Ɛisa.
Uqbel a d-yaweḍ lɣaci, inelmaden-is ḥeṛsen-t ad yečč, nnan-as : A Sidi ɛeddi-d aț-țeččeḍ !
Yenna-yasen : Sɛiɣ lqut ara ččeɣ meɛna kunwi ur teẓrim ara d acu-t.
Inelmaden qqaṛen wway gar asen : Ahat yella win i s-d-yewwin ad yečč.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna : Lqut-iw, d m'ara xedmeɣ lebɣi n win i yi-d-iceggɛen akken ad kemmleɣ ccɣel i ɣef i yi-iwekkel.
Kunwi teqqaṛem mazal ṛebɛa wagguren i tmegra ma d nekk a wen-d-iniɣ: ldit allen-nwen aț-țwalim igran weṛṛaɣ-it, wejden i tmegra !
Win imeggren yewwi lexlaṣ-is, ijemmeɛ lɣella i tudert n dayem. Akka lfeṛḥ yesdukkel win izerrɛen d win imeggren.
Axaṭer ț-țideț lemtel-agi i d-yeqqaṛen : « Yiwen izerreɛ wayeḍ imegger » !
Nekk ceggɛeɣ-kkun aț-țmegrem anda ur tezriɛem ara, anda i nɛețțaben wiyaḍ ; nutni nɛețțaben, kunwi tɣelltem lɣella n leɛtab-nsen.
Aṭas n isamariyen n taddart-nni i gumnen s Sidna Ɛisa mi d-tcehhed fell-as tmeṭṭut-nni s imeslayen-agi : «yenna-yi-d akk ayen i xedmeɣ !»
Mi wwḍen ɣuṛ-es isamariyen-nni, ḥellelen Sidna Ɛisa ad iqqim yid-sen. Dɣa yeqqim yid-sen sin wussan.
Aṭas nniḍen i gumnen yis mi slan i imeslayen-is.
Nnan-as i tmeṭṭut-nni : Tura numen yis mačči kan ɣef wayen i ɣ-d-tenniḍ fell-as, nesla yas s yiman-nneɣ, neẓra belli d nețța i d amcafeɛ n ddunit.
Mi ɛeddan sin wussan, Sidna Ɛisa iṛuḥ syenna ɣer tmurt n Jlili.
Yenna-yasen : « Ulac nnbi yesɛan leqdeṛ di tmurt-is. »
Mi gewweḍ ɣer tmurt n Jlili, lɣaci sṭreḥben yis s lfeṛḥ d ameqqran imi ula d nutni ḥedṛen i lɛid n Tfaska di temdint n Lquds, ẓran akk lbeṛhanat i gexdem dinna.
Yuɣal iɛedda ɣef taddart n Kana di tmurt n Jlili anda akken i gerra aman d ccṛab. Yella yiwen lḥakem n ddewla n temdint n Kafernaḥum yesɛa mmi-s yuḍen yenṭer.
Mi gesla s Sidna Ɛisa yuɣal-ed si tmurt n Yahuda ɣer tmurt n Jlili, iṛuḥ-ed ɣuṛ-es, iḥellel-it iwakken a d yas ad yesseḥlu mmi-s yețmețțaten.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : M'ur twalam ara licaṛat d lbeṛhanat ur tețțamnem ara ?
Lḥakem n ddewla yenna-yas : A Sidi, di leɛnaya-k ɣiwel uqbel ad yemmet mmi !
Ɛeddan kra n wussan, Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer temdint n Lquds akken ad yeḥdeṛ i lɛid n wat Isṛail.
Di temdint-agi, zdat n tewwurt yețțusemman « tawwurt n wulli, »tella yiwet n temda n waman qqaṛen-as s tɛibṛanit : « Bitesda ». Zzin-as-d xemsa ifragen yesɛan ssqef.
Deg ifragen-agi aṭas n imuḍan i gḍelqen, iderɣalen, iɛibanen d wukrifen țṛaǧun akk ad ḥerrken waman.
Axaṭer tiswiɛin yețṣubbu-d yiwen n lmelk ɣer temda, yețḥerrik aman-nni ; win ara ikecmen d amezwaru ɣer temda m'ara ḥerrken waman ad yeḥlu si lehlak-is akken yebɣu yili.
Yella dinna yiwen wergaz tmanya utlatin iseggasen nețța di lehlak.
Sidna Ɛisa mi t-iwala yeḍleq, yeẓra belli aṭas aya segmi yuḍen, yenna-yas: Tebɣiḍ aț-țeḥluḍ ?
Amuḍin-nni yerra-yas-ed : A Sidi, ur sɛiɣ ara win ara yi gren ɣer temda m'ara ḥerken waman ; m'ara ɛeṛdeɣ ad kecmeɣ wayeḍ a yi-izwir.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ekker fell-ak, ddem tagertilt-ik telḥuḍ !
Imiren kan argaz-nni yeḥla, yeddem tagertilt-is yebda tikli. Ayagi yedṛa deg wass n ssebt yellan d ass n westeɛfu.
Lecyux n wat Isṛail nnan-as i wergaz-nni yeḥlan : Ass-agi d ass n westeɛfu, d leḥṛam fell-ak aț-țebbibeḍ tagertilt-ik !
Nețța yerra-yasen : Win i yi-sseḥlan d nețța i yi-d yennan : « Ddem tagertilt-ik telḥuḍ. »
Steqsan-t nnan-as : Anwa i k-d-yennan akka ?
Lameɛna argaz-nni yeḥlan ur yeẓri ara anwa-t, axaṭer Sidna Ɛisa yekcem ger lɣaci ițemdeḥḥasen dinna.
Taswiɛt kan, Sidna Ɛisa yemlal-it-id deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen yenna yas : Aql-ik teḥliḍ, sya d asawen xḍu i ddnub iwakken ur ideṛṛu ara yid-ek akteṛ n wannect-nni !
Argaz-nni iṛuḥ ad ixebbeṛ lecyux n wat Isṛail belli d Sidna Ɛisa i t-yesseḥlan.
Lecyux n wat Isṛail bdan accetki ɣef Sidna Ɛisa imi i gexdem ayagi deg wass n westeɛfu.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna yasen : Baba Ṛebbi ixeddem ar tura, nekk daɣen aql-i xeddmeɣ !
?ef wawal-agi lecyux-nni ufan-as-ed sebba nniḍen, țqelliben amek ara t-nɣen, mačči kan imi ur iqudeṛ ara ass n westeɛfu meɛna imi gerra Ṛebbi d Baba-s yerna yesseɛdel iman-is d Ṛebbi.
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : S tideț qqaṛeɣ-awen : Mmi-s n Ṛebbi ur ixeddem acemma s yiman is, ixeddem ala ayen yeẓra ixeddem-it Baba-s. Kra n wayen ixeddem Baba-s ixeddem-it Mmi-s daɣen.
Axaṭer Baba-s iḥemmel Mmi-s, yesbeggin-as-d lecɣal-is meṛṛa. Ad as-yernu tazmert s wacu ara yexdem ayen yugaren kra n wayen teẓram ar ass-a, aț-țwehmem di lecɣal-is.
Akken Baba Ṛebbi yeskkaray-ed lmegtin ițțarra-yasen tudert, akken daɣen Mmi-s yețțak tudert i win yebɣa.
Baba Ṛebbi ur iḥekkem ɣef yiwen, lameɛna yerra lḥekma ger ifassen n Mmi-s
iwakken imdanen meṛṛa ad qadṛen Mmi-s akken țqadaṛen Baba-s. Win ur nqudeṛ ara Mmi-s ur iqudeṛ ara Baba-s i t-id iceggɛen.
S tideț nniɣ-awen : « kra n win yesmeḥsisen i wawal-iw, yumnen s win i yi-d-iceggɛen yesɛa tudert n dayem yerna ulac fell-as lḥisab, lameɛna iɛedda yakan si lmut ɣer tudert.
S tideț nniɣ-awen : « iteddu-d lweqt yerna yewweḍ-ed anda lmegtin ad slen i ṣṣut n Mmi-s n Ṛebbi, yerna wid akk ara s-yeslen ad idiren.
Akken yesɛa Baba Ṛebbi tudert deg yiman-is i gefka daɣen i Mmi-s ad yesɛu tudert deg yiman-is.
Yerra ger ifassen-is lḥekma imi d Mmi-s n bunadem i gella.
Ur țțawhamet ara, axaṭer lweqt iteddu-d, wid akk yellan deg i?ekwan ad slen i ṣṣut n Mmi-s n bunadem,
imiren a d-kkren ; wid ixedmen lxiṛ a d-ḥyun ɣer tudert n dayem ma d wid ixedmen cceṛ a d-ḥyun iwakken ad țțuḥasben.
Ur xeddmeɣ acemma s lebɣi-w lameɛna ḥekkmeɣ s lebɣi n Baba Ṛebbi. Lḥekma-inu d lḥeqq axaṭer ur țqellibeɣ ara ad xedmeɣ lebɣi-w, lameɛna lebɣi n win i yi-d-iceggɛen. »
Ma yella d nekk kan i d icehden ɣef yiman-iw cchada-inu ur tețwaqbal ara.
Syenna, Sidna Ɛisa yezger lebḥeṛ n Jlili ( iwumi qqaṛen daɣen lebḥeṛ n Tiberyas ).
Aṭas n yemdanen i geddan yid-es mi walan yesseḥlay imuḍan.
Daymi Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer wedrar ad innejmaɛ d inelmaden-is.
Lɛid n wat Isṛail iwumi qqaṛen Tafaska n izimer n leslak tqeṛb-ed.
Akken i gwala lɣaci iteddu-d ɣuṛ-es, Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq ɣer Filibus yenna-yas : Ansi ara d-naɣ aɣṛum i wannect agi n lɣaci ?
Yesteqsa-t kan iwakken ad i?er d acu ara s-d-yini, axaṭer nețța yeẓra yakan d acu ara yexdem.
Filibus yerra-yas : A Sidi ur d-keffunt ara mitin alef iwakken mkul yiwen deg-sen a t-id-iṣaḥ ciṭṭuḥ n weɣṛum.
Andriyus gma-s n Semɛun Buṭrus, yellan seg inelmaden, yenṭeq ɣer Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas :
Yella dagi yiwen weqcic yesɛa xemsa n teḥbulin n weɣṛum n tem?in akk-d sin iselman (iḥutiwen), lameɛna d acu ara d-xedmen i wannect-agi n lɣaci ?
Sidna Ɛisa issendeh-iten ad sɣimen lɣaci. Deg wemkan-nni yeqwa leḥcic, lɣaci yeqqim ɣer lqaɛa, ad ilin azal n xemsa alaf n yergazen.
Sidna Ɛisa yeddem-ed tiḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum, yeḥmed Ṛebbi icekkeṛ-it, ifṛeq-itent i lɣaci yeqqimen ɣef leḥcic, yefreq-asen daɣen iselman nni, ččan akk armi ṛwan.
Mi ččan ṛwan, Sidna Ɛisa iluɛa inelmaden-is yenna-yasen : Jemɛet-ed ayen i d-yeqqimen akken ur ixețțeṛ ula d acemma.
Ayen i d-yegran si xemsa n teḥbulin-nni n weɣṛum n temẓin, jemɛen-t-id ččuṛen yis tnac n iḍellaɛen (tiquftin).
Lɣaci-nni mi walan lbeṛhan-agi n Sidna Ɛisa, țɛeggiḍen qqaṛen : Mbla ccekk argaz-agi d nețța i d nnbi-nni ara d-yasen ɣer ddunit.
Sidna Ɛisa mi geẓra lɣaci bɣan a t-rren d agellid fell-asen, iḍeṛṛef iman-is, yuli ɣer wedrar.
Mi geɣli yiṭij, inelmaden-is uɣalen ṣubben ɣer rrif n lebḥeṛ.
Rekben taflukt ad zegren ɣer ugemmaḍ, ɣer Kafernaḥum. Yeɣli-d yakan ṭṭlam, Sidna Ɛisa urɛad yelḥiq ɣuṛ-sen.
Yekker-ed yiwen waḍu iǧehden, lebḥeṛ yerwi.
Inelmaden-is yuɣ-iten lḥal wwḍen ɣer tlemmast n lebḥeṛ. Walan Sidna Ɛisa iteddu-d ɣuṛ-sen, ileḥḥu-d ɣef wuḍar s ufella n waman. Mi d-iqeṛṛeb ɣer teflukt nsen, xelɛen.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna yasen : Ur țțaggadet ara, d nekk !
Bɣan a t-srekben yid-sen di tefluk meɛna ufan-d iman-nsen wwḍen ɣer wemkan anda țeddun.
Azekka-nni, lɣaci yeqqimen agummaḍ i lebḥeṛ wwin-d s lexbaṛ belli anagar yiwet n teflukt i gellan dinna, yerna Sidna Ɛisa ur yeddi ara d inelmaden-is mi ṛuḥen di teflukt.
Dɣa tiflukin nniḍen i d-yusan si temdint n Tiberyas, wwḍent-ed ɣer wemkan-nni anda akken i sen-yebḍa Sidna Ɛisa aɣṛum mi geḥmed Ṛebbi.
Mi walan lɣaci ulac dinna Sidna Ɛisa akk-d inelmaden-is, rekben tiflukin, zegren ɣer Kafernaḥum ad qellben fell-as.
Mi t-ufan dinna, nnan-as : A Sidi, melmi d-tusiḍ ɣer dagi ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : S tideț a wen-d-iniɣ : imi teččam aɣṛum armi teṛwam i tețqellibem fell-i mačči imi tfehmem lbeṛhanat-iw.
Ur țḥebbiṛet ara ɣef yiɛebbaḍ-nwen, ḥebbṛet ɣef tudert yețdumun i dayem. Tudert-agi, d Mmi-s n bunadem ara wen-ț-id-yefken, Baba Ṛebbi yefka-yas tazmert imi i t-iɛellem s ṭṭabeɛ-ines.
Deffir wayagi, Sidna Ɛisa ikemmel abrid-is iteddu di tmurt n Jlili. Ur yebɣi ara ad iṛuḥ ɣer tmurt n Yahuda, axaṭer imeqqranen n wat Isṛail țqelliben fell-as iwakken a t nɣen.
Lɛid i deg xeddmen wat Isṛail tiɛecciwin iqeṛṛeb-ed.
Dɣa atmaten is nnan-as : Kker aț-țṛuḥeḍ ɣer tmurt n Yahuda akken inelmaden-ik yellan dinna ad ẓren ayen i txeddmeḍ.
Win yebɣan ad yețwassen, ur ilaq ara ad iffer wayen i gxeddem. Imi tzemreḍ i lecɣal imeqqranen, sbeggen-ed iman-ik a k-walin akk yemdanen.
Atmaten-is s yiman-nsen ur uminen ara yis.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : Ma yella ɣuṛ-wen iwweḍ-ed lweqt, nekk ɣuṛ-i mazal.
Medden ur sɛin ara sebba s wayes ara kkun keṛhen, keṛhen-iyi nekk imi d-sbeggneɣ yir lecɣal-nsen.
Kunwi ṛuḥet aț-țɛeggdem, ma d nekk ur tedduɣ ara, imi lweqt-iw urɛad i d-yusi.
Mi sen-d-yenna ayagi, yeǧǧa-ten ṛuḥen, nețța yeqqim di tmurt n Jlili.
Mi ṛuḥen watmaten-is ad ɛeggden, iṛuḥ ula d nețța mbla ma yesseɛlem yiwen.
Deg ussan n lɛid, imeqqranen n wat Isṛail țnadin fell-as, steqsayen anda yella.
Lɣaci i d-yusan ad ɛeggden, bdan țmeslayen fell-as. Kra deg-sen qqaṛen : D argaz n lxiṛ ! Wiyaḍ qqaṛen : Awah ! Yețkellix kan ɣef lɣaci !
Yiwen ur d-yehdiṛ fell-as ɛinani axaṭer uggaden imeqqranen n wat Isṛail.
Mi gneṣṣef lɛid n iɛecciwen, Sidna Ɛisa yuli ɣer lǧameɛ iqedsen, yebda yesselmad.
At Isṛail wehmen, qqaṛen : Ur yeɣṛi ara d lɛulama yerna yessen tira iqedsen, ansi i s-d-tekka tmusni-yagi ?
Sidna Ɛisa yenna yasen : Ayen i sselmadeɣ mačči s ɣuṛ-i i d-yekka, yekka-d s ɣuṛ win i yi-d iceggɛen.
Win iqesden ad yexdem lebɣi n Ṛebbi ad yeɛqel ma yella wayen i sselmadeɣ yekka-d s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi neɣ d imeslayen-iw kan.
Win iheddṛen s yisem-is yețqellib ad yawi cciɛa i yiman-is. Ma d win yețqelliben a d-yawi cciɛa i win i t-id iceggɛen yeqqaṛ tideț, ulac deg-s lexdeɛ.
Nnbi Musa yeǧǧa-yawen-d ccariɛa, lameɛna ulac gar-awen win i ț-itebɛen ! Acuɣeṛ i tețqellibem a yi tenɣem ?
Lɣaci nnan-as : Anwa akka i gebɣan a k-ineɣ ? Waqila ikcem-ik lǧen !
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : ?ef wayen akka xedmeɣ i twehmem ?
Meyzet ɣef wayagi : nnbi Musa yeǧǧa-yawen-d lextana (ṭṭhaṛa), lɛadda-agi mačči s ɣuṛ-es i d-tekka meɛna s ɣuṛ lejdud-is. Atan tqeblem tessextanem deg wass n westeɛfu.
Ma yella tqeblem aț-țesxetnem i weqcic deg ass n westeɛfu, iwakken ur tețxalafem ara ccariɛa n Musa, acuɣeṛ terfam fell-i imi sseḥlaɣ amdan s lekmal-is deg wass n westeɛfu ?
Beṛkat ! Ur ḥekkmet ara s wayen kan i țwalint wallen-nwen, lemdet aț-țḥekmem s lḥeqq.
Kra n imezdaɣ n temdint n Lquds wehmen, qqaṛen : Mačči d win akken i țqelliben a t-nɣen ?
Atan iheddeṛ ɛinani zdat lɣaci, yiwen ur s-yenni acemma ! Ɛeqlen-t lɛulama-nneɣ d nețța i d Lmasiḥ ?
Argaz-agi neẓra ansi-t, lameɛna Lmasiḥ asm'ara d-yas yiwen ur iẓerr ansi ara d-yekk.

Sidna Ɛisa yenṭeq s ṣṣut ɛlayen, slan-as-d akk deg wefrag n Lǧameɛ iqedsen, yenna : Tessnem-iyi yerna teẓram ansi i d-kkiɣ ! Ur d-usiɣ ara s lebɣi-w, lameɛna d Bab n lḥeqq i yi-d iceggɛen; kunwi ur t-tessinem ara.
Nekkini ssneɣ-t axaṭer s ɣuṛ-es i d-usiɣ yerna d nețța i yi-d-iceggɛen.
Bɣan a t-ṭṭfen imiren, meɛna yiwen ur yesris afus-is fell-as imi ass-is urɛad d-yewwiḍ.
Aṭas n lɣaci si terbaɛt-nni i gumnen yis, qqaṛen : M'ara d-yas Lmasiḥ, eɛni ad ixdem lbeṛhanat yugaren wigi ?
Ifariziyen wwin-d s lexbaṛ s wayen heddṛen lɣaci ɣef Sidna Ɛisa, dɣa lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d ifariziyen ceggɛen iɛessasen a t-id ṭṭfen.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna i lɣaci : Mazal-iyi kra n lweqt yid-wen, syin akkin ad uɣaleɣ ɣer win i yi-d iceggɛen.
Aț-țqellbem fell-i ur iyi-tețțafem ara imi ur tezmirem ara a d-tasem ɣer wanda ara yiliɣ.
At Isṛail qqaṛen wway gar-asen : Anda akka ara iṛuḥ armi ur nețțizmir ara a t-naf ? Eɛni ad iṛuḥ ɣer wat Isṛail ițwazerɛen ger leǧnas ? Neɣ ibɣa ad isselmed leǧnas nniḍen ?
D acu i gebɣa a d-yini mi d-iqqaṛ : « aț-țqellbem fell-i, ur iyi-tețțafem ara axaṭer ur tezmirem ara a d-tasem ɣer wanda ara yiliɣ.»
Ass aneggaru n lɛid, yellan d ass yesɛan aṭas n lqima ; Sidna Ɛisa ibedden ger lɣaci iɛeggeḍ, yenna : Win iffuden a d-yas ɣuṛ-i ad isew ; win yumnen yis-i a d-yas ad isew.
Akken yura di lkutub : D isaffen n waman ara d-ițfeggiḍen seg-s.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-d ayagi ɣef Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ara yeččaṛen ulawen n wid yumnen yis. Di lweqt-nni, Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen mazal ur d-ițțunefk ara axaṭer Sidna Ɛisa werɛad yekcim tamanegt-is.
Ger lɣaci i s-d-yeslan, llan wid yeqqaṛen : Argaz-agi mbla ccekk d nețța i d nnbi-nni ara d-yasen !
Wiyaḍ qqaṛen : D nețța i d Lmasiḥ ! Ma d kra nniḍen qqaṛen : Yezmer Lmasiḥ a d-iffeɣ si tmurt n Jlili ?
Ur yuri ara di tira iqedsen : Lmasiḥ a d-yeffeɣ si dderya n Sidna Dawed, si taddart n Bitlḥem ?
S wakka i gebda yețțimɣuṛ lxilaf ger lɣaci ɣef Sidna Ɛisa.
Kra deg-sen bɣan a t-ḥebsen lameɛna yiwen ur yesris afus-is fell-as.
Mi yuɣalen iɛessasen i d-yețwaceggɛen a t-ṭṭfen, lmuqedmin imeqqranen d ifariziyen nnan-asen : Iwacu ur t-id-tewwim ara ?
Nutni rran-asen : Di leɛmeṛ ur nesli i yiwen iheddeṛ am nețța.
Ifariziyen nnan-asen : Iseḥḥer-ikkun ula d kunwi ?
Teẓram yiwen si lecyux-nneɣ, neɣ seg ifariziyen i gumnen yis ?
Anagar lɣaci-agi ur nessin ara ccariɛa... a ten-inɛel Ṛebbi !
Nikudem yellan d yiwen seg-sen, win akken i gṛuḥen deg iḍ ɣer Sidna Ɛisa, yenna-yasen :
Tserreḥ-aɣ ccariɛa-nneɣ a neḥkem ɣef yiwen uqbel a s-nsel neɣ uqbel a nẓer d acu n cceṛ i gexdem ?
Nutni rran-as : Ula d kečč d ajlili ? Qelleb mliḥ di tira iqedsen aț-țafeḍ : « Ulac nnbi ara d-yekken si tmurt n Jlili.»
Imiren, mkul yiwen yuɣal ɣer wexxam-is.
Sidna Ɛisa yuli s yiɣil uzemmur ;
azekka-nni, ssbeḥ zik yuɣal ɣer lǧameɛ iqedsen. Lɣaci meṛṛa uzzlen-d ɣuṛ-es. Sidna Ɛisa yeqqim gar-asen, yebda yesselmad iten deg ufrag n lǧameɛ.
Atnaya lɛulama n ccariɛa akk-d ifariziyen wwin-as-d yiwet n tmeṭṭut ṭṭfen-ț txeddem zzna. Sbedden-ț ger lɣaci akken a ț iwali Sidna Ɛisa.
Nnan-as : A Sidi, neṭṭef tameṭṭut-agi mi txeddem zzna.
Di ccariɛa, Sidna Musa yumeṛ-aɣ-d a neṛjem s yedɣaɣen tameṭṭut am tagi alamma temmut. I keččini d acu ara d-tiniḍ ?
Steqsan-t iwakken a t-jeṛṛben, țnadin sebba s wacu ara ccetkin fell-as. Sidna Ɛisa yekna, yețțaru s uḍad-is di lqaɛa.
Imi t-ḥeṛṣen s usteqsi, yekker yenna-yasen : Win deg-wen werǧin yednib a ț-yeṛjem d amezwaru !
Lɣaci-nni, mi slan annect-agi, bdan tixxiṛen yiwen yiwen, seg umɣaṛ armi d ameẓyan. ?ǧan dinna Sidna Ɛisa weḥd-es di tlemmast n wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen, nețța ț-țmeṭṭut-nni.
Dɣa yerfed allen-is, yenna-yas : A tameṭṭut, anda-ten widak-nni i d-icetkan fell-am ? Ulac win iḥekmen fell-am ?
Tenna-yas : Ulac a Sidi ! Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yas : Ula d nekk ur ḥekkmeɣ ara fell-am. Ṛuḥ, meɛna sya d asawen xḍu i ddnub.
Sidna Ɛisa iheddeṛ i lɣaci yenna yasen : D nekk i ț-țafat n ddunit, win ara yi-tebɛen ur iteddu ara di ṭṭlam, lameɛna ad yesɛu tafat n tudert.
Ifariziyen nnan-as : Tețcehhiḍeḍ ɣef yiman-ik, cchada-inek ur tṣeḥḥa ara.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen : ?-țideț, țcehhideɣ ɣef yiman-iw, lameɛna cchada-inu tṣeḥḥa, axaṭer ?riɣ ansi d-kkiɣ, ẓriɣ daɣen ɣer wanda tedduɣ. Ma d kunwi ur te?rim ansi d-kkiɣ ur teẓrim anda tedduɣ.
Kunwi tḥekkmem ɣef wiyaḍ s lɛeqliya n wemdan, ma d nekk ur ḥekkmeɣ ɣef yiwen.
Ma yella yewwi-d lḥal ad ḥekmeɣ, ad ḥekkmeɣ s lḥeqq axaṭer ur lliɣ ara weḥd-i, Baba Ṛebbi i yi-d-iceggɛen yella yid-i.
Yura di ccariɛa-nwen belli ma ddukklen sin inigan ɣef yiwet n cchada, cchada-nsen tețwaqbel.
Atan nekk cehdeɣ-ed ɣef yiman-iw, Baba i yi-d-iceggɛen d inigi fell-i.
Nutni nnan-as : Anda yella Baba-k ? Yerra-yasen : Ur iyi-tessinem, ur tessinem Baba. Lemmer i yi-tessinem, tili tesnem Baba.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-d annect-agi mi gesselmad deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen, zdat wemkan anda srusun lweɛdat. Ula d yiwen ur yesris afus-is fell-as axaṭer urɛad d-yewwiḍ wass-is.
Sidna Ɛisa yerna yenna-yasen : Atan ad ṛuḥeɣ, aț-țqellbem fell-i lameɛna aț-țemtem di ddnub-nwen, ur tezmirem ara a d-tasem ɣer wanda ara ṛuḥeɣ.
At Isṛail qqaṛen wway gar-asen : Ahat yebɣa ad ineɣ iman-is imi ɣ-d-yenna ur tezmirem ara a d-tasem ɣer wanda ara ṛuḥeɣ ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Kunwi n lqaɛa nekk n igenwan ; kunwi n ddunit-agi nekk mačči-yines.
Daymi i wen-d-nniɣ aț-țemtem di ddnub-nwen. Atan m'ur tuminem ara belli nekk « d Win yellan, » aț-țemtem di ddnub-nwen.
Nnan-as : Anwa-k keččini ? Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : D win akken i wen-d-qqaṛeɣ si tazwara.
?ef wayen i kkun-yeɛnan sɛiɣ aṭas ara d-iniɣ, aṭas ara ḥasbeɣ ; win i yi-d-iceggɛen d Bab n tideț, d ayen i sliɣ ɣuṛ-es i d-țɛawadeɣ di ddunit.
Deg ubrid-is, Sidna Ɛisa iwala yiwen wergaz, d aderɣal seg wasmi i d-ilul.
Inelmaden-is steqsan-t nnan-as : A Sidi, iwacu i d-ilul wergaz-agi d aderɣal ? Anwa i gdenben d nețța neɣ d imawlan-is ?
Sidna Ɛisa yerra-yasen : Tidderɣelt-agi ur d-tekki ara si ddnub-is neɣ si ddnub n imawlan-is, lameɛna iwakken medden meṛṛa ad ẓren ayen i gezmer Ṛebbi a t-ixdem.
Skud mazal tafat n wass, ilaq-aɣ a nexdem lecɣal n win i yi-d iceggɛen ; iteddu-d yiḍ anda yiwen ur yezmir ad ixdem.
Skud mazal lliɣ di ddunit d nekk i ț-țafat n ddunit.
Mi d-yenna imeslayen-agi, Sidna Ɛisa yessusef ɣer lqaɛa, yexleḍ akal s tsusaf-is, yeḍla-t ɣef wallen n uderɣal-nni,
yenna-yas : Ṛuḥ aț-țessirdeḍ di tala n Silwi (Silwi lmeɛna-ines «amceggeɛ»). Aderɣal-nni iṛuḥ a d-issired, mi d-yuɣal, yețwali.
Lǧiran-is akk-d wid i t-yessnen itețțer, qqaṛen : Argaz-agi mačči d win akken yețɣimin ɣer lqaɛa yezga yessutur tin n Ṛebbi ?
Kra qqaṛen : D nețța. Wiyaḍ qqaṛen : Mačči d nețța, d wayeḍ i gțemcabin ɣuṛ-es. Ma d nețța yeqqaṛ : D nekk s yiman-iw.
Nnan-as : Ihi amek i d-ldint wallen ik ?
Nețța yerra-yasen : Argaz-nni iwumi qqaṛen Ɛisa yexleḍ akal s tsusaf-is, yeḍla-t i wallen-iw, yenna-yi-d : « Ṛuḥ aț-țessirdeḍ di tala n Silwi.» Mi ṛuḥeɣ ssardeɣ, imiren kan yuɣal iyi-d yeẓri.
Nutni nnan-as : Anda-t wergaz-agi ? Yenna-yasen : Ur ẓriɣ ara anda yerra
Wwin argaz-nni yellan zik d aderɣal ɣer ifariziyen.
Yuɣ lḥal deg wass n westeɛfu i gexleḍ Sidna Ɛisa akal s tsusaf-is, i s-d-yerra iẓri i uderɣal-nni.
Ifariziyen steqsan-t amek armi i t-id-yuɣal yeẓri. Nețța yenna-yasen : Yexleḍ akal s tsusaf-is, yeḍla-t ɣef wallen-iw, ṛuḥeɣ ssardeɣ udem-iw, imiren kan uɣaleɣ țwaliɣ.

?ef wakka i nnan kra seg ifariziyen : Argaz-agi ur yezmir ara a d-yekk s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi, imi ur yețqadaṛ ara lqanun n wass n westeɛfu. Ma d wiyaḍ qqaṛen : Lemmer d amednub i gella amek i gezmer ad ixdem lbeṛhanat am wigi ? Yekker lxilaf ger lɣaci-nni,
ifariziyen rnan steqsan daɣen aderɣal-nni : I kečč d acu ara d-tiniḍ deg wergaz-agi i k-d-yeldin allen ? Nețța yenna-yasen : Nekk a d-iniɣ, argaz-agi ț-țideț d nnbi.
Lameɛna imeqqranen n wat Isṛail ugin ad amnen belli argaz-nni yella si zik d aderɣal, yuɣal yețwali. Uɣalen ceggɛen ɣer imawlan-is, usan-d.
Steqsan-ten nnan-asen : Argaz-agi, ț-țideț d mmi-twen ? D ṣṣeḥ ilul-ed d aderɣal ? Amek armi i guɣal yețwali tura ?
Imawlan n uderɣal-nni nnan asen : ?-țideț, d mmi-tneɣ yerna ilul-ed d aderɣal.
Meɛna amek i guɣal yețwali tura neɣ anwa i s-d-yerran i?ri... ur neẓri ara ! Steqsit-eț nețța, d argaz i gella, izmer a d-yerr s yiman-is.
Imawlan-is nnan-asen akka, axaṭer uggaden lecyux n wat Isṛail i gqesden ad sṭixṛen si lǧameɛ-nsen kra n win ara icehden belli Ɛisa d Lmasiḥ.
Daymi i sen-nnan imawlan is : « D argaz i gella, yezmer ad yerr s yiman-is.»
-- s tideț a wen-d-iniɣ, win ur nkeččem ara si tewwurt ɣer wemṛaḥ ( leɛzib ) n wulli, iɛedda si ẓẓeṛb, winna d amakar yerna d aqeṭṭaɛ.
Ma d win ikeččmen si tewwurt d nețța i d ameksa n wulli.
Aɛessas n wemṛaḥ ileddi tawwurt i umeksa, ulli sellent i ṣṣut-is, issawal-asent s yismawen-nsent, yessufuɣ-itent ɣer beṛṛa.
Mi gessufeɣ tid akk yellan-ines, izeggir zdat-sent, ulli ttabaɛent-eț axaṭer ssnent ṣṣut-is.
D lmuḥal ad tebɛen-t abeṛṛani, ad rewlent fell-as imi ur ssinent ara ṣṣut n ibeṛṛaniyen.
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yasen lemtel agi, lameɛna ur fhimen ara ayen yebɣa a sen-yini.
Yenna yasen daɣen : S tideț qqaṛeɣ-awen, d nekk i ț-țawwurt ansi țɛeddayent wulli.
Wid meṛṛa i d-yusan uqbel-iw d imakaren d iqeṭṭaɛen. Lameɛna ulli ur sen-ḥessent ara.
D nekk i ț-țawwurt. Win ara ikecmen yis-i ad yețțusellek : ad ikcem ad yeffeɣ akken i s-ihwa, ad yaf ayen ara yečč.
Amakar yețțas-ed kan iwakken ad yaker, ad yezlu, ad yessenger. Nekk usiɣ-ed iwakken ad fkeɣ tudert i wulli-inu, tudert s tugeț (ṭaqa).
D nekk i d ameksa n ṣṣeḥ. Ameksa n ṣṣeḥ yețțsebbil tudert-is ɣef wulli-ines.

Ma d win ur nelli ara d ameksa n wulli ur nelli ara d bab-nsent, d ameksa kan yețwaxelṣen, ireggel, ițaǧǧa ulli m'ara iwali uccen. Imiren uccen a d-yezḍem ɣef wulli, ad yawi kra seg-sent yerna ad yesserwel akk taqeḍɛit.
Argaz-agi ixeddem akka imi d ameksa kan yețwaxelṣen, ur as tewqiɛ ara deg wulli.
Nekk d ameksa n ṣṣeḥ, ssneɣ ulli-inu nutenti ssnent-iyi,
akken i yi-issen Baba Ṛebbi i t-ssneɣ ula d nekk. ?sebbileɣ tudert-iw ɣef wulli-inu.
Sɛiɣ daɣen ulli nniḍen ur nelli ara seg wemṛaḥ agi. Tigi daɣen ilaq a tent-id-awiɣ, a d-ḥessent i ṣṣut-iw, s wakka aț-țili anagar yiwet n tqeḍɛit s yiwen umeksa.
Baba iḥemmel-iyi imi țsebbileɣ tudert-iw meɛna syin akkin a ț-id-rreɣ.
Yiwen ur izmir a yi-ikkes tudert, țsebbileɣ-ț s lebɣi-inu. Sɛiɣ tazmert a ț-sebbleɣ, sɛiɣ daɣen tazmert a ț-id-rreɣ. D wagi i d lameṛ i yi-d yefka Baba Ṛebbi.
Mi d-yenna imeslayen-agi, yekker daɣen lxilaf ger lɣaci.
