Ṛṛusul mi slan s wannect nni cerrgen llebsa-nsen, uzzlen ɣer tlemmast n lɣaci, țɛeggiḍen :

Ay irgazen, acuɣeṛ i txeddmem akka ? Nukni d imdanen kan i nella am kunwi ! D lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i wen-d newwi iwakken aț-țeṭṭixṛem i leɛbada n wayen ur nesɛi lmeɛna ; aț-tebɛem abrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, Bab n tudert i d-ixelqen igenni d lqaɛa, lebḥeṛ d wayen akk yellan deg-s.
Ɣas akken di zzmanat iɛeddan yeǧǧa imdanen n leǧnas meṛṛa ad tebɛen abrid i sen-yehwan ;

nețța yețbeggin-ed iman-is s lxiṛat i gxeddem : d nețța i wen-d-ițțaken ageffur ( lehwa ), d nețța i wen-d ițțaken lɣellat di lweqt-nsent, d nețța daɣen i wen-d-ițakken tamɛict-nwen, ula d ulawen-nwen d nețța i ten issefṛaḥen.
Ɣas akken ṛṛusul nnan asen imeslayen-agi, s lḥif ameqqran i ḥebsen lɣaci-nni iwakken ur sen zellun ara asfel.

Dɣa usan-d kra seg wat Isṛail si temdinin n Antyuc akk-d Ikunyum, sekkren ccwal ger lɣaci, sḥeṛcen-ten ad ṛejmen Bulus iwakken a t-nɣen. Mi t-ṛejmen, zzuɣṛen-t ɣer beṛṛa n temdint, axaṭer ɣilen yemmut.
Lameɛna nnejmaɛen-d ɣuṛ-es inelmaden, ṭṭfen-as afus, yuɣal yekker yekcem ɣer temdint. Azekka-nni, nețța d Barnabas ṛuḥen ɣer temdint n Derba.
Mi beccṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ di temdint-nni n Derba, aṭas inelmaden i d-yernan ; dɣa uɣalen ɣer temdinin n Listra, Ikunyum d Antyuc
iwakken ad sǧehden ulawen n inelmaden. Nehhun-ten ad ṭṭfen di liman, qqaṛen-asen : S waṭas n leɛtab ara nekcem ɣer ddewla n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Sbedden imḍebbṛen di mkul tajmaɛt ; mi uẓamen, rnan dɛan ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, ǧǧan-ten seddaw leɛnaya n Sidi Ṛebbi s wayes umnen.
Zegren si tmurt n Bisidya, wwḍen-d ɣer tmurt n Bamfilya,
beccṛen awal n Ṛebbi di temdint n Barja, imiren ṣubben-d ɣer temdint n Aṭalya.
Syenna rekben lbabuṛ, uɣalen ɣer temdint n Antyuc ansi i ten wekklen i Ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef cceɣl-nni xedmen.
Mi wwḍen, snejmaɛen-d atmaten, ḥkan-asen ayen akk i gexdem Sidi Ṛebbi yis-sen, d wamek i d-wwin ɣer webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi at leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail.
Sɛeddan aṭas n wussan akk-d inelmaden.
Kra n yemdanen i d-yusan si tmurt n Yahuda ɣer temdint n Antyuc, bɣan ad slemden atmaten, qqaṛen-asen : Ma yella ur teḍhiṛem ara am akken i d-tenna ccariɛa n Musa, ur tezmirem ara aț-țețwasellkem

Bulus d Barnabas ur qbilen ara ayen i sselmaden yergazen-agi i d-yusan si tmurt n Yahuda dɣa yekker lxilaf ameqqran gar-asen. Ceggɛen Bulus d Barnabas akk-d kra seg-sen, ad alin ɣer ṛṛusul akk-d imeqqranen yellan di temdint n Lquds iwakken ad msefhamen ɣef temsalt-agi n ṭṭhaṛa.

Tajmaɛt-nni n watmaten n temdint n Antyuc tɛawen-iten deg wayen ara ḥwiǧen deg webrid-nsen ; dɣa ṛuḥen, ɛeddan si tmura n Finisya akk-d Samarya, ḥekkun di mkul amkan amek umnen s Sidna Ɛisa leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail. Mi slan i wannect-agi, feṛḥen aṭas watmaten.
Mi wwḍen ɣer temdint n Lquds, tesṭerḥeb yis-sen tejmaɛt n watmaten d ṛṛusul akk-d imeqqranen n tejmaɛt ; nutni ḥkan-asen lecɣal imeqqranen i gexdem Sidi Ṛebbi gar-asen.
Kra si terbaɛt n ifariziyen i gumnen s Sidna Ɛisa kkren-d nnan : Ilaq aț-ḍehhṛem i watmaten ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail yerna a sen tamṛem ad tebɛen ccariɛa n Sidna Musa.
Dɣa ṛṛusul akk-d imeqqranen n tejmaɛt nnejmaɛen iwakken ad frun taluft-agi.

Mi ketṛen deg wawal, ikker-ed Butṛus yenna-yasen : Ay atmaten, teẓram belli Sidi Ṛebbi yextaṛ-iyi-d gar-awen seg wass amezwaru iwakken ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, akken ad amnen.
Sidi Ṛebbi yessnen ulawen, ibeggen-ed belli iqbel-iten imi i sen-yefka Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen am akken i ɣ-t-id-yefka i nukkni ;
ur yexdim ara lxilaf gar-aɣ d yid-sen, imi i gṣeffa ulawen-nsen s liman ula d nutni.
Ihi tura acuɣeṛ i tețjeṛṛibem Sidi Ṛebbi, mi tebɣam aț-țessersem ɣef tuyat n wid yumnen azaglu ur nerfid nukkni, ur rfiden lejdud-nneɣ ;
lameɛna s ṛṛeḥma n Sidna Ɛisa swayes i numen, i nețțusellek am akken țțusellken ula d nutni.
Akken ma llan di tejmaɛt ssusmen, dɣa smeḥsisen i Bulus d Barnabas i d-iḥekkun licaṛat d leɛǧayeb i gexdem Sidi Ṛebbi yis-sen ger leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail.
Mi kfan ameslay, inṭeq Yeɛqub yenna-d : Ay atmaten, ḥesset-iyi-d : Tura
Semɛun yeḥka-d amek i d-ixtaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi si ger leǧnas si tazwara, lumma ara yeddun s yisem-is.
S wakka, yedṛa-d wayen i d nnan lenbiya am akken yura di tektabt iqedsen :
Deg ussan-nni, a d-uɣaleɣ a s-ɛiwdeɣ lebni i wexxam n Dawed ; axxam-nni yeɣlin, ad sbeddeɣ leḥyuḍ-is ihudden,
iwakken ayen i d-iqqimen seg imdanen akk-d leǧnas meṛṛa i geslan s yisem-iw, ad nadin ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi.
Akka i d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi i gxeddmen lecɣal-agi i d-ihegga si zik.
Ihi a wen-d-iniɣ : lemmer ufiɣ, ur nrennu ara aɣilif i wid ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, i gumnen s Sidna Ɛisa.
Lameɛna a sen-naru tabṛaț iwakken ad ṭṭixṛen ɣef wučči n weksum immezlen i lmeṣnuɛat d ssadat. Ad ttixṛen daɣen i yir tikli, i wučči n lmal immurḍsen akk-d tissit n idammen,
axaṭer si zzman aqdim llan yemdanen ițbecciṛen ccariɛa n Musa di mkul tamdint, yerna mkul ass n westeɛfu qqaṛen taktabt-is di leǧwameɛ n wat Isṛail.

Ihi ṛṛusul, imeqqranen n tejmaɛt akk-d watmaten meṛṛa walan belli d ṛṛay yelhan ma yella xtaṛen-d kra n watmaten si gar-asen, iwakken a ten-ceggɛen ɣer temdint n Antyuc nutni d Bulus akk-d Barnabas. Xtaṛen Yuda, ițusemman Barsaba akk-d Silas ; d irgazen i țqadaṛen watmaten.

Fkan asen tabṛaț i deg uran : Ay atmaten ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, i gzedɣen di temdinin n Antyuc, n Surya akk-d Silisya, țsellimen-d fell-awen ṛṛusul akk-d imeqqranen n tejmaɛt akk-d watmaten n temdint n Lquds.
Bulus d Silas wwḍen ɣer temdinin n Derba d Listra ; ufan dinna yiwen unelmad isem-is Timuti, baba-s d ayunani, ma d yemma-s n wat Isṛail, nețțat daɣen tumen s Lmasiḥ.
Atmaten yellan di temdint n Listra ț-țemdint n Ikunyum ḥemmlen-t yerna țcekkiṛen-t.
Bulus yebɣa ad yawi yid-es Timuti, daymi i s-iḍehheṛ ɣef ddemma n wat Isṛail yellan dinna, axaṭer ẓran akk belli baba-s d ayunani.
Di yal tamdint i deg ɛeddan, țxebbiṛen atmaten s lewṣayat yellan di tebṛaț i d-fkan ṛṛusul d imeqqranen n temdint n Lquds, nehhun-ten ad tebɛen lewṣayat-agi.
Tijmaɛin n watmaten țimɣuṛent di liman, leḥsab n widak yumnen s Lmasiḥ yețnerni kull ass.
Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ur sen-iserreḥ ara ad ṛuḥen ad beccṛen awal n Sidi Ṛebbi di tmurt n Asya, dɣa zegren timura n Frijya d Galasya.
Mi wwḍen ɣer tmurt n Misya, ɛeṛden ad ṛuḥen ɣer tmurt n Bitinya ; lameɛna Ṛṛuḥ n Sidna Ɛisa ur sen-iserreḥ ara daɣen ad ṛuḥen ɣer dinna.
Ɛeddan si tmurt n Misya, ṣubben ɣer temdint n Truwas.
Deg iḍ, iweḥḥa-yas-ed Ṛebbi i Bulus, iwala yiwen umezdaɣ n Masidunya ibedd-ed ɣuṛ-es, ițḥellil-it ad iɛeddi ɣuṛ-sen ɣer tmurt n Masidunya a ten-iɛiwen.
Mbeɛd ayen i s-d-iweḥḥa Sidi Ṛebbi i Bulus, nennuda amek ara nṛuḥ ɣer tmurt n Masidunya, axaṭer nefhem belli d Sidi Ṛebbi i ɣ-d yessawlen iwakken a nbecceṛ Lexbeṛ n lxiṛ di tmurt-nni.
Mi nerkeb di lbabuṛ si temdint n Truwas, nṛuḥ qbala ɣer tegzirt n Samutras. Azekka-nni nkemmel ɣer temdint n Nabulis.
Syenna nṛuḥ ɣer temdint n Filibus, illan țamdint tamezwarut n Masidunya i gesteɛmeṛ Ṛuman ; nesɛedda kra n wussan dinna.
Ass n westeɛfu, neffeɣ si temdint nṛuḥ ɣer rrif n wasif, nɣil a naf amkan anda țnejmaɛen i tẓallit. Nufa dinna kra n tilawin nnejmaɛent, neqqim iwakken a nemmeslay yid sent.

Tella dinna yiwet n tmeṭṭut isem-is Lidya n temdint n Tyatir, teznuzu lkețțan azeggaɣ ɣlayen ; ț-țameṭṭut iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi. M'akken i d-tesmeḥsis, Sidi Ṛebbi yeldi-yas ul-is iwakken aț-țerr ddehn is ɣer wayen i d-yeqqaṛ Bulus.
Mi tețwaɣḍes deg waman nețțat d wat wexxam-is, teɛṛeḍ-aɣ, tenna-d : ma twalam umneɣ seg ul-iw s Sidi Ṛebbi, eyyaw aț-țesɛeddim kra n wussan deg wexxam-iw. Dɣa teḥreṣ-aɣ iwakken a nekcem.
Yiwen wass mi nteddu ɣer wemkan-nni n tẓallit, temmuger-aɣ-d yiwet n tqeddact ițwamelken, ț- țaderwict, tețțawi-d aṭas n lfayda i yemɛellmen i ɣef txeddem.
Tettabaɛ-aɣ-d nekk d Bulus, tețɛeggiḍ teqqaṛ : Imdanen-agi d iqeddacen n Ṛebbi ɛlayen, țbecciṛen-awen abrid n leslak.
Acḥal n wussan nețțat tettabaɛ deg-nneɣ, yuɣal Bulus yeɛya deg-s, yezzi ɣuṛ-es, yenna i uṛuḥani i ț-imelken : Umṛeɣ-k s yisem n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, effeɣ si tmeṭṭut-agi ! Imiren kan, yeffeɣ-it uṛuḥani-nni.
Imɛellmen-is mi walan dayen ur sen-d-tețțawi ara lfayda, ṭṭfen Bulus d Silas, zzuɣṛen-ten ɣer wezniq n temdint anda țnejmaɛen lɣaci zdat lḥukkam.
Wwin-ten ɣer lḥakem n tmurt n Ṛuman nnan : Imdanen-agi-nni n wat Isṛail cewwlen tamdint-nneɣ.
Sselmaden lɛaddat ur nezmir a tent-neqbel neɣ a tent-netbeɛ nukkni yellan d iṛumaniyen.
Lɣaci kkren-d ɣuṛ-sen s leɛyaḍ, dɣa lḥukkam n Ṛuman umṛen a sen-cerrgen llebsa-nsen, a ten wwten s ujelkkaḍ ( s ucelliṭ ).
Bulus d Silas ɛeddan si temdinin n Anfibulis akk-d Abulunis, wwḍen ɣer temdint n Tiṣalunik anda sɛan wat Isṛail lǧameɛ.
Akken yennum, Bulus yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ ; tlata smanat, mkul ass n westeɛfu, ițmeslay yid-sen ɣef wawal n Ṛebbi.
Issefham-asen, ițbeggin-asen-d di Tira belli Lmasiḥ ilaq ad yeɛteb yerna a d-yeḥyu si ger lmegtin, iqqaṛ-asen : Ɛisa-yagi ɣef i wen-d-hedṛeɣ, d nețța i d Lmasiḥ.
Kra deg-sen umnen ; aṭas n iyunaniyen iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi d waṭas n tilawin n laṣel i geddan daɣen d Bulus akk-d Silas.

Lameɛna at Isṛail usmen, dɣa wwin yid-sen kra n yergazen n diri ițmenṭaṛen deg iberdan, sekkren ccwal ger lɣaci, cewwlen tamdint meṛṛa, zeḍmen ɣer wexxam n Yazun, qellben ɣef Bulus d Silas iwakken a ten-caṛɛen zdat lɣaci.
Imi ur ten-ufin ara, zuɣṛen-d Yazun d kra n watmaten ɣer lḥukkam n temdint, bdan țɛeggiḍen : D irgazen-agi i gerwin ddunit, atan usan-d armi d ɣuṛ-nneɣ,
Yazun isṭerḥeb yis-sen. Xulfen lumuṛ n Qayṣer, qqaṛen belli yella ugellid nniḍen ițusemman Ɛisa.
S yimeslayen-agi, sḥeṛcen lɣaci akk-d lḥakem n temdint.
Ugin a sen-serrḥen i Yazun d watmaten nniḍen armi xellṣen lexṭiya.
Mi d-yewweḍ yiḍ, atmaten srewlen Bulus d Silas ɣer temdint n Biri. Mi wwḍen, kecmen ɣer lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail.
Lɣaci n dinna sṭerḥben yis-sen axiṛ n wid n temdint n Tiṣalunik , qeblen awal n Ṛebbi s wul yeṣfan. Kull ass țnadin di Tira iqedsen iwakken ad walin ma yella ț-țideț, yella di tira wayen i d-qqaṛen.
Aṭas seg-sen i gumnen ; ger iyunaniyen, aṭas n tilawin n laṣel d yergazen nniḍen i gumnen daɣen.
Lameɛna mi slan wat Isṛail n Tiṣalunik belli Bulus ițbecciṛ awal n Ṛebbi di temdint n Biri, uzzlen-d ad rwin lɣaci, a ten-cewwlen.
Dɣa atmaten srewlen imiren Bulus ɣer lǧiha n lebḥeṛ, ma d Silas d Timuti qqimen di temdint n Biri.
Widak yewwin Bulus, ssawḍen-t armi ț-țamdint n Atinya, syenna uɣalen-d ɣer temdint n Biri. Iweṣṣa-ten Bulus ad inin i Silas d Timuti, ur țɛeṭṭilen ara a t-leḥqen.
M'akken i gețṛaǧu Silas akk-d Timuti di temdint n Atinya, Bulus iɣaḍ-it lḥal mi gwala tamdint-nni teččuṛ d lmeṣnuɛat i țɛebbiden imezdaɣ-is.
Di lǧameɛ, yebda ițmeslay d wat Isṛail akk-d iyunaniyen iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi. Ițmeslay daɣen akk-d wid i d-ițemlili kull ass di tejmaɛt n temdint.

Kra n lɛulama yețfelsifen, yeɛni wid ițekkin di tejmaɛt n Ibikur akk-d Stuwis, bdan țmeslayen yid-es. Kra qqaṛen : D acu i gebɣa ad yini bu lehduṛ agi ? Wiyaḍ qqaṛen : Waqila yețbecciṛ iṛebbiten ibeṛṛaniyen ! Axaṭer Bulus yella ițbecciṛ-asen ɣef Sidna Ɛisa akk-d ḥeggu n lmegtin.
Dɣa wwin-t yid-sen ɣeryiwen wemkan n ccṛeɛ n temdint-nni iwumi qqaṛen Laryufaj, nnan-as : Nezmer a nẓer d acu-t uselmed agi ajdid i ɣ-d-tewwiḍ ?
Axaṭer nesla-yak tețmeslayeḍ-ed ɣef temsalin yessewhamen. Nebɣa a nissin lmeɛna-nsent.
Bulus iṛuḥ si temdint n Atinya ɣer temdint n Kurintus.

Yufa dinna yiwen wergaz n wat Isṛail, isem-is Akilas, laṣel-is n tmurt n Tqenṭert ; yewweḍ-ed deg ussan-nni kan si tmurt n Selyan nețța ț-țmeṭṭut-is Brisila, axaṭer Qayṣer Kludyus yumeṛ i wat Isṛail meṛṛa ad ffɣen si temdint n Ṛuma.
Imi Brisila d Akilas xeddmen iqiḍunen am Bulus, yeqqim ɣuṛ-sen xeddmen s tdukli.
Mkul ass n westeɛfu, Bulus ițmeslay di lǧameɛ, ițbecciṛ i wat Isṛail akk-d iyunaniyen ttabaɛen ddin n wat Isṛail, iwakken ad amnen.
Mi d-usan Silas d Timuti si tmurt n Masidunya, Bulus yuɣal ițțelhay kan d ubecceṛ n wawal n Ṛebbi, ițbeggin ed i wat Isṛail belli d Ɛisa i d Lmasiḥ.

Imi i t-xulfen yerna regmen-t, Bulus yezwi icuḍaḍ-is, yenna-yasen : Cfut ur teqbilem ara leslak-agi, ddnub i yirawen-nwen ! Nekk ayen i yi-d-yewwi lḥal xedmeɣ-t. Ihi sya d asawen, ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer wat leǧnas ur nelli ara seg warraw n wat Isṛail.
Mi d-iffeɣ syenna, ikcem ɣer wexxam n Tit Justus, i gellan d amdan iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi ; axxam-is yezga-d tama n lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail.
Krisbus, ameqqran n lǧameɛ yumen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ nețța d wat wexxam-is meṛṛa ; aṭas n wat kurintus daɣen i gumnen mi slan s wayen i d-yenna Bulus, dɣa țwaɣeḍsen deg waman.
Yiwen n yiḍ, Sidi Ṛebbi iweḥḥa yas-ed di targit i Bulus yenna-yas-d : Ur țțaggad ara, kemmel ehdeṛ ur țsusum ara !
Axaṭer aqli-n yid-ek ! Yiwen ur izmir ad issers afus-is fell-ak iwakken a k-yexdem cceṛ, axaṭer aṭas i gellan d ayla-w di temdint-agi.
Bulus yeqqim aseggas d sețța wagguren ger wat kurintus, isselmad asen awal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Di lweqt-nni i deg yella Galyun d lḥakem ɣef tmurt n Lakaya, at Isṛail msefhamen, ddukklen ɣef Bulus, wwin-t ɣer wexxam n ccṛeɛ, nnan :
Argaz-agi issamaṛ lɣaci ad ɛebden Ṛebbi s webrid ixulfen ccariɛa.
Mi gekker Bulus ad ihdeṛ, inṭeq Galyun yenna i wat Isṛail : Lemmer d lbaṭel neɣ d ayen n diri i gexdem, zemreɣ a wen ḥesseɣ am akken yella di lqanun ay at Isṛail ;
meɛna imi d amjadel ɣef yimeslayen, ɣef yismawen akk-d ccariɛa n Musa, ayagi d ccɣel-nwen ! Ur bɣiɣ ara ad ḥekmeɣ ɣef wannect-a.
Dɣa lɣaci mmɣen ɣef Sustin, ameqqran n lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail, ewten-t zdat wexxam n ccṛeɛ , Galyun ur s-tewqiɛ ara lmeɛna.

Bulus yerna aṭas n wussan di temdint n Kurintus ; syenna yeǧǧa atmaten di lehna, yerkeb lbabuṛ ɣer tmurt n Surya ; Brisila d Akilas ddan yid-es. Uqbel ad iṛuḥ si lmeṛṣa n temdint n Senkriya, iseṭṭel aqeṛṛuy-is axaṭer yefka lemɛahda i Sidi Ṛebbi.
Mi wwḍen ɣer temdint n Ifasus, mfaṛaqen : Bulus yeǧǧa iṛfiqen-is Akilas d Brisila, ma d nețța ikcem ɣer lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail, ițmeslay yid-sen.
Ḥellelen-t ad yernu kra wussan yid-sen, lameɛna ur yeqbil ara.
Yenna-yasen : A d-uɣaleɣ ɣuṛ-wen ma yebɣa Ṛebbi.
Yerkeb di lbabuṛ si temdint n Ifasus ɣer temdint n Qiṣarya ; syenna iṛuḥ a d-iẓer tajmaɛt n watmaten yellan di temdint n Lquds ; imiren iṣubb ɣer temdint n Antyuc.
Yers-ed fell-awen Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen asmi i tumnem ? Rran-as : Leɛmeṛ nesli s Ṛṛuḥ-agi iqedsen.
Yenna-yasen : Anwa aɣḍas i-s-tețwaɣeḍsem ihi ? Rran-as : S weɣḍas n Yeḥya.
Bulus yenna-yasen : Yeḥya yesseɣḍes wid akk iqeblen ad beddlen tikli, yeqqaṛ i wegdud ad amnen s win ara d-yasen deffir-es, yeɛni s Sidna Ɛisa.
Mi slan i yimeslayen-agi, țwaɣeḍsen s yisem n Sidna Ɛisa.
Akken yessers Bulus ifassen-is fell-asen, ikcem-iten Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, bdan heddṛen s tutlayin ur nețwassen ara, yerna țcaren-d ayen i sen-d-yusan s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Imdanen-agi ad ilin di tnac yid-sen.
Dɣa Bulus ikcem ɣer lǧameɛ n wat Isṛail. Azal n tlata wagguren ițmeslay yid-sen, ițqenniɛ-iten iwakken ad amnen s wayen yeɛnan tagelda n Sidi Ṛebbi.

Lameɛna kra deg-sen yeqquṛ wul-nsen ugin ad amnen, rnan kkaten deg webrid n Sidna Ɛisa zdat lɣaci. Mi gwala annect-agi, Bulus iṭṭaxeṛ-asen, yewwi yid-es inelmaden, isselmad-iten kull ass deg wexxam n yiwen wergaz isem-is Tiranus.
Yeqqim dinna sin iseggasen armi imezdaɣ meṛṛa n tmurt n Asya, ama d at Isṛail ama d iyunaniyen, slan i wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Sidi Ṛebbi ixeddem lbeṛhanat imeqqranen s ifassen n Bulus ;
lɣaci wwḍen armi srusun ɣef yimuḍan ula ț-țimucwaṛin neɣ iceṭṭiḍen yennulen Bulus, dɣa imuḍan ḥellun, wid akk yețțumelken țeffɣen ten leǧnun.
Kra iseḥḥaren n wat Isṛail, ileḥḥun seg wemkan ɣer wayeḍ, ɛerden ad ssuffɣen leǧnun seg wid yețwamelken, qqaṛen-asen : S yisem n Sidna Ɛisa, win akken i gețbecciṛ Bulus, effɣet seg-es !
Widak ixeddmen annect-agi llan di sebɛa yid-sen, d arraw n Ciba yellan d yiwen si lmuqedmin imeqqranen n at Isṛail.
Lǧen-nni yerra-yasen-d : Ɛisa ssneɣ-t, ssneɣ daɣen anwa i d Bulus, ma d kunwi d acu-kkun ?
Argaz-nni i gezdeɣ lǧen, izḍem fell-asen yekkat-iten armi rewlen seg wexxam d iɛeryanen, yerna jerḥen.
At Isṛail akk-d iyunaniyen meṛṛa izedɣen tamdint n Ifasus slan s wayagi, ikcem-iten meṛṛa lxuf, ḥemmden isem n Sidna Ɛisa.
Aṭas seg wid i gumnen, usan-d ad qiṛṛen zdat wiyaḍ, ḥkan-d ayen xedmen.
Aṭas seg wid yellan xeddmen ssḥur, wwin-d tiktabin-nsen s wayes xeddmen ssḥur, sseṛɣen-tent zdat medden. Ufan belli azal n xemsin alef n twiztin i d ssuma-nsent.
S wakka i gewweḍ wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi ɣer mkul amkan, ițnerni s tezmert n Sidi Ṛebbi.

Mi gɛedda wayagi akk, Bulus yeqsed ad iṛuḥ ɣer temdint n Lquds, ad iɛeddi si tmura n Masidunya akk-d Akaya ; ixemmem deg iman-is yenna : « M'ara awḍeɣ ɣer dinna, ilaq-iyi daɣen ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer temdint n Ṛuma.»
Mi tethedden lḥala ifuk ccwal, imiren Bulus isnejmaɛ-ed inelmaden, yenha-ten, dɣa yeǧǧa-ten di lehna, yeṭṭef abrid ɣer tmurt n Masidunya.
Mi gezger tamurt n Masidunya, inehhu inelmaden, isseǧhad-iten s waṭas yimeslayen ; syenna ikemmel abrid ɣer tmurt n iyunaniyen anda yeqqim tlata wagguren.
Mi gțeddu ad yerkeb di lbabuṛ ɣer tmurt n Surya, yesla belli at Isṛail mcawaṛen iwakken a t-xedɛen ; dɣa ibeddel ṛṛay, iṭṭef abrid ad yuɣal ɣer tmurt n Masidunya.
Ddan yid-es : Subatir, mmi-s n Birus si temdint n Biri ; Arisṭark akk-d Skundus n temdint n Tiṣalunik, Gayus n temdint n Derba ; yedda daɣen Timuti, Tucik akk-d Trufim n tmurt n Asya.
Wigi zwaren ɣer zdat, eṛǧan-aɣ di temdint n Truwas,
ma d nukni mi gɛedda Lɛid n weɣṛum mbla iɣes ( tamtunt ), nerkeb lbabuṛ si temdint n Filibus ; xemsa wussan mbeɛd, nelḥeq-iten ɣer temdint n Truwas, anda nesɛedda sebɛa wussan.
Ass amezwaru n dduṛt nennejmaɛ a nebḍu aɣṛum iwakken ad nemekti Lmasiḥ, Bulus ițmeslay nețța d inelmaden. Imi ilaq ad iṛuḥ azekka-nni, ikemmel yid-sen awal armi i gneṣṣef yiḍ ;
taɣuṛfeț anda i nennejmaɛ, ceɛlent deg-s aṭas n teftilin.
Yiwen ilemẓi, isem-is Utikus, yella yeqqim ɣef yiri n ṭṭaq. Imi i gɛeṭṭel Bulus deg umeslay, Utikus yewwi-t nuddam ; yeɣli-d si leɛli wis tlata armi d lqaɛa, mi t-id-refden, ufan-t yemmut.
Bulus iṣubb-ed, yekna ɣuṛ-es, iddem-it ger iɣallen-is yenna : Ur țțaggadet ara, mazal deg-s taṛwiḥt, idder.
Syenna yuɣal yuli ar tɣuṛfeț, yebḍa aɣṛum ; mi ččan, ikemmel yid-sen ameslay armi d lefjer, dɣa iṛuḥ.
Ilemẓi-nni, wwin-t yedder ; dɣa yers-ed lfeṛḥ deg ulawen-nsen.
Nukni nerkeb lbabuṛ, nezwar Bulus ɣer temdint n Assus anda ara nemyagar yid-es axaṭer yebɣa ad iṛuḥ ɣef wuḍaṛ.
Mi i ɣ-d-yelḥeq di temdint n Assus, yerkeb yid-nneɣ di lbabuṛ ɣer temdint n Mitilan ;
syenna nkemmel abrid di lebḥeṛ, newweḍ azekka-nni zdat temdint n Ciyu, sellazekka-nni newweḍ ɣer temdint n Samus ; ass wis ṛebɛa newweḍ ɣer temdint n Mili.
Bulus yebɣa ad iɛeddi rrif n temdint n Ifasus mbla ma yeḥbes, iwakken ur isṛuḥuy ara lweqt di tmurt n Asya. Ițɣawal iwakken ma yella wamek, ad yaweḍ ɣer temdint n Lquds ass n lɛid n wass wis xemsin.
Si temdint n Mili, Bulus iceggeɛ ɣer imeqqranen n tejmaɛt n temdint n Ifasus iwakken a d-asen.
Mi d-wwḍen ɣuṛ-es, yenna-yasen : Tesnem si zik tikli-inu yid-wen seg wass amezwaru mi d-kecmeɣ tamurt n Asya.
Qedceɣ ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi s wannuz d imeṭṭawen ger iɣeblan d lemḥayen i yi-sseṛwan wat Isṛail.
Țbecciṛeɣ-awen rniɣ slemdeɣ kkun ama zdat lɣaci ama deg ixxamen-nwen, mbla ma ffreɣ acemma seg wayen i kkun-inefɛen.
Mi nemfaṛaq yid-sen, nerkeb lbabuṛ nṛuḥ qbala ɣer temdint n Kus, azekka-nni ɣer temdint n Ṛudus ; syenna nkemmel abrid ɣer temdint n Batara.
Mi nufa lbabuṛ ara izegren ɣer tmurt n Finisya, nerkeb deg-s nṛuḥ.
Mi nqubel tigzirt n Qubṛus, neǧǧa-ț ɣer tama tazelmaṭ, nkemmel abrid nneɣ ɣer tmurt n Surya, newweḍ ɣer temdint n Sur imi dinna ara yessers lbabuṛ sselɛa-s.
Mi nufa dinna inelmaden, nesɛedda sebɛa wussan yid-sen ; s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, inelmaden-nni nnan-as i Bulus : Ur țțali ara ɣer temdint n Lquds.
Mi ɛeddan wussan-nni, nekker a nṛuḥ, ddan yid-nneɣ armi neffeɣ i temdint, nutni ț-țilawin-nsen d warraw-nsen. Mi newweḍ ɣer rrif n lebḥeṛ nuɣal ɣef tgecrar, nedɛa ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
Mi nemsalam yid-sen, nerkeb di lbabuṛ nṛuḥ ; nutni uɣalen ɣer yexxamen-nsen,
nukkni nkemmel abrid s lbabuṛ si temdint n Sur armi ț-țamdint n Bṭulimays, neẓra dinna atmaten, neqqim yid-sen yiwen wass.
Azekka-nni nṛuḥ, newweḍ ɣer Qiṣarya ; nekcem ɣer wexxam n Filbas, win ițbecciṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, nețța yellan d yiwen si sebɛa-nni ițwaxtaṛen di temdint n Lquds ; neqqim ɣuṛ-es.
Filbas-nni, ɣuṛ-es ṛebɛa yessi-s urɛad zwiǧent, țxebbiṛent-ed s wayen i tent-id-ițțasen s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ɛeddan kra n wussan, mi d yewweḍ yiwen seg watmaten isem-is Agabus, ula d nețța ițxebbiṛ-ed s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, iṣubb-ed si tmurt n Yahuda, yusa-d ɣuṛ-nneɣ.

Iddem tabagust n Bulus, icudd idaṛṛen-is d ifassen-is, yenna : Atan wayen i d-iqqaṛ Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen : akka ara cidden wat Isṛail di temdint n Lquds bab n tbagust-agi, a t-sellmen ger ifassen n ikafriwen.
Mi nesla annect-agi, nukkni d watmaten n Sizari nḥellel Bulus iwakken ur ițțali ara ɣer temdint n Lquds.
Dɣa Bulus yerra-yasen : Acu i kkun-yuɣen mi tețrum akka armi tgezmem tasa-w ? Nekk qebleɣ mačči kan ad țwacuddeɣ, lameɛna qebleɣ ula d lmut di temdint n Lquds ɣef ddemma n yisem n Sidna Ɛisa.
Imi yugi ad yaɣ awal-nneɣ, ur nketteṛ ara fell-as lehduṛ nenna : A neǧǧ lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi ad yedṛu !
Akken ɛeddan wussan-nni, nhegga iman-nneɣ a nali ɣer temdint n Lquds.
Kra inelmaden n Qiṣarya ddan yid-nneɣ, wwin-aɣ ɣer yiwen wergaz wuɣuṛ ara nili, isem-is Mansun, n tegzirt n Qubṛus, d yiwen seg inelmaden imezwura.
Mi newweḍ ɣer temdint n Lquds, sṭreḥben yis-nneɣ watmaten s lfeṛḥ.
Azekka-nni, yedda yid-nneɣ Bulus ɣer wexxam n Yeɛqub anda nnejmaɛen imeqqranen n tejmaɛt.
Mi gsellem fell-asen, Bulus yeḥka-yasen ayen akk ixdem yis Sidi Ṛebbi ger leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail.
Mi slan ayagi, ḥemmden Sidi Ṛebbi nnan-as : Twalaḍ a gma-tneɣ acḥal n luluf n wat Isṛail i gumnen s Sidna Ɛisa yerna ṭṭfen akk di ccariɛa n Musa.

Atan slan wat Isṛail n temdint n Lquds belli tesselmadeḍ i wat Isṛail yellan ger leǧnas ad ǧǧen ccariɛa n Musa ; slan daɣen teqqaṛeḍ asen : « ur seḍhaṛet ara i warrac nwen, ur ttabaɛet ara leɛwayed i ɣ-d-ǧǧan lejdud ».
Acu ara nexdem tura ? Mbla ccekk ad slen belli tusiḍ-ed ;
ihi exdem ayen ara k-d-nini : llan gar-aneɣ ṛebɛa yergazen i gefkan lemɛahda i Sidi Ṛebbi,
Ay atmaten akken ma tellam dagi meẓẓi meqqeṛ, semḥesset ed tura a wen-d-iniɣ ayen s wayes ara dafɛeɣ ɣef yiman-iw !
Mi slan iheddeṛ-asen-d s tɛibṛanit, ssusmen meṛṛa iwakken a s-slen. Dɣa yenna :

Nekk n wat Isṛail, ț-țideț luleɣ di temdint n Sars n tmurt n Silisya, lameɛna țțuṛebbaɣ di temdint-agi n Lquds. Lliɣ d anelmad n ccix Gamalyel s yiman-is ; yesselmed-iyi akken ilaq amek ara tebɛeɣ ccariɛa i d-ǧǧan lejdud-nneɣ. Ttabaɛeɣ seg ul-iw abrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, am kunwi ass-agi.
Qehṛeɣ armi d lmut wid ittabaɛen abrid-agi ajdid n Sidna Ɛisa, am yergazen am tlawin, țțawiɣ-ten-id ɣer leḥbus țwarzen.

Lmuqeddem ameqqran ț-țejmaɛt n lɛuqal atnan d inigan ma bɣan a d-cehden ; d nutni s yiman-nsen i yi-d-yefkan tibṛatin i watmaten n Dimecq, syenna a d-awiɣ țwarzen ɣer temdint n Lquds, wid akk yumnen s webrid-agi, iwakken a ten-ɛaqben.
Lliɣ tedduɣ deg webrid, qṛib ad awḍeɣ ɣer temdint n Dimecq. Aț-țili d țnaṣfa n wass, taswiɛt kan, yiwet n tafat tameqqrant tewwet-ed seg igenni, tețfeǧǧiǧ, tezzi-yi-d.
Ɣliɣ ɣer lqaɛa, sliɣ i yiwen n ṣṣut i yi-d-iqqaṛen : Caɛul, a Caɛul, acuɣeṛ i yi tețqehhiṛeḍ ?
Nniɣ-as : Anwa-k, a Sidi ? Yenna-yi-d : Nekk d Ɛisa Anaṣari, win akken i tețqehhiṛeḍ.
Wid yellan yid-i walan tafat-nni, lameɛna ur slin ara i ṣṣut i yi-d iheddṛen, dɣa nniɣ : Acu i tebɣiḍ a t-xedmeɣ a Sidi ?
Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yi-d : Ekker, ṛuḥ ɣer Dimecq, dinna ara k-d-inin ayen akk ilaqen a t-txedmeḍ.
Imi iyi-tesderɣel tafat-nni s ufeǧǧeǧ-ines, d imdukkal-iw i yi ṭṭfen afus armi wwḍeɣ ɣer Dimecq.
Yella dinna yiwen wergaz isem-is Ananyas, d argaz iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi, yerna yettabaɛ ccariɛa ; at Isṛail meṛṛa izedɣen di temdint n Dimecq țcehhiden fell-as s lxiṛ.
Yusa-d ɣuṛ-i yenna-yi-d : A Caɛul a gma, Sidi Ṛebbi yerra-yak-d iẓri ! Di teswiɛt-nni, yuɣal-iyi-d yezṛi, dɣa walaɣ-t.
Ananyas yenna-yi-d : Sidi Ṛebbi n lejdud-nneɣ yextaṛ ik aț-țissineḍ lebɣi-ines, aț-țwaliḍ s wallen-ik win yellan d Aḥeqqi, aț-țesleḍ imeslayen seg yimi-is .
axaṭer aț-țuɣaleḍ d inigi-ines zdat yemdanen meṛṛa ɣef wayen akk i teẓriḍ d wayen iwumi tesliḍ.
Tura d acu i tețṛaǧuḍ ? Kker aț-tețwaɣeḍseḍ, aț-țizdigeḍ seg ddnubat-ik m'ara tedɛuḍ s yisem-is.
Asmi uɣaleɣ ɣer temdint n Lquds, yiwen n wass lliɣ țẓallaɣ deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen, iweḥḥa-yi-d Sidi Ṛebbi,
walaɣ Sidna Ɛisa yenna-yi-d : Ffeɣ s lemɣawla si temdint n Lquds, axaṭer ur qebblen ara ayen s wayes ara tcehdeḍ fell-i.
Nniɣ : A Sidi, ssnen-iyi ! Sran s yiman nsen belli ttabaɛeɣ si lǧameɛ ɣer wayeḍ wid yumnen yis-ek iwakken a ten-erreɣ ɣer lḥebs ad țewten.
Ula d Stifan inigi-inek, mi ssuzlen idammen-is lliɣ dinna, qebleɣ at nɣen yerna ɛusseɣ leḥwayeǧ n wid i t-yenɣan.
Dɣa Sidi Ṛebbi yenna-yi-d : Ṛuḥ a k-ceggɛeɣ ɣer lebɛid ɣer wat leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail.
Smeḥsisen-as armi d awal-agi imiren ɛeggḍen nnan : Ekkset si ddunit argaz am wagi ! Ur t-țaǧǧat ara ad yidir !
Țɛeggiḍen, ṭeggiṛen leḥwayeǧ nsen, ssafagen aɣebbaṛ ɣer igenni.
Lqebṭan n Ṛuman yumeṛ ad skecmen Bulus ɣer lbeṛj, a t-ewten s ujelkkaḍ ( s ucelliṭ ) iwakken ad issinen sebba ɣef wacu țɛeggiḍen fell-as.
Mi t-cudden s tɣeggadin, Bulus yenna i lqebṭan yellan dinna : Eɛni iserreḥ-awen lqanun aț țewtem aṛumani s ujelkkaḍ uqbel ad iɛeddi di ccṛeɛ ?
Ɣef yimeslayen-agi, lqebṭan-nni iṛuḥ ɣer wemdebbar ameqqran yenna-yas : Ḥader aț-țewteḍ argaz-agi ! D aṛumani !
Amdebbar ameqqran mi d-yusa ɣer Bulus, yenna-yas : Ț-țideț kečč d aṛumani ? Ih, d aṛumani i lliɣ !
Amdebbar ameqqran yenna : Nekk aṭas n yedrimen i fkiɣ iwakken ad uɣaleɣ d aṛumani. Bulus yerra-yas : Nekk, seg wasmi i d-luleɣ i rseɣ di lekwaɣeḍ d aṛumani.
Imiren widak i d-ikkren a t wten, ṭṭaxṛen-as. Lqebṭan ameqqran s yiman-is yuggad mi geẓra Bulus d aṛumani yerna icudd-it.

Azekka-nni, imi i gebɣa ad yissin wemdebbar ameqqran ɣef wacu i d-ccetkan fell-as wat Isṛail, iserreḥ i Bulus, yumeṛ i lmuqedmin akk-d usqamu n ccṛeɛ ad nnejmaɛen. Dɣa yewwi-d Bulus isbedd-it-id zdat-nsen.
Lmuqeddem ameqqran Ananyas yumeṛ i wid yellan zdat-es, a t-wten ɣer yimi.
Dɣa Bulus yenna : A k-id-iwet Ṛebbi a bu sin wudmawen ! Teqqimeḍ aț-țḥekmeḍ fell-i s ccariɛa, lameɛna kečč s yiman-ik txulfeḍ-ț imi tumreḍ ad iyi wten.
Widak yellan zdat-es nnan-as : Tregmeḍ lmuqeddem ameqqran n Ṛebbi !
Bulus yenna-yasen : Ur ẓriɣ ara ay atmaten belli d nețța i d lmuqeddem ameqqran, axaṭer yura di ccariɛa : Ur țekkes ara leqdeṛ ɣef lḥakem n wegdud-ik.

Bulus, mi gwala deg unejmaɛ-nni azgen deg-sen d isaduqiyen, azgen nniḍen d ifariziyen, iɛeggeḍ gar-asen, yenna : Ay atmaten, nekk d afarizi, d mmi-s n ufarizi ; ɣef ddemma n usirem i nesɛa di ḥeggu n lmegtin i d-beddeɣ ɣer ccṛeɛ ass-agi !
Mi d-yenna ayagi, ikker umennuɣ ger ifariziyen d isaduqiyen ; dɣa yebḍa unejmaɛ-nni.
Axaṭer isaduqiyen qqaṛen ulac ḥeggu, ulac lmalayekkat, ulac leṛwaḥ ; ma d ifariziyen, nutni umnen s wannect agi.
Ikker umennuɣ gar-asen ; kra n lɛulama n ccariɛa n tejmaɛt n ifariziyen kkren iwakken ad ḥudden Bulus, nnan : Ur nufi ara ayen n diri deg wemdan-agi. Yezmer lḥal ihdeṛ-as-d Ṛebbi neɣ lmelk !
Imi ițțimɣuṛ umenɣi, lqebṭan ameqqran yugad ad feṛqen Bulus d iftaten. Yumeṛ i lɛeskeṛ ad ṛuḥen a t-id-kksen si tlemmast-nsen, a t awin ɣer lbeṛj.
Azekka-nni deg iḍ, Sidna Ɛisa iḍheṛ-as-d i Bulus yenna-yas : Ur țțaggad ara, axaṭer am akken tcehdeḍ fell-i di temdint n Lquds, ilaq daɣen aț-țcehdeḍ fell-i di temdint n Ṛuma.
Mi guli wass, at Isṛail xedmen tiḥileț, msefhamen, gullen ur ččin ur swin alamma nɣan Bulus.
Wid akk i s-ixedmen taxazabit agi, llan akteṛ n ṛebɛin yid-sen.
Ṛuḥen ad ẓren imeqqranen d lmuqedmin akk-d lɛuqal nnan asen : Neggul s limin ameqqran, ur nečči acemma alamma nenɣa Bulus.
Tura ihi, init-as i lqebṭan ameqqran a t-id-yawi ɣer unejmaɛ n ccṛeɛ zdat-wen, amzun tebɣam a s-tɛiwdem abeḥḥet ; ma d nukkni, a nheggi iman-nneɣ a t-nenɣ uqbel a d-yaweḍ ɣer dagi.
Lameɛna mmi-s n weltma-s n Bulus imi gesla s tḥileț-nni i s heggan, iṛuḥ ɣer lbeṛj anda yețwaḥbes Bulus, a s-yessiweḍ lexbaṛ.
Bulus yessawel-ed i yiwen si lfesyanat, yenna-yas : Awi aqcic-agi ɣer lqebṭan ameqqran, axaṭer yesɛa awal ara s-yini.
Lfesyan yewwi yid-es aqcic-nni ɣer lqebṭan ameqqran, yenna-yas : Bulus ameḥbus-nni yessawel iyi-d iḥellel-iyi iwakken a k-d-awiɣ aqcic-agi, yesɛa awal ara k-d-yini.
Lqebṭan ameqqran iddem aqcic-nni seg ufus, ɛezlen iman-nsen ɣer ṭṭeṛf ; yenna-yas : D acu i tebɣiḍ a yi-t-id-tiniḍ ?
Yerra-yas : At Isṛail msefhamen a k-d ḍelben aț-țawiḍ Bulus azekka ɣer zdat unejmaɛ n ccṛeɛ, ufan-d sebba a s-ɛiwden abeḥḥet ɣef temsalt-is.
Ur țțaɣ ara awal-nsen, axaṭer akteṛ n ṛebɛin deg-sen ḥeyylen-as, gullen s limin ameqqran ur tețțen ur tessen alamma nɣan-t. Tura heggan iman-nsen, țṛaǧun anagar lebɣi-k.
Amdebbar ameqqran iserreḥ-as i weqcic-nni ad iṛuḥ, yenna-yas : Ur qqaṛ i yiwen belli tessaweḍed iyi-d lexbaṛ-agi.
Yuɣal issawel i sin lfesyanat, yenna-yasen : Heggit mitin iɛeskṛiwen, sebɛin yemnayen akk-d mitin iɛeskṛiwen i gteddun s imezṛagen, ad ṛuḥen ɣef tesɛa n yiḍ ɣer Qiṣarya.
Heggit daɣen iɛewdiwen iwakken ad ssiwḍen Bulus di laman ɣer lḥakem Filiks.
Mi ɛeddan xemsa wussan, lmuqeddem ameqqran Ananyas iṣubb-ed ɣer Qiṣarya nețța d kra n lɛuqal n wat Isṛail akk-d yiwen ubugaṭu isem-is Tertulus ; usan-d ɣer lḥakem ad ccetkin ɣef Bulus.
Mi d-ssawlen i Bulus, Tertulus yebda accetki fell-as s yimeslayen agi :
A lḥakem ameqqran ! S uḍebbaṛ-ik yelhan i d-yers lxiṛ d lehna ɣef tmurt-agi ! Ɣef wayagi, a Filiks ameqqran, ncekkeṛ-ik meṛṛa di mkul amkan ;
lameɛna iwakken ur k-nețɛeṭṭil ara aṭas, di leɛnaya-k semḥess-ed i kra n yimeslayen-agi ara k-d-nini :
Argaz-agi d țerka, iskker ccwal ger wat Isṛail n ddunit meṛṛa, d nețța i d ameqqran n tejmaɛt n inaṣariyen.
Yeɛṛed ad issenǧes ula d lǧameɛ iqedsen. Mi t-neṭṭef, nebɣa a neḥkem fell-as s ccariɛa-nneɣ,
lameɛna yewweḍ-ed lqebṭan ameqqran Lizyas, ikkes-aɣ-t s ddreɛ si ger ifassen-nneɣ,
yerna yumeṛ i wid iccetkan fell-as a d-asen ad ccetkin ɣuṛ-ek. Tura tzemreḍ s yiman-ik a t-tbeḥteḍ, iwakken aț-țesleḍ seg yimi-s wayen akk i ɣef neccetka fell-as.
At Isṛail yellan dinna, cehden akk belli akka i gella lḥal.
Mi i s-iwehha lḥakem i Bulus iwakken a d-ihdeṛ, Bulus yenna : Sriɣ aṭas iseggasen aya i telliḍ d lḥakem ɣef wegdud-agi ; ihi s laman ara d-qeddmeɣ tamsalt-iw zdat-ek.
Ur wwiḍen ara tnac wussan segmi uliɣ ɣer temdint n Lquds iwakken ad ɛebdeɣ Ṛebbi, tzemreḍ aț-țesteqsiḍ s yiman-ik.
Ulac win i yi-d-yufan deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen țemjadaleɣ nekk d walebɛaḍ, ulac daɣen win i yi-d-yufan di leǧwameɛ n wat Isṛail neɣ di temdint sekkreɣ ccwal ger lɣaci.
Ur zmiren ara a d-awin țțbut n wayen akka i ɣef d-ccetkan fell-i.

Zemreɣ a d-iniɣ zdat-ek a lḥakem Filiks : Ṛebbi i ɛebbdeɣ, d win akken ɛebden lejdud-iw ; s tideț umneɣ s webrid-agi ajdid i ɣef d-qqaṛen : « ixulef abrid-nsen » ; lameɛna umneɣ s wayen akk yuran di ccariɛa n Musa akk-d lenbiya.
Sɛiɣ asirem ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi -- am akken i t-sɛan ula d nutni -- belli a d-ḥyun yemdanen meṛṛa ama d iḥeqqiyen ama d wid ixedmen cceṛ.
Daymi țɛassaɣ iman-iw kull ass, iwakken ad sɛuɣ ul yeṣfan zdat Ṛebbi akk-d yemdanen.
Acḥal n iseggasen, nekk ɛaceɣ di lɣeṛba ; usiɣ-ed iwakken a d-awiɣ kra n yedrimen i d-jemɛeɣ d lemɛawna i igellilen n tmurt-iw yerna wwiɣ-ed daɣen lweɛdat i Sidi Ṛebbi.
Atan wamek i yi-d-ufan deg wefrag n lǧameɛ iqedsen : ufan-iyi-d akken kan i ssezdegeɣ iman-iw akken i d-tenna ccariɛa; ur iyi-d zzin imdanen ur yelli ccwal
yerna d at Isṛail n tmurt n Asya i gellan dinna, d nutni i glaq ad bedden zdat-ek ma sɛan kra ɣef wacu ara ccetkin fell-i.
Neɣ m'ulac wid yellan dagi, a d-inin d acu ufan deg-i n diri mi beddeɣ zdat unejmaɛ-nsen n ccṛeɛ ;
anagar ma yella ɣef wawal-nni i d-nniɣ s leɛyaḍ gar-asen : « imi umneɣ s ḥeggu n lmegtin, i d-beddeɣ ass-agi ɣer ccṛeɛ zdat-wen ! »
Filiks yesnen akken ilaq abrid n Lmasiḥ, yenna-yasen : Uɣalet-ed m'ara d-yaweḍ lqebṭan Lizyas, imiren ad ẓreɣ tamsalt-nwen.
Mi ɛeddan tlata wussan segmi yuɣal d lḥakem, Fistus yuli si temdint n Qiṣarya ɣer temdint n Lquds.
Dɣa lmuqedmin imeqqranen akk-d imeqqranen n wat Isṛail, ccetkan ɣuṛ-es ɣef Bulus.
Ssutren i Fistus a sen-ixdem lemziya, a sen-d-yawi Bulus ɣer temdint n Lquds, nutni heggan-as-d taxazabit iwakken a t-nɣen deg webrid.
Lameɛna Fistus yerra-yasen : Bulus ițwaḥbes di Qiṣarya, nekk s yiman-iw qṛib ad uɣaleɣ ɣer dinna.
Xtiṛet-ed si gar-awen wid ara yeddun yid-i ; ma yella kra n wayen n diri i gexdem wergaz-agi, ad ccetkin fell-as.
Fistus isɛedda azal n tmanya neɣ ɛecṛa wussan gar-asen, taggara yuɣal ɣer Qiṣarya. Azekka-nni, iṭṭef amkan ɣef wukersi n ccṛeɛ, iceggeɛ a d-awin Bulus.
Mi d-yewweḍ Bulus, at Isṛail i d-yusan si temdint n Lquds zzin-as, gren-d fell-as lbaṭel, lameɛna ur zmiren ara a d-tebten wayen i d qqaṛen.
Bulus iḥudd iman-is yenna : Ur ɛuṣaɣ ccariɛa n wat Isṛail, ur skecmeɣ leḥṛam ɣer lǧameɛ iqedsen, ur xulfeɣ Qayṣer.
Imi gebɣa ad issefṛeḥ at Isṛail, Fistus yenna i Bulus : Tebɣiḍ aț-țaliḍ ɣer temdint n Lquds iwakken aț-țɛeddiḍ di ccṛeɛ dinna zdat-i ?
Lameɛna Bulus yenna : Ɣer ccṛeɛ n Qayṣer i beddeɣ, ɣuṛ-es ara țțucaṛɛeɣ. Ur xdimeɣ ula d acemma i gḍuṛṛen at Isṛail, akken teẓriḍ kečč s yiman-ik.

Ma yella xedmeɣ lbaṭel neɣ ayen yuklalen lmut, ur țțaggadeɣ ara ad mmteɣ. Lameɛna ma yella lecɣal-agi ɣef i d-ccetkan fell-i ur seḥḥan ara, yiwen ur izmir a yi-isellem ger ifassen-nsen. Ad rẓeɣ ccṛeɛ ɣer Qayṣer !
Mi gemcawaṛ Fistus nețța ț-țejmaɛt-nni n ccṛeɛ, yenna i Bulus : Tessutreḍ-ed ccṛeɛ n Qayṣer, aț-țețțucarɛeḍ zdat Qayṣer !
Mi ɛeddan kra wussan, agellid Aɣribas akk-d weltma-s Birinis, usan-d ɣer Qiṣarya ad sellmen ɣef lḥakem Fistus.
Imi qqimen dinna kra wussan, Fistus iḥka-yas i ugellid-nni taqsiṭ n Bulus, yenna-yas : Yella yiwen wergaz i geǧǧa Filiks dagi d ameḥbus.
Mi lliɣ di temdint n Lquds, ccetkan fell-as imeqqranen n lmuqedmin d lɛuqal n wat Isṛail ; ssutren-iyi-d ad ḥekmeɣ fell-as.
Nniɣ-asen mačči di lɛadda n iṛumaniyen ad ḥekmen ɣef wemdan uqbel a t-semqabalen nețța d wid i d-iccetkan fell-as, iwakken ad yaf abrid amek ara idafeɛ ɣef yiman-is.
Ihi usan-d ɣer dagi. Ur ɛeṭṭleɣ ara, azekka-nni fkiɣ lameṛ a d-awin argaz-nni iwakken a t-sɛeddiɣ di ccṛeɛ ;
wid iccetkan fell-as ur d-nnin acemma seg wayen țrajuɣ a t-id-inin.
Țemjadalen anagar ɣef ddin akk-d yiwen ițusemman Ɛisa. Ɛisa-agi yemmut, meɛna Bulus yeqqaṛ-ed yedder.
Aɣribas yenna i Bulus : -- Atan ɣuṛ-ek wawal, tzemreḍ aț-țdafɛeḍ ɣef yiman-ik. Bulus yerfed afus-is iwakken ad idafeɛ ɣef yiman-is, yenna :
Feṛḥeɣ aṭas ay agellid Aɣribas imi zdat-ek ara ɛeddiɣ di ccṛeɛ ass-agi ɣef wayen akk i ccetkan fell-i wat Isṛail,
axaṭer tesneḍ akken ilaq leɛwayed akk-d yimeslayen-nsen ; di leɛnaya-k ihi semḥess-iyi-d s leɛqel.
At Isṛail ssnen tikli-inu si temẓi-w, axaṭer țțuṛebbaɣ di temdint n Lquds ger warraw n tmurt-iw.
Ssnen-iyi si zik ma bɣan ad cehden fell-i. Lliɣ d afarizi, tebɛeɣ leqwanen iweɛṛen yeɛnan ddin-nneɣ di tejmaɛt n ifariziyen.
Beddeɣ ass-agi di ccṛeɛ axaṭer ssarmeɣ aț-țwakmel lemɛahda-nni i gefka Sidi Ṛebbi i lejdud-nneɣ.
Tnac leɛṛac-nneɣ i gɛebden Ṛebbi am yiḍ am ass, țṛaǧun a d-taweḍ lemɛahda-agi i ssaramen. Ɣef wusirem-agi i ccetkan wat Isṛail fell-i.
Ay agellid Aɣribas, acuɣeṛ i tɣilem d lmuḥal a d-isseḥyu Sidi Ṛebbi lmegtin ?
Ma d nekkini, di tazwara ɛeṛdeɣ ad xaṣmeɣ s wayen yellan di tezmert-iw, isem-agi n Ɛisa Anaṣari ;
d ayen i xedmeɣ di temdint n Lquds, rriɣ aṭas imasiḥiyen ɣer lḥebs, yerna d lmuqedmin imeqqranen i yi-d-yefkan țesriḥ-agi. M'ara ḥekkmen fell-asen s lmut, nekkini qebbleɣ ;
qehṛeɣ-ten acḥal d abrid si lǧameɛ ɣer wayeḍ, ḥeṛseɣ-ten ad ṭṭixṛen i webrid-agi n Ɛisa ; deg urrif-iw ameqqran, țṛuḥeɣ armi ț-țimdinin tibeṛṛaniyin iwakken a ten-qehhṛeɣ.
Ɣef wannect-nni lmuqedmin imeqqranen fkan-iyi tazmert s wayes ṛuḥeɣ ɣer temdint n Dimecq.
Taswiɛt kan di țnaṣfa wass ay agellid, walaɣ deg webrid yiwet n tafat i d-yekkan seg igenni, tețfeǧǧiǧ akteṛ n yiṭij, tezzi-yi-d i nekk akk-d wid yellan yid-i,
neɣli akk ɣer lqaɛa. Sliɣ i ṣṣut i d-iqqaṛen s tmeslayt taɛibṛanit : A Caɛul, a Caɛul ! Acuɣeṛ i yi tețqehhiṛeḍ ? Yewɛeṛ fell-ak aț-țɛaṣiḍ inezlan.
Rriɣ-as : Anwa-k a Sidi ? Yenna-yi-d : Nekkini d Ɛisa-nni i tețqehhiṛeḍ ;
kker fell-ak, bedd ɣef yidaṛṛen-ik, ḍehṛeɣ-ak-d iwakken a k-rreɣ d aqeddac-iw, d inigi ɣef wayen twalaḍ ass-agi d wayen ara k-d-sekneɣ sya d asawen.
Xtaṛeɣ-k-id si ger wat Isṛail akk-d leǧnas nniḍen uɣuṛ ara k ceggɛeɣ. A sen-teldiḍ allen
iwakken a d ffɣen si ṭṭlam ɣer tafat, si tezmert n Cciṭan ɣer tezmert n Ṛebbi, ad amnen yis-i, iwakken a sen-neɛfuɣ ddnubat-nsen, ad sɛun amkan ger wid i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Daymi, ay agellid Aɣribas, ur ɛuṣaɣ ara aweḥḥi i yi-d-yusan seg igenni.
Mi fkan lameṛ a nerkeb lbabuṛ ɣer tmurt n Selyan, ǧǧan Bulus akk-d kra n imeḥbas nniḍen i yiwen ufesyan n terbaɛt n Qayṣer, isem-is Xulyus.
Nerkeb deg yiwen lbabuṛ n temdint n Adramit, ara iṛuḥen rrif n tmura n Asya ; nṛuḥ, yedda yid-nneɣ Aristaṛk yellan d amasiduni n temdint n Tiṣalunik.
Azekka-nni, newweḍ ɣer temdint n Sidun , Xulyus yețqadaṛen Bulus, ixdem-as lemziya, iserreḥ-as ad iṛuḥ ɣer imdukkal-is iwakken a s-d-fken ayen yeḥwaǧ.
Mi neqleɛ syenna, nɛedda rrif rrif n tegzirt n Qubṛus axaṭer iṣbeḥ-aɣ-d waḍu iǧehden si zdat.
Nezger lebḥeṛ n Silisya akk-d Bamfilya, newweḍ ɣer lmeṛṣa n Mira yellan di tmurt n Lizya.
Afesyan-nni yufa dinna lbabuṛ n Skandriya ara iṛuḥen ɣer tmurt n Selyan, isserkeb-aɣ deg-s.
Lbabuṛ nni yewwi-yaɣ kra n wussan s țțawil ; armi neṛwa leɛtab i newweḍ ɣer tama n temdint n Knidus, imi ur aɣ-yeǧǧi ara waḍu a nqeṛṛeb, nɛedda rrif n tegzirt n Kritus, ɣer tama n Salmuni.
Nkemmel rrif rrif s leɛtab, armi newweḍ ɣer yiwen wemkan isem-is « Lemraṣi icebḥen », zdat temdint n Lazaya.
Nesṛuḥ aṭas n lweqt, lweqt n usafer di lebḥeṛ yuɣal yewɛeṛ aṭas, imi ass i deg țțuẓummen wat Isṛail di taggara n lexṛif iɛedda.
Daymi i sen-iɛeggen Bulus yenna-yasen : Ay atmaten, ẓriɣ belli tikkelt-agi ma nkemmel aṣafeṛ-nneɣ, a d-tili lexsaṛa mačči kan i lbabuṛ d sselɛa yellan deg-s, lameɛna tezmer aț-țeglu ula yis-nneɣ.
Afesyan-nni aṛumani yuɣ awal i bab n lbabuṛ akk-d win i t-inehṛen wala ad yaɣ awal i Bulus.

Imi lmeṛṣa-nni ur telhi ara iwakken ad sɛeddin deg-s ccetwa, azgen ameqqran n ibeḥriyen bɣan ad ṛuḥen, iwakken ma yella wamek, ad awḍen ɣer lmeṛṣa n Finikus yellan di tegzirt n Kritus ; lmeṛṣa-yagi tqubel lǧiha taɣeṛbit, bɣan ad sɛeddin deg-s ccetwa.
Akken i d-yekker yiwen ubeḥri xfifen, ɣilen ad awḍen ɣer leqsed nsen. Refden amextaf n lbabuṛ, ṛuḥen rrif rrif n tegzirt n Kritus.
Lameɛna ur tɛeṭṭel ara tekker-ed yiwet n tbuciḍant iwumi qqaṛen Erakilun i d-ikkan seg idurar n tegzirt-nni.
Imi lbabuṛ ur s-izmir ara i tbuciḍant-nni, neǧǧa-t a t-yawi waḍu ɣer wanda i s-yehwa,
nɛedda seddaw yiwet n tegzirt tamecṭuḥt yeddurin ɣef waḍu, isem-is Kluda. Mi ɣ-teɣli teflukt-nni n leslak, s leɛtab ameqqran i ț-id-nessuli ɣer lbabuṛ.
Imi nuggad a ɣ-yawi waḍu ɣer leryuf iweɛṛen n tmurt n Libya, ncudd lbabuṛ s imurar ; nerna nṣubb-ed lbac-nni s wayes i t-yețțawi waḍu, neǧǧa iman-nneɣ a ɣ-yawi ɣer wanda yebɣa.
Azekka-nni, imi mazal lebḥeṛ yenhewwal, nessenqes kra n sselɛa yellan deg-s nḍeggeṛ-iț ɣer lebḥeṛ.
Ass wis tlata, ixeddamen n lbabuṛ rnan ḍeggṛen sselɛa-nni i d-iqqimen.
Acḥal n wussan ur d-iban yiṭij ur d-banen itran, lebḥeṛ mazal-it yerwi, ur numin ara a nțwasellek.

Aṭas wussan i neqqim mbla lmakla ; dɣa Bulus ibedd-ed gar-asen yenna : Ay irgazen, lemmer i yi-tuɣem awal m'akken i wen-d-nniɣ : a neqqim axiṛ di lmeṛṣa n Kritus, tili ur d-tdeṛṛu ara lexsaṛa akk-d lxuf-agi !
Tura ur țțagadet ara, sǧehdet iman-nwen axaṭer ula d yiwen deg-wen ur ițmețțat ; ur d-tețțili lexsaṛa anagar lbabuṛ-agi ara iɣeṛqen.
Iḍ iɛeddan, Sidi Ṛebbi i ɛebbdeɣ iceggeɛ-ed yiwen lmelk ibedd-ed ɣuṛ-i
yenna-yi-d : « a Bulus, ur țțaggad ara ! Ilaq aț-țbeddeḍ zdat Qayṣer, atan Sidi Ṛebbi a kkun isellek s kečč s wid yellan yid-ek ».
Sewṛet ihi ay atmaten ! Țekleɣ ɣef Ṛebbi ad idṛu am akken i d-yenna ;
mbla ccekk ihi a ɣ-ḍeggṛent lemwaji ɣer yiwet n tegzirt.
Mi d-nemneɛ si lebḥeṛ, nesla belli tigzirt-nni isem-is Malṭa.
Imezdaɣ-is setṛeḥben yis-nneɣ, xedmen-aɣ lxiṛ d ameqqran ; ceɛlen times axaṭer yekkat ugeffur ( lehwa ), yerna d asemmiḍ.
Bulus ijmeɛ-ed kra n yesɣaṛen a ten-iger ɣer tmes, si leḥmu-nni n tmes yeffeɣ-ed yiwen n wezrem yenṭed deg ufus-is.

Lɣaci mi walan azrem-nni yeckenṭeḍ deg ufus-is, qqaṛen wway gar-asen : « Argaz-agi iban d bu tmegṛaḍ, axaṭer ɣas akken yemneɛ-ed si lebḥeṛ, Sidi Ṛebbi yellan d Bab n lḥeqq ur t-yețțaǧa ara ad yidir. »
Lameɛna Bulus yezwi azrem-nni ɣer tmes, ur t-yuɣ ula d acemma ;
lɣaci-nni țṛaǧun a t-walin ibzeg neɣ ad yemmet imiren kan. Ɛussen-t, mi walan ur t-yuɣ wacemma, beddlen ṛṛay, ḥesben-t d yiwen seg iṛebbiten s wayes țțamnen.
Di leǧwahi-nni i gezdeɣ Bubliyus lḥakem ameqqran n tegzirt-nni ; yesɛa aṭas n wakal, yesṭerḥeb yis-nneɣ, yerna yessens-aɣ ɣuṛ-es tlata wussan.
Deg ussan-nni, baba-s n Bubliyus yella deg usu yehlek, tuɣ-it tawla yerna tuzzel tɛebbuṭ-is. Bulus iṛuḥ ɣuṛ-es, issers ifassen-is fell-as, yedɛa ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi dɣa yeḥla.
Mi slan yis imuḍan n tegzirt-nni usan-d ɣuṛ-es isseḥla-ten ula d nutni.
Ɣef wayagi, qudṛen-aɣ aṭas ; mi nekker a nṛuḥ, fkan-aɣ-d ayen akk neḥwaǧ i webrid.
Mi ɛeddan tlata waguren, nerkeb yiwen lbabuṛ n temdint n Skandriya iwumi qqaṛen Dyuskuṛ, isɛeddan ccetwa di tegzirt-nni ;
newweḍ ɣer temdint n Sirakuz, anda neqqim tlata wussan.
Syenna nkemmel rrif rrif n lebḥeṛ armi ț-țamdint n Ṛejyu, azekka-nni yekker-ed yiwen n waḍu i d-yekkan seg usamer, sin wussan mbeɛd, newweḍ ɣer temdint n Buzul.
Nufa dinna atmaten i ɣ iḥellelen a neqqim yid-sen sebɛa wussan, syenna nkemmel abrid ɣer temdint n Ṛuma.

Mi slan yis-nneɣ watmaten n temdint n Ṛuma, usan-d armi d ssuq n Abyus akk-d wemkan yețțusemman « Tlata Țbernat » iwakken a ɣ-d-mmagren. Mi ten iwala Bulus, yefṛeḥ yeḥmed Ṛebbi yerna yuɣal-it-id lǧehd.
Mi newweḍ ɣer temdint n Ṛuma, serrḥen-as i Bulus ad izdeɣ deg yiwen wexxam, nețța d yiwen uɛeskṛi i t yețɛassan.

Mi ɛeddan tlata wussan, Bulus yessawel i imeqqranen n wat Isṛail. Mi d-nnejmaɛen, Bulus yenna yasen : Ay atmaten, ɣas akken ur xdimeɣ acemma i gxulfen agdud d leɛwayed n lejdud-nneɣ, ṭṭfen-iyi ɣer lḥebs di temdint n Lquds, sellmen-iyi ger ifassen n lɛeskeṛ n Ṛuman.
Mi yi-beḥten, bɣan ad iyi serrḥen axaṭer ur ufin ara deg-i sebba s wayes ara ḥekmen fell-i s lmut.
Imi ur qbilen ara wat Isṛail ad iyi-d-serrḥen iṛumaniyen, iḥettem-iyi lḥal ad rẓeɣ ccṛeɛ ɣer Qayṣer ; lameɛna mačči d acetki i bɣiɣ ad ccetkiɣ ɣef wegdud-iw.
Daymi i bɣiɣ a kkun-ẓreɣ, ad mmeslayeɣ yid-wen axaṭer ɣef ddemma n usirem n wat Isṛail i țwarzeɣ s snasel-agi.
Imeqqranen n wat Isṛail nnan-as : Ur d-neṭṭif ula d yiwet n tebṛaț si tmurt n Yahuda ɣef wayen yeɛnan tamsalt-ik, ula d yiwen seg watmaten ur d-yusi ad iccetki neɣ a ɣ-d-yini ayen n diri fell-ak.
Lameɛna nebɣa a nsel s ɣuṛ-ek ayen akka s wacu i tumneḍ, ma d ayen yeɛnan tajmaɛt-agi seg i d-tekkiḍ, neẓra belli di yal amkan tețmagar-ed uguren.

Dɣa msefhamen ɣef wass nniḍen i deg ara mlilen. Mi d yewweḍ wass-nni, usan-d deg waṭas yid-sen ɣer wexxam n Bulus. Si ṣṣbeḥ armi ț-țameddit, Bulus yețbecciṛ-asen ɣef tgeldit n Ṛebbi s ccariɛa n Musa ț-țektabin n lenbiya, yețqellib a ten-iqenneɛ iwakken ad amnen s Sidna Ɛisa.
Kra umnen s wayen i d-yenna, ma d wiyaḍ ugin ad amnen.
Mi țeddun ad ṛuḥen mazal lxilaf gar-asen, dɣa Bulus yerna-yasen imeslayen-agi : Ț-țideț ayen i d-yenna Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i lejdud-nwen s yimi n nnbi Iceɛya
mi d-yenna : Ṛuḥ ɣer wegdud-agi tiniḍ-asen : ɣas aț-țeslem s imeẓẓuɣen-nwen ur tfehmem ara ; aț-țemmuqlem s wallen-nwen ur tețwalim ara,

imi ul n wegdud-agi yuɣal d azṛu ; qeflen imeẓẓuɣen-nsen, qemcen allen-nsen ; ur bɣin ara ad walin s wallen-nsen, d slen s imeẓẓuɣen-nsen, ad fehmen s wul-nsen, iwakken a d-uɣalen ɣuṛ-i ad beddlen tikli akken a ten-sseḥluɣ !
Atan ihi tura leslak n Sidi Ṛebbi ad ițțunefk i leǧnas nniḍenur nelli ara n wat Isṛail axaṭer nutni a s-semḥessen yerna a t-qeblen.
Mi d-yenna Bulus ayagi, ffɣen-d imeqqranen n wat Isṛail, leḥḥun țemjadalen wway gar-asen.
Bulus yeqqim sin iseggasen deg wexxam-nni i gekra. Isṭerḥib s kra n win i d-yețțasen a t-iẓer.
Yețbecciṛ tageldit n Ṛebbi s tlelli, isselmad-asen ayen akk yeɛnan Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, ulac win i t-iḥebsen.

name: Romans
chapters: Nekk Bulus, yellan d aqeddac n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, țwaxtaṛeɣ ad iliɣ d ṛṛasul, iwakken ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ i d-yewɛed Sidi Ṛebbi si zik s yimi n lenbiya di tira iqedsen,
d ayen yeɛnan Mmi-s, Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ i d-ilulen d amdan seg wedrum n Dawed,
yețțusemma d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi s tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, s ḥeggu-ines si ger lmegtin.
Yis i ɣ-ixdem Sidi Ṛebbi lemziya a nili d imceggɛen, iwakken a d-nawi s yisem-is imdanen n leǧnas meṛṛa ad amnen yis yerna ad aɣen awal-is.
Yessawel-awen-d ula i kunwi yellan ger leǧnas-agi, iwakken aț-țilim d ayla n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
I wid akk yellan di temdint n Ṛuma, i gḥemmel Sidi Ṛebbi, iwumi i d-yessawel ad ilin d ayla-s : ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a wen-d-țțunefkent s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ akk-d Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Di tazwara, ad ḥemdeɣ Sidi Ṛebbi fell-awen meṛṛa s yisem n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, axaṭer yeffeɣ lexbaṛ di ddunit meṛṛa belli tumnem s Lmasiḥ.
Sidi Ṛebbi i ɛebbdeɣ seg ul-iw, i ɣef qeddceɣ imi țbecciṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ yeɛnan Mmi-s, yeẓra belli țțadreɣ-kkun-id dima m'ara deɛɛuɣ ɣuṛ-es.
Ssutureɣ mkul ass i Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken ma yebɣa, ad afeɣ abrid amek ara n-aseɣ ɣuṛ-wen.
Acḥal i bɣiɣ a kkun-ẓreɣ, akken a kkun-slemdeɣ ɣef kra n tukciwin i d-ițțak Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen iwakken aț țǧehdem ;
yerna m'ara n-awḍeɣ ɣuṛ-wen, a nemseǧhad wway gar aneɣ ; kunwi s liman-nwen, nekk s liman-inu, imi yiwen n liman i ɣ-isdukklen.

Ay atmaten, bɣiɣ aț-țeẓrem belli acḥal n tikkal i ɛerḍeɣ a n-aseɣ ɣuṛ-wen, iwakken lxedma inu a wen-d-teglu s kra n lfayda, am akken i d-tewwi lfayda i leǧnas nniḍen ; meɛna ar tura mazal țmagareɣ-ed uguren.
Ilaq-iyi ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer yemdanen n ddunit meṛṛa, ɣer leǧnas itqeddmen akk-d wid ur netqeddem ara, ɣer wid yeɣṛan d wid ur neɣṛi ara.
Daymi i bɣiɣ ad beccṛeɣ daɣen lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ, i kunwi yellan di temdint n Ṛuma.
Ur ssetḥaɣ ara s lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ, axaṭer ț-țazmert n Sidi Ṛebbi i leslak n kra win yumnen yis ; di tazwara i wat Isṛail, a d-ḍefṛen leǧnas nniḍen.

Lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ ibeggen-ed amek i gețțarra Sidi Ṛebbi imdanen d iḥeqqiyen s liman, axaṭer s liman kan i nezmer a nuɣal d iḥeqqiyen si tazwara alamma ț-țaggara. Akken yura di tira iqedsen : Aḥeqqi ad yidir s liman.
Sidi Ṛebbi ițbeggin-ed urrif-is seg igenni ɣef ddnub d cceṛ n yemdanen i gețɣummun lḥeqq s lbaṭel ;
Ulac fell-ak ssmaḥ a win ițḥasaben wiyaḍ, axaṭer akken tebɣuḍ tiliḍ, mi tețḥasabeḍ wiyaḍ, d iman-ik i tḥusbeḍ, imi kečč i ten-ițḥasaben txeddmeḍ am nutni.
Neẓra belli Sidi Ṛebbi iḥekkem s lḥeqq ɣef wid ixeddmen lecɣal-agi.
I kečč i gețḥasaben wid ixeddmen lecɣal-agi, ma txeddmeḍ am nutni, tɣileḍ aț-țmenɛeḍ i lḥisab n Sidi Ṛebbi ?
Eɛni tḥeqṛeḍ leḥnana d ṣṣbeṛ i gesɛa Sidi Ṛebbi mbla ceḥḥa ? Ur teẓriḍ ara belli iṣebber-ak s leḥnana-s iwakken aț-țbeddleḍ tikli ?
Lameɛna kečč yesɣaṛayen ul-ik tugiḍ aț-țbeddleḍ tikli, tețheggiḍ i yiman-ik lɛiqab ameqqran i wass n lḥisab, ass i deg ara d-ibin wurrif akk-d lḥeqq n Sidi Ṛebbi
ara yerren i mkul yiwen ayen yexdem .
ad yefk tudert n dayem i wid ixeddmen lxiṛ s ṣṣbeṛ, yețnadin ɣef lɛezz d lḥeṛma akk-d tudert n dayem.
Ma d wid yellan d imcumen, ikeṛhen tideț, ixeddmen lbaṭel, a d-isseɣli fell-asen urrif ț-țwaɣit ;
a d-isseɣli daɣen ccedda ț-țwaɣit ɣef yal amdan ixeddmen cceṛ, di tazwara ɣef wat Isṛail, a d-ḍefṛen leǧnas nniḍen.
Meɛna a d-ițțunefk lɛezz d lḥeṛma akk-d lehna i kra n win ixeddmen lxiṛ, i wat Isṛail uqbel, a d-ḍefṛen leǧnas nniḍen.
?er Sidi Ṛebbi ulac lxilaf ger yemdanen.
Kra n wid ara idenben, ur nessin ara ccariɛa n Musa, asm'ara mmten ur tḥekkem ara fell-asen ; ma d win ara idenben yili yessen ccariɛa, d ccariɛa ara t-iḥasben.
Mačči d wid ismeḥsisen kan i ccariɛa i gețwaḥesben d iḥeqqiyen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, meɛna d wid i gxeddmen ayen i d-tenna.
Leǧnas ur nessin ara ccariɛa, i gxeddmen s nneya-nsen ayen i d-tenna, uɣalen d ccariɛa i yiman-nsen ɣas akken ur ț-sɛin ara.
Beggnen-d s tikli-nsen belli ayen i d-tenna ccariɛa, deg ulawen-nsen i gura. D ulawen-nsen i d-ițbegginen annect-a axaṭer axemmem nsen tikwal ițḥasab-iten, tikwal yețḥuddu fell-asen.
D annect-agi ara d-ibanen asm'ara iḥaseb Sidi Ṛebbi s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, ayen akk xeddmen yemdanen s tuffra am akken yella di lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i țbecciṛeɣ.
Kečč iḥesben iman-ik si dderya n wat Isṛail, tețțekleḍ ɣef ccariɛa n Musa, tețzuxxuḍ s Ṛebbi ;
kečč yessnen lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi, teẓriḍ d acu i gelhan imi tesneḍ ccariɛa ;
kečč i gɣilen tzemreḍ aț-țeṭṭfeḍ afus i iderɣalen, aț-țiliḍ ț-țafat n wid yellan di ṭṭlam ;
kečč iḥesben iman-ik tzemreḍ aț-țesfehmeḍ wid ur nessin, neɣ aț-țiliḍ d ccix n warrac axaṭer tufiḍ di ccariɛa n Musa tamusni akk-d țideț !
Tesselmadeḍ wiyaḍ, meɛna ur tesselmadeḍ ara iman-ik ;
tnehhuḍ wiyaḍ ur țțakren ara, kečč s yiman-ik tețțakreḍ ; tnehhuḍ wiyaḍ ur zennun ara, kečč s yiman-ik tzennuḍ ! Tkeṛheḍ ssadaț, tețțakreḍ lemqamat-nsen !
Tețzuxxuḍ s ccariɛa, meɛna tesseɣlayeḍ lqima n yisem n Sidi Ṛebbi imi ur txeddmeḍ ara ayen i d-teqqaṛ !
Axaṭer akken yura di tira iqedsen : ?ef ddemma-nwen i gețwargem yisem n Sidi Ṛebbi ger leǧnas.
Ihi d acu i sɛan n wat Isṛail sennig wiyaḍ ? D acu n nnfeɛ yellan di ṭṭhaṛa ?
Lfayda tella yerna ț-țameqqrant di mkul tama, axaṭer d nutni iwumi d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi awal-is d imezwura.
Ma yella ihi kra deg-sen ɛuṣan awal-is, eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi a ten-inkeṛ meṛṛa i lmend-nsen ?
D lmuḥal ! Sidi Ṛebbi d aḥeqqi, d imdanen kan i geskiddiben ; am akken yura di tektabt n ?abur : Iwakken a d-iban lḥeqq n wawal-ik, yerna m'ara tețḥasabeḍ, d kečč i gesɛan lḥeqq.
Ma yella lbaṭel i nxeddem isban-ed lḥeqq n Sidi Ṛebbi, d acu ara d-nini ? Eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi ur yesɛi ara lḥeqq m'ara ɣ-iɛaqeb ? ( Nniɣ-ed ayagi s lɛeqliya n wemdan. )
?-țideț yesɛa lḥeqq ! Neɣ m'ulac amek ara iḥaseb ddunit ?
Ma yella lekdeb-iw ițbeggin-ed tideț n Sidi Ṛebbi yerna isnernay di lɛaḍima-s, acuɣer ihi mazal-iyi țwaḥesbeɣ d amednub ?
Llan kra n yemdanen heddṛen fell-aɣ s ẓẓuṛ, qqaṛen belli nenna-d : « Acuɣeṛ ur nxeddem ara cceṛ iwakken a d-yeffeɣ lxiṛ ? » Imdanen am wigi uklalen lɛiqab n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Amek ihi ? Eɛni Nukni s wat Isṛail axiṛ n wiyaḍ ? Xaṭi ! Nniɣ-ed yakan belli am wat Isṛail am leǧnas nniḍen, d aklan n ddnub meṛṛa.
Akken yura di tektabt iqedsen : Ulac amdan aḥeqqi, ulac ula d yiwen,
Yiwen ur ifhim, yiwen ur yețqellib ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi, ffɣen akk i webrid, uɣalen d imejhal ;
ulac win ixeddmen lxiṛ, ulac ula d yiwen.
Imawen-nsen ldin am iẓekwan, Ilsawen-nsen d ixeddaɛen. ?čuṛen d ssem am izerman.
Imawen-nsen ččuṛen d ddeɛwat n cceṛ ț-țeṛzeg.
Iḍaṛṛen-nsen țɣawalen iwakken ad ssizlen idammen ;
ansi ɛeddan ad ǧǧen axeṣṣar d nnger di lateṛ-nsen.
Ur ssinen ara abrid n lehna ;
D acu ara d-nini ihi ɣef Sidna Ibṛahim, jeddi-tneɣ ? Amek i tedṛa yid-es ?
Lemmer yețwaḥseb d aḥeqqi s lxiṛ yexdem, tili yesɛa sebba s wayes ara izuxx, meɛna ur yezmir ara ad izuxx zdat Sidi Ṛebbi.
Akken yura di tira iqedsen : Sidna Ibṛahim yețkel ɣef Ṛebbi, daymi i gețwaḥseb d aḥeqqi .
Axeddam yuklal lexlaṣ-is, lexlaṣ ines ur s-ițwaḥseb ara d lemziya meɛna d lḥeqq-is.
Akken daɣen win ur nețkil ara ɣef lxiṛ i gxeddem, meɛna yețkel ɣef Ṛebbi i gețțarran amednub d aḥeqqi, ad yețwaḥseb d aḥeqqi ɣef ddemma n liman-is.
Akka i gessefra Sidna Dawed ɣef wemdan i gḥețțeb Sidi Ṛebbi d aḥeqqi mbla ma yemmuqel ɣer lefɛayel-is :
D iseɛdiyen wid iwumi țwasemḥent seyyat-nsen, iwumi țwamḥan ddnubat -nsen !
D aseɛdi wemdan iwumi ur iḥsib ara Sidi Ṛebbi ddnub-is !
Lfeṛḥ-agi, yella i wid iḍehṛen kan neɣ yella daɣen i wid ur neḍhiṛ-ara ? Nenna-d belli : Ṛebbi iḥseb Sidna Ibṛahim d aḥeqqi ɣef ddemma n liman-ines.
Melmi ițwaḥseb Sidna Ibṛahim d aḥeqqi, uqbel ad yeḍheṛ neɣ armi geḍheṛ ? Mačči armi geḍheṛ meɛna uqbel !

?ṭhaṛa tusa-yas-ed d țbut, d ccama i d-isbeggnen belli Sidi Ṛebbi yerra-t d aḥeqqi ɣef ddemma n liman-ines uqbel ad yeḍheṛ. S wakka Sidna Ibṛahim yuɣal d jedd n wid akk yumnen, i gețwaḥesben d iḥeqqiyen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi ɣas ur ḍhiṛen ara.
Yella daɣen d jedd n wid akk iḍehṛen, ur nețkil ara ɣef ṭṭhaṛa-nsen kan meɛna tebɛen lateṛ-is, sɛan liman i gesɛa uqbel ad yeḍheṛ.
Ayen akk i gewɛed Sidi Ṛebbi d lweṛt di ddunit i Sidna Ibṛahim akk-d dderya n dderya-s, ur s-t-iwɛid ara imi i getbeɛ ccariɛa, meɛna imi i gețkel fell-as. Daymi i t-yeḥseb Sidi Ṛebbi d aḥeqqi.
Lemmer d wid ittabaɛen ccariɛa ara iweṛten, iwumi ihi liman, iwumi lweɛd n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Axaṭer d ccariɛa i d-ițawin urrif n Ṛebbi, lemmer ulac ccariɛa ur d-tețțili ara tṛuẓi n ccariɛa.

Lweɛd i d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi i Sidna Ibṛahim, yebna ɣef liman iwakken ad yili d lemziya, ad țekkin deg-s dderya n dderya-s mačči d wid kan yessnen ccariɛa lameɛna wid akk yumnen am nețța, yuɣal d jeddi-tneɣ nukni akk s wid yumnen.
Am akken yura di Tawṛat n Sidna Musa : Sbeddeɣ-k iwakken aț-țiliḍ d jedd n waṭas n leǧnas. Yuɣal d jeddi-tneɣ zdat Ṛebbi s wayes i gumen, i d-iḥeggun lmegtin, i d-ixelqen ayen ur nelli ara.
?as akken ur d-iqqim usirem, Sidna Ibṛahim yuṛǧa s lețkal d ameqqran armi yuɣal d jedd n waṭas n yegduden akken i s-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi : Akka ara tili dderya n dderya-k.
Liman n Sidna Ibṛahim ur yenqis ara ɣas akken qṛib ad issiweḍ meyya iseggasen, iwala iman-is dayen ur yezmir ara ad isɛu dderya, yerna tameṭṭut-is Saṛa teǧǧa-ț dderya.
Yețkel ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi, ur t-yekcim ara ccekk ɣef wayen i s-yewɛed. D liman yesɛa i t-isǧehden, s wakka i gețḥemmid Sidi Ṛebbi Bab n tezmert.
Yețkel belli Sidi Ṛebbi yezmer a s-d-yefk ayen i s-yewɛed.
?ef wannect-agi i t-yeḥseb Sidi Ṛebbi d aḥeqqi.
Mačči fell-as kan i gura di tira iqedsen : Yețwaḥseb d aḥeqqi,
lameɛna fell-aɣ ula d nukni, imi numen s win i d-isseḥyan Ɛisa Ssid nneɣ si ger lmegtin.
Tura imi nuɣal d iḥeqqiyen s liman, ters-ed lehna gar-aɣ d Ṛebbi s Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Yis daɣen i nufa abrid s liman ɣer ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi i deg nella tura. Lfeṛḥ-nneɣ, d asirem nesɛa belli a nțekki di lɛaḍima n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ula di lmeḥnat, nețțili di lfeṛḥ axaṭer neẓra lmeḥna tețțawi-d ṣṣbeṛ,
ṣṣbeṛ isseǧhad deg ujeṛṛeb, lǧehd deg ujeṛṛeb ițțawi-d asirem.
Asirem-agi ulac deg-s lexdeɛ, axaṭer leḥmala n Sidi Ṛebbi teẓẓa deg ulawen-nneɣ s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i ɣ-d-yețțunefken ;
asm'akken i ɣ-iɣleb ddnub ur s-nezmir ara, Lmasiḥ yemmut ɣef ddemma n imednuben di lweqt ilaqen.
Iwɛeṛ i wemdan ad iqbel ad immet ɣef ddemma n uḥeqqi ; ahat ad yili win ara iqeblen ad immet ɣef ddemma n wemdan yelhan ;
ma d Lmasiḥ, nețța yemmut fell-aɣ m'akken nella d imednuben ; s wakka i ɣ-d-ibeggen Sidi Ṛebbi leḥmala-ines.
Imi nuɣal tura d iḥeqqiyen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi s idammen n Lmasiḥ yuzzlen fell-aɣ, yis daɣen ara nețțusellek seg urrif n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Asm'akken nella d iɛdawen-is, yefka-d Mmi-s iwakken s lmut-is a ɣ-issemṣaleḥ yid-es. Tura imi nemṣalaḥ d Sidi Ṛebbi, a nețțusellek daɣen s tudert n Mmi-s.
Mačči d ayagi kan, lameɛna tura lfeṛḥ-nneɣ atan di Sidi Ṛebbi, s Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ i ɣ-issemṣalaḥen yid-es.
S wakka ihi, ddnub ikcem-ed ɣer ddunit s yiwen wemdan, amdan agi d Adem ; ddnub-agi yewwi-d lmut, lmut tețțawi akk imdanen, axaṭer imdanen meṛṛa denben.
Uqbel a d-yefk Sidi Ṛebbi ccariɛa i Musa, ddnub yella yakan di ddunit ; meɛna imdanen ur țțuḥasben ara s ccariɛa imi urɛad i d-tusi.
?as akka, si zzman n Adem armi d zzman n Sidna Musa lmut teḥkem ula ɣef yemdanen ur nɛuṣa ara Ṛebbi am akken i t-iɛuṣa Adem, nețța yellan d lemtel n win ara d-yasen.

Ur nezmir ara a nmettel ddnub n Adem ɣer lemziya d ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi ; Adem iɛuṣa Sidi Ṛebbi yiwet n tikkelt yewwi-d lmut i yemdanen meṛṛa, acḥal ihi meqqṛet ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi i d-yețțunefken i yemdanen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Acu ara d-nini ihi ? A nkemmel a nețɛici di ddnub iwakken ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi aț-țimɣuṛ ?
Ala ! Nukni i gemmuten ɣef ddemma n ddnub, amek ara nkemmel a nețɛici deg-s ?
Neɣ ur teẓrim ara belli nukni akk i gețwaɣeḍsen iwakken a neddukel d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, nețwaɣḍeṣ yid-es di lmut-is ?
S weɣḍas, nețwamḍel yid-es iwakken, nukni daɣen a d-neḥyu akken i d-yeḥya Lmasiḥ si ger lmegtin s tezmert n Ṛebbi, a nekcem di tudert tajḍiṭ.
Axaṭer ma necrek yid-es di lmut-is, a necrek daɣen yid-es di ḥeggu-ines.
Ilaq-aɣ a nẓer belli amdan-nni i nella zik, yemmut, ițwasemmeṛ akk-d Lmasiḥ iwakken aț-țemmet lǧețța yeččuṛen d ddnub, ur nețțili ara d aklan n ddnub.
Axaṭer win yemmuten islek si ddnub,
imi nemmut akk-d Lmasiḥ, numen daɣen belli a nidir yid-es.
Neẓra belli Lmasiḥ seg wasmi i d-yeḥya si ger lmegtin, ur yețțuɣal ara ad immet, lmut ur tezmir ara aț-țeḥkem fell-as.
Axaṭer taluft n ddnub yefra-ț ɣef yiwet n tikkelt i dayem, s lmut-is. Tura atan d lḥey, idder i Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ula d kunwi ḥesbet iman-nwen am akken temmutem ɣef wayen yeɛnan ddnub. Ɛicet i Ṛebbi di tdukkli akk-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Tura ur țțaǧat ara ddnub ad iḥkem fell-awen, ur xeddmet ara ccehwat n tnefsit-nwen am zik.

Ur țțaǧat ara lemfaṣel n lǧețțat-nwen ad ɣlint di ddnub, iwakken ad ixdem yis-sen cceṛ ; lameɛna qeddmet iman-nwen i Ṛebbi am win i d-iḥyan si lmut iwakken aț-țqeddcem fell-as a ț-țxeddmem anagar lxiṛ.
Ddnub ur yețțuɣal ara ad iḥkem fell-awen axaṭer ur tellim ara seddaw n ccariɛa lameɛna seddaw n ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Acu ara d-nini ihi ? A neǧǧ ddnub ad idebbeṛ fell-aɣ tura imi nella seddaw n ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi mačči seddaw n ccariɛa ? A ɣ-imneɛ Ṛebbi deg wannect-agi !
Ur teẓrim ara belli ma tuɣalem d aklan n yiwen iwakken ad idebbeṛ fell-awen, ilaq a s-taɣem awal ama d ddnub yețțawin ɣer lmut neɣ d ṭṭaɛa n Ṛebbi yețțawin ɣer tudert taḥeqqit.
Lameɛna a neḥmed Ṛebbi imi zik tellam d aklan n ddnub, ma tura tḍuɛem s wulawen-nwen awal i tlemdem.
Tețțusellkem-d si ddnub tuɣalem d aklan n lḥeqq.

Tura a wen-d-hedṛeɣ s lɛeqliya nwen iwakken aț-țfehmem axaṭer annect-agi yewɛeṛ i lefhama. Am akken tsellmem iman-nwen zik d aklan i lɛaṛ iwakken aț-țxedmem lɛaṛ, tura sellmet iman-nwen d aklan i lḥeqq d ṣṣwab iwakken aț-țeṣfu tudert-nwen.
Asmi tellam d aklan n ddnub texḍam i lḥeqq.
Acu i trebḥem s lecɣal-nni s wayes tessetḥam tura, lecɣal-nni i gețțawin ɣer lmut.
Tura tețwaselkem si ddnub, tuɣalem d iqeddacen n Ṛebbi, lfayda nwen ț-țikli deg webrid yeṣfan akk-d tudert n dayem.
Ddnub yețțawi ɣer lmut, ma d ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi tewwi-yaɣ-d tudert n dayem di tikli-nneɣ akk-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ.
Ay atmaten ur teẓrim ara belli ccariɛa teḥkem ɣef wemdan skud mazal-it idder ? Heddṛeɣ-ed akka i wid yessnen ccariɛa.
A wen-d-fkeɣ yiwen n lemtel : tameṭṭut tețwarez ɣer wergaz-is s ccariɛa skud mazal-it yedder, meɛna ma yemmut wergaz-is tserreḥ-as ccariɛa ma tebɣa aț-țɛiwed zzwaǧ ;
ma tuɣ wayeḍ skud mazal argaz-is idder, yețțusemma tezna ; meɛna ma yemmut wergaz-is tserreḥ-as ccariɛa aț-țɛiwed zzwaǧ, ayagi ur yețțusemma ara d leḥṛam.
Ula d kunwi ay atmaten, temmutem ɣef wayen yeɛnan ccariɛa s lmut n Lmasiḥ, akken aț-țeṭṭfem deg win i d-yeḥyan si ger lmegtin iwakken aț-țxedmem ayen i s-iɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi.
Axaṭer d ccariɛa i d-isbeggnen amek i nțeddu s lebɣi n tnefsit-nneɣ d ccehwat-nneɣ n diri ; d nețțat daɣen i d-isbeggnen amek yexdem ddnub-agi deg-nneɣ, armi i ɣ-yeṣṣaweḍ ɣer lmut.

Lameɛna tura nețțusellek si lḥekma n ccariɛa imi nețțusemma nemmut ɣef wayen yeɛnan ccariɛa nni i ɣ-yurzen, s wakka i nezmer tura a nḍuɛ Sidi Ṛebbi s lɛeqliya tajḍiṭ n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, mačči am zik s lɛeqliya-nni taqdimt mi nella seddaw n ccariɛa.

Acu ara d-nini ihi, eɛni ccariɛa deg-s ddnub ? Xaṭi ! Lameɛna lemmer ulac ccariɛa tili ur țissineɣ ara d acu i d ddnub. Axaṭer lemmer ur d-tenni ara ccariɛa : ur ṭṭamaɛ ara , tilli ur ẓriɣ ara belli ṭṭmeɛ d leḥṛam ?
Ddnub ifuṛes tagniț s lameṛ n ccariɛa ; yesnulfa-d deg-i mkul ṣṣenf n ṭṭmeɛ n diri ; axaṭer mbla ccariɛa ur d-ițban ara d acu i d ddnub.
Zik, asmi ulac ccariɛa lliɣ țɛiciɣ s nneya, mi d-iffeɣ lameṛ n ccariɛa, ddnub yuki-d deg-i, yeṣṣaweḍ-iyi ɣer lmut.
S wakka, lameṛ i glaqen ad iyi-ssiweḍ ɣer tudert, yewwi-yi ɣer lmut
axaṭer ddnub yufa abrid, s lameṛ-agi n ccariɛa dɣa ixdeɛ-iyi, yewwi-yi ɣer lmut.
Ihi, ccariɛa s yiman-is teṣfa, lumuṛat yellan deg-s ṣfan, lhan yerna d lḥeqq.
Eɛni yuɣal-iyi wayen yelhan d sebba n lmut ? Xaṭi ! D ddnub i yi-ṣṣawḍen ɣer lmut s wayen yelhan, iwakken s ccariɛa, a d-tban acḥal meqqṛet tezmert n ddnub.
Neẓra belli ccariɛa n Musa tețțunefk-ed s Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi. Ma d nekk, d amdan kan i lliɣ yerna imlek-iyi ddnub.
Ur ẓriɣ ara acu i xeddmeɣ, ayen bɣiɣ a t-xedmeɣ ur t-xeddmeɣ ara lameɛna d ayen akken keṛheɣ i xeddmeɣ.
Ma yella ayen i xeddmeɣ d ayen akken ur bɣiɣ ara a t-xedmeɣ, tḥeqqeqeɣ belli ccariɛa telha.
Tura ihi mačči d nekk i gxeddmen ayagi, meɛna d ddnub izedɣen deg-i.
Axaṭer ẓriɣ belli ayen yelhan ur yezdiɣ ara deg-i nekk yellan d amdan. ?as akken yebɣa wul-iw ad ixdem lxiṛ, nekk ur zmireɣ ara a t-xedmeɣ,
axaṭer ur xeddmeɣ ara lxiṛ i bɣiɣ, meɛna d cceṛ ur bɣiɣ ara i xeddmeɣ ;
ma yella xeddmeɣ ayen ur bɣiɣ ara ihi mačči d nekk i t-ixeddmen meɛna d ddnub-nni izedɣen deg-i.
Ihi atan wayen fehmeɣ deg yiman-iw : mkul m'ara bɣuɣ ad xedmeɣ lxiṛ ad afeɣ d cceṛ kan iwumi zemreɣ.
Deg ul-iw ḥemmleɣ ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi,
meɛna țțafeɣ deg yiman-iw yiwet n ṭṭbiɛa yețnaɣen d ccariɛa n Ṛebbi i gḥemmel wul-iw ; ṭṭbiɛa-yagi terra-yi seddaw lḥekma n ddnub yellan deg-i.
A nnger-iw ! Anwa ara yi sellken si ṭṭbiɛa-agi n wemdan i yi-țțawin ɣer lmut ?
A neḥmed Sidi Ṛebbi imi s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ i nețțusellek ! S wakka ihi, s lefhama-inu, ḍuɛeɣ ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi, meɛna s ṭṭbiɛa n wemdan yellan deg-i, d akli n ddnub i lliɣ.
Ihi ass n lḥisab ulac lɛiqab ɣef wid yumnen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Axaṭer tazmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, tin i d-ifkan tudert i wid yumnen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, tsellek-iyi-d si tezmert n ddnub akk-d lmut.

Ccariɛa n Musa ur tezmir ara aț-țeɣleb ddnub axaṭer ṭṭbiɛa-nneɣ tekkes-as tazmert. Ayen akken ur tezmir ara ccariɛa n Musa a t texdem, d ayen i gexdem Sidi Ṛebbi mi d-iceggeɛ Mmi-s s ṣṣifa n wemdan, i d-yusan s lǧețța am tin n yemdanen yellan meṛṛa d imednuben, iwakken ad yefk iman-is d asfel s wayes ara yeḥkem ɣef ddnub i ten-izedɣen.
S wakka ihi ara yețwakkemmel deg-nneɣ wayen i d-tenna ccariɛa n Musa, nukni yețɛicin s tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen mačči s ṭṭbiɛa-nneɣ.
Wid yețɛicin s ṭṭbiɛa n wemdan țqelliben kan ɣef wayen yeɛnan lebɣi n wemdan, ma d wid ițɛicin s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen țqelliben ɣef wayen yeɛnan lebɣi n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
Wid ițɛicin s ṭṭbiɛa n wemdan țeddun ɣer lmut, ma d wid ițɛicin s lebɣi n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen țeddun ɣer tudert d lehna.
Axaṭer wid ittabaɛen lebɣi n wemdan uɣalen d iɛdawen n Sidi Ṛebbi imi ur ḍuɛen ara ccariɛa-ines, axaṭer ṭṭbiɛa n wemdan ur tezmir ara aț-țḍuɛ ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Wid temlek ṭṭbiɛa-nsen ulamek ara ɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ma d kunwi mačči s ṭṭbiɛa n wemdan i tețțeddum lameɛna tețțeddum s lebɣi n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen axaṭer Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi izdeɣ deg-wen. Win deg ur yezdiɣ ara Ṛṛuḥ n Lmasiḥ ur yelli ara d ayla-s.
Ma yella Ṛṛuḥ n Lmasiḥ deg-wen, ɣas akken lǧețța-nwen aț-țemmet ɣef ddemma n ddnub, ṛṛuḥ-nwen ad yidir ɣef ddemma n lḥeqq n Sidi Ṛebbi.

Ma yezdeɣ deg-wen Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi i d-yesseḥyan Sidna Ɛisa si ger lmegtin, win i d-yesseḥyan Sidna Ɛisa si ger lmegtin, yezmer daɣen s Ṛṛuḥ-is izedɣen deg-wen, a d-yerr tudert i lǧețța-nwen ara yemten.
S wakka ihi ay atmaten lebɣi n ṭṭbiɛa-nneɣ ur yeṭebbiṛ ara fell-aɣ tura iwakken a nexdem lebɣi-ines.
Ma yella tɛacem s lebɣi n ṭṭbiɛa nwen atan aț-țemtem, lameɛna ma tɣelbem lebɣi n ṭṭbiɛa-nwen s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, aț-țidirem.
Axaṭer wid ițeddun s Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi, d nutni i d arraw n Ṛebbi.
Ṛṛuḥ i wen-d-ițțunefken mačči d Ṛṛuḥ ara kkun-irren d aklan iwakken aț-țɛicem di tugdi, meɛna d Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i kkun-irran d arraw n Ṛebbi, yis i nezmer a nessiwel i Sidi Ṛebbi : « A baba-tneɣ ! »
D Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi s yiman-is i d-iḥeqqeqen deg wulawen-nneɣ belli nuɣal d arraw n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ihi ma yella d arraw-is i nella, d nukni daɣen ara iweṛten : a newṛet ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi nukni akk-d Lmasiḥ, axaṭer ma nenɛețțab yid-es, a nili daɣen yid-es di lɛaḍima-ines.
Ihi leɛtab i nesɛedday tura, ur nezmir ara a t-nmettel ɣer lɛaḍima ara d-ibeggen Sidi Ṛebbi deg-nneɣ.
Taxelqit meṛṛa tḥar melmi ara d-banen warraw n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Axaṭer taxelqit teɣli seddaw leḥkum n lbaṭel, mačči s lebɣi-ines, lameɛna s lebɣi n win i ț-yesseɣlin.
Meɛna taxelqit-agi tessaram aț-țețwasellek si twaɣit i ț-isfesden, iwakken aț-țekki di lɛaḍima n tlelli n warraw n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Neẓra tura belli taxelqit meṛṛa tenɛețțab, tețnazaɛ am tmeṭṭut yeṭṭfen addud.

Mačči ț-țaxelqit kan, meɛna ula d nukni yesɛan Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, yellan d amur amezwaru n tikciwin i ɣ-d-iwɛed Sidi Ṛebbi, nețnazaɛ deg iman-nneɣ, nețṛaǧu a nban s tideț d arraw n Ṛebbi i nella m'ara icafeɛ deg-nneɣ s lekmal.
Axaṭer leslak nneɣ d ayen i nessaram ; ma yella nesɛa ayen i nessaram, ayagi mačči d asirem : anwa ara yessirmen ayen yesɛa ?
Meɛna ma nessaram ayen ur nesɛi, nețṛaǧu-t s ṣṣbeṛ.

Akken daɣen Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ițțas-ed a ɣ iɛiwen nukni ixuṣṣen di tezmert, axaṭer ur nessin ara a neẓẓal akken ilaq ; lameɛna Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen s yiman-is ideɛɛu ɣer Ṛebbi ɣef ddemma-nneɣ, s nnehtat iwumi ur yezmir yimi a tent-id-yini s imeslayen ;
imiren Sidi Ṛebbi yessnen ulawen, yeẓra d acu i gessutur Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, imi s lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi i gdeɛɛu ɣef wid yextaṛ.
Neẓra belli Sidi Ṛebbi issufuɣ ɣer lxiṛ ayen akk i d-ideṛṛun d wid i t-iḥemmlen, wid yextaṛ s lebɣi-ines.
Axaṭer wid akk i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi si zik, iqsed si tazwara a ten-yerr am Mmi-s iwakken Mmi-s agi ad yili d amenzu n waṭas n watmaten.
Wid i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi si zik, d wid iwumi i d-issawel ; wid-nni iwumi yessawel yerra-ten d iḥeqqiyen zdat-es, wid yerra d iḥeqqiyen yefka-yasen amkan di lɛaḍima-s.
Acu ara d-nernu ihi ? Anwa ara ɣ-izemren ma yella Sidi Ṛebbi yid-nneɣ ?
Nețța iqeblen ad isebbel Mmi-s eɛzizen, yefka-t d asfel fell-aɣ meṛṛa, amek ur ɣ-d-yețțak ara daɣen kullec yid-es ?
Anwa ara icetkin ɣef wid yextaṛ Ṛebbi ? D Sidi Ṛebbi s yiman-is i ten-iḥesben d iḥeqqiyen !
Anwa i gzemren ad iḥkem fell asen ? Ɛisa Lmasiḥ d win yemmuten yerna iḥya-d si ger lmegtin, yuli ɣer tama tayeffust n Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken ad icafeɛ fell-aɣ !
Anwa i gzemren a ɣ-ifṛeq ɣef leḥmala n Lmasiḥ ? Eɛni d ddiq neɣ d ccedda, d leqheṛ neɣ d laẓ, d leɛra neɣ d ayen yessaggaden neɣ d ajenwi ?
A wen-d-iniɣ tideț, nekk iteddun deg ubrid n Lmasiḥ, ur skiddibeɣ ara ; lxaṭer-iw icehhed-d ɣef wayagi s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i yi-sedduyen :
leḥzen d uɣilif zgan deg ul-iw.
Zemreɣ ad qebleɣ ad țțuneɛleɣ neɣ ad țțuḥeṛṛmeɣ ɣef Lmasiḥ ɣef ddemma n watmaten-iw akk-d lumma-inu ;
nutni at Isṛail i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi d agdud-is yefka-yasen-d lɛaḍima, yexdem yid-sen leɛqud, yefka-yasen-d ccariɛa d wamek ara t-ɛebden, yerna-yasen-d lemɛahdat.

Seg-sen i d-ffɣen lejdud-nneɣ i gellan d iqeddacen imezwura n Sidi Ṛebbi, ula d Lmasiḥ seg-sen i d-iffeɣ mi d-ilul s ṣṣifa n wemdan, nețța i gellan sennig kra yellan, d Illu yețwaḥemden i dayem. Amin !
Acu ara d-nini ? Sidi Ṛebbi yendem deg wawal-is ? Xaṭi ! Meɛna mačči d wid meṛṛa i d-ilulen seg jeddi-tneɣ Isṛail i gellan n wat Isṛail i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Daɣen mačči d wid meṛṛa i d-yeǧǧa Sidna Ibṛahim i gellan d arraw-is n tideț, axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi inna-yas-d : Seg Isḥaq ara d-teffeɣ dderya i k-weɛdeɣ.
S wakka ihi nezmer ad ini mačči d dderya i d ilulen s lebɣi n wemdan ara ițțusemmin d arraw n Sidi Ṛebbi meɛna anagar wid i d-ilulen s lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi akken i t-id-yewɛed.
Axaṭer atnan imeslayen s wayes i gɛuhed Sidi Ṛebbi : A d-uɣaleɣ aseggas i d-iteddun di lweqt-agi, ?ara a d-tesɛu aqcic.
Mačči d ayagi kan : arraw n Rbiḥa daɣen i gellan d akniwen, sɛan yiwen n baba-tsen yellan d jeddi-tneɣ Isḥaq.

Meɛna imi Sidi Ṛebbi ițextiri imdanen mačči ɣef ddemma n lecɣal-nsen meɛna akken yella lebɣi-s d usiwel-ines ; mazal urɛad i d-lulen warraw n Rbiḥa, ur xdimen cceṛ, ur xdimen lxiṛ, mi s-d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi : Amenzu deg warraw-im ad yuɣal d aqeddac ɣef wumecṭuḥ.
Akken i gura daɣen deg umkan nniḍen n tira iqedsen : ?emmleɣ Yeɛqub, keṛheɣ Icaw.
D acu ara d-nini deg wannect-a ? Eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi ixeddem lbaṭel ? D lmuḥal !
Axaṭer yenna-yas i Sidna Musa : A d-sserseɣ ṛṛeḥma-inu ɣef win i bɣiɣ, ad ḥunneɣ daɣen ɣef win i bɣiɣ.
Lbaṛaka n Sidi Ṛebbi ur d-tețțas ara s lefɛayel n wemdan ama yuzzel ama yeqqim meɛna kullec yețțas-ed s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi i d-yețțaken ṛṛeḥma ines akken yebɣa.
Anda nniḍen di tira iqedsen Sidi Ṛebbi yenna i Ferɛun agellid n Maṣer : Sbeddeɣ-k d agellid ameqqran iwakken a d-sbeggneɣ tazmert-iw deg-ek, s wakka di ddunit meṛṛa ad issinen belli d nekk i d Illu.
Akka ihi, Sidi Ṛebbi yesrusu-d ṛṛeḥma-s ɣef win yebɣa, isɣaṛay daɣen ul n win yebɣa.
Ahat ad yili win ara d-yinin : imi akka i gella lḥal, acu i mazal ițlumu deg-nneɣ ? Anwa i gzemren a t-iɛaṣi ?
I kečč ay amdan ur nesɛi azal, d acu i tḥesbeḍ iman-ik iwakken aț-țḥasbeḍ Sidi Ṛebbi ? Eɛni tacmuxt ițwameslen s wakal tezmer aț-țini i win i ț-imeslen acuɣer i yi-tmesleḍ s ṣṣifa-yagi ?
Win imesslen afexxaṛ yezmer ad ixdem ayen i s-ihwan s wakal ; seg wakal-nni yezmer ad imsel tacmuxt izewqen neɣ tin i sseqdacen kull ass.
Eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi ur yezmir ara a d-ibeggen urrif-is akk-d tezmert-is ? Iɣaḍ-ik lḥal ma yella yeṣber s ṣṣber ameqqran i wid yuklalen urrif-is yerna teddun ɣer nnger ?
Deg wannect-agi, Sidi Ṛebbi yebɣa a d-isbeggen acḥal meqqṛet tmanegt-is i nukni i ɣef iḥunn, i ghegga si zik iwakken a nili yid-es di tmanegt-is ;
nukni iwumi i d-yessawel Sidi Ṛebbi mačči seg wat Isṛail kan, meɛna ula si ger leǧnas nniḍen ;
akken i t-id-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi di tektabt n nnbi Hucaɛ : Lǧens-nni ur nelli ara d agdud-iw a s-semmiɣ agdud-iw, win akken ur nețwaḥemmel ara a s-semmiɣ win eɛzizen fell-i.
Anda akken i sen-qqaṛen : « Ur tellim ara d agdud n Sidi Ṛebbi», dinna ara țțusemmin d arraw n Sidi Ṛebbi yeddren.
Si lǧiha-s, nnbi Iceɛya icar-ed ɣef wayen yeɛnan agdud n wat Isṛail : ?as ad ketṛen wat Isṛail am ṛṛmel ɣef yiri n lebḥeṛ, kra deg-sen kan ara yețțuselken.
Ay atmaten, ayen i țmenniɣ deg ul-iw, d leslak n wat Isṛail meṛṛa, acḥal i ssutreɣ di Ṛebbi ɣef ddemma-nsen iwakken ad țțuselken.
Axaṭer zemreɣ ad cehdeɣ fell-asen belli ẓewṛen, bɣan ad ɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi meɛna txuṣṣ-iten tmusni.
Imi ur ḥsiben ara lḥeqq i d yețțasen s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi yerna țnadin ad sbedden lḥeqq-nsen iman-nsen, ur ḍuɛen ara lḥeqq i d-yețțasen s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi ;
axaṭer Lmasiḥ, d nețța i ț-țaggara n ccariɛa, i d lḥeqq n wid yumnen meṛṛa.
Atah wayen yura Sidna Musa ɣef lḥeqq i d-ițekken si ccariɛa : Amdan ara ixedmen ayen i d-tenna ccariɛa, ad yidir yis.
Lameɛna atah wamek ițmeslay lḥeqq i d-ițasen si liman : ur qqaṛ ara deg ul-inek anwa ara yalin ɣer igenni ; amakken Lmasiḥ ur d-iṣubb ara syenna
Neɣ anwa ara iṣubben ɣer laxeṛt ? amakken ur d-yeḥyi ara Lmasiḥ si ger lmegtin .
Acu i d teqqaṛ ihi ? Awal n tudert atan ɣuṛ-ek, deg imi-k d wul-ik . Awal-agi d awal n liman, d awal i nețbecciṛ.
Ma tcehdeḍ s yimi-k belli Sidna Ɛisa d Ssid-ik, ma tumneḍ deg wul-ik belli Sidi Ṛebbi isseḥya-t-id si ger lmegtin, atan aț-țețțuselkeḍ.
Axaṭer ma yella tumneḍ seg wul, Sidi Ṛebbi a k-iḥseb d aḥeqqi ; ma tcehdeḍ s yimi-k aț-țețțuselkeḍ.
Akken i t-id-nnant tira iqedsen : Kra n win yumnen yis weṛǧin ad inneḥcam.
Ihi ulac lxilaf ger wat Isṛail akk-d wid ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail ; imi yiwen n Ṛebbi i gellan, ṭṭfen meṛṛa deg-s, nețța i d-yețțaken mbla ceḥḥa i wid akk ineddhen ɣuṛ-es.
Akken yura : Kra win ara yedɛun s yisem-is ad ițțusellek.
Amek ara dɛun ɣuṛ-es ma yella ur uminen ara yis ? Amek ara amnen ma yella ur slin ara yis ? Amek daɣen ara slen yis ma ulac win i sen-ihedṛen fell-as ?
Amek ara yilin wid ara d-ihedṛen fell-as ma yella ur țțuceggɛen ara ? Akken yura di tira iqedsen : Acḥal yelha m'ara nwali teddun-d ɣuṛ-nneɣ wid ițbecciṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
Lameɛna ur qbilen ara meṛṛa lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ. Nnbi Iceɛya yenna daɣen : A Sidi, anwa i gumnen s wayen i nberreḥ ?
S wakka liman ițțas-ed seg wayen i nsell yeɛnan awal n Lmasiḥ.
Lameɛna ma nenna-d : ahat ur slin ara ? Atah wayen yuran : ?ṣut-nsen inuda ddunit meṛṛa, lehduṛ-nsen wwḍen ɣer ixfawen n ddunit.

Nezmer a d-nini : ahat ur ẓrin ara wat Isṛail ? Lameɛna d Musa i d-ixebbṛen d amezwaru s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi mi d-yenna : A wen-d-ssekkreɣ tismin ɣef win ur nelli ara d agdud ; a kkun-id-yas wurrif ɣef wegdud ur nesɛi lefhama.
Nnbi Iceɛya yessaweḍ armi genna : Ufan-iyi wid ur nennuda ara fell-i, sbeggneɣ-d iman-iw i wid ur nqelleb ara ad iyi-ssinen.
Meɛna ɣef wat Isṛail yenna : ?elqeɣ ifassen-iw ṭul n wass ɣer wegdud i yi-ixulfen, i yi-iɛuṣan.
Ad iniɣ : eɛni Sidi Ṛebbi inkeṛ agdud-is ? Xaṭi ! Imi nekk s yiman-iw n wat Isṛail, si dderya n Sidna Ibṛahim, seg wedrum n Benyamin.
Sidi Ṛebbi ur yenkiṛ ara agdud-is i gextaṛ si zik. Ur teẓrim ara d acu i d-qqaṛent tira iqedsen, asmi i geccetka nnbi Ilyas i Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef wat Isṛail ? Yenna :
A Sidi Ṛebbi ! Nɣan lenbiya i d ceggɛeḍ, hudden idekkanen anda i k-d-țqeddimen lɣaci iseflawen, anagar nekk i d yeqqimen yerna țnadin a yi-nɣen !
Lameɛna atah wamek i s-d-yerra Sidi Ṛebbi : Xtaṛ-aɣ-ed i yiman-iw sebɛa alaf n yergazen ur nseǧǧed ara zdat lmeṣnuɛ Baɛl.
Akka daɣen, di lweqt-agi i deg nella tura, llan kra seg wat Isṛail i geṭṭfen deg-s, d wid i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, s ṛṛeḥma-ines.
Mačči ɣef ddemma n lefɛayel-nsen i ten-yextaṛ meɛna s ṛṛeḥma-ines. Neɣ m'ulac ma yella s lefɛayel i gțextiṛi Sidi Ṛebbi, ṛṛeḥma-ines ur tețțusemma ara d ṛṛeḥma.
Amek ihi ? Ayen i nudan wat Isṛail ur t-wwiḍen ara, anagar wid i gextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi i t-yewwḍen ; ma d wiyaḍ qquṛen wulawen-nsen.
Akken yura di tektabt iqedsen : Sidi Ṛebbi yeqfel lɛeqliya-nsen, allen-nsen ur țwalint ara, i meẓẓuɣen-nsen ur sellen ara, ar ass-agi.
Ula d Sidna Dawed yenna : Imensi n tmeɣṛiwin-nsen a sen-yuɣal ț-țasraft anda ara ɣlin, d acebbak ara d-yesseɣlin. fell-asen lɛiqab uklalen
A d-yeɣli ṭṭlam ɣef wallen-nsen iwakken ur țwalin ara, lqedd-nsen ad yeknu i dayem !
Acu ara d-iniɣ ihi ? Eɛni at Isṛail ɣlin iwakken ur țțuɣalen ara a d kkren ? Xaṭi ! Lameɛna s tuccḍa-nsen i wwḍen leǧnas nniḍen ɣer leslak. D annect-agi i d-issekkren tismin i wat Isṛail.

Ma yella tuccḍa-nsen tesserbeḥ at ddunit, teṣṣaweḍ-iten ɣer leslak, ma yella lexsaṛa-nsen tewwi-d rrbeḥ i yegduden nniḍen, ihi acḥal meqqṛet lbaṛaka ara d-iffɣen seg-sen m'ara d-uɣalen ɣer webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, iwakken ad țțuselken.
Nekk i d-ițwaceggɛen d ṛṛasul i leǧnas ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, fkiɣ aṭas n lqima i ccɣel-agi i yi-d ițțunefken
iwakken ma yella wamek, a d ssekkreɣ tismin i watmaten-iw n wat Isṛail, ahat ad țțuselken kra deg-sen.
Axaṭer ma yella aɛzal n wat Isṛail isemṣalaḥ leǧnas nniḍen akk-d Sidi Ṛebbi, acu ara yedṛun ihi m'ara d-uɣalen nutni ɣer webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi ? Ad yili am akken d ḥeggu i d-ḥyan si ger lmegtin !
Ma yella awren i tețqeddimem i Sidi Ṛebbi yeṣfa, ula d arukti yeṣfa ; ma yella izuṛan n ttejṛa ṣeḥḥan, ifurkawen daɣen ad ilin ṣeḥḥan.

Akka i tedṛa d wat Isṛail : kra n tṣedwa țwagezment si tzemmurt, kečč a win ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, yellan d aḥeccad, tețwaleqmeḍ deg umkan-nsent ; ma yella tețțekkiḍ deg izuṛan n tzemmurt d zzit-is,
ur ilaq ara aț-țḥeqṛeḍ tiseḍwa-nni yețwagezmen. ?ader iman-ik ɣef zzux, axaṭer mačči d kečč i geṭṭfen aẓar meɛna d aẓar i k-iṭṭfen.
A d-tiniḍ ihi : « țwagezment kra n tṣedwa iwakken ad țțuleqmeɣ nekkini ».
Ayagi ț-țideț ; nutni țwagezmen axaṭer ur uminen ara, ma d kečč teṭṭfeḍ amkan-nsen imi tumneḍ. ?ader iman-ik ɣef zzux, aggad Sidi Ṛebbi axiṛ-ik !
Axaṭer akken i gegzem tiseḍwa n laṣel n tzemmurt iwakken a k-ileqqem fell-as, i gezmer a k-igzem ula d kečč.
Meyyez ihi acḥal ḥnin Sidi Ṛebbi, acḥal daɣen yewɛeṛ : yewɛeṛ ɣer wid yeɣlin, ma d kečč d aḥnin ɣuṛ-ek ma teṭṭfeḍ di leḥnana-ines, neɣ m'ulac aț-țețwagezmeḍ ula d kečč.
Ula d at Isṛail m'ur kemmlen ara di leǧhel-nsen, zemren ad țțuleqmen, axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yezmer a ten ileqqem, a ten-yerr ɣer tzemmurt nsen.

A kkun-nhuɣ ihi ay atmaten s ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken aț-țsebblem lǧețțat-nwen d leɛqliya nwen am wesfel yeddren, zeddigen, yeṣfan ara iɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi ; ț-țagi i d ṭṭaɛa i gețṛaǧu deg-wen Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ur țɛanadet ara lǧil-agi n tura, meɛna ǧǧet Sidi Ṛebbi ad ibeddel ixemmimen-nwen d lɛeqliya-nwen iwakken aț-țissinem lebɣi-ines : ayen yelhan, ayen yeṣfan ur nesɛi lɛib, d wayen akk i t-iɛeǧben.
S ṛṛeḥma i yi-d-ițțunefken, a d iniɣ i mkul yiwen deg-wen : ur ssimɣuṛet ara iman-nwen, sqenɛet s wakken tellam, ddut s neyya ɣef leḥsab n liman i wen-d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi.
Am akken nesɛa aṭas n lemfaṣel di lǧețța-nneɣ, meɛna mkul yiwen si lemfaṣel-nni s lxedma-ines,
akken daɣen nukni, ɣas deg waṭas yid-nneɣ i nella, s tdukli-nneɣ nețțili d yiwet n lǧețța di Lmasiḥ, aql-aɣ meṛṛa d lemfaṣel wway gar-aneɣ, wa yeḥwaǧ wayeḍ.
Lameɛna di ṛṛeḥma-ines, Sidi Ṛebbi yefka-yaɣ-d tukciwin yemxalafen : ilaq yal yiwen ad ixdem ayen i s-d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi, akken ilaq, s wul d liman :
ama d axebbeṛ s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, ama d leqdic,
ama d aselmed, neɣ d nehhu. Ilaq daɣen win ițseddiqen, ad iseddeq mbla ṭṭmeɛ, win ițdebbiṛen ad idebbeṛ s ṣṣwab, win ițḥunnun ɣef yimeɣban ilaq ad iḥunn fell-asen s wul-is.
Ur seɛɛut ara sin wudmawen, ḥemmlet s wul yeṣfan, keṛhet cceṛ, ṭṭfet deg wayen yelhan.
Sɛut daymen leqdeṛ wway gar-awen ; sɛut leḥnana, myeḥmalet s leḥmala n tegmaț.
Qedcet ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi s wulawen-nwen d wayen yellan di tezmert-nwen, ẓewṛet, ur țțilit ara d imeɛdazen.
Feṛḥet ɣef ddemma n usirem i tesɛam, sɛut ṣṣbeṛ di tegniț n ccedda, deɛɛut dayem ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, ur ḥebbset ara.
Ɛiwnet atmaten-nwen di liman deg wayen uḥwaǧen, sṭerḥbet s lfeṛḥ s wid i d-yețțasen ɣuṛ-wen.
Dɛut s lxiṛ i wid i kkun ițqehhiṛen, deɛɛut s lxiṛ, ur deɛɛut ara s cceṛ ;
feṛḥet d wid ifeṛḥen, țrut d win yețrun.
Ur xeddmet ara lxilaf wway-gar awen, ur ssimɣuṛet ara iman-nwen meɛna ddut s wannuz, ur ḥețbet ara iman-nwen d wid yesnen.
Ur țțarrat ara țțaṛ seg wid i kkun-iḍuṛṛen, nadit ɣef wayen yelhan zdat yemdanen meṛṛa.
Ma yella wamek ara d-tekk s ɣuṛ-wen lehna, ilit di lehna akk-d yemdanen meṛṛa.

Ur țțarrat ara țțaṛ ay imeɛzuzen, lameɛna ǧǧet kullec ger ifassen n Sidi Ṛebbi, d nețța ara ixedmen ccɣel-is. Atah wayen yuran di tira iqedsen : D nekk ara yerren țțaṛ, ara yerren i mkul yiwen ayen yukla l, i d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi .
Yura daɣen : Ma yelluẓ weɛdaw-ik efk-as ad yečč, ma yeffud efk-as ad isew, axaṭer ma txedmeḍ akka , am akken ț-țirgin iṛeqqen ara tesserseḍ ɣef wuqeṛṛuy-is.
Ur țțaǧa ara cceṛ ad iṭṭef amkan deg ul-ik iwakken ad ixdem lebɣi-s, lameɛna eɣleb cceṛ s lxiṛ.
Mkul amdan, ilaq ad iqadeṛ imdebbṛen i gḥekkmen tamurt i deg yețɛici, axaṭer d Sidi Ṛebbi i d-iǧǧan lḥekma di ddunit, d nețța daɣen i gebɣan aț-țuɣal lḥekma-agi ɣer yifassen n yemdanen.
S wakka ihi, win ara ixalfen lḥekma i gesbedd Sidi Ṛebbi, d lameṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi i gɛuṣa, d lɛiqab kan ara d-isseɣli ɣef yiman-is.
Mačči d wid ixeddmen lxiṛ ara yaggaden imdebbṛen n lḥukuma meɛna d wid ixeddmen cceṛ. M'ur tebɣiḍ ara aț-țaggaḍeḍ lḥukuma, xdem ayen yelhan, a k-fken lehna.

Axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yefka-d lḥukuma i nnfeɛ-inek, meɛna ma txedmeḍ cceṛ, ɣas aggad-iț axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yefka i lḥukkam tazmert s wayes ara k-ɛaqben s lmut. Lḥukkam agi qeddcen ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken a d-sbanen urrif-is m'ara ɛaqben wid ixeddmen cceṛ.
?ef wayagi, ilaq-aɣ a nḍuɛ imdebbṛen n lḥukuma, mačči ɣef ddemma n lɛiqab kan meɛna i lmend n lxaṭer-nneɣ.
Daymi daɣen i glaq aț-țxelṣem tabzert i lḥukuma, axaṭer wid ițdebbiṛen deg wannect-agi, xeddmen ccɣel-nsen akken i t-id yenna Sidi Ṛebbi.
Rret i mkul yiwen ayen i wen-ițțalas : xellṣet tabzert i kra win i wen-ițțalasen, aggadet win i glaq a t-taggadem, qadṛet win i glaq a t-tqadṛem.
?uṛ-wat a wen-ițalas yiwen lḥaǧa anagar leḥmala n wway gar-awen, axaṭer win iḥemmlen wiyaḍ, ixdem ayen akk i d-tenna ccariɛa.

Axaṭer lumuṛat n ccariɛa i d yeqqaṛen : Ur txeddmeḍ ara lɛaṛ, ur tneqqeḍ ara, ur tețțakreḍ ara, ur teṭṭamaɛeḍ ara , akk-d lumuṛ nniḍen meṛṛa nnejmaɛen deg yiwen n lameṛ-agi : Ilaq aț-țḥemleḍ wiyaḍ am yiman-ik .
Win yesɛan leḥmala deg wul-is ur ițḍuṛṛu ara wiyaḍ, ihi win iḥemmlen wiyaḍ, yexdem ayen akk i d-tenna ccariɛa.
Imi teẓram d acu n lweqt i deg nella, tura yewweḍ-ed lawan i deg ara d-akim si nuddam axaṭer ass n leslak iqeṛṛeb-ed ɣuṛ-nneɣ akteṛ n wass amezwaru i deg numen.
Qṛib ad yekfu yiḍ, ițeddu ad yali wass, a ndeggeṛ akkin ɣef yiman-nneɣ lexdayem n ṭṭlam, a nerfed leslaḥ s wayes ara neddu di tafat.
A nelḥu ɛinani s tezdeg akk-d ṣṣfa, di tafat n wass ; xḍut i ssikṛan d ccehwat, i leɛdez d lexdayem icemten, i čaqlalat ț-țismin.
Meɛna elset tudert tajḍiṭ i gellan di Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, ur țțaǧat ara iman-nwen a kkun-yawi ṭṭmeɛ n lebɣi n tnefsit-nwen.
Qeblet gar-awen win ur neǧhid ara di liman, ur kkatet ara deg-s ma ixuṣṣ di lefhama.
Axaṭer yiwen yumen belli yezmer ad yečč kullec, wayeḍ ixuṣṣen di liman ițkukru, itețț kan lxedṛa.
Win itețțen kullec ur ilaq ara ad iḥqeṛ win ur ntețț ara, win ur ntețț ara ur ilaq ara daɣen ad iḥaseb win itețțen, axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi iqbel-it akken yella.

D acu-k kečč iwakken aț-țḥasbeḍ aqeddac n wayeḍ ? Ma yella ixdem ccɣel-is neɣ yeqqim, ayagi d ccɣel n umɛellem-is ! Meɛna ad ibedd ɣer ccɣel-is, axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yesɛa tazmert iwakken a t-iṭṭef ur iɣelli ara.
