nekk yellan d ulac ger imasiḥiyen meṛṛa, yețțunefk-iyi-d s ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi ad beccṛeɣ i wid ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail, lexbaṛ n lxiṛ yeɛnan lbaṛakat ur nkeffu yellan di Lmasiḥ
yerna a d-sfehmeɣ lmeɛna n lbaḍna agi i geffer Sidi Ṛebbi si lebda, nețța i gxelqen kullec.
S wakka, lḥekmat ț-țnezmarin n igenwan ad issinent tamusni n Sidi Ṛebbi di mkul ṣṣifat-ines, s tejmaɛt n imasiḥiyen
akken yella di leqsed n Sidi Ṛebbi si lebda ; leqsed-agi yessaweḍ-it ɣer lekmal-is s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ.
S liman-nneɣ di Sidna Ɛisa i nezmer a nqeṛṛeb ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi s lețkal.
Daymi i wen-qqaṛeɣ tura : ur țțaǧat ara uguren i d-țmagareɣ ɣef ddemma-nwen a kkun-sfeclen axaṭer d ayen ara kkun-iqeṛṛben ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ɣef wayagi i kerfeɣ tigecrar, seǧǧdeɣ zdat Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ,
seg i d-tekka yal tawacult yellan ama deg igenwan ama di lqaɛa,
ṭṭalabeɣ-as iwakken s lɛaḍima-s tameqqrant, a kkun-isseǧhed s tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ-is iqedsen.
Ssutureɣ-as ad izdeɣ Lmasiḥ deg wulawen-nwen s liman, aț-țesɛum izuṛan ara iṛeṣṣin di leḥmala,
iwakken kunwi akk-d wid yumnen meṛṛa, aț-țzemrem aț-țfehmem acḥal hraw, acḥal ɣezzif, acḥal lqay, acḥal ɛlay leḥmala n Lmasiḥ,
yerna aț-țissinem leḥmala-agi yugaren yal tamusni yellan di ddunit, alamma yezdeɣ Ṛṛuḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi deg-wen s lekmal.
Sidi Ṛebbi ixeddem deg-nneɣ s tezmert-is, yețțak-aɣ-d akteṛ n wayen akk i s-neṭṭalab d wayen akk i nețxemmim ;
ad ițțubarek yisem-is si lǧil ɣer lǧil di tejmaɛt n imasiḥiyen akk-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ i dayem, Amin !
Nekk yellan d aqeddac n Lmasiḥ, a kkun-nhuɣ ihi aț-țeddum akken yebɣa Sidi Ṛebbi mi wen-d-issawel.
Ddut s lḥenna d wannuz akk-d ṣṣbeṛ, țemyawit wway gar-awen s lmaḥibba.
Ḥeṛset iman-nwen aț-țeṭṭfem di tdukkli n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, s lehna wway gar-awen.
Yiwet n lǧețța kan akk-d yiwen n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i gellan, am akken daɣen i wen-d-issawel Sidi Ṛebbi ɣer yiwen usirem kan.
Yiwen kan i d Ssid-nneɣ, yiwen n liman akk-d yiwen n weɣḍas i gellan,
yiwen n Ṛebbi kan i gellan, d nețța i d baba-tneɣ meṛṛa ; yella sennig kullec, yella ger yemdanen meṛṛa, yella daɣen deg-sen meṛṛa.
Meɛna mkul yiwen deg-nneɣ tețțunefk-as-d ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi s wakken yella umur i s-d-yefka Lmasiḥ.
Akken yura di tira iqedsen+ : Mi yuli ɣer igenwan, + yewwi yid-es imeḥbas, ifka-d tikciwin i yemdanen.+ +
D acu i d lmeɛna : « Yuli ɣer igenni ? » Ayagi, yeɛni : uqbel ad yali Lmasiḥ ɣer igenni, iṣubb ɣer imukan lqayen n ddaw tmurt.
D win akken iṣubben, i gulin daɣen ɣer igenwan iwakken ad yeɛmeṛ ddunit meṛṛa ;

d nețța i d-ifeṛqen tukciwin i yemdanen : kra yefka-yasen ad ilin d ṛṛusul, kra d lenbiya, kra nniḍen ad beccṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, wiyaḍ d imeksawen n tejmaɛt n imasiḥiyen neɣ d wid yesselmaden agdud n Sidi Ṛebbi.
S tukciwin-agi, Sidna Ɛisa ad iheggi wid yextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi, ad sɛun tazmert s wayes ara xedmen ccɣel i sen-d-ifka iwakken aț-țegmu tejmaɛt n watmaten yellan d lǧețța n Lmasiḥ ;
Cbut Sidi Ṛebbi baba-twen imi tellam d arraw-is eɛzizen ;
ddut di tudert-nwen s leḥmala am akken i ɣ-iḥemmel Lmasiḥ i gefkan iman-is ɣef ddemma-nneɣ d asfel i Sidi Ṛebbi, am lweɛda yesɛan rriḥa iɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi.
Kunwi s imasiḥiyen xḍut i zzna, i wayen ur neṣfi ara, i ṭṭmeɛ ; ayagi meṛṛa ur ilaq ara a d-ițwabdar gar-awen ulamma d abdar ;
ur qebbḥet, ur d-qqaṛet imeslayen ur nesɛi lmeɛna, ur stehzayet ara ɣef wiyaḍ, ayagi d ayen n diri ; meɛna d imeslayen ara iḥemden Sidi Ṛebbi i glaqen a d-ffɣen seg imi-nwen ;

axaṭer ilaq aț-țeẓrem belli wid izennun neɣ wid ixeddmen ayen ur neṣfi akk-d wid ur nesteqniɛ ara, imi wid ur nesteqniɛ ara cban wid iɛebbden lmeṣnuɛat, widak-agi meṛṛa ur țekkayen ara di tgeldit n Lmasiḥ akk-d Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ḥadret ad yili win ara kkun-ikellxen s lehduṛ ur nesɛi lmeɛna ; axaṭer ɣef wayagi i d-ițrusu wurrif n Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef wid i t ițɛuṣun.
Ɣuṛ-wat ad yili wayen ara kkun icerken yid-sen.
Ț-țideț, zik-nni tellam di ṭṭlam, meɛna tura s tikli nwen deg ubrid n Lmasiḥ, teffɣem ɣer tafat. Ddut ihi di tafat imi tellam d arraw n tafat ;
axaṭer tafat tețțawi ɣer wayen yelhan, ɣer lḥeqq akk-d tideț.
Meyyzet aț-țfehmem ayen iɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi ;
ur țekkayet ara di lecɣal n ṭṭlam ur nesɛi lfayda, meɛna kecfet-ed lecɣal-agi ɣer tafat.
S tideț ayen xeddmen imdanen agi s tuffra, d lḥecma a t-id-nebder ;
lameɛna m'ara d-nekcef ayen xeddmen, lecɣal-nsen țbanen-d di tafat imi anda tella tafat, kullec yețban di tafat.
Axaṭer yura : Ddekwal a kečč yeṭṭsen, ekker-ed si ger lmegtin, imiren a d-tecṛeq fell-ak tafat n Lmasiḥ.+
Ihi ḥadret mliḥ tikli-nwen, ur leḥḥut ara am imehbal, meɛna am wid itɛeqlen ;
faṛset lweqt axaṭer ussan d ixeddaɛen.
Daymi, ur smuhbulet ara, meɛna nadit aț-țissinem lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ur sekkṛet ara, axaṭer ssekṛan yessufuɣ i webrid, lameɛna ǧǧet Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ad iččaṛ ulawen-nwen ;
țemseǧhadet wway-gar-awen s isefra n Zabuṛ, cnut ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi, țḥemmidet-eț s wulawen-nwen.
Ḥemmdet Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ ɣef kullec, di mkul lweqt, s yisem n Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Țemqadaṛet wway gar-awen i lmend n Lmasiḥ.
A tilawin, ḍuɛemt irgazen-nkunt am akken i glaq aț țḍuɛemt Sidi Ṛebbi !
Axaṭer argaz d aqeṛṛuy ɣef tmeṭṭut-is, am akken yella Lmasiḥ d aqeṛṛuy ɣef tejmaɛt n imasiḥiyen ; Lmasiḥ d amsellek n tejmaɛt-agi yellan d lǧețța-s.
Am akken i tețḍuɛu tejmaɛt n imasiḥiyen Lmasiḥ, tilawin daɣen ilaq ad ḍuɛent irgazen-nsent di kullec.
Ay irgazen, mkul yiwen deg-wen ilaq ad iḥemmel tameṭṭut-is akken iḥemmel Lmasiḥ tajmaɛt n imasiḥiyen yerna isebbel tudert-is fell-as ;
A dderya, ḍuɛet imawlan-nwen akken yebɣa Sidi Ṛebbi, axaṭer ayagi d ayen yellan d lḥeqq.
Di ccariɛa i d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi i Sidna Musa, d wagi i d lameṛ amezwaru yesɛan lemɛahda :
Qadeṛ baba-k d yemma-k iwakken aț-țɛiceḍ di lehna yerna ad yiɣzif leɛmeṛ-ik di ddunit.+
Ma d kunwi ay imawlan, ur sserfayet ara dderya-nwen, meɛna ṛebbit-țen akken i kkun-id-iweṣṣa Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ay aklan, ḍuɛet imɛellmen n ddunit-agi, s leqdeṛ, s wul yeṣfan d neyya am akken d Lmasiḥ i tețḍuɛum .
Ayagi ur t-xeddmet ara kan m'ara kkun-țɛassan am akken tețnadim aț-țɛeǧbem i yemdanen, lameɛna ilit am iqeddacen n Lmasiḥ i gxeddmen lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi seg ul.
Qedcet fell-asen am akken d Lmasiḥ s yiman-is i ɣef tqeddcem mačči ɣef yemdanen.
Teẓram belli win ixedmen lxiṛ, ama d akli neɣ d aḥeṛṛi, a t-yaf ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.

Ma d kunwi ay imɛellmen, xedmet daɣen i iqeddacen-nwen akken yella di lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi ; ur xeddmet ara deg-sen lbaṭel, imi teẓram belli amɛellem-nsen yellan daɣen d amɛellem-nwen, deg igenwan i gella yerna nețța ur ixeddem ara lxilaf ger yemdanen.
Sǧehdet ihi iman-nwen s tezmert tameqqrant n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Refdet leslaḥ meṛṛa i d-yețțak Sidi Ṛebbi, iwakken ur kkun-iɣelleb ara Cciṭan s tḥila-ines ;
axaṭer imenɣi-nneɣ mačči akk d yemdanen i gella, lameɛna nețnaɣ ț-țgeldiwin akk-d tnezmarin n ṭṭlam iḥekmen di ddunit-agi, akk-d leṛwaḥ imcumen yellan deg igenwan.
Ɣef wayagi, refdet leslaḥ n Sidi Ṛebbi, iwakken aț-țizmirem aț-țqablem tiswiɛin iweɛṛen, s wakka ɣer taggara n umenuɣ a kkun-id-yaf lḥal mazal tbeddem.
Heggit iman-nwen am iɛsekṛiwen, beggset tideț, lset lḥeqq ɣef yidmaren-nwen am tidemmar n wuzzal.
Sɛut zzwaṛa am warkasen deg yidaṛṛen-nwen, daymen theggam i ubecceṛ n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
Di yal taswiɛt, sɛut liman am tseddarit s wayes ara tizmirem aț-țsensem isufa n tmes n Cciṭan ;
cuddet leslak am tcacit n wuzzal ɣef wuqeṛṛuy-nwen, sxedmet asekkin n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen yellan d awal n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Di yal taswiɛt deɛɛut ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen s yal taẓallit d uḥellel. Ɛiwzet ihi, kettṛet di tẓallit, deɛɛut ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef watmaten meṛṛa ;
deɛɛut daɣen fell-i iwakken a yi-d-yefk Sidi Ṛebbi imeslayen s wayes ara beccṛeɣ lbaḍna n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ mbla tugdi.
Țțuceggɛeɣ-d ad beccṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ ; ɣef ddemma-s i lliɣ d ameḥbus ; dɛut ihi iwakken a t-beccṛeɣ akken ilaq, mbla tugdi.
Bɣiɣ aț-țeẓrem ula d kunwi ayen i yi-yeɛnan d wayen i xeddmeɣ, daymi i n-ceggɛeɣ gma-tneɣ ameɛzuz Tucik iqeddcen seg ul ɣef Sidna Ɛisa, d nețța ara kkun-isɛelmen ɣef kullec.
Ceggɛeɣ-t-in iwakken aț-țeẓrem ayen akk i ɣ-iɛnan, yerna ad isseǧhed ulawen-nwen.
Ay atmaten, lehna, leḥmala akk-d liman a wen-d-țțunefken s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ akk-d Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.

name: Philippians
chapters: S ɣuṛ Bulus akk-d Timuti iqeddacen n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, i watmaten yumnen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, i imeqqranen n tqeḍɛit akk-d wid i ten-ițɛassan yellan di temdint n Filibus.
Ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a wen-d țțunefkent s ɣuṛ baba-tneɣ Ṛebbi akk-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ !
?ḥemmideɣ țcekkiṛeɣ Sidi Ṛebbi mkul tikkelt m'ara kkun-id-mmektiɣ.
Yal ass deɛɛuɣ fell-awen s lxiṛ di tẓallit-iw s lfeṛḥ d ameqqran,
ɣef ddemma n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i deg tețțekkim seg wass amezwaru armi ț-țura.
Umneɣ s tideț belli win yebdan deg-wen ccɣel-agi yelhan, a t-ikemmel alamma d ass n tuɣalin n Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
D lḥeqq imi țxemmimeɣ akkagi fell-awen axaṭer tezgam deg ul-iw yerna tețțekkim irkulli di tejmilt i yi-d-ifka Sidi Ṛebbi, ama mi lliɣ di lḥebs ama mi țbecciṛeɣ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ s tezmert ț-țissas.
Atan Ṛebbi d inigi, acḥal i kkun ccedhaɣ axaṭer ḥemmleɣ-kkun s leḥnana n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ;
yerna ayen i ssutureɣ di tẓallit-iw d anerni n leḥmala-nwen di tmusni akk-d lefhama.
S wakka aț-țissinem amek ara textiṛem ayen ifazen, iwakken aț-țilim teṣfam, ulac ayen ara wen-ssukksen i wass n tuɣalin n Lmasiḥ ;
yerna tudert-nwen aț-țeččaṛ s wayen yellan d lḥeqq i gxeddem yis-wen Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, i tmanegt akk-d lḥemd n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ay atmaten, bɣiɣ aț-țeẓrem belli ayen idṛan yid-i, d ayen i gesnernan abecceṛ n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
Axaṭer deg ufrag n ccṛeɛ akk-d imukan nniḍen meṛṛa, ẓran akk ɣef ddemma n Lmasiḥ i țwaḥebseɣ.
Aṭas n watmaten i gțeklen ɣef Ssid-nneɣ, yerna ɣas akken ẓran-iyi țwarzeɣ s snasel ur kukran ara, țbecciṛen awal n Ṛebbi mbla tugdi.
S tideț, llan kra țbecciṛen Lmasiḥ s ṭṭmeɛ akk-d zzux ; meɛna wiyaḍ țbecciṛen s wul yeṣfan d neyya.
Widak-agi xeddmen ayagi s lmaḥibba, imi ẓran țwaxtaṛeɣ iwakken ad dafɛeɣ ɣef lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
Ma d wiyaḍ, țbecciṛen Lmasiḥ s wul yeččuṛen ț-țiḥila ; ixemmimen nsen ur ṣfin ara, ɣilen s wakka ara rnun lqeṛḥ i wul-iw m'akka lliɣ di lḥebs.
Ur i yi-tewqiɛ ara, axaṭer akken yebɣu yili lḥal, ama s tḥila ama s wul yeṣfan Lmasiḥ yețwabecceṛ ; ɣef wayagi feṛḥeɣ yerna mazal ad feṛḥeɣ,
axaṭer ẓriɣ ayagi meṛṛa i nnfeɛ inu, s tẓallit-nwen akk-d lemɛawna n Ṛṛuḥ n Sidna Ɛisa.
Bɣiɣ yerna ssarameɣ ur d-yețțili wacemma s wayes ara ssetḥiɣ ; meɛna am ass-a am uzekka, s lețkal ameqqran, a d-tban deg-i tmanegt n Lmasiḥ ama s tudert-iw ama s lmut-iw ;
axaṭer ɣuṛ-i, Lmasiḥ ț-țudert-iw ma d lmut d rrbeḥ.
Meɛna ma yella tudert-iw di ddunit, d lfayda ɣef ddemma n leqdic-iw ɣef lexbaṛ n lxiṛ , d acu ara xtiṛeɣ ? Ur ẓriɣ ara !
Di snat lǧihat-agi ɛewqeɣ : deg yiwet n tama, bɣiɣ ad ṛuḥeɣ iwakken ad iliɣ akk-d Lmasiḥ, axaṭer d ayen ifazen aṭas ,
di tama nniḍen, ɣef ddemma-nwen yenfeɛ axiṛ ad idireɣ di ddunit ; ayagi tḥeqqeqeɣ deg-s.
?riɣ ad idireɣ yerna ad qqimeɣ gar-awen meṛṛa, iwakken aț-tennernim yerna aț-țfeṛḥem di liman.
Tuɣalin-iw ɣuṛ-wen, a wen-d-tefk sebba tajḍiṭ, s wayes ara tzuxxem s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ɣef ddemma-inu.

Acu kan, ddut s tikli yuklal lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Lmasiḥ iwakken ad sleɣ fell-awen, ama usiɣ-ed a kkun-ẓreɣ ama ɣabeɣ fell-awen, tǧehdem, tedduklem s yiwen n Ṛṛuḥ, tețḥarabem s yiwen wul ɣef liman i d-ițțak lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
?uṛ-wat aț-țeǧǧem iɛdawen a kkun-ssagden, ayagi ad yili i nutni d țbut n nnger-nsen, i kunwi d țbut n leslak-nwen ; annect-agi s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi i d-yekka ;
axaṭer tețțunefk-awen-d ṛṛeḥma mačči kan iwakken aț-țamnem s Lmasiḥ, meɛna iwakken aț-țenɛețțabem daɣen ɣef ddemma-ines
m'ara tețḥarabem akken twalam țḥarabeɣ nekkini, yerna mazal țḥarabeɣ ar tura am akken i teslam yis.
Eɛni ur tufim ara ṣṣbeṛ di Lmasiḥ, asseǧhed di leḥmala, tagmaț di Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen wway-gar-awen, ur tufim ara leḥnana d ṛṛeḥma ?
Kemmlet ihi lfeṛḥ-iw, sɛut yiwen uxemmem, sɛut yiwet n leḥmala, ddukklet s yiwen n ṛṛuḥ, d yiwen uxemmem.
Ur xeddmet acemma s umḥizwer neɣ iwakken aț-țesɛum ccan ur nesɛi lqima, meɛna anzet, ḥesbet wiyaḍ am akken sɛan lqima akteṛ-nwen.
Ilaq yal yiwen deg-wen ur ițnadi ara kan ɣef nnfeɛ-ines, lameɛna ilaq ad inadi ɣef nnfeɛ n wiyaḍ.
Sɛut deg ulawen nwen ixemmimen yellan di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ :
Nețța yellan d ṣṣifa n Ṛebbi, ur inuda ara ad isseɛdel iman-is akk-d Ṛebbi.
Meɛna isellem kullec s yiman-is mi guɣal d aqeddac. Isseɛdel iman-is d yemdanen mi d-iban s ṣṣifa n wemdan ;
yessanez iman-is mi gedda s ṭṭaɛa armi d lmut, lmut ɣef wumidag.
Daymi Sidi Ṛebbi issuli-t sennig n kra wayen yellan yerna ifka-yas isem yellan sennig n yismawen meṛṛa,
iwakken s yisem n Ɛisa, yal tagecrirt aț-țeknu deg igenwan, di lqaɛa, ddaw lqaɛa,
iwakken yal iles a d-icehhed belli Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, d nețța i gellan sennig kullec i tmanegt n Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ.
A wid eɛzizen fell-i, yal ass tețțaɣem awal ; sbeggnet-ed ihi leslak-nwen s lecɣal, s ṭṭaɛa d wannuz, mačči am asm'akken lliɣ yid-wen, meɛna tura akteṛ imi ɣabeɣ fell-awen.
Axaṭeṛ d Ṛebbi i wen-d-ițțaken lebɣi akk-d tezmert s wayes ara txedmem lebɣi-s yelhan.
Xedmet kullec mbla asmermeg neɣ asṭuqqet n wawal,
iwakken yiwen ur kkun-ițlumu, aț-țilim teṣfam, d arraw n Ṛebbi, ur tseɛɛum ara lɛib ger lǧil-agi n ixeddaɛen, aț-țfeǧǧeǧem gar-asen am teftilin di ddunit
aț-țețbecciṛem awal n tudert ; s wakka, ass n tuɣalin n Lmasiḥ, ayagi ad yili d sebba n ccan-iw imi ur uzzileɣ ur nɛețțabeɣ baṭel.
?as akken ad țțusebbleɣ d asfel ara yernun ɣef wesfel n liman-nwen yețțunefken d lweɛda i Sidi Ṛebbi, d ayen i yi isfeṛḥen yerna feṛḥeɣ yid-wen meṛṛa .
Ula d kunwi feṛḥet am nekk, feṛḥet yid-i.
S lețkal i sɛiɣ di Sidna Ɛisa, ssarameɣ qṛib a wen-ceggɛeɣ Timuti iwakken a yi-issefṛeḥ s lexbaṛ ara yi-d-yawi s ɣuṛ-wen.
Ur sɛiɣ ula d yiwen ara yi-iɛawnen deg ixemmimen-iw, iwakken ad iḥebbeṛ fell-awen seg ul ;
axaṭer akken ma llan țnadin ɣef nnfeɛ-nsen, mačči ɣef nnfeɛ n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Tessnem tikli n Timuṭi, am weqcic ɣer baba-s, yefka tudert-is yid-i i ubecceṛ n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
Ihi akken kan ara tefru temsalt-iw, a wen-t-in-ceggɛeɣ
yerna sɛiɣ lețkal di Ssid-nneɣ belli qṛib a n-aseɣ s yiman-iw ɣuṛ-wen.
Walaɣ ilaq-iyi a wen-ceggɛeɣ gma-tneɣ Ebafrudit, amdakkul-iw di lxedma d uḥareb ɣef ddemma n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, win akken i yi-d-tceggɛem yewwi-yi-d s ɣuṛ-wen ayen akk ḥwaǧeɣ ;
iccedha-kkun meṛṛa yerna yeḥzen aṭas imi teslam yis yehlek.
?-țideț ihlek armi yewweḍ lmut ; meɛna iɣaḍ Sidi Ṛebbi yerna mačči kan d nețța i t-iɣaḍen, ɣaḍeɣ-t ula d nekk iwakken ur d-iɣelli ara fell-i leḥzen ɣef wayeḍ.
Ceggɛeɣ-t-in s lemɣawla, iwakken aț-țfeṛḥem m'ara t-twalim yerna ula d nekk leḥzen-iw ad yifsus.
Sṭerḥbet yis s lfeṛḥ d ameqqran, s wakken yuklal yal yiwen yellan deg ubrid n Lmasiḥ ; qadṛet imdanen am wigi
axaṭer ɣef ddemma n leqdic ɣef Lmasiḥ i gewweḍ ɣer lmut, mi gsebbel ṛṛuḥ-is iwakken ad ixdem ayen akken ur tezmirem ara a yi-t-txedmem kunwi.
Ihi ay atmaten, feṛḥet imi tedduklem akk-d Ssid-nneɣ. Ur ɛeyyuɣ ara di tira n wayen i wen-n-uriɣ yakan, yerna ayagi a wen-yili d ṭṭmana i liman-nwen.
?adret iman nwen deg wuccanen, ḥadret iman nwen ɣef yemcumen-nni iḍehṛen s lekdeb.
Axaṭeṛ d nukni i gesɛan ṭṭhara n ṣṣeḥ imi nɛebbed Sidi Ṛebbi s Ṛṛuḥ-is ; yerna nețzuxxu s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ nețkel fell-as, ur nețkil ara ɣef limaṛat n yemdanen.
Ula d nekk zemreɣ ad țekleɣ ɣef limaṛat n yemdanen. Ma yella win i gɣilen izmer ad ițkel ɣef limaṛat agi, nekk zemreɣ ad țekleɣ akteṛ !
Axaṭer dehṛeɣ ass wis tmanya, kkiɣ-ed si ccetla n wat Isṛail, n wedrum n Benyamin, d aɛibṛani mmi--s n uɛibṛani.
?ef wayen yeɛnan ccariɛa, d afarizi, ma d zzwaṛa, d win ițqehhiṛen tajmaɛt n imasiḥiyen ; ɣef wayen yeɛnan lqanun n ccariɛa n Sidna Musa, ur yelli wayen i yi-ixuṣṣen.
Meɛna ayen akken i yi-illan d lfayda, ḥesbeɣ-t tura d lexṣara ɣef ddemma n Lmasiḥ.
Zemreɣ a d iniɣ : ḥesbeɣ kullec d lexṣara ɣef ddemma n wayen ifazen, yellan ț-țamusni n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-iw. ?ef ddemma-s qebleɣ a yi-iṛuḥ kullec, ḥesbeɣ kullec d afṛaden, iwakken a d-rebḥeɣ Lmasiḥ
yerna ad sɛuɣ amkan ɣuṛ-es, ad uɣaleɣ d aḥeqqi mačči mi ḍuɛeɣ ccariɛa n Sidna Musa, meɛna imi uɣaleɣ d aḥeqqi s liman yellan di Lmasiḥ, s lḥeqq-nni i d-yețțak Sidi Ṛebbi i wid yesɛan liman deg-s.
S wakka ad issineɣ Lmasiḥ, ad issineɣ tazmert n ḥeggu-ines, ad țekkiɣ di leɛtab-is, ad iliɣ am nețța di lmut-is iwakken
akken yebɣu yili lḥal ad awḍeɣ s wayagi ɣer ḥeggu si ger lmegtin.
Ur d-nniɣ ara tikli-inu di Lmasiḥ tennekmal neɣ wwḍeɣ ɣer lmeqsud, meɛna mazal țțazzaleɣ iwakken a t-awḍeɣ, imi ula d nekk yewwi-yi Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Ay atmaten, ur ḥsibeɣ ara iman-iw wwḍeɣ ɣer lmeqṣud-agi ; lameɛna tella yiwet lḥaǧa xeddmeɣ-ț : tețțuɣ ayen iɛeddan, ssarameɣ ɣer wayen yellan ɣer zdat,
țțazzaleɣ ɣer lmeqṣud-agi iwakken ad awḍeɣ ɣer wayen i ɣ-ihegga Sidi Ṛebbi deg igenwan s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Nukni yellan d imdanen meqqṛen di liman ilaq a nesɛu akk axemmem-agi ; ma yella tesɛam axemmem yemxalafen ɣef kra n temsalin, d Sidi Ṛebbi ara kkun-d-isfehmen ɣef wayagi.
S wakka, imi newweḍ di tudert-nneɣ ɣer tegniț-agi, ilaq a nkemmlet tikli-nneɣ s tdukli.
Ɛandet-iyi ay atmaten, țmuqulet ɣer wid i twalam leḥḥun di liman am nukni,
axaṭer aṭas i gteddun am iɛdawen n umidag n Lmasiḥ ; nniɣ-awen-t-id acḥal d abrid, tura daɣen a wen-t-id ɛiwdeɣ s imeṭṭawen :
Taggara-nsen d nnger ; ṛebbi-nsen d iɛebbaḍ-nsen, țzuxxun s wayen i glaq ad nneḥcamen, țxemmimen anagar ɣef leḥwayeǧ n ddunit.
Ma d nukni tanezduɣt-nneɣ deg igenwan, syenna i nețṛaǧu s lḥir amsellek-nneɣ Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ
ara ibeddlen lǧețțat-nneɣ timeḥquṛin, a tent-yerr am lǧețța-s yeččuṛen d lɛaḍima, s tezmert s wayes ițțarra kullec seddaw lḥekma-s.
Daymi, ay atmaten-iw eɛzizen fell-i, kunwi i ccedhaɣ a kkun ẓreɣ, kunwi yellan d lfeṛḥ-iw, d ccan-iw , akka i glaq aț-țeṭṭfem s lǧehd di Ssid-nneɣ, a wid eɛzizen fell-i !
Bɣiɣ ad weṣṣiɣ tiyessetmatin nneɣ Iwudya akk-d Sinticya, iwakken ad ddukklent deg yiwen uxemmem di Ssid-nneɣ.
Ula d kečč a gma Sizugus unṣiḥ, ḍelbeɣ-ak a tent-tɛiwneḍ nutenti i ḥurben yid-i ɣef ddemma n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, akk-d Klimun d imdukkal-iw nniḍen di leqdic iwumi uran yismawen nsen di tektabt n tudert.
Ilit dayem di lfeṛḥ imi tedduklem akk-d Ssid-nneɣ ; a wen-t-id-ɛiwdeɣ : ilit dayem di lfeṛḥ.
Ilaq aț-țiḥninem ɣer yemdanen meṛṛa, Ssid-nneɣ qṛib a d-yuɣal.
Ur țḥebbiṛet ɣef wacemma, meɛna di yal lḥaǧa, ssutret ayen teḥwaǧem i Sidi Ṛebbi s tẓallit, s uḥellel akk-d leḥmadi ;
imiren lehna n Sidi Ṛebbi i gugaren yal tamusni, aț-țeḥrez ulawen-nwen d ixemmimen nwen di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Taggara ay atmaten a wen-d iniɣ : ayen akk yellan d ṣṣeḥ, d lḥeṛma, d lḥeqq, d ṣṣfa, ayen akk yuklalen leḥmala d wayen yuklalen leqdeṛ akk-d leḥmadi, ad ilin d sebba n ixemmimen-nwen.
Ayen tlemdem s ɣuṛ-i yerna tqeblem-t, ayen twalam xeddmeɣ-t d wayen teslam nniɣ-t-id xedmet-eț ula d kunwi, dɣa Sidi Ṛebbi Bab n lehna ad yili yid-wen.

Feṛḥeɣ aṭas am akken ț-țukci i yi-d-ifka Ssid-nneɣ mi walaɣ ul-nwen iɛawed iǧǧuǧeg-ed ɣuṛ-i, tețḥebbiṛem fell-i ; ẓriɣ tețḥebbiṛem fell-i , lameɛna ur wen-d-teɣli ara teswiɛt iwakken a yi-t-id-tbeggnem.
Ur d-nniɣ ara ayagi imi xuṣṣeɣ, axaṭer lemdeɣ ad steqniɛeɣ di yal taswiɛt i deg lliɣ.
Ssneɣ ad ɛiceɣ di lexṣaṣ, am akken ssneɣ ad ɛiceɣ di tawant. Di yal amkan, di kullec lemdeɣ leqnaɛa d lexṣaṣ, lemdeɣ tawant d laẓ.
Zemreɣ i kullec s win i yi-sseǧhaden.
Lameɛna d ayen ilhan i txedmem imi tețțekkim di leɛtab-iw.

Kunwi teẓram ay atmaten n temdint n Filibus belli asmi bdiɣ abecceṛ n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, mi ṛuḥeɣ si tmurt n Masidunya. Ula d yiwet n tejmaɛt ur temḥasab yid-i deg wayen i ț-id ikeččmen d wayen i tețțak d lemɛawna i wiyaḍ, anagar tajmaɛt-nwen ;
anagar kunwi i gxedmen ayagi, yerna mi lliɣ di temdint n Tisalunikya, snat n tikkal i yi-d-tceggɛem ayen akk ḥwaǧeɣ.
Mačči ɣef lweɛda i țnadiɣ, meɛna țnadiɣ ɣef lfayda tameqqrant ara yilin di nnfeɛ-nwen.

Yewweḍ-iyi-d kullec, aql-i di tawant, ur iyi-ixuṣṣ wacemma imi i yi-d-iwweḍ wayen i d-tefkam i gma tneɣ Ibafrudit ; ayen i d-yusan s ɣuṛ-wen am leɛṭeṛ n rriḥa yelhan, am wesfel i geqbel Sidi Ṛebbi yerna iɛǧeb-as.
Sidi Ṛebbi a wen-d-yefk ayen akk teḥwaǧem s wakken tella lɛaḍima n lbaṛakat-is, di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Tamanegt i Sidi Ṛebbi baba tneɣ, si lǧil ɣer lǧil, amin !
Sellmet ɣef wegdud n Sidi Ṛebbi, wid akk yumnen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Atmaten akk yellan yid-i țsellimen fell-awen. Wid akk yellan seg ugdud n Sidi Ṛebbi țsellimen fell-awen, abeɛda wid yellan d iqeddacen n Qayṣer.
Ṛṛeḥma n Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ aț-țili yid-wen.

name: Colossians
chapters: Nekk Bulus, amceggeɛ n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ s lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi akk-d gma-tneɣ Timuti,
i watmaten yellan di temdint n Kulus, wid iteddun s ṣṣfa deg webrid n Lmasiḥ. Ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a wen-d-țțunefkent s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi Baba-tneɣ !
Nețḥemmid Sidi Ṛebbi Baba-s n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ yerna ndeɛɛu fell-awen ;
axaṭer nesla s liman i tesɛam di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ d wamek i tḥemmlem agdud n Sidi Ṛebbi,
ɣef ddemma n usirem i wen-ițțuheggan deg igenwan, asirem nni i wen-d-ițțuxebbṛen s wawal n tideț n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
Lexbeṛ-agi n lxiṛ yewḍen armi d ɣuṛ-wen, yețnerni di ddunit meṛṛa ; akken daɣen i gețnerni deg-wen ula d kunwi seg wasmi i teslam yerna tessnem tideț ɣef ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi,
akken i wen-ț-isselmed Ibafras, aṛfiq-nneɣ eɛzizen di leqdic ; nețța iqeddcen ɣef Lmasiḥ s wul yeṣfan,
ixebbeṛ-aɣ-ed ɣef leḥmala s wayes i kkun-yeččuṛ Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
Daymi nezga ndeɛɛu fell-awen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi seg wasmi nesla yis-wen, nessutur-as a wen-d-yefk amek ara tissinem akken ilaq lebɣi ines, s lɛeqliya d lefhama i d-ițțak Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
S wakka, aț-țleḥḥum s tikli yebɣa Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken a s tɛeǧbem di kullec, a d-tefkem lfakya yelhan, yerna aț-țnernim di tmusni n Sidi Ṛebbi,
Ndeɛɛu ɣer Ṛebbi akken a kkun-isseǧhed s tezmert-is tameqqrant iwakken aț-tṣebṛem i kullec alamma ț-țaggara.
Ḥemmdet, cekkṛet s lfeṛḥ Sidi Ṛebbi Baba-tneɣ i wen-d-yefkan amur di lweṛt i d-ihegga i warraw n tafat.
Ikkes-aɣ-d si tezmert n ṭṭlam, iwakken a ɣ-yessiweḍ ɣer tgelda n Mmi-s eɛzizen,
s wayes nețwasellek yerna nesɛa leɛfu n ddnubat-nneɣ.
Lmasiḥ, d ṣṣifa n Sidi Ṛebbi ur nezmir a nwali, d nețța i d amezwaru n txelqit meṛṛa.
Yis i gețwaxleq wayen nețwali d wayen ur nețwali ara ama deg igenwan ama di lqaɛa, tigeldiwin d igelliden, lḥekmat akk-d tezmar yellan deg igenwan ; kullec yețwaxleq yis, kullec yețwaxleq i nețța.
Yella-d uqbel a d-yețwaxleq kra yellan, d nețța i d lsas n txelqit,
d aqeṛṛuy n tejmaɛt n imasiḥiyen yellan d lǧețța-s. Yella si tazwara, d nețța i d amenzu i d-iḥyan si ger lmegtin iwakken ad yili d amezwaru di kullec.
Bɣiɣ aț-țeẓrem acḥal meqqeṛ imenɣi i deg lliɣ ɣef ddemma nwen, ɣef watmaten n temdint n Ludikus akk-d wid meṛṛa i geslan yis-i meɛna leɛmeṛ ur ẓrin udem-iw.
Qebleɣ imenɣi-agi iwakken ad theddnen wulawen-nsen, ad ddukklen s leḥmala, ad ččaṛen d lefhama iwakken ad issinen lbaḍna n Sidi Ṛebbi Ṛebbi yellan di Lmasiḥ ;
deg-s i ffren igerrujen n lefhama ț-țmusni.
Nniɣ-d akka iwakken ur kkun ițkellix yiwen s imeslayen yețɣuṛṛun.
Ɣas akken ur lliɣ ara yid-wen, leɛqel-iw atan ɣuṛ-wen ; feṛḥeɣ aṭas mi ẓriɣ acḥal i teṭṭfem di liman-nwen di Lmasiḥ yerna tsedduyem kullec akken ilaq.
Ihi imi tqeblem Ɛisa Lmasiḥ d Ssid-nwen, ddut di lebɣi-ines.
Sbeddet lsas n tudert-nwen fell-as, sǧehdet liman-nwen akken i kkun nesselmed, țḥemmidet daymen Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ḥadret a kkun-kellxen wid ițfelsifen, wid yessexdamen tiḥila ț-țiḥeṛci ; ayagi d lekdubat i gebnan ɣef leɛwayed n yemdanen akk ț-țizemmar n ddunit, mačči ɣef uselmed n Lmasiḥ.
Axaṭer ayen akk yellan di Sidi Ṛebbi yezdeɣ s lekmal di Lmasiḥ,
kunwi tesɛam kullec deg-s, nețța yellan sennig lḥekmat ț-țzemmar.
Sṭhaṛa-nwen tekka-d si tikli nwen akk-d Lmasiḥ, mačči am tin yețwaxedmen s ufus n wemdan, lameɛna s ɣuṛ Lmasiḥ i d-tekka iwakken a kkun-isellek si tezmert n lǧețța tamednubt.
S weɣḍas-nwen tețwameḍlem akk-d Lmasiḥ, lameɛna teḥyam-d daɣen yid-es si lmut imi tumnem s tezmert n Sidi Ṛebbi i t-id-isseḥyan si ger lmegtin.
Kunwi ur neḍhiṛ ara, tellam temmutem ɣef ddemma n ddnubat nwen ; tura Sidi Ṛebbi yerra-kkun-id ɣer tudert s Lmasiḥ. Sidi Ṛebbi yeɛfa-yaɣ ddnubat-nneɣ meṛṛa.
Yemḥa leɛqed-nni i ɣ-isseḍlamen, imi ur nezmir ara a nexdem ayen d-teqqaṛ ccariɛa ; yemḥa-t mi t-isemmeṛ ɣef wumidag.
Sidi Ṛebbi yekkes tazmert i lḥekmat ț-țzemmar n igenwan, ikcef itent-id zdat txelqit meṛṛa, iɣleb-itent s lmut n Mmi-s ɣef wumidag.
Ihi ur țțaǧat ara win ara kkun-iḥasben ɣef wayen ara teččem d wayen ara teswem neɣ imi ur tettabaɛem ara ayen yeɛnan leɛyudat, talalit n waggur d wussan n westeɛfu ;
ayagi akk yezwar-ed d lemtel kan n wayen i d-iteddun, axaṭer tideț di Lmasiḥ i tella.

Ɣuṛ-wat a wen-kellxen yemdanen ițțarran iman-nsen d wid yunzen, țɛebbiden lmalayekkat, a kkun-id-awin ɣer webrid-nsen iwakken ur tețțawḍem ara ɣer lmeqṣud-nwen ; imdanen am wigi ttabaɛen kan ixemmimen-nsen yerna xeddmen ccan i yiman-nsen.
Ur qbilen ara ad ṭṭfen di Lmasiḥ yellan d aqeṛṛuy, i gesdukklen lǧețța s lemfaṣel meṛṛa d iẓuran i d-icudden ɣuṛ-es ; yis i tețnerni lǧețța, i tețțimɣuṛ s wakken yella di lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ma yella temmutem akk-d Lmasiḥ, teṭṭaxṛem ɣef wayen akk yeɛnan tudert n ddunit, acimi ihi am akken di ddunit i tellam, tqebblem ad ḥețțmen fell-awen leɛwayed n ddunit m'ara wen-qqaṛen :
« Ur teddmet ara neɣ ur ɛeṛṛdet ara neɣ ur țnalet ara !»
Lumuṛat-agi meṛṛa i nxeddem d ayen ara yefnun, d leqwanen d uselmed n yemdanen ;
ț-țideț, lumuṛat-agi sselmaden leɛbada, annuz akk-d uɛețțeb n lǧețțat nneɣ, țbanen-d amakken d ayen yelhan, lameɛna d ayen ur nezmir ad iɛawen bunadem ad iṭṭef iman-is.
Kunwi ihi, imi i d-teḥyam akk-d Lmasiḥ, nadit ɣef leḥwayeǧ n igenwan anda yella Lmasiḥ i gḥekmen ɣer tama tayeffust n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Țḥebbiṛet ɣef wayen yellan deg igenwan mačči ɣef wayen yellan di ddunit-agi,
axaṭer ɣer ddunit tețțusemmam temmutem, meɛna ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi tudert-nwen teffer akk-d Lmasiḥ.
M'ara d-iban Lmasiḥ yellan ț-țudert-nwen, kunwi daɣen a d tbanem yid-es.
Ɣef ddemma n wayagi, xḍut i yir tikli n ddunit-agi s wayes tețțeddum zik : leḥṛam, ayen iɛefnen, lebɣi n tnefsit, ccehwat n diri akk-d ṭṭmeɛ, ayagi meṛṛa am win ițɛebbiden ayen ixulfen Sidi Ṛebbi.
D annect-agi i d-isseɣlayen urrif n Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef wid i t-ițɛaṣin.
Ula d kunwi akka i tellam zik-nni mi tețɛicim di ddnub.
Meɛna tura sbeɛdet iman-nwen ɣef wannect-agi meṛṛa : urrif, zzɛaf, ddɣel ; ḥadret a d-ffɣen seg imawen-nwen rregmat neɣ yir lehduṛ.
Ur skiddibet ara wway gar-awen imi tura teǧǧam yir tikli-nwen n zik.
Tuɣalem d ijdiden, tețnernim di tmusni n Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken aț țemcabim ɣuṛ-es, nețța i kkun-d-ixelqen.

Di tudert-agi tajdiṭ ulac lxilaf ger wat Isṛail d leǧnas nniḍen, ger win iḍehṛen d win ur neḍhiṛ, ger wid itqeddmen d wid ur netqeddem, neɣ ger wakli d uḥeṛṛi, imi d Lmasiḥ i gellan d kullec di mkul yiwen.
Sidi Ṛebbi iḥemmel-ikkun, yextaṛ-ikkun aț-țilim d agdud-is. Sɛut ihi ṛṛeḥma deg wulawen-nwen, leḥnana, lxiṛ, ṣṣbeṛ d wannuz.
Țemyawit wway gar-awen, ma yella win yesɛan accetki ɣef wayeḍ msamaḥet axiṛ wway gar-awen, akken i wen-isemmeḥ Lmasiḥ, msamaḥet ula d kunwi.
Nnig n wayagi meṛṛa sɛut leḥmala, ț-țin i gesdukkulen ulawen.
Sɛut lehna n Lmasiḥ deg ulawen nwen iwakken aț-țilim d yiwen, ḥemmdet Sidi Ṛebbi imi ɣer lehna-agi i wen-d-yessawel.

Awal n Lmasiḥ ad izdeɣ gar-awen s lbaṛakat-is meṛṛa iwakken wa ad isselmad wa, wa ad inehhu wayeḍ s ṣṣwab. Ccnut s wulawen-nwen, ḥemmdet Sidi Ṛebbi s isefra n Zabuṛ akk-d ccnawi i d-ițțak Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
Ama deg imeslayen ama di lecɣal ara txedmem, xedmet kullec s yisem n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa, s yisem-is țḥemmidet Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ.
A tilawin, ḍuɛemt irgazen-nkunt, ayagi d ayen ilaqen i tid i gețḍuɛun Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ma d kunwi ay irgazen, ilaq aț-țḥemmlem tilawin-nwen, ur seɛɛut ara ulawen iqesḥen ɣuṛ-sent.
Ay arrac țțaɣet awal i imawlan nwen di kullec, axaṭer akka ara tɛeǧbem i Sidi Ṛebbi.
Lameɛna kunwi ay imawlan ur sserfuyet ara dderya-nwen neɣ m'ulac ad feclen.
Ma d kunwi ay iqeddacen, țțaɣet awal i imɛellmen-nwen di ddunit-agi mačči kan zdat-nsen akken a sen tɛeǧbem meɛna ɣas ulac-iten xedmet ccɣel-nwen seg wul, am akken i Sidi Ṛebbi.
Kra n wayen ara txedmem, xedmet-eț s wul yeṣfan am akken i Sidi Ṛebbi i t-txeddmem mačči i yemdanen,
mmektit-ed lweṛt i kkun ițṛaǧun s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi akken i t-id-yewɛed ; axaṭer amɛellem n tideț i ɣef tqeddcem, d Lmasiḥ.
Win ixeddmen cceṛ a d-iɣellet ayen yexdem ; axaṭer ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi ulac lxilaf.
Ay imɛellmen ddut s lḥeqq, ur xeddmet ara lxilaf ger iqeddacen nwen, axaṭer teẓram belli ula d kunwi tesɛam amɛellem deg igenwan.
Ur ɣefflet ara, meɛna deɛɛut țḥemmidet daymen Sidi Ṛebbi.
Deɛɛut daɣen fell-aɣ ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken a ɣ-d-ildi tiwwura a nbecceṛ awal-is, a nxebbeṛ ɣef lbaḍna n Lmasiḥ i ɣef lliɣ di lḥebs,
dɛut iwakken ad sfehmeɣ akken ilaq lbaḍna-agi i yemdanen.
Ddut s ṣṣwab zdat wid ur numin ara s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ; faṛset tagniț, țbecciṛet awal n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Sɛut iles aẓidan, imeslayen yesɛan lfayda, iwakken aț-țețțarram awal i yal yiwen s ṣṣwab.
Tucik, gma-tneɣ eɛzizen i ɣef țekleɣ, aṛfiq-nneɣ di leqdic ɣef Ssid-nneɣ, a wen-n-yawi lexbaṛ-iw.
Ɣef wannect-agi i wen-t-in ceggɛeɣ iwakken a wen-n-yawi lexbaṛ-nneɣ yerna ad ihedden ulawen-nwen.
A d-yas nețța d gma-tneɣ eɛzizen Unizim i ɣef nețkel, yellan d yiwen seg-wen ; d nutni ara wen-n-yawin lexbaṛ ɣef wayen meṛṛa ideṛṛun dagi.
Ițsellim-ed fell-awen Arisṭark aṛfiq-iw yellan yid-i di lḥebs akk-d Maṛqus yețțilin i Barnabas, win i ɣef kkun-weṣṣaɣ aț-țesterḥbem yis ma yusa-d ɣuṛ-wen.
Ițsellim-ed daɣen fell-awen Ɛisa iwumi qqaṛen Yustus. Ger wat Isṛail anagar tlata watmaten-agi i gxeddmen yid-i i tgeldit n Sidi Ṛebbi, d nutni kan i yufiɣ ɣer tama-w.

Gma-tneɣ Ibafras n tmurt-nwen, yellan d aqeddac n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ițsellim-ed fell-awen ; yezga ideɛɛu ɣer Ṛebbi fell-awen iwakken aț-țeṭṭfem, aț-țennernim di liman yerna aț-țilim twejdem aț-țxedmem lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi.
A d-cehdeɣ fell-as acḥal inɛețțab fell-awen, ɣef watmaten n tejmaɛt n Ludikus akk-d wid n Yirabulis.
Luqa aḥbib-nneɣ eɛzizen yellan d ṭṭbib akk-d Dimas, țsellimen-d fell-awen.
Sellmet ɣef watmaten yellan di Ludikus, ɣef Nimfa akk d wid ițnejmaɛen deg wexxam-is.
M'ara teɣṛem tabṛaț-agi, fket-eț i watmaten n tejmaɛt n Ludikus a ț-ɣṛen, kunwi daɣen ɣṛet tabṛaț ara kkun-id-yawḍen s ɣuṛ-sen.
Init i Arcibus ad ibedd i ccɣel nni i ɣef t-iwekkel Ssid-nneɣ, a t-ixdem akken ilaq.
Nekk Bulus, s ufus-iw i wen-n uriɣ. Sslam fell-awen ! Ur tețțut ara belli d ameḥbus i lliɣ. Ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi aț-țili yid-wen.

name: 1 Thessalonians
chapters: Nekk Bulus, Silwan akk-d Timuti, i tejmaɛt n watmaten yellan di temdint n Tiṣalunik yumnen s Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ akk-d Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa lmasiḥ. Ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a d-ersent fell-awen.
Yal ass nețḥemmid Sidi Ṛebbi fell-awen ; mkul m'ara nedɛu ɣuṛ-es, nețțader-ikkun-id di tẓallit-nneɣ.

Nețmektay-ikkun-id zdat Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ, ɣef wayen akk txeddmem seg wasmi tumnem s Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ; tqeblem aț-țenneɛtabem ɣef ddemma n yisem-is imi tḥemmlem-t yerna lețkal-nwen fell-as d ameqqran.
Ay atmaten eɛzizen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, neẓra belli d nețța i kkun-id ixtaṛen.

Lexbeṛ-agi n lxiṛ i wen-d newwi mačči d imeslayen kan, lameɛna s țțeḥqiq i wen-d-nbecceṛ lexbaṛ-agi n tideț, s tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen. Teẓram amek i nedda gar-awen, asm'akken i nella ɣuṛ-wen ; nexdem ayagi iwakken a kkun-nɛiwen di tikli-nwen.
Ula d kunwi tuɣalem tețțeddum am nukni deg webrid n Ssid-nneɣ, imi di teswiɛt iweɛṛen i tqeblem awal-is s lfeṛḥ i d-ițțak Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen.
S wakka tuɣalem d lemtel i wid akk yumnen, i gellan di tmura n Masidunya akk-d Akaya.
Axaṭer s ɣuṛ-wen, lexbaṛ n lxiṛ iwweḍ mačči kan ɣer tmura-agi, meɛna slan s liman-nwen di Sidi Ṛebbi di mkul amkan. Daymi fiḥel a d-nemmeslay fell-awen.
Imdanen meṛṛa ḥekkun amek i tesṭerḥbem yis-nneɣ, amek i d-tuɣalem ɣer webrid n Sidi Ṛebbi, teǧǧam aɛbad n ssadaț, iwakken aț-țḍuɛem Sidi Ṛebbi n tideț, Sidi Ṛebbi yeddren.
Yerna tețṛaǧum a d-yuɣal Ssid nneɣ Ɛisa seg igenwan, Mmi-s-nni i d-isseḥya si ger lmegtin ; d nețța ara ɣ-isellken ass n lḥisab.
Ay atmaten, kunwi s yiman-nwen teẓram mačči mbla lmeɛna i d-nusa ɣuṛ-wen.
Teẓram daɣen nenneɛtab, nețwargem di temdint n Filibus, meɛna neṭṭef di liman-nneɣ di Sidi Ṛebbi, nkemmel abecceṛ n wawal-is gar-awen ɣas akken nețwaqehheṛ.
Lexbeṛ-agi n lxiṛ i wen-d newwi ur ibni ara ɣef lekdeb neɣ ɣef tḥila d lexdeɛ.
Sidi Ṛebbi ițkel fell-aɣ, daymi i ɣ-iceggeɛ iwakken a nbecceṛ awal-is. Axaṭer iẓra nețmeslay mačči iwakken a neɛǧeb i yemdanen, meɛna iwakken a s-neɛǧeb i nețța yessnen ulawen-nneɣ.
Teẓram belli leɛmeṛ ur nemmeslay s usqizzeb neɣ neḍmeɛ kra deg yiwen, atan Sidi Ṛebbi d inigi !
Leɛmeṛ ur nqelleb ad yali ccan-nneɣ ama ɣuṛ-wen ama ɣer wiyaḍ ; yerna lemmer nebɣi, nezmer a nḥettem iman-nneɣ fell-awen imi d imceggɛen n Lmasiḥ i nella !
Meɛna asmi nella gar-awen, neččuṛ d leḥnana am tyemmaț ițḥadaren ɣef warraw-is.
Imi tellam deg wulawen-nneɣ, mačči kan d lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi i nebɣa a wen-nbecceṛ, meɛna nezmer a nsebbel ula ț-țiṛwiḥin-nneɣ fell-awen, axaṭer teɛzizem fell-aɣ aṭas.
Ma tecfam ay atmaten ɣef wussan nni mi i wen-d-newwi lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, nenneɛtab, nxeddem iḍ d wass akken ur nețțili ț-țaɛkumt ula i yiwen deg-wen.
Ṛebbi yeẓra, kunwi teẓram belli tikli-nneɣ teṣfa, nedda s lḥeqq, yiwen ur aɣ-d-issukkes lɛib gar-awen kunwi s wid yumnen.
Teẓram daɣen nella i mkul yiwen deg-wen am ubabat ɣer warraw-is.
Nenha-kkun, nesseǧhed-ikkun, nḥellel-ikkun iwakken aț-țeddum akken yebɣa Sidi Ṛebbi i wen-d issawlen ɣer tgeldit-is d lɛaḍima-s.

S wakka nețḥemmid dayem Sidi Ṛebbi imi tqeblem awal-is i wen-d newwi. Tqeblem-t mačči am akken d awal n wemdan, meɛna tqeblem-t imi d awal n Sidi Ṛebbi. D awal-agi i gxeddmen deg-wen tura, kunwi s wid yumnen.
Ay atmaten, tedṛa yid-wen am tejmuyaɛ n imasiḥiyen yellan di tmurt n Yahuda : akken i kkun-qehṛen warraw n tmurt-nwen akken daɣen i ten-qehṛen wudayen.
D udayen-agi i genɣan Ssid nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ akk-d lenbiya, d nutni daɣen i ɣ-iqehṛen. Ɛuṣan Sidi Ṛebbi yerna d iɛdawen n yemdanen.
Rnan kemmlen di ddnubat-nsen, axaṭer ur ɣ-ǧǧin ara a nbecceṛ leslak n Sidi Ṛebbi i leǧnas nniḍen ur nelli ara n wat Isṛail. S wakka i d-yeɣli lɛiqab n Sidi Ṛebbi fell-asen.
Ma d nukni ay atmaten seg wasmi i d-nṛuḥ s ɣuṛ-wen, ɣas akken ur kkun-ẓerrent ara wallen, tellam deg wulawen-nneɣ ; nxaq fell-awen aṭas, daymi i neɛṛeḍ a d-nas iwakken a kkun-nẓer.
Acḥal n tikkal i nebɣa a nuɣal ɣuṛ-wen, nekk s yiman-iw, yiwet neɣ snat n tikkal i ɛerḍeɣ a n-ruḥeɣ, meɛna Cciṭan ur aɣ yeǧǧi ara, iqḍeɛ-aɣ abrid.
D kunwi i d sebba n usirem d lfeṛḥ-nneɣ ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi, yis-wen ara nzuxx zdat Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa asm'ara d-yuɣal.
Ț-țideț, d kunwi i d can nneɣ i d lfeṛḥ-nneɣ.
Imi ur nezmir ara a neṣbeṛ fell-awen nnig wannect-a, nufa-d yiwen ṛṛay : nukni a neqqim di temdint n Atinya,
ma d gma-tneɣ Timuti, aqeddac n Sidi Ṛebbi, ițbecciṛen lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Lmasiḥ, a wen-t-in-nceggeɛ a kkun isseǧhed yerna a kkun-inhu di liman nwen,
iwakken yiwen ur ifeččel di teswiɛt-agi n uqehheṛ. Teẓram belli ayagi d ayen i ɣ-ițṛaǧun.
Asmi nella yid-wen nenna-yawen yakan belli a d-yas wass i deg ara nețwaqehheṛ. Atan tura twalam belli d ayen ideṛṛun.

Imi xaqeɣ fell-awen, ur zmireɣ ara ad ṣebṛeɣ, ceggɛeɣ-awen gma tneɣ Timuti iwakken a yi-d-yawi lexbaṛ ma mazal teṭṭfem di liman nwen ; axaṭer uggadeɣ a kkun iɣuṛṛ Cciṭan, aț-țețțum ayen akk i wen-nesselmed, uggadeɣ lxedma nneɣ aț-țuɣal d ulac.

Mi d-yuɣal Timuti s ɣuṛ-wen, yewwi-yaɣ-d lexbaṛ yelhan fell-awen : iḥka-yaɣ-d amek tḍuɛem Sidi Ṛebbi, d leḥmala yellan wway gar-awen ; yenna-yaɣ-d daɣen amek i ɣ-d țmektayem, ur aɣ-tețțum ara, tḥarem melmi ara ɣ-teẓrem am akken i nxaq fell-awen ula d nukni.
Ay atmaten, ɣas akka nella di lmeḥna d iɣeblan, theddnen wulawen nneɣ ɣef wayen yeɛnan liman-nwen.
Tura yuɣal-aɣ-d ṛṛuḥ imi neẓra teṭṭfem di Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Lfeṛḥ-nneɣ d ameqqran zdat Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef ddemma-nwen. Akken nebɣu neḥmed-it fell-awen drus.
Nețḥellil Sidi Ṛebbi am iḍ am ass, a ɣ-d-yefk tagniț i deg ara kkun-nẓer, iwakken a wen-nkemmel aselmed n wayen i kkun-ixuṣṣen di liman-nwen.
Nessutur Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ d Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa a ɣ-d-ldin iberdan iwakken a n-nas ɣuṛ-wen.
Ad isnerni Ṛebbi leḥmala i tesɛam wway gar-awen, aț-țḥemmlem daɣen imdanen meṛṛa am akken i kkun nḥemmel nukni.
Ad isseǧhed Ṛebbi ulawen nwen, iwakken aț-țeṣfum, aț-țilim mbla lɛib zdat Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ i wass i deg ara d-yuɣal Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ nețța d lmalayekkat.
Ay atmaten, tlemdem s ɣuṛ-nneɣ amek ara teddum iwakken aț-țɛeǧbem i Sidi Ṛebbi ; a kkun nenhu s yisem n Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ kemmlet ɣer zdat iwakken aț țimɣuṛem.
Ay atmaten teẓram belli lewṣayat i wen-nesselmed, kkant-ed s ɣuṛ Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
D ṣṣfa n wulawen-nwen i gebɣa Sidi Ṛebbi ; yebɣa aț-țḥadrem iman nwen si lefsad,
yal yiwen deg-wen ur ițțak ara lebɣi i tnefsit-is deg wayen icemten ; ad iddu s ṣṣfa d lḥeṛma,
ur ițmenni ara ayen icemten am akken xeddmen imejhal ur nessin ara Sidi Ṛebbi.
Deg wannect-agi ilaq yiwen ur ițkellix gma-s di tlufa yeɛnan idrimen. Acḥal n tikkal i kkun-nweṣṣa iwakken aț-țḥadrem iman-nwen axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi ad yerr țțar akken i wen-t-id-nenna !
Sidi Ṛebbi ur aɣ-d-inni ara a neddu di lefsad meɛna iweṣṣa-yaɣ-d a neddu s ṣṣfa.
S wakka win ur neqbil ara lewṣayat-agi, mačči d amdan i gɛuṣa, meɛna iɛuṣa Sidi Ṛebbi i wen-d-ițțaken Ṛṛuḥ-is iqedsen.
Ɣef wayen yeɛnan tagmaț, fiḥel ma nemmeslay-awen-d fell-as, imi temyeḥmalem wway gar-awen akken i tlemdem s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Akken daɣen i tḥemmlem atmaten yellan di tmurt n Masidunya meṛṛa. Di leɛnaya nwen ay atmaten, kemmlet deg webrid-agi.
Nadit aț-țɛicem di talwit, ur țɛassat ara d acu i xeddmen wiyaḍ. Xedmet s ifassen-nwen, ur ṭṭamaɛet ara aɣṛum-nwen deg wiyaḍ, akken i kkun-nweṣṣa yakan
iwakken a kkun-qadṛen medden ɣef ddemma n tikli nwen yeṣfan, yerna ur tețțilim ț-țaɛkumt ula i yiwen.
Ay atmaten, ur nebɣi ara a kkun-neǧǧ di ccekk ɣef wayen yeɛnan wid yemmuten, iwakken ur tețțilim ara di leḥzen am wid ur nesɛi ara asirem n leslak n Sidna Ɛisa.
Axaṭer akken numen belli Sidna Ɛisa yemmut yuɣal yeḥya-d, numen daɣen belli Sidi Ṛebbi a d-isseḥyu wid yemmuten, imi umnen s Sidna Ɛisa.
Atah wayen ara wen-d-nini akken i t-id-isselmed Ssid-nneɣ : ma yella mazal-aɣ nedder asm'ara d-yuɣal, ur nețțili ara d imezwura ɣef wid yemmuten.

Axaṭer m'ara d-iffeɣ lameṛ, m'ara d-tenṭeq taɣect n lmelk akk-d ṣṣut n lbuq n Sidi Ṛebbi, Sidna Ɛisa s yiman-is a d-iṣubb seg igenni, imiren widak-nni yemmuten, llan umnen yis, a d-ḥyun d imezwura si ger lmegtin.
Ma d nukni ma yella mazal-aɣ nedder, a nețwarfed yid-sen ɣef wusigna, a nemmager Sidna Ɛisa deg igenwan, iwakken a nili yid-es i dayem.
Ihi mseǧhadet, mṣebbaṛet wway gar-awen s yimeslayen-agi.
Ɣef wayen yeɛnan ussan akk d lweqt, fiḥel ma nura-yawen fell-asen.
Teẓram s yiman-nwen belli ass-nni, Sidna Ɛisa a d-yuɣal am umakar deg iḍ.
M'ara yinin yemdanen : « aql-aɣ di lehna ț-țalwit, » ass-nni ur țfiqen ara alamma yeɣli-d fell-asen nnger, am lewjaɛ m'ara ṭṭfen tameṭṭut yellan s tadist, yernu yiwen ur imenneɛ.
Ma d kunwi ay atmaten, ur tellim ara di ṭṭlam iwakken a d-iɣli wass-nni fell-awen am umakar ;
axaṭer kunwi d arraw n tafat, tețțeddum deg wass ; nukni ur nelli ara d arraw n ṭṭlam iteddun deg yiḍ.
Ihi ur ilaq ara a neɣfel am wiyaḍ, meɛna ilaq a nɛass iman-nneɣ yerna a nɛiwez.
Wid yegganen gganen deg yiḍ, wid iṣekkren țṣekkiren deg yiḍ.
Ma d nukni yellan d arraw n tafat, a nɛass ɣef yiman-nneɣ : a nesɛu liman d leḥmala am llebsa n wuzzal ițlusu uɛeskṛi, a nesɛu asirem n leslak, am tcacit n wuzzal ɣef wuqeṛṛuy.
Axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi ur aɣ-ixtaṛ ara iwakken a nețwaɛaqeb, meɛna yebɣa a nesɛu leslak s Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ
i gemmuten fell-aɣ, iwakken ama nedder ama nemmut a nili yid-es.
S wakka ihi, țemseǧhadet, țemṣebbaṛet wway gar-awen akken i txeddmem yakan.
Di leɛnaya-nwen ay atmaten, qadṛet wid iqeddcen gar-awen, axaṭer s yisem n Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ i kkun nehhun, i kkun-sselmaden.
Ɛuzzet țen tḥemmlem-ten ɣef ddemma n lxedma-nsen, ɛicet di lehna wway gar-awen.
Di leɛnaya-nwen ay atmaten : nhut wid iteddun s yir tikli, ṣebbṛet wid iwumi ɣlin ifadden, refdet wid ifeclen, swesɛet ulawen-nwen ɣuṛ-sen meṛṛa.
Ḥadret iman-nwen ur țțarat ara țțaṛ, qellbet ɣef wayen yelhan ama gar-awen ama ɣer imdanen meṛṛa.
yal ass deɛɛut ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi,
ḥemmdet-eț ɣef kullec. D ayagi i gețṛaǧu Sidi Ṛebbi deg-wen, di tikli-nwen akk-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Ur snusut ara tafat n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ;
ur ḥeqqṛet ara ayen i d-ițweḥḥi Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i yemdanen.
ḥadret iman-nwen ɣef wayen n diri.
Sidi Ṛebbi bab n talwit, ad iṣeffi ṛṛuḥ-nwen, lǧețțat nwen ț-țeṛwiḥin-nwen, iwakken aț țeqqimem d izedganen i wass i deg ara d-yuɣal Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Win i kkun-ixtaṛen, deg-s laman, d nețța ara kkun-iṣṣiwden ɣer wannect agi.
Ay atmaten, deɛɛut ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi fell-aneɣ.

name: 2 Thessalonians
chapters: Nekk Bulus, Silwan akk-d Timuti, i tejmaɛt n watmaten n temdint n Tiṣalunik yumnen s Sidi Ṛebbi d Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a wen-d țțunefkent s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ay atmaten eɛzizen, imi liman-nwen simmal yețnerni, simmal tețțemyeḥmalem wway gar-awen, eɛni mačči d lḥeqq ma nețḥemmid Sidi Ṛebbi fell-awen am iḍ am ass ?
Newweḍ armi nețzuxxu yis-wen di yal tajmaɛt n watmaten, nețțawi-kkun d lemtel axaṭer ɣas akken tenneɛtabem tețwaqehṛem, tṣebrem, teṭṭfem di liman-nwen.
Sidi Ṛebbi d bab n lḥeqq, ma yella iɛemmed aț-țenneɛtabem akkagi, yebɣa a kkun-yerr d wid yuklalen tagelda-ines ; ț-țagelda-agi i ɣef tenneɛtabem.
Axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yellan d Bab n lḥeqq, a d-yerr leqheṛ ɣef wid i kkun-ițqehhiṛen,
a kkun-iṣebber yid-nneɣ, kunwi yețwaqehṛen. Ayagi a d-idṛu asm'ara d-yuɣal Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, m'ara d-iṣubb seg igenwan nețța d lmalayekkat-is
di tlemmast n uḥeǧǧaǧu n tmes iwakken ad iɛaqeb wid iɛuṣan Sidi Ṛebbi, ur neqbil ara lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Sidna Ɛisa.
Lɛiqab ara ten-id-yasen, ț-țawaɣit ur nețfaka, Sidi Ṛebbi a ten-iḥeṛṛem ɣef udem-is, ur țwalin ara lɛaḍima-s.
Ayagi a d-idṛu asm'ara d-yas Sidna Ɛisa ; ass-nni wid yumnen yis ad tɛeǧǧben deg-s, a t-ḥemden m'ara t-walin di lɛaḍima-s ! Ula d kunwi aț-țilim gar-asen axaṭer tumnem s lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i wen-nbecceṛ.

?ef ayagi i ndeɛɛu ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi fell-awen am iḍ am ass, iwakken a kkun-yerr d wid yuklalen tudert i ɣer wen-d-issawel. Nessutur-as daɣen a wen-d-ifk tazmert, iwakken aț-țxedmem ayen akken tessaramem n wayen yelhan, yerna ad ibarek lecɣal txeddmem deg webrid n Sidna Ɛisa.
S wakka imdanen ad ḥemden isem-is ɣef ddemma n tikli-nwen yelhan, kunwi daɣen aț-țwaɛuzzem s ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi akk-d ṛṛeḥma n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
?ef wayen yeɛnan tuɣalin n Ssid nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ț-țemlilit-nneɣ yid-es, di leɛnaya-nwen ay atmaten :

ḥadret a kkun-iffeɣ leɛqel neɣ a wen-ikcem ukukru, ma yella win i wen-d-yennan belli ass n tuɣalin n Sidna Ɛisa yewweḍ-ed ; yezmer lḥal ad yili win i wen-t-id-yennan neɣ win i t-iwalan deg uweḥḥi, neɣ daɣen a wen-arun tabṛaț am akken d nukni i wen-țin-yuran.
Akken yebɣu yili lḥal ur țțaǧat yiwen a kkun-ikellex, axaṭer ass-nni ur d-ițaweḍ ara uqbel ussan n tijehli, uqbel a d-iban wemcum ijehlen i gețṛaǧu nnger.
Win akken ara yessimɣuṛen iman is sennig wayen meṛṛa iɛebbden yemdanen, ad yekcem ɣer lǧameɛ iqedsen n Ṛebbi ad yerr iman-is deg wemkan n Ṛebbi. f+
Ur tecfim ara belli xebbṛeɣ kkun id yakan ɣef ayagi asm'akken lliɣ yid-wen ?
Teẓram acu i t-iṭṭfen ur d-ițban ara tura alamma yewweḍ-ed lweqt-is !
Tazmert n cceṛ yellan d lbaḍna, tebda ccɣel-is, ilaq kan ayen i ț-iṭṭfen ar tura ad ițwakkes.
Imiren amcum-nni amejhul a d- ban, dɣa Sidna Ɛisa a t-iṣuḍ s nnefs-is a t-issenger, a t-imḥu s ufeǧǧeǧ n lɛaḍima-s asm'ara d-yuɣal.
Amcum-agi amejhul a d-yas s tezmert n Cciṭan, ad ixdem leɛǧubat d lbeṛhanat s wayes ara ikellex,
ad issexdem lekdeb d lbaṭel iwakken ad ikellex wid iḍaɛen, axaṭer ur qbilen ara leḥmala n tideț s wayes ara țwaselken.
Daymi Sidi Ṛebbi iceggeɛ-asen-d tazmert n ṭṭlam aț-țexdem deg-sen, iwakken ad amnen s wayen yellan d lekdeb.
S wakka wid akk ur numin ara s tideț, ad țțuɛaqben imi țțafen lfeṛḥ-nsen anagar di lbaṭel.
Ay atmaten ɛzizen ɣer Ṛebbi, ilaq-aɣ a nețḥemmid kull ass Sidi Ṛebbi fell-awen, axaṭer ixtaṛ-ikkun d imezwura iwakken aț-țețțusellkem s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen i kkun-iṣeffan s liman di tideț.
Sidi Ṛebbi issawel-awen-d aț țekkim di tmanegt n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, s lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ i wen-d newwi.
Ihi ay atmaten ḥerzet, ṭṭfet deg uselmed i wen-d-newwi, ama s yimi nneɣ ama s tebṛatin-nneɣ.
Nessutur di Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ akk-d baba-tneɣ Ṛebbi i ɣ-iḥemmlen, i ɣ-d-ifkan s ṛṛeḥma ines ṣṣbeṛ d usirem ițdumun,
ad țțuṣebbṛen wulawen-nwen, a wen-d-tețțunefk tezmert s wayes ara txeddmem anagar ayen yelhan ama di lecɣal-nwen ama deg imeslayen-nwen.
?ef wayen nniḍen ay atmaten, dɛut Sidi Ṛebbi fell-aneɣ iwakken awal-is ad ițțubecceṛ, ad yaweḍ ɣer yal amkan, ad ițwaɛuzz am akken i t-tɛuzzem kunwi.
Dɛut daɣen iwakken a ɣ-isellek si ger ifassen n yemcumen i ɣ-ibɣan cceṛ, axaṭer llan wid ur nețțamen ara.
Lameɛna Sidi Ṛebbi d bab n lețkal, a kkun-isseǧhed, a kkun iḥader ɣef wemcum.
Nesɛa laman ɣuṛ-es fell-awen belli txeddmem yerna aț-țkemlem aț-țxedmem ayen i ɣef i kkun-nweṣṣa.
Ndeɛɛu ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken ad iččaṛ ulawen-nwen s leḥmala-ines, iwakken aț-țesɛum ṣṣbeṛ n Lmasiḥ. f+
Ay atmaten a kkun-nenhu s yisem n Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ : sbeɛdet iman-nwen ɣef atmaten imeɛdazen, ițɛicin akken bɣan, mačči am akken i wen-t-nesselmed.
Teẓram s yiman nwen amek i glaq a ɣ-tɛandem, axaṭer nukni ur nɛac ara deg ussexṛeb asmi nella yid-wen.
Ur neḍmiɛ ula deg yiwen aɣṛum-nneɣ, lameɛna nețɛețțib iman-nneɣ di lxedma iḍ d wass, iwakken ur nețțili ț-țaɛekkumt ula i yiwen.
Yerna lemmer nessuter-awen a ɣ-tɛiwnem, d lḥeqq fell-aɣ ; meɛna nexdem akkenni iwakken a wen-nili d lemtel.
Asmi nella gar-awen nweṣṣa kkun belli « win ur nebɣi ara ad ixdem ur ilaq ara ad yečč. »
Axaṭer nesla belli llan gar-awen imeɛdazen ur nebɣi ara ad xedmen meɛna ggaren iman-nsen di lecɣal i ten-ixḍan.
Imdanen-agi a ten-nweṣṣi s yisem n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ : ad xedmen akken ilaq iwakken a d-ḥeṛṛen aɣṛum nsen.
Ma d kunwi ay atmaten xedmet lxiṛ, ur ɛeggut ara !
Win ur neqbil ara ayen i d-nenna di tebṛaț-agi, jebdet iman-nwen fell-as, ur țeddut ara yid-es iwakken ad inneḥcam, ad issetḥi.
Ur t-ḥețțbet ara d aɛdaw, meɛna nhut-eț am yiwen seg watmaten-nwen.
Nessutur di Sidi Ṛebbi bab n talwit a wen-d-yefk lehna kull ass, di yal tagniț ! Sidi Ṛebbi ad yili yid-wen meṛṛa !
Nekk Bulus, uriɣ-awen sslam-agi s ufus-iw, ț-țagi i ț-țira-inu di yal tabṛaț i wen-ceggɛeɣ.

name: 1 Timothy
chapters: Nekk Bulus amceggeɛ n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, s lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi amsellek-nneɣ akk-d lebɣi n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ i deg yella usirem-nneɣ,
i gma-tneɣ Timuti f+ i d-ṛebbaɣ di liman am mmi n tideț, lbaṛaka, ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a k-d-țțunefkent s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi Baba-tneɣ akk-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ.
Akken i k-nhiɣ uqbel ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer tmurt n Masidunya qqim di temdint n Ifasus f+ iwakken ur tețțaǧǧaḍ ara kra n yemdanen ad slemden ayen i gxulfen tikli di liman,
ini-asen ad xḍun i tmucuha f+ d umeslay n zzux ɣef yizuṛan n tjaddit ur nețfaka, ayagi yețțawi-d lehduṛ ur nesɛi lfayda i ɣ-issebɛaden ɣef liman d lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi.
A sen-tiniḍ annect-agi iwakken a d-tessakiḍ deg wulawen-nsen leḥmala yeṣfan, ad ithedden lxaṭer-nsen yerna ad sɛun liman n tideț ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
Llan kra n yemdanen ffɣen i webrid, țmeslayen kan ɣef wayen ur nesɛi lmeɛna.
Bɣan ad slemden i wiyaḍ ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi, nutni s yiman-nsen ur fhimen d acu i d qqaṛen ur fhimen ayen i sselmaden.
Neẓra belli ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi d ayen yelhan ma yella netbeɛ-iț akken ilaq,

meɛna ilaq daɣen a nẓer belli ccariɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi ur d-tețțunefk ara ɣef ddemma n iḥeqqiyen meɛna tețțunefk-ed ɣef ddemma n yemcumen, i wid iɛuṣan Ṛebbi, i imejhal, i imednuben akk-d wid ur nețțak ara lqima i wayen iqedsen, wid ur nețqadaṛ ara Ṛebbi, wid ineqqen imawlan-nsen akk-d iqettalen,
i wid yeffɣen i webrid, i wat lɛaṛ, i wid itjaṛen deg waklan akk-d i ikeddaben, i wid ur nețțaṭṭaf ara deg wawal-nsen neɣ wid yețxalafen aselmed n tideț i wen-d yețțunefken.
Akka i gella di lexbaṛ n lxiṛ i yi-d-ițțunefken, i d-isbegginen tamanegt n Sidi Ṛebbi ameɣlal.
Ayen i ɣef ara kkun-weṣṣiɣ di tazwara, ḥemmdet cekkṛet Sidi Ṛebbi, ssuturet di tẓallit, deɛɛut ɣuṛ-es ɣef yemdanen meṛṛa.
Deɛɛut ɣef yigelliden d wid akk yeṭṭfen imukan n lḥekma iwakken a nɛic di lisser ț-țalwit, a nḍuɛ Sidi Ṛebbi s lḥeṛma d leqdeṛ.
Ayagi d ayen yelhan, d ayen iɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi amsellek-nneɣ,
axaṭer yebɣa imdanen meṛṛa ad issinen tideț yerna ad țțuselken.
Yiwen n Ṛebbi i gellan, yiwen umcafeɛ daɣen i gellan ger yemdanen d Ṛebbi ; amcafeɛ-agi, d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ
i gefkan iman-is d asfel i leslak n yemdanen meṛṛa. D wagi i d țțbut i d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi di lweqt-is ;
daymi i d-țțuceggɛeɣ iwakken ad beccṛeɣ, ad slemdeɣ i leǧnas ibeṛṛaniyen ayen yeɛnan liman ț-țideț. Ayen akka i d-qqaṛeɣ ț-țideț mačči d lekdeb.
Bɣiɣ ihi ad ilin di mkul amkan yergazen ireffden ifassen ɣer Ṛebbi s wul yeṣfan, mbla lɣecc d yir axemmem.
Akken daɣen i glaq ad xedment tilawin, ad ilint s llebsa isseṭren, ad sɛunt lḥeṛma d neyya, ur țzewwiqent acebbub-nsent, ur țcebbiḥent iman-nsent s ddheb, s tɛeqcin akk-d llebsa ifazen,
meɛna ad cebbḥent iman-nsent s lecɣal yelhan, akken ilaq ad xedment tilawin yețḍuɛun Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ilaq-as i tmeṭṭut aț-țḥesses i uselmed s tsusmi d wannuz.
Ur qebbleɣ ara aț-țesselmed tmeṭṭut neɣ aț-țdebbeṛ ɣef wergaz meɛna aț-țețsusum ( ur d-teggar ara iman-is ).
Axaṭer d Adem i d-yețwaxelqen d amezwaru d wamek i d-terna ?ewwa ; f+
mačči d Adem i geɣwa Cciṭan meɛna d ?ewwa i wumi ikellex f+ armi i tɛuṣṣa Sidi Ṛebbi,
lameɛna aț-țețțusellek s tarwa-s f+ ma tețțeddu s ṣṣfa d neyya di liman d leḥmala.
?-țideț mi qqaṛen : « ma yella win yebɣan ad yuɣal d amdebbeṛ di tejmaɛt d ayen yelhan i gețmenni ».

Lameɛna amdebbeṛ di tejmaɛt ur ilaq ara ad afen deg-s lɣaci wayen ara s-d-ssukksen, ilaq ad yesɛu yiwet n tmeṭṭut kan, ad yili d win iḥekkmen deg iman-is, d aɛeqli, d win iteddun s ṣṣwab. Ilaq ad yili d win yesṭerḥiben deg wexxam-is, d win izemren ad isselmed awal n Ṛebbi ;
ur yețțili ara d asekṛan neɣ d amčaqlal meɛna ad yili d aḥnin d imhenni. Ur ilaq ara ad iḥemmel idrimen ;
ilaq daɣen ad yissin amek ara idebbeṛ ɣef wexxam-is, arraw-is ad ilin d wid yețțaɣen awal yerna a t-țqadaṛen.
Axaṭer ma yella walebɛaḍ ur yezmir ara ad idebbeṛ ɣef wexxam is, amek ara idebbeṛ di tejmaɛt n Sidi Ṛebbi ?
Amdebbeṛ di tejmaɛt ur ilaq ara ad yili d ajdid di liman di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, m'ulac a t-yekcem zzux, aț-țedṛu yid-es akken tedṛa d Cciṭan. f+
Ilaq ula d wid ur numin ara s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ a d-cehden fell-as s lxiṛ ur țțafen ara deg-s wayen ara s-d ssukksen, iwakken ur iɣelli ara di tecṛektin n Cciṭan.
Iqeddacen n tejmaɛt daɣen ilaq ad sɛun leqdeṛ, ad ilin d irgazen iteṭṭfen deg awal-nsen, ad xḍun i tissit n ccṛab akk-d rrbeḥ n lexdeɛ.
Ilaq ad ḥerzen s wul yeṣfan lbaḍna n liman i d-yețwakecfen.
Ilaq ula d nutni ad țwajeṛben di leqdic-nsen, m'ur ufin ara ayen ara sen-d-ssukksen imiren zemren ad qedcen di tejmaɛt.
Ula ț-țiqeddacin n tejmaɛt ilaq ad sɛunt lḥeṛma, ur țmeslayent ara cceṛ ɣef wiyaḍ, ad ilint ț-țiɛeqliyin, ț-țid i ɣef yella lețkal ɣef kullec.
Iqeddacen n tejmaɛt ilaq ad sɛun yiwet n tmeṭṭut kan yerna ad ḍebbṛen ɣef yexxamen-nsen d warraw-nsen akken ilaq.
Axaṭer wid iqeddcen ɣef tejmaɛt akken ilaq, ad yali leqdeṛ-nsen ad nnernin di liman yerna ad sɛun lețkal d ameqqran di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen ixebbeṛ-ed ɛinani belli deg ussan ineggura, aṭas ara iwexxṛen ɣef liman di Lmasiḥ, ad tebɛen wid i ten-ițɣuṛṛun s uselmed i d-yețțasen s ɣuṛ leǧnun.
A ten-ɣuṛṛen wat sin wudmawen yețbecciṛen lekdeb, wid iwumi yemmut wul am akken yețwaqqed s useffud.
Imdanen-agi bɣan ad ḥeṛṛmen zzwaǧ akk-d kra n leṣnaf n lmakla, lameɛna Sidi Ṛebbi ixleq-ed kullec iwakken wid yumnen yis yessnen tideț, a t-ḥemden a t-cekkṛen.
Ayen akk i d-ixleq Sidi Ṛebbi yelha, ur ilaq ara a nerr kra di rrif, acu kan ilaq a t-ncekkeṛ ɣef wayen i ɣ-d-ițțak,
axaṭer ayen akk i d yețwaxelqen iṣeffu-t wawal n Ṛebbi akk-d țẓallit.
Ssefhem-asen ayagi i watmaten iwakken aț-țiliḍ d aqeddac yelhan n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, sseǧhed iman-ik di liman s wawal n Sidi Ṛebbi d uselmed n tideț i ttebɛeḍ s wul yeṣfan.
Ma ț-țimucuha n temɣaṛin ur nesɛi ara lmeɛna i gxulfen liman, ḍeggeṛ-itent akkin fell-ak. Issin amek ara telḥuḍ deg ubrid n Sidi Ṛebbi .
Tazzla deg wannar d ayen yelhan meɛna tenfeɛ i lǧețța kan, ma ṭṭaɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi tenfeɛ i kullec axaṭer deg-s i tella tudert n tura akk-d ț-țin i d-iteddun i ɣ-iwɛed Sidi Ṛebbi.
Awal-agi d awal n tideț yuklalen ad ițwaqbel ɣer yemdanen meṛṛa.
Ma d nukni nețɛețțib iman-nneɣ iwakken a neǧhed di liman, imi nețkel ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi Illu-nneɣ yeddren yellan d amsellek n yemdanen meṛṛa abeɛda wid yumnen yis.
Atan wayen i ɣef ara tweṣṣiḍ imdanen d wayen ara sen-teslemḍeḍ.
?uṛ-ek a k-iḥqeṛ yiwen imi meẓẓiyeḍ di leɛmeṛ, meɛna ili-k d lemtel ger wid yumnen s yimeslayen-ik, s tikli-inek, s leḥmala-inek, s liman-inek ț-țezdeg n wul-ik.
Sɛedday lweqt-ik di leqṛaya d ubecceṛ d uselmed n wawal n Ṛebbi i wiyaḍ, alamma usiɣ-en.
Ur țțaǧa ara di rrif tikci i k-d-ițțunefken s ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi d yimeslayen s wayes i d-caren fell-ak di tejmaɛt mi ssersen ifassen-nsen fell-ak imeqqranen n tejmaɛt.
Err ddehn-ik ɣer wayagi txedmeḍ-t akken ilaq, iwakken imdanen meṛṛa ad walin amek i tețnerniḍ di tikli-inek di Lmasiḥ.
?ader ɣef yiman-ik d wayen i tesselmadeḍ i wiyaḍ, ma tkemmleḍ akken, d leslak ara d-tawiḍ i keččini akk-d wid i k-yesmeḥsisen.
Ur țlummu ara ɣef wemɣaṛ s leɛyaḍ, meɛna nhu-t am akken d baba-k ; enhu daɣen ilmeẓyen am akken d atmaten-ik,
tamɣaṛt am yemma-k, tilmeẓyin am yessetma-k, s wul yeṣfan.
Qadeṛ tuǧǧal f+ telhuḍ ț-țid yeḥwaǧen lemɛawna.

Ma ț-țid yesɛan dderya neɣ dderya n warraw-nsent, ilaq d nutni ara d-yelhun yid-sent, akka ara d-sbeggnen ṭṭaɛa-nsen ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi m'ara rren lxiṛ i imawlan-nsen, ayagi d ayen i gɛeǧben i Sidi Ṛebbi.
Taǧǧalt i gellan weḥd-es ur nesɛi win ara ț-țirefden tețkel ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi tdeɛɛu ɣuṛ-es tețḥellil-it am yiḍ am ass.
Ma ț-țaǧǧalt yeṭṭafaṛen zzhu n ddunit, tinna temmut ɣas mazal-iț tedder.
Atah wayen i ɣef ara tweṣṣiḍ tuǧǧal iwakken ur d-yețțili ara wayen ara sent-d-ssukksen.
Ma yella win ur nɛawen ara at wexxam-is abeɛda imawlan-is, atan yeǧǧa liman, yuɣal akteṛ n win ijehlen.
Taǧǧalt ilaq aț-țesɛu sețțin n iseggasen di leɛmeṛ-is iwakken a ț-tɛawen tejmaɛt, ilaq aț-țili tezweǧ yiwet n tikkelt kan.
Ilaq aț-țili tețwassen s lecɣal-is yelhan, ț-țin iṛebban arraw-is akken ilaq, isṭerḥiben deg wexxam-is, issarden iḍaṛṛen n iqeddacen n Sidi Ṛebbi ; treffed imeɣban, txeddem lxiṛ.
Meɛna ur qebbel ara i tejmaɛt aț-țɛawen tuǧǧal meẓẓiyen di leɛmeṛ, axaṭer m'ara bɣunt ad ɛawdent zzwaǧ zemrent ad ǧǧent abrid n Lmasiḥ ;
s wakka ad xedɛent lɛahed-nni i fkant i Sidi Ṛebbi.

Yerna m'ur sɛint ara ayen ara xedment, ad țcalint seg wexxam ɣer wayeḍ mačči kan imi ur sɛint ara ccɣel, meɛna ad kettṛent deg yimeslayen ur nesɛi lmeɛna, ad ggarent iman-nsent deg wayen i tent-yexḍan.
Ihi bɣiɣ ad nhuɣ tuǧǧal meẓẓiyen di leɛmeṛ ad ɛawdent zzwaǧ, ad sɛunt dderya, ad lhint d yexxam-nsent iwakken iɛdawen ur țțafen ara ayen n diri ara hedṛen fell-asent.
Axaṭer llant seg-sent tid i geffɣen i webrid n Ṛebbi tebɛent abrid n Cciṭan.
Ma tella tin yumnen tesɛa tuǧǧal i s-yețțilin, d nețțat i glaq a tent tɛiwen iwakken ur țțilint ara ț țaɛkumt i tejmaɛt, akken daɣen tajmaɛt aț-țizmir aț-țɛiwen tid ur nesɛi ara win ara tent-irefden.
Imdebbṛen n tejmaɛt ixeddmen ccɣel-nsen akken ilaq uklalen ad țwaxelṣen s zzyada abeɛda wid yenneɛtaben deg ubecceṛ d uselmed.
Wid yellan d aklan yumnen s Lmasiḥ ilaq ad ẓren belli imɛellmen-nsen uklalen leqdeṛ, iwakken ur ițwargam f+ ara yisem n Sidi Ṛebbi, ur kkaten ara medden deg wayen i nesselmad.

Wid yesɛan imɛellmen i gețțamnen s Lmasiḥ ur ilaq ara ad kksen fell-asen leqdeṛ imi d atmaten-nsen i llan, lameɛna ad qedcen fell-asen seg ul imi d wid yumnen s Lmasiḥ, d wid eɛzizen ara yesfayden si leqdic-nsen. Atah wayen ara tweṣṣiḍ d wayen ara teslemdeḍ :
win ara yeslemden ayen ixulfen liman-nneɣ, ur neqbil ara awal imqeddes n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ,
yeččuṛ d zzux ur yessin kra ; iḥemmel ad ikețțeṛ awal, yețnaɣ ɣef ddemma n yimeslayen. Seg wannect-agi i d-itekk umennuɣ, tismin, lekfeṛ d ccekk,
imeslayen nsen ur țfakan ara axaṭer ččuṛen s yir ixemmimen teɛṛeq-asen tideț, ɣilen s ṭṭaɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi ara uɣalen d imeṛkantiyen.
?-țideț abrid n Sidi Ṛebbi yețțawi-d rrbeḥ ameqqran, meɛna ma yella nesteqniɛ s wayen nesɛa.
Axaṭer ur d-newwi yid-nneɣ acemma ɣer ddunit, akken daɣen ur nezmir a nawi acemma yid-nneɣ m'ara nemmet.
Ihi ma yella nesɛa ayen ara nečč d wayen ara nels, ilaq a nesteqneɛ.
Ma d wid yettabaɛen cci n ddunit ɣellin deg ujeṛṛeb akk-d tfextin n yir ccehwat n tnefsit-nsen, i gețțawin imdanen ɣer txeṣṣart akk-d nnger.
Axaṭer ṭṭmeɛ n idrimen d sebba n kra n wayen yellan diri-t. Llan kra i gtebɛen cci-yagi n ddunit, ffɣen i webrid n Lmasiḥ, ḍuṛṛen tiṛwiḥin nsen, sseɣlin-d lhemm ɣef yiman nsen.
Ma d kečč ay aqeddac n Sidi Ṛebbi ssebɛed iman-ik ɣef wannect agi meṛṛa, nadi ɣef lḥeqq d ṭṭaɛa, liman, lmaḥibba, ṣṣbeṛ d wannuz.
Sseǧhed iman-ik deg umenɣi ɣef liman, eṭṭef di tudert n dayem i ɣer k-d-issawel Sidi Ṛebbi, asm'akken i d-cehdeḍ s wayen tumneḍ zdat yemdanen meṛṛa.
A k-weṣṣiɣ zdat Sidi Ṛebbi i d-yețțaken tudert, zdat Ɛisa Lmasiḥ i gcehden ɣef liman akken ilaq zdat Bunṭus Bilaṭus.
Tbeɛ lewṣayat-agi, iwakken aț-țeqqimeḍ d azedgan, ur a k-d-issukus yiwen kra alamma d ass n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ
ara d-yuɣalen di lweqt i d-ihegga Sidi Ṛebbi awḥid Bab n tezmert, Agellid n igelliden d Ssid n ssyadi,
win yeddren i dayem, i gellan di tafat ur yezmir yiwen aț-țyaweḍ, ulac win i t-iwalan neɣ i gzemren a t-iwali. I nețța tamanegt ț-țezmert i dayem ! Amin.
Weṣṣi imeṛkantiyen n ddunit-agi iwakken ur ssemɣaṛen ara iman-nsen, ur țkalayen ara ɣef cci n ddunit ur nesɛi laman, meɛna ad țeklen ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi i ɣ-d-ițțaken lxiṛ s tugeț iwakken a nili di lfeṛḥ.
Weṣṣi-ten ad xeddmen lxiṛ, ad ilin d imeṛkantiyen s lecɣal lɛali, ad țseddiqen mbla cceḥḥa, ad bḍun d wiyaḍ ayen sɛan.
S wakka, ad jemɛen i yiman-nsen agerruj yelhan i wussan i d-iteddun iwakken ad sɛun tudert n tideț.
A Timuti eɛzizen, eḥrez ayen i tlemdeḍ, ssebɛed iman-ik ɣef yimeslayen ur nesɛi lmeɛna, ɣef yimennuɣen yeɛnan tamusni n lekdeb.
Wid i gtebɛen tamusni-agi, sṛuḥen liman-nni i sɛan di Lmasiḥ. Ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi aț-țili yid-wen !

name: 2 Timothy
chapters: Nekk Bulus aqeddac n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ s lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi, țwaceggɛeɣ ad beccṛeɣ tudert i ɣ-iwɛed Sidi Ṛebbi di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
A Timuti a mmi eɛzizen : leɛfu, ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a k-d-țțunefkent s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ akk-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ.
?ḥemmideɣ Sidi Ṛebbi i ɣef qeddceɣ s wul yeṣfan akken qedcen fell-as lejdud-iw, deɛɛuɣ fell-ak am yiḍ am ass ;
m'ara d-mmektiɣ imeṭṭawen-ik, țḥiriɣ melmi ara k-ẓreɣ iwakken ad iliɣ di lfeṛḥ.
?mektayeɣ-ed neyya-nni i tesɛiḍ di liman, akken i ț-tesɛa sețți-k Luiza akk-d yemma-k Anisa ; tḥeqqeqeɣ belli ar ass-a mazal-iț deg wul-ik.
Daymi bɣiɣ a k-weṣṣiɣ a d tessakiḍ tikci-nni i k-d-yețțunefken s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi asm'akken i sserseɣ ifassen-iw fell-ak.
Axaṭer mačči d Ṛṛuḥ n ukukru i ɣ-d-yefka Sidi Ṛebbi meɛna d Ṛṛuḥ yeččuṛen ț-țazmert d leḥmala akk-d leɛqel.
Ihi ur țsetḥi ara aț-țcehdeḍ ɣef Ssid-nneɣ, ur țsetḥi ara daɣen yis-i nekk yellan d ameḥbus ɣef ddemma-s. Meɛna eqbel leɛtab yid-i ɣef ddemma n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ, țkel ɣef tezmert i d-yețțak Sidi Ṛebbi.
D nețța i ɣ-isellken, i ɣ-d-issawlen ɣer tudert iqedsen, ayagi mačči ɣef ddemma n lecɣal-nneɣ meɛna d nețța i gebɣan s ṛṛeḥma-ines i ɣ-d yețțunefken s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ uqbel a d-texleq ddunit.
Ṛṛeḥma-agi tban-ed tura s tisin n wemsellek-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, i gɣelben lmut, ibeggen-ed tafat n tudert ur nețfaka s lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
?ef ddemma n lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ i d-țțucegɛeɣ d ṛṛasul iwakken ad beccṛeɣ, ad slemdeɣ.
Ihi kečč a mmi, sseǧhed iman-ik s ṛṛeḥma i gellan di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Ayen tesliḍ s ɣuṛ-i zdat waṭas inigan, sseḥfeḍ-it i wid yeṭṭfen di liman di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ iwakken nutni daɣen ad izmiren a t-slemden i wiyaḍ.
Awi amur-ik n leɛtab am uɛsekṛi n Lmasiḥ.
Aɛsekṛi i gebɣan ad yeɛǧeb i lqebṭan-is ur ilaq ara ad ixemmem ɣef lecɣal n ddunit.
Ulac daɣen win ara irebḥen timzizla ma yella ur yuzzil ara akken i d-yenna lqanun.
Afellaḥ ițenɛețțaben, d nețța i gezwar lḥal ad iɣellet.
Efhem ayen akka i k-d-nniɣ axaṭer d Sidi Ṛebbi ara k-iɛawnen aț-țfehmeḍ kullec.
Mmekti-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ i d-iḥyan si ger lmegtin, win akken i d-iffɣen seg uẓaṛ n Sidna Dawed akken i t-id-yenna lexbaṛ n lxiṛ n Lmasiḥ i ɣ ɣ ecciṛeɣ ;
lexbaṛ-agi i ɣef nneɛtabeɣ armi țwarzeɣ s snasel am akken d amcum i lliɣ, meɛna awal n Sidi Ṛebbi ur yețwacekkal ara.
Daymi ṣebṛeɣ i kullec ɣef ddemma n wid yețwaxtaṛen iwakken ula d nutni ad sɛun leslak i gellan di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ akk-d țmanegt n dayem.
Atah wayen yuklalen lețkal : ma nemmut yid-es, a nidir daɣen yid-es ;
ma yella neṭṭef di liman, a neḥkem yid-es ; ma yella nenkkeṛ-it ula d nețța a ɣ-yenkeṛ ;
ma yella nexdeɛ-it, nețța ur a ɣ-ixeddeɛ ara axaṭer ur yezmir ara ad yenkeṛ ayen i d-yenna.
Atah wayen ara sen-d-smektiḍ : nhu-ten zdat Ṛebbi ur țemčeqlalen ara ɣef yimeslayen ur nesɛi lmeɛna, yessufuɣen i webrid wid i sen ismeḥsisen.
Exdem lmeǧhud-ik zdat n Ṛebbi, aț-țiliḍ d aqeddac ibedden ɣer ccɣel-is, ur nețsetḥi ara deg wayen i gxeddem, i gețbecciṛen awal n Sidi Ṛebbi s lḥeqq.
Xḍu i yimeslayen ur nesɛi lmeɛna i gxulfen liman axaṭer wid i ten itebɛen simmal țzaden teffɣen i webrid n Ṛebbi.
Imeslayen-nsen am lehlak i teddun di lǧețța armi yečča-ț meṛṛa. Llan gar-asen ?imnayus d Filitus
i gwexxṛen ɣef webrid n tideț, qqaṛen belli ḥeggu n lmegtin dayen yedṛa-d, s wakka ssufuɣen aṭas n yemdanen seg webrid n liman.
Lameɛna d lsas i gessers Sidi Ṛebbi ara idumen : Ssid-nneɣ yeẓra wid yellan d ayla-s ; f+ yura daɣen win ara yinin nekk d ayla-s, ilaq ad yexḍu i wayen n diri. f+

Deg wexxam n imeṛkantiyen mačči d iqbucen n ddheb neɣ n lfeṭṭa kan i gellan meɛna llan daɣen wid n wesɣaṛ d wid n wakal ; wid n ddheb d lfeṭṭa țțaǧan-ten i leqdic n wussan n tmeɣṛa ma d wiyaḍ i leqdic n mkul ass.
Ilaq aț-țeẓred belli ɣer taggara n ddunit a d-asen wussan iweɛṛen.

Imdanen ad țxemmimen ɣef yiman-nsen kan, ad ṭṭamaɛen deg idrimen, ad ssemɣuṛen iman-nsen, ad țzuxxun, ad reggmen di Ṛebbi, ad țɛaṣin imawlan-nsen, ad nekkṛen lxiṛ, ad tekksen sser ɣef wayen yesɛan lḥeṛma,
ur seɛɛun ṛṛeḥma ur seɛɛun leḥnana deg ulawen-nsen, ad skiddiben ɣef wiyaḍ, ur zemmren ara ad ḥekmen deg iman-nsen, ulawen nsen qquṛen, d iɛdawen n lxiṛ,
d ixeddaɛen, a ten-isderɣel zzux, ad ḥemmlen lebɣi n tnefsit-nsen wala lebɣi n Sidi Ṛebbi ;
ad tebɛen abrid n Sidi Ṛebbi s wawal kan meɛna ad nekkṛen tazmert yellan deg-s. Ihi xḍu-k i yemdanen am wigi.
Kra seg-sen keččmen ɣer kra n yexxamen, țkellixen tilawin ur nesɛi ara lḥeṛma i gețțawi zzhu n ddunit ;
țqellibent daymen ad fehment, lameɛna leɛmeṛ țțawḍent ɣer tmusni n tideț.
Am akken i xulfen Yanes d Yambris Sidna Musa, f+ akken daɣen ara xalfen tideț yemdanen-agi, aț-țeɛwej lefhama-nsen, ad ffɣen i webrid n liman.
Meɛna ur țțawḍen ɣer wacemma axaṭer imdanen meṛṛa a ten-ɛeqlen belli ffɣen i webrid am akken tedṛa d Yanes d Yambris.
Ma d kečč tettebɛeḍ akken ilaq ayen i k-slemdeɣ, tikli-inu, ixemmimen-iw, liman-iw, ṣṣbeṛ-iw, leḥmala-inu d ẓẓwara-inu,
leqheṛ i țwaqehṛeɣ akk-d leɛtab-iw. Teẓriḍ lemḥayen i gɛeddan fell-i di temdinin n Antyuc, n Ikunyum d Listra ? Anwa leqheṛ iwumi ur ṣbiṛeɣ ara ? Meɛna Sidi Ṛebbi isellek-iyi seg-sen meṛṛa.
Kra n win yebɣan ad iddu di liman n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ad ițțuqehheṛ.
Ma d imcumen ixeddaɛen, ad țkemmilen dayem di cceṛ-nsen, ad ɣuṛṛen wiyaḍ, ad rnun iman-nsen.
Ma d kečč eḥrez ayen i tlemdeḍ s wayes i tesqenɛeḍ ; teẓriḍ anwa i k-islemden.
Seg asmi telliḍ d ameẓyan i tessneḍ tira iqedsen ; yis-sent ara tesɛuḍ lefhama yețțawin ɣer leslak s liman di Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Yal tira iqedsen s ɣuṛ Ṛebbi i d-tekka yerna twulem i uselmed, i usefhem, i nehhu akk-d țṛebga deg webrid n lḥeqq,
iwakken yal aqeddac n Sidi Ṛebbi ad yili d amdan ikemlen i gwulmen i yal ccɣel yelhan.
A k-n-ssutreɣ ɣef wudem n Ṛebbi d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ ara iḥasben wid yeddren d wid yemmuten, i lmend n wass n tuɣalin-is ț-țgeldit-is.
Becceṛ awal n Sidi Ṛebbi ama di teswiɛt yelhan ama di teswiɛt iweɛṛen, ssefhem, lumm, enhu, sselmed s ṣṣbeṛ d leɛqel.
Axaṭer a d-yaweḍ lweqt anda kra n yemdanen ur zemmren ara ad slen i uselmed n tideț, lameɛna ad tebɛen lebɣi n tnefsit-nsen, a d-sbedden lecyux ara sen-d-ihedṛen ayen kan i sen-iɛeǧben ;
ad sɛuẓẓgen iman nsen ɣef tideț, ad rren ddehn-nsen ɣer tmucuha.
Ma d kečč ḥekkem deg iman-ik di kullec, ṣṣbeṛ i cedda d leɛtab, becceṛ lexbaṛ n lxiṛ , txedmeḍ lwaǧeb-ik n uqeddac n Sidi Ṛebbi akken ilaq.
Ma d nekk yewweḍ-ed lweqt i deg ilaq ad sebbleɣ iman-iw, yewweḍ-ed lweqt i deg ara ṛuḥeɣ.
Kfiɣ ccɣel-iw yerna ṭṭfeɣ di liman ar tura, nnuɣeɣ imenɣi n tideț armi ț-țaggara.
Tura yețṛaǧu-yi lḥeqq n lxedma-w ara yi-d-yefk Bab n lḥeqq deg ass n lḥisab, yerna mačči i nekk kan, lameɛna i wid meṛṛa i t-iḥemmlen yețṛaǧun ass n tuɣalin-is.
Exdem lmeǧhud-ik iwakken ur tețɛeṭṭileḍ ara a d-taseḍ ɣuṛ-i.
Gma-tneɣ Dimas yeǧǧa-yi, yewwi-t zzhu n ddunit, iṛuḥ ɣer temdint n Tisalunik. Gma-tneɣ Krisis iṛuḥ ɣer tmurt n Galasya, ma d gma-tneɣ Tit iṛuḥ ɣer tmurt n Dalmasya.
Anagar gma-tneɣ Luqa i geqqimen yid-i. Awi-d yid-ek gma tneɣ Maṛqus iwakken ad iyi-iɛawen di lxedma-w.
Ma d gma-tneɣ Ticik atan ceggɛeɣ-t ɣer temdint n Ifasus.
M'ara d-taseḍ, awi-d yid-ek abeṛnus-nni i ǧǧiɣ deg wexxam n Karbus di temdint n Truwas, awi-d yid-ek daɣen idlisen, abeɛda wid yețwaxedmen s weglim.
Alixandru aḥeddad iḍuṛṛ-iyi, ixdem-iyi aṭas n cceṛ meɛna ayen yexdem a t-yaf ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ula d kečč ḥader iman-ik seg-s, axaṭer yețxaṣam-aɣ-d daymen deg wayen i nețbecciṛ.
Ass amezwaru i deg d-beddeɣ ɣer ccṛeɛ ur ufiɣ ula d yiwen ɣer tama-w, ǧǧan-iyi akk ; lameɛna a wer ten-iḥaseb Ṛebbi ɣef wayagi !
D Sidi Ṛebbi i yi-iɛawnen, i yi-isǧehden, iwakken lexbaṛ n lxiṛ ad ițțubecceṛ s lekmal-is i leǧnas nniḍen meṛṛa yerna isellek-iyi-d seg imi n yizmawen.
Sidi Ṛebbi mazal a yi-iḥader ɣef wayen akk n diri yerna ad iyi-isellek iwakken ad kecmeɣ tagelda-ines yellan deg igenwan. I nețța tamanegt si lǧil ɣer lǧil ! Amin !
Sellem ɣef Briska d Akilas akk-d țwacult n Unisifur.
Gma-tneɣ Irast yeqqim di temdint n Kurintus, ma d Trufim ǧǧiɣ-t di temdint n Milet mazal-it yehlek.
Exdem lmeǧhud-ik iwakken a d taseḍ uqbel ccetwa. Bulus, Buden, Linus, Kludya d watmaten akk nniḍen țsellimen-d fell-ak.
Sidi Ṛebbi ad yili yid-ek ! Ṛṛeḥma-s a d-ters fell-awen ! Amin.

name: Titus
chapters: Nekk Bulus aqeddac n Sidi Ṛebbi, i d-iceggeɛ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ iwakken ad ssiwleɣ i wid akk yextaṛ Sidi Ṛebbi a d-uɣalen ɣer webrid-is yerna ad issinen tideț,
akken ad țeklen belli sɛan tudert n dayem, tudert i gewɛed Sidi Ṛebbi uqbel a d-tețwaxleq ddunit nețța ur neskiddib ara.
Yefka-d awal-is di lweqt ilaqen, ibeggen-it-id di lexbaṛ i yi-d yețțunefken s lameṛ n Sidi Ṛebbi amsellek-nneɣ.
Uriɣ-ed tabṛaț-agi i kečč, a Tit a mmi n tideț di liman i ɣ-yesdukklen : ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a k-d-țțunefkent s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi akk-d Ɛisa Lmasiḥ amsellek-nneɣ !
?ǧiɣ-k di tegzirt n Kritus iwakken aț-țkemmleḍ ccɣel-nni ur nfuk ara, yerna aț-țesbeddeḍ di yal tamdint imeqqranen n tejmuyaɛ n imasiḥiyen akken i k-n-umṛeɣ.

Yal yiwen deg-sen ilaq ad yili d amdan iwumi ur d-ssukksen acemma, ad yesɛu yiwet tmeṭṭut kan, arraw-is ad ilin d wid iḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi, ad sɛun tikli yelhan, ad țțaɣen awal iwakken ur sen-d-ssukkusen ara wiyaḍ kra n diri.

Ilaq ameqqran n tejmaɛt ad yili yeṣfa di tikli-ines, imi d nețța i geṭṭfen lecɣal n Sidi Ṛebbi, ur ilaq ad yili d win yessimɣuṛen iman-is, ur ilaq ad ireffu, ur ilaq ad yili d asekṛan, ur ilaq ad yeskker ccwal, ur ilaq daɣen a t-ɣwun yedrimen n leḥṛam.
Lameɛna ilaq-as ad yili d win yețqabalen s wudem lɛali, d bab lxiṛ, d aɛeqli, d aḥeqqi, d win yețḍuɛun Sidi Ṛebbi, d win iḥekkmen deg iman-is ;
ilaq ad yeṭṭef deg awal n Sidi Ṛebbi yellan ț-țideț akken i t-yelmed, iwakken ad yizmir ad isselmed, ad inhu wiyaḍ yerna a d-isbeggen i wid i d-yekkaten deg awal-agi, belli ɣelṭen.
Aṭas seg wat Isṛail i gɛuṣan Sidi Ṛebbi yerna țkellixen medden s imeslayen-nsen,
ilaq a sen-terrem tikmamin i yimawen-nsen. Skarayen lhul deg yexxamen m'ara sselmaden ayen ur nlaq ara, iwakken ad rebḥen leḥṛam.
Yiwen seg-sen i ḥesben d nnbi, yenna-d : « at țegzirt n Kritus si zik-nsen d imeskaddaben, d lewḥuc iweɛṛen, d ifenyanen yețxemmimen kan ad ččen ' ' ;
ayagi i d-yenna ț-țideț. Daymi, ilaq a ten-tenhuḍ s lewɛaṛa, iwakken ad sɛun liman iseḥḥan ;
ur ilaq ara ad țḥessisen i tmucuha n wudayen akk-d lewṣayat n yemdanen ur neqbil ara tideț.
Kullec zeddig i wid zeddigen, meɛna ulac ayen zeddigen i wid ur nzeddig ara, ur nețțamen ara s Ṛebbi ; imi xemmimen-nsen d wulawen-nsen neǧsen yerna ur țendemmayen ara.
Imdanen-agi qqaṛen nessen Ṛebbi, meɛna cceṛ i xeddmen yesbeggin-ed belli ur t-ssinen ara, ɛuṣan Sidi Ṛebbi xeddmen anagar wayen yekṛeh, ur zmiren ara ad xedmen ayen yelhan.
Ma d kečč sselmed ayen yellan ț-țideț n Sidi Ṛebbi.
Ini i yemɣaṛen ad setqenɛen, ad fken leqdeṛ i yiman-nsen, ad sɛun leɛqel, ad amnen s Sidi Ṛebbi s tideț, ad ḥemmlen wiyaḍ seg wul, ad ṣebṛen i leɛtab.
Ini daɣen i temɣarin ad sɛunt tikli yeṣfan, ur ilaq ara ad ilint ț-țiqeṛṛaḍin, ur ilaq ara ad țḥawalent tissit n ccṛab meɛna ilaq ad nehhunt ɣer wayen yelhan,
ad țweṣṣint tilawin ad ḥemmlent irgazen-nsent d warraw nsent,
ad ilint ț-țiɛeqliyin, ad ddunt s ṣṣfa, ad lhint d lecɣal n wexxam, ad lhunt, ad țțaɣent awal i yergazen-nsent iwakken awal n Sidi Ṛebbi ur yețwargam ara.
Nhu daɣen ilmeẓyen ad sɛun leɛqel ;
kečč s yiman-ik ilaq aț-țiliḍ d lemtel s lecɣal-ik yelhan, sselmad seg wul akk-d țideț,
s imeslayen iṣeḥḥan i deg ur yezmir yiwen a d iwwet, iwakken ixṣimen-ik ur țțafen ara ayen n diri ara hedṛen fell-aneɣ yerna ad nneḥcamen.
Iqeddacen daɣen ilaq-asen ad țțaɣen awal yerna ad ɛeǧben bab-nsen, ur sen-țeddun ara di nneqma,
ilaq ur ten-țțakren ara meɛna ad ilin d wid imeɛnen i deg yella laman, iwakken aselmed n Sidi Ṛebbi amsellek-nneɣ ad yesɛu ccan.
Sidi Ṛebbi isbeggen-ed ṛṛeḥma-s i d-yewwin leslak i yemdanen meṛṛa.
Ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi tesselmad-aɣ a neṭṭixeṛ ɣef lecɣal-nneɣ ur nelhi d wayen akk n diri yellan di ddunit, a nɛic di ddunit-a s ṣṣwab, s lḥeqq d ṭṭaɛa n Sidi Ṛebbi ;
akka ihi ara neṛǧu lfeṛḥ n wass i nessaram i deg ara d-tban tmanegt n Yillu-nneɣ ameqqran, amsellek nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Yefka iman-is fell-aneɣ iwakken a ɣ-isellek si ddnub yerna a ɣ-yerr d agdud-is yeṣfan, iwejden i lecɣal yelhan.
Akka i glaq aț-țețmeslayeḍ, aț-țnehhuḍ, aț-țețweṣṣiḍ s lewɛaṛa, ur țțaǧa yiwen a k-yeḥqeṛ.
Smekti-ten-id ad qadṛen wid iḥekkmen, ad țțaɣen awal, ad ilin wejden ad xedmen lecɣal yelhan :
ur kkaten deg yiwen, ad ilin d imhenniyen d imawlan n tifrat, yeččuṛen d leḥnana ɣer yemdanen meṛṛa.
Axaṭer ula d nukni zik txuṣṣ-aɣ tmusni, ur nețțaɣ ara awal ; nella nḍaɛ, nella d aklan n zzhu d wayen akk s wayes i ɣ-tesseḍmeɛ ddunit, nella d imcumen, nɛac di tismin, nekṛeh wiyaḍ, wiyaḍ keṛhen-aɣ.
Meɛna asmi i d-ibeggen Sidi Ṛebbi leḥnana-s d leḥmala-s i yemdanen,
isellek-aɣ mačči axaṭer d iḥeqqiyen i nella meɛna isellek-aɣ s ṛṛeḥma-s tameqqrant ; yessared-aɣ si ddnub-nneɣ s tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen iwakken a d-nlal d ijdiden ;
Sidi Ṛebbi yeččuṛ-aɣ s Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen s Ɛisa Lmasiḥ amsellek-nneɣ,
iwakken s ṛṛeḥma-ines a nuɣal d iḥeqqiyen zdat Sidi Ṛebbi, a ɣ-d tețțunefk tudert n dayem i nețṛaǧu.
Awal-agi ț-țideț yerna bɣiɣ a d tesmektayeḍ ayagi kull-as iwakken wid yumnen s Ṛebbi, ad xeddmen anagar ayen yelhan, d ayagi kan i gelhan yerna yeṣleḥ i yemdanen !
Ur sṭuqqutet ara awal mbla lmeɛna ɣef wayen yeɛnan izuṛan n lejdud neɣ čaqlalat d umenɣi ɣef ddemma n ccariɛa, axaṭer d ayen ur nesɛi azal, ur neṣliḥ.
Ma yella tenhiḍ tikkelt neɣ snat win i d-yeskaren ccwal, ur k-d-ismeḥses ara, ssebɛed-it fell-ak ;
amdan am wagi yeṭṭaxeṛ i webrid n tideț, ddnub i yiri-s.
M'ara k-n-ceggɛeɣ gma-tneɣ Artimas neɣ Tucik, ilaq-ak a d-ṛuḥeḍ a nemlil di temdint n Nikubulis, dinna ara sɛeddiɣ ccetwa.
Eɛṛeḍ aț-țɛiwneḍ Zennac yellan d abugaṭu yesnen ccariɛa akk-d Abulus m'ara ṛuḥen ad safṛen, tefkeḍ-asen ayen ara ḥwiǧen.
Axaṭer ilaq daɣen atmaten-nneɣ ad lemden ad xedmen i wiyaḍ lecɣal yelhan, iwakken ad sɛun ayen ara ḥwiǧen, ur țțilin ara mbla lfayda.
Wid akk yellan yid-i țsellimen-d fell-ak. Sellem ɣef wid i ɣ-ihemmlen i gḍuɛen Sidi Ṛebbi. Ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi a d-ters fell-awen !

name: Philemon
chapters: Nekk, Bulus yellan di lḥebs ɣef ddemma n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ, akk-d d gma-tneɣ Timuti, i kečč a Filimun eɛzizen, amdakkel-nneɣ di leqdic,
i weltma-tneɣ Abya, i Arxibus aṛfiq-nneɣ di lecɣal n Lmasiḥ akk-d tejmaɛt i gețțilin deg wexxam-ik ;
ṛṛeḥma ț-țalwit a wen-d-tețțunefkent s ɣuṛ Sidi Ṛebbi baba-tneɣ akk-d Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ.
Mkul m'ara dɛuɣ ɣer Ṛebbi țmektayeɣ-k-id, țḥemmideɣ Sidi Ṛebbi fell-ak ;
axaṭer sliɣ ɣef liman-ik meqṛen di Sidna Ɛisa Lmasiḥ akk-d leḥmala i tesɛiḍ ɣer yemqedsen meṛṛa.
Ssutureɣ di Ṛebbi iwakken a d tesbeggneḍ liman-inek di Lmasiḥ s lecɣal yelhan, yerna aț-țɛeqleḍ ayen meṛṛa i ɣ-yelhan i nukni deg webrid n Lmasiḥ.
Feṛḥeɣ, yethedden wul-iw ɣef ddemma n leḥmala-inek axaṭer yis-ek a gma theddnen wulawen n yemqedsen.
?as Lmasiḥ iserreḥ-iyi iwakken ad ḍebbṛeɣ fell-ak ɣef wayen i glaq aț-țxedmeḍ,
bɣiɣ axiṛ a k-ssutreɣ s leḥmala imi nekk Bulus yellan d amɣaṛ yerna tura d ameḥbus ɣef ddemma n Ɛisa Lmasiḥ,
A k-ḥelleleɣ ɣef ddemma n gma-tneɣ Unizim, i guɣalen d mmi axaṭer wwiɣ-t-id ɣer webrid n Lmasiḥ dagi di lḥebs.
Zik ur k-yenfiɛ ara, meɛna tura infeɛ-aɣ di sin am kečč am nekk.
Nețța yeɛzizen ɣuṛ-i aṭas, atan a k-t-in-erreɣ ihi.
Acḥal bɣiɣ ad iqqim dagi ɣuṛ-i iwakken ad iyi-iqdec deg umkan-ik, m'akka țwaḥebseɣ ɣef ddemma n lexbaṛ n lxiṛ.
Meɛna ur bɣiɣ ara ad xedmeɣ ayagi mbla ṛṛay-ik, iwakken ayen ara yi-txedmeḍ n wayen yelhan ur t-txeddmeḍ ara s uḥettem, lameɛna a t-txedmeḍ s wul-ik d lebɣi-k.
Anwi yeẓran ? Ahat yemfaṛaq yid-ek i kra n lweqt kan iwakken asm'ara temlilem ur tețțuɣalem ara aț-țemfaṛaqem,
imiren ur yețțili ara d akli meɛna axiṛ n wakli imi guɣal d yiwen seg watmaten eɛzizen, abeɛda ɣuṛ-i, ilaq ad yiɛziz fell-ak akteṛ imi tura mačči d aqeddac-ik kan i gella, meɛna d gma-tneɣ di Lmasiḥ.
Ma yella ț-țidet tḥesbeḍ-iyi d aḥbib-ik tḥemmleḍ-iyi, sṭerḥeb yis am akken ara tesṭerḥbeḍ yis-i.
Ma yella iḍlem-ik neɣ tețțalaseḍ-as lḥaǧa, ḥaseb-iyi-d nekkini.
Uriɣ-ak-n ayagi s ufus-iw : « d nekk Bulus ara k-ixellṣen deg wayen i s-tețțalaseḍ » yerna mbla ma smektaɣ-k-id belli d nekk i k-id yewwin ɣer webrid n leslak.
A gma, xdem-iyi lemziya-agi ɣef ddemma n Ssid-nneɣ Ɛisa Lmasiḥ akken ad yethedden wul-iw di Lmasiḥ.
Uriɣ-ak-n tabṛaț-agi imi țekleɣ ad iyi-taɣeḍ awal, yerna ẓriɣ aț-țxedmeḍ nnig wayen i k-n-ssutreɣ.
Heggit-iyi taxxamt, axaṭer ssarameɣ ɣer Sidi Ṛebbi qṛib a-yi-n yerr ɣuṛ-wen akken i s- tessuturem kull-as di tẓallit-nwen.

name: Hebrews
chapters: Zik-nni, acḥal iberdan i d-ihdeṛ Sidi Ṛebbi seg yimi n lenbiya s țebcirat yemxalafen ;
ma deg ussan-agi yellan d ussan ineggura, yemmeslay-aɣ-d s Mmi-s, yerra kullec ger ifassen-is, yis i d-ixleq ddunit meṛṛa.

D nețța i d-isbeggnen ccbiha n tideț akk-d tmanegt tameqqrant n Sidi Ṛebbi akken tella, s tezmert n wawal-is i gbedd lsas n ddunit meṛṛa. Mi gessazdeg imdanen si ddnubat-nsen, yeṭṭef amkan n lḥekma deg igenwan ɣer tama tayeffust n Sidi Ṛebbi ;
yekka-d sennig n lmalayekkat, axaṭer Sidi Ṛebbi yefka-yas isem yugaren isem-nsent.
Anwa lmelk iwumi yenna Sidi Ṛebbi : Kečč d Mmi, d nekk i k-id-yefkan ɣer ddunit ass-a . Anwa lmelk i ɣef i d-yenna : Nekk ad iliɣ d Baba-s, nețța ad yili d Mm i.
Asmi i d-yefka amenzu ɣer ddunit yenna-d : L malayekkat meṛṛa n Sidi Ṛebbi ad seǧǧdent zdat-es a t-ɛebdent.
?ef wayagi, ilaq a neṭṭef deg uselmed n tideț i nesla, a t neḥrez iwakken ur nțeffeɣ ara i webrid.
Imeslayen i d-wwint lmalayekkat sɛan azal, kra n win ur neqbil ara, ur netbiɛ ara imeslayen-agi yuklal lɛiqab,
amek ara nemneɛ ma yella ur neḥsib ara leslak ameqqran yecban wagi ? Leslak-agi i d-ibecceṛ Ssid-nneɣ si tazwara, ɛawden-aɣ-t-id daɣen wid i s-yeslan.
Sidi Ṛebbi ibeggen-ed tideț n cchada-nsen s licaṛat d lbeṛhanat d waṭas n leɛǧayeb akk-d tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen, akken yella di lebɣi-ines.
Mačči i lmalayekkat iwumi yefka Sidi Ṛebbi lḥekma ɣef ddunit i d-iteddun i ɣef d-nețmeslay.
Yella win i d-icehden ɣef wayagi di tira iqedsen, yenna-d : D acu-t wemdan iwakken a t-id-temmektiḍ , a d-terreḍ ddehn-ik ɣuṛ-es ; d acu-t mmi-s n wemdan iwakken a d-telhiḍ yid-es ?
Terriḍ-t seddaw n lmalayekkat i kra n lweqt , mbeɛd tefkiḍ-as lqima d lɛezz,
terriḍ kullec seddaw iḍaṛṛen-is. Mi gerra Sidi Ṛebbi kullec seddaw iḍaṛṛen-is, yefka-yas ad iḥkem ɣef kullec ; ladɣa urɛad nwala tura yeḥkem ɣef kullec.

Lameɛna Ɛisa, win akken yerra Sidi Ṛebbi seddaw n lmalayekkat i kra n lweqt, nețwali-t tura di tmanegt-is yeččuṛ d lɛezz ɣef ddemma n leɛtab n lmut-is ; s ṛṛeḥma n Sidi Ṛebbi i gemmut ɣef yemdanen meṛṛa.

Sidi Ṛebbi i d-ixelqen kullec yerna kullec d ayla-s, yehwa-yas ad issiweḍ ccan n Ɛisa amsellek n yemdanen ɣer lekmal, mi t-id isɛedda si leɛtab ameqqran, iwakken a d-yawi aṭas n yemdanen ɣer lɛaḍima-s ;
axaṭer Sidna Ɛisa i gṣeffun si ddnub akk-d wid i gețwaṣeffan, yiwen i ten-id-ifkan. Daymi ur yessetḥa ara yis-sen, isemma-yasen « atmaten-is »
mi genna : A d beccṛeɣ isem-ik i watmaten-iw, a k-ḥemdeɣ di tlemmast n tejmaɛt n watmaten .
Ihi ay atmaten yețwaxtaṛen, a wid iwumi i d-yessawel Sidi Ṛebbi aț-țweṛtem tageldit n igenwan, sserset tamuɣli-nwen ɣef Ɛisa, lmuqeddem ameqqran i d-iceggeɛ Sidi Ṛebbi i ɣef nețcehhid.
Yexdem lebɣi n win i t-id iceggɛen am akken i gexdem Sidna Musa i wexxam n Sidi Ṛebbi.
?-țideț Sidna Ɛisa yesɛa ccan akteṛ n Sidna Musa, imi win yebnan axxam, d nețța i gesɛan ccan akteṛ n wexxam yebna.
Axaṭer yal axxam yella win i t-yebnan, ma d win i d-ixelqen kra yellan, d Sidi Ṛebbi.
Sidna Musa yexdem ayen i glaqen a t-yexdem, yella am uqeddac ɣef wexxam n Sidi Ṛebbi iwakken a d ibeggen ayen ara d-ițțubeccṛen sya ɣer zdat.
Ma d Lmasiḥ yexdem ayen i glaq a t-yexdem, yesbedd-it am Mmi-s, d aqeṛṛuy n wexxam-is ; d nukni i d axxam-is ma yella neṭṭef, neṣbeṛ yerna nețkel deg wayen i nessaram.
?ef wannect-a i d-yenna Ṛṛuḥ iqedsen : Ass-a ma yella teslam i taɣect n Sidi Ṛebbi,
ur sɣaṛayet ara ulawen-nwen am wasmi i jehlen lejdud-nwen m'akken i yi-sserfan deg unezṛuf
Skud mazal nezmer a nekcem ɣer westeɛfu i ɣ-yewɛed Sidi Ṛebbi, ilaq a naggad ur aɣ-ițfat ara lḥal, iwakken yiwen deg-wen ur s-yeqqaṛ ḍelmeɣ, iɛedda lweqt ur zmireɣ ara ad kecmeɣ.
Axaṭer lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ i ɣ-d ițțubeccṛen, d lexbaṛ-nni i d ițțubeccṛen i lejdud-nneɣ, lameɛna ur stenfɛen ara seg-s axaṭer mi s-slan ur t-qbilen ara.

Ma d nukni i t-iqeblen a nekcem ɣer westeɛfu-yagi i ɣef d-yenna Sidi Ṛebbi : Deg wurrif i deg lliɣ, gulleɣ ur kcimen asteɛfu-inu . Sidi Ṛebbi yenna-d akka ɣas akken ifuk lecɣal-is seg wasmi i gexleq ddunit,
akken yura di tira iqedsen ɣef wass wis sebɛa : Sidi Ṛebbi yesteɛfa deg wass wis sebɛa seg wayen akk yexdem .
Yura daɣen : D lmuḥal ad kecmen ɣer westeɛfu-inu.
Imezwura i geslan i lexbaṛ-agi n lxiṛ ur kcimen ara ɣer westeɛfu yagi axaṭer ur t-qbilen ara, meɛna yella wamek ara kecmen wiyaḍ.

Aṭas n leqṛun mbeɛd, Sidi Ṛebbi yemmeslay-ed ɣef wass nniḍen iwumi i gsemma « ass-a » mi d-yenna seg yimi n Sidna Dawed : ( am akken yura iwsawen ) Ass-a ma yella teslam i taɣect-is ur sɣaṛayet ara ulawen-nwen.
Lemmer nnbi Yacuɛa yessaweḍ lejdud-nneɣ ɣer wemkan n westeɛfu, tili Sidi Ṛebbi ur d-yețmeslay ara ɣef wass nniḍen n westeɛfu.
Yal lmuqeddem ameqqran yețwaxtaṛ-ed iwakken ad iqdec ɣef Sidi Ṛebbi ɣef ddemma n yemdanen, ad yețqeddim lewɛadi d iseflawen ɣef ddemma n ddnubat nsen.
Yezmer ad ifhem wid ur nessin ara akk-d wid iḍaɛen, imi ula d nețța s yiman-is ur yeǧhid ara, yezmer ad yeɣleḍ.
Ihi ɣef lǧehd-agi i t-ixuṣṣen i glaq ad yefk iseflawen ɣef yiman-is nețța akk-d yemdanen nniḍen ɣef ddemma n ddnubat-nsen.
Yiwen ur izmir ad yeṭṭef amkan n lmuqeddem ameqqran ma yella mačči d Sidi Ṛebbi i t-id-isbedden, am akken i gesbedd nnbi Haṛun.
Akka daɣen Lmasiḥ, mačči d nețța i gesbedden iman-is d lmuqeddem ameqqran lameɛna d Sidi Ṛebbi i t-isbedden mi s-yenna : Kečč d Mmi, d nekk i k-id-yefkan ɣer ddunit ass-a .
Yenna-yas daɣen : Sbeddeɣ-k aț-țiliḍ d lmuqeddem i dayem am akken i sbeddeɣ Malxisadeq.
Asm'akken yella Lmasiḥ di ddunit s ṣṣifa n wemdan, acḥal i gedɛa, acḥal i gḥellel s nnhati d imeṭṭawen Sidi Ṛebbi i gzemren a t-isellek si lmut. ?ef ddemma n ṭṭaɛa-ines, yețwaqbel.
?as akken d Mmi-s n Ṛebbi i gella, yelmed ṭṭaɛa s leɛtab i gɛeddan fell-as.
S wakka i gewweḍ ɣer tmanegt tameqqrant, yuɣal d abrid n leslak n dayem i wid akk i s-yețțaɣen awal.
Sidi Ṛebbi isbedd-it ad yili d lmuqeddem ameqqran am akken i t-yella Malxisadeq.
Nezmer a d-nernu aṭas ɣef wannect-agi meɛna d ayen i weɛṛen i wsefhem, axaṭer tweɛṛem i lefhama.
Ilaq acḥal ayagi segmi i tuɣalem d iselmaden, kunwi atan mazal teḥwaǧem win ara wen-islemden lumuṛ imezwura n wawal n Ṛebbi ; ur tezmirem ara i weɣṛum, mazal-ikkun teḥwaǧem ayefki.

Ur ilaq ara a neqqim kan deg wayen nelmed di tazwara ɣef wawal n Lmasiḥ. Ilaq-aɣ a neddu ɣer zdat a nesnekmal almud-nneɣ, mbla ma nɛawed-ed i lsas s wadda ɣef wayen yeɛnan : nndama ɣef lecɣal n diri i gețțawin ɣer lmut, liman di Sidi Ṛebbi,
